title: Context-Integrated Adversarial Learning for Predictive Modelling of Stock Price Dynamics
summary: It is a challenging task to forecast equity prices in fast moving financial markets as this becomes even more difficult when the predictive signal is based on non-homogeneous information channels. The classical statistical methods, especially the Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA) models, limit their analytical ability with the linear assumptions that prevent the modeling of complex temporal dynamics. In contrast, complex neural networks, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks, are also skilled at capturing sequential interaction effects; they however tend to collapse in the face of abrupt shifts in volatility and changing distributions. In this paper we introduce a context-sensitive adversarial learning model to predict equity prices in this work, which is synthesized distribution-based generative modelling with sentiment-based auxiliary information obtained through Natural Language Processing (NLP). The architecture uses adversarial training to model future price movements and incorporates contextual sentiment features derived using financial textual data. Through a collective utilization of quantitative market indicators along with the additional contextual cues, the framework hopes to enhance the reliability of forecasts during the periods of increased volatility and regime change. Empirical evaluation of a sample of U.S. equities testifies that the presented approach outperforms the traditional ARIMA and LSTM baselines in a range of measures of error. These findings imply that context-sensitive adversarial paradigm is an effective instrument of enhancing stock price prediction effectiveness in complex financial environments characterized by uncertainty and structural changes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种上下文敏感的对抗学习模型，结合基于分布的生成建模和通过NLP获得的情绪辅助信息，用于预测股票价格。在波动剧烈和制度变迁时期，该模型优于传统ARIMA和LSTM基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统ARIMA模型受线性假设限制，无法捕捉复杂的时间动态；而LSTM等神经网络在波动剧烈和分布变化时性能下降。现有方法难以处理基于非均匀信息渠道的预测信号，尤其是在高 volatility 和市场结构变化的环境下。
AI.method: 提出上下文敏感的对抗学习模型，融合了基于分布的生成建模和通过NLP从金融文本数据中提取的情绪特征。采用对抗训练机制来建模未来价格走势，并整合量化市场指标与上下文情绪线索。
AI.result: 在美国股票样本上的实证评估表明，该方法在多种误差指标上优于传统的ARIMA和LSTM基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 上下文敏感的对抗范式是增强股票价格预测的有效工具，特别适用于充满不确定性和结构性变化的复杂金融环境。

title: Beyond Picking Winners: Correlation-Driven Tail Risk in Venture Capital Portfolio Construction
summary: We propose a Gaussian-copula-based framework that learns deal-level dependence directly from observed joint success frequencies across founder, geography, and market attributes. Holding marginal deal success probabilities fixed, deal-level correlation preserves expected portfolio outcomes but shifts the portfolio distribution toward heavier right tails and higher kurtosis. In portfolio simulations, correlation reduces the probability of modest success counts while sharply amplifying extreme upside outcomes, especially in structurally concentrated portfolios. Our findings suggest that extreme venture capital outcomes may partly reflect correlation-induced tail amplification rather than solely higher average deal quality, with potential implications for portfolio construction and risk management. We note that the observed dataset reflects selected deals with observable outcomes, which inflates apparent success rates relative to the true population base rate; however, the core finding that correlation reshapes the distributional shape while leaving the mean unchanged is structurally robust to the level of marginal success probabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于高斯Copula的框架，从创业者、地理和市场属性中学习交易层面的依赖关系。研究发现，在保持边际成功率不变的情况下，交易层面的相关性会保留期望投资组合收益，但使分布呈现更重的右尾和更高的峰度，从而放大极端上行结果，暗示风投极端回报部分源于相关性导致的尾部放大效应。
AI.motivation: 传统风投模型通常假设交易间相互独立，忽略了投资组合内部交易间的相关性，难以解释实际中观察到的极端回报现象。
AI.method: 采用高斯Copula框架，从联合成功频率中学习交易间依赖关系，在固定边际成功概率下进行投资组合模拟。
AI.result: 相关性降低中等成功次数的概率，同时显著放大极端上行结果，尤其在结构性集中的投资组合中效果更明显。
AI.conclusion: 风投极端回报可能部分源于相关性导致的尾部放大，而非仅由更高的平均交易质量驱动，这对投资组合构建和风险管理具有启示意义。

title: Non-unique time and market incompleteness
summary: Financial markets are often modelled as if time were unique and continuous across assets and markets. Financial markets are however asynchronous, order flow is event-driven, and waiting times between events are often random. Many of the most influential formulations of financial market models presuppose a unique global calendar time and advocate for this or that preferred single latent continuous-time price system. Here we critically contrast these assumptions with event-time, renewal, point-process, and order-flow descriptions. We revisit no-arbitrage, no-dynamic-arbitrage, and risk-neutral option pricing in settings where the market is represented as a discrete event system and where the continuum limit of a discrete-time random walk need not be unique. The central suggestion is then that such non-uniqueness points to a more foundational form of market incompleteness than is usually emphasized. This highlights the importance of operational time at the level of decision making but reminds market practitioners that managing risk itself often requires reconciling operational time with a global calendar time. At these longer time scales forms of effective or average completeness may still emerge at lower frequencies and remain useful for portfolio construction and risk management, even if high-frequency hedging and execution expose a clock mismatch between trading, pricing, and longer-horizon allocation.

AI.tldr: 本文批评了传统金融模型中“唯一全局日历时间”的假设，指出金融市场本质上是异步的、事件驱动的。作者提出用事件时间、更新过程、点过程等框架替代连续时间模型，并论证这种非唯一性揭示了比传统认识更根本的市场不完全性，同时讨论了操作时间与日历时间在风险管理和投资组合构建中的协调问题。
AI.motivation: 挑战金融模型中普遍假设的“唯一全局连续时间”框架，指出金融市场实际上是异步、事件驱动的，等待时间具有随机性，因此需要重新审视无套利、无动态套利和风险中性定价等核心概念。
AI.method: 采用批判性对比分析，将传统连续时间模型与事件时间、更新过程、点过程、订单流等离散事件系统描述进行对比，重新审视无套利条件和期权定价在离散事件框架下的含义。
AI.result: 发现离散事件系统中的连续极限不唯一，这指向一种比传统认识更根本的市场不完全性；同时指出在低频尺度下，有效或平均完备性仍然可以出现，有助于组合构建和风险管理。
AI.conclusion: 操作时间在决策层面至关重要，但风险管理需要协调操作时间与全局日历时间；高频交易和执行暴露了交易、定价与长期配置之间的时钟错配，而低频下仍可恢复有效的完备性。

title: Representation Homogeneity and Systemic Instability in AI-Dominated Financial Markets: A Structural Approach
summary: This paper investigates how similarity in the informational representation of market states among Artificial Intelligence (AI) trading agents can generate systemic instability in financial markets. We construct a structural multi-agent market model calibrated using high-frequency microstructural moments. AI agents are modeled through a two-layer decision architecture consisting of a nonlinear representation layer and an adaptive linear readout layer. The representation layer maps raw market states into high-dimensional feature vectors, while the readout layer generates return forecasts that feed into a risk-controlled trading rule. This representation-based microfoundation separates two objects that are often conflated in the literature: representation homogeneity (the degree to which agents encode market states into similar feature spaces) and forecast overlap (the degree to which agents produce similar return predictions). We show theoretically that these two concepts are related but not equivalent, and that representation homogeneity can compress the effective space of forecast disagreement under stress even when predictions appear diverse in normal times. Through controlled factorial experiments that vary representation homogeneity while conditioning on alternative risk-aversion and learning-rate distributions, we hypothesize that increasing representation similarity amplifies synchronization in beliefs and positions, leading to volatility clustering, liquidity stress, and elevated tail risk. Our structural mechanisms suggest that low perceived volatility regimes can endogenously accumulate hidden leverage through position stickiness, which subsequently collapses when shocks trigger synchronized deleveraging. The results provide a structural foundation for macroprudential policies aimed at monitoring and preserving diversity in how AI systems represent and process market information.

AI.tldr: 本文研究AI交易智能体之间市场状态信息表征的相似性如何引发金融市场的系统性不稳定，通过构建结构化的多智能体市场模型，发现表征同质化会压缩压力状态下的预测分歧空间，导致信念和头寸同步化，从而引发波动率聚集、流动性压力和尾部风险上升。
AI.motivation: 探究AI交易智能体在信息表征层面的相似性是否以及如何成为金融市场系统性不稳定的根源，填补现有文献中表征同质性与预测重叠这两个概念混淆的空白。
AI.method: 构建结构化多智能体市场模型，使用高频微观结构矩进行校准；AI智能体采用双层决策架构（非线性表征层+自适应线性读出层）；通过控制因子实验，在给定风险厌恶和学习率分布条件下，变化表征同质性水平进行系统分析。
AI.result: 理论上证明表征同质性与预测重叠相关但不等价；表征同质性会压缩压力状态下的有效预测分歧空间；表征相似性放大信念和头寸同步化，导致波动率聚集、流动性压力和尾部风险上升；低感知波动率机制通过头寸粘性内生积累隐藏杠杆，在冲击触发同步去杠杆时崩溃。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为宏观审慎政策提供了结构性基础，建议监测和保持AI系统在表征和处理市场信息方式上的多样性，以防止系统性风险积聚。

title: Accelerating Reinforcement Learning for Wind Farm Control via Expert Demonstrations
comment: Submitted to Journal of Physics: Conference Series (Torque 2026). This is the Accepted Manuscript version of an article accepted for publication in Journal of Physics: Conference Series. IOP Publishing Ltd is not responsible for any errors or omissions in this version of the manuscript or any version derived from it. This Accepted Manuscript is published under a CC BY licence
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers a promising approach for adaptive wind farm flow control, yet its practical deployment is hindered by slow training convergence and poor initial performance, factors that could translate to years of reduced power output if an untrained agent were deployed directly. This work investigates whether domain knowledge from steady-state wake models can accelerate RL training and improve initial controller performance. We propose a pretraining methodology in which expert demonstrations are generated by deploying a PyWake-based steady-state optimizer within a dynamic wake simulation (WindGym), then used to initialize both the actor and critic networks of a Soft Actor-Critic agent via behavior cloning. Experiments on a 2x2 wind farm show that pretraining eliminates the costly initial learning phase: while an untrained agent underperforms the greedy zero-yaw baseline by approximately 12%, pretraining raises initial performance to near-baseline levels. During online fine-tuning, all configurations converge within 250,000 environment steps to achieve similar performance, ultimately exceeding that of a lookup-table controller, which reaches approximately 7% power gain after 500,000 steps.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种预训练方法，利用稳态尾流模型生成专家演示，通过行为克隆初始化SAC智能体的actor和critic网络，消除了强化学习在风电场流动控制中的初始低效阶段，使初始性能接近贪婪基线水平。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在自适应风电场流动控制中训练收敛慢、初始性能差，直接部署未经训练的智能体会导致多年电力产出损失。
AI.method: 使用PyWake稳态优化器在动态尾流模拟(WindGym)中生成专家演示，通过行为克隆初始化Soft Actor-Critic智能体的actor和critic网络。
AI.result: 在2x2风电场实验中，预训练消除了初始学习阶段：未训练智能体比贪婪零偏航基线低约12%，而预训练将初始性能提升至接近基线水平；在线微调中所有配置在25万步内收敛，最终超过查找表控制器（50万步后约7%功率增益）。
AI.conclusion: 基于稳态尾流模型的预训练能有效加速RL训练并提升初始控制器性能，为强化学习在实际风电场中的部署提供了可行方案。

title: Multiplicative Contractions, Additive Recoveries: Functional-Form Restrictions on Risk Exposure Dynamics
summary:
We test a regime-conditional functional-form restriction on aggregate risk-exposure dynamics implied by VaR-constrained intermediary models: exposures contract multiplicatively when capital constraints bind and grow additively (level-independent) when slack. The contraction half follows from binding VaR constraints (Brunnermeier and Pedersen 2009; Adrian and Shin 2010; He and Krishnamurthy 2013). The additive-rebuild prediction is derived under constant-rate capital replenishment; we test the joint restriction on FINRA monthly margin debt (1997-2026).
  Two findings. First, regime-interacted regression of detrended margin growth on lagged level (T=350 months) yields calm slope -0.040 (p=0.082, additive) and stress slope -0.205 (p<0.001, multiplicative); Wald test on regime x level interaction rejects equal dependence (p=0.0016). Second, the restriction implies drawdown-recovery duration ratio increases with crash depth. On 73 S&P 500 episodes (1950-2026), Cox model gives depth coefficient -13.75 (p<10^{-7}): 75% lower recovery hazard per 10pp deeper drawdown. Continuous-depth regression yields beta=1.22 (p=0.047); beta=1.59 (p<0.001) excluding 1980-82 Volcker. Median duration ratio for crashes >30% is 3.1x; replicates across eight other equity indices. Calibrated Heston, Markov-switching, and block bootstrap nulls match price-level duration asymmetry but lack an exposure state variable, so cannot speak to the regime-conditional flip on direct exposures.
  We do not claim the exposure test identifies the intermediary mechanism: FINRA margin debt is a noisy proxy. We claim only that the regime-conditional functional form is a sharper target than return-level moments alone, and confirming it on margin debt is consistent with -- not proof of -- the constrained-intermediary mechanism. A companion test on CFTC weekly speculative positioning is left for future work (Sections 5.2 and F).

AI.tldr: 本文检验了VaR约束中介模型隐含的体制条件性风险暴露函数形式：约束时暴露乘性收缩（斜率-0.205），宽松时加性增长（斜率-0.040）。使用FINRA月度保证金债务数据（1997-2026, T=350）和S&P 500 73次回撤事件（1950-2026），证实了深度与恢复时长比率的关系（深度系数-13.75, p<10^{-7}）。作者不声称识别了中介机制，仅表明体制条件性函数形式比单纯收益矩更精确。
AI.motivation: 现有文献多关注收益层面的风险暴露度量，但缺乏对VaR约束中介模型中风险暴露动态的体制条件性函数形式的直接检验。作者旨在填补这一空白，提供比单纯收益矩更精确的检验目标。
AI.method: 使用FINRA月度保证金债务数据（1997-2026, T=350个月），进行体制交互回归检验暴露的乘性收缩与加性增长。使用Cox比例风险模型分析S&P 500 73次回撤事件（1950-2026），检验回撤深度与恢复时长的关系。进行校准Heston、马尔可夫转换和块自助法作为对照。
AI.result: 平静期斜率-0.040（p=0.082），压力期斜率-0.205（p<0.001），Wald检验p=0.0016。Cox模型深度系数-13.75（p<10^{-7}），深度每增加10pp恢复风险降低75%。>30%崩溃的中位持续时间比为3.1倍。替代模型无法复制体制条件性暴露反转。
AI.conclusion: 体制条件性函数形式比收益矩更精确的检验目标；保证金债务数据与约束中介机制一致但不构成证明；CFTC投机性持仓测试留待未来工作。

title: Stacked Triple Differences
comment: Main text is 40 pages with 6 pages of figures
summary: Triple differences (DDD) is a workhorse quasi-experimental design in applied economics. But, under staggered adoption, its conventional three-way fixed-effects (3WFE) implementation inherits the forbidden-comparison and interpretation issues now well understood in the difference-in-differences literature. To resolve these issues, I introduce stacked DDD. I extend the stacked difference-in-differences approach to the DDD setting by creating self-contained stacks, each consisting of four cells over an event window: treated and clean comparison cohorts, each with treatment-eligible and treatment-ineligible units. Appending these stacks yields a unified dataset for estimating treatment effects without making forbidden comparisons. I prove that, at each post-treatment event-time, a linear regression with fully saturated fixed-effects applied to the stacked dataset identifies a strictly positive, cell-size-weighted average of stack-level conditional average treatment effects, with stack weights proportional to stack-level cell sizes. Building on this characterization, I outline alternative weighting schemes that recover distinct, transparent causal estimands with clear interpretations. Stacked DDD complements recent GMM and imputation-based frameworks by trading efficiency for regression-based transparency, pairwise (rather than global) parallel trends, and direct control over aggregation weights. I provide two empirical illustrations where stacked DDD yields substantially different quantitative conclusions compared to existing procedures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出堆叠三重差分法（Stacked DDD），解决传统三重差分在 staggered adoption 设置下存在的 forbidden comparison 和解释问题，通过构建自包含的四单元堆叠结构，实现了回归透明的因果识别。
AI.motivation: 传统三重差分（DDD）在 staggered adoption 情境下，其三方固定效应（3WFE）估计存在 forbidden comparison 和解释歧义问题（类似于 DID 文献中已充分认识的缺陷），需要加以修正。
AI.method: 扩展堆叠 DID 方法至 DDD 场景：构建自包含的堆叠（stack），每个 stack 包含四类单元（处理组和清洁对照组，各含 eligible 和 ineligible 单位）；将多个 stack 拼接成统一数据集进行回归，避免 forbidden comparison；通过线性回归与饱和固定效应识别加权平均处理效应。
AI.result: 证明在饱和固定效应回归下，堆叠 DDD 识别出严格正的、按单元格规模加权的 stack 级条件平均处理效应；提出了替代加权方案以获得更透明的因果估计量；两个实证案例显示堆叠 DDD 与传统方法结论存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠 DDD 以效率换取回归透明度、成对平行趋势假设（而非全局平行趋势）以及对聚合权重的直接控制，是 GMM 和插值框架的有益补充。

title: MarketBench: Evaluating AI Agents as Market Participants
summary: Markets are a promising way to coordinate AI agent activity for similar reasons to those used to justify markets more broadly. In order to effectively participate in markets, agents need to have informative signals of their own ability to successfully complete a task and the cost of doing so. We propose MarketBench, a benchmark for assessing whether AI agents have these capabilities. We use a 93-task subset of SWE-bench Lite, a software engineering benchmark, with six recently released LLMs as a demonstration. These LLMs are miscalibrated on both success probability and token usage, and auctions built from these self-reports diverge from a full-information allocation. A follow-up intervention where we add information about capabilities from prior experiments to the context improves calibration, but only modestly narrows the gap to a full-information benchmark. We also document the performance of a market-based scaffolding with these LLMs. Our results point to self-assessment as a key bottleneck for market-style coordination of AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MarketBench基准，用于评估AI智能体在市场中自我评估能力（成功概率和成本估算）的校准程度。通过对SWE-bench Lite子集和六种LLM的测试，发现这些模型的自我报告存在严重校准偏差，导致基于市场的分配偏离最优方案。即使加入历史信息干预，校准改善也有限，表明自我评估是AI智能体市场协调的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 市场机制有望协调AI智能体的活动，但智能体需要具备准确的自我评估能力（包括任务成功概率和成本信号）才能有效参与市场。目前缺乏系统评估AI智能体这些能力的基准，因此作者提出MarketBench来填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用SWE-bench Lite中的93个任务作为子集，结合六种最新发布的LLM进行实验。通过比较LLM自我报告的成功概率和token使用量与实际情况的差异，评估校准程度。进一步设计干预实验，在上下文中加入历史实验的能力信息，观察校准改善效果，并记录了基于市场的脚手架构建表现。
AI.result: 六种LLM在成功概率和token使用量两个维度上均存在严重的校准偏差。基于这些自我报告构建的拍卖市场分配与完全信息下的最优分配存在显著差异。加入历史信息干预后校准有所改善，但与完全信息基准之间的差距缩小幅度有限。
AI.conclusion: 自我评估能力是AI智能体实现市场式协调的关键瓶颈，当前LLM在这方面的表现不足以支撑有效的市场参与，亟需进一步提升。

title: Implicit Humanization in Everyday LLM Moral Judgments
summary: Recent adoption of conversational information systems has expanded the scope of user queries to include complex tasks such as personal advice-seeking. However, we identify a specific type of sought advice-a request for a moral judgment (i.e. "who was wrong?") in a social conflict-as an implicitly humanizing query which carries potentially harmful anthropomorphic projections. In this study, we examine the reinforcement of these assumptions in the responses of four major general-purpose LLMs through the use of linguistic, behavioral, and cognitive anthropomorphic cues. We also contribute a novel dataset of simulated user queries for moral judgments. We find current LLM system responses reinforce implicit humanization in queries, potentially exacerbating risks like overreliance or misplaced trust. We call for future work to expand the understanding of anthropomorphism to include implicit userside humanization and to design solutions that address user needs while correcting misaligned expectations of model capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大语言模型（LLM）在回应道德判断请求时会强化用户的拟人化假设，通过语言、行为和认知层面的拟人化线索，可能加剧过度依赖和信任错位等风险。
AI.motivation: 对话式信息系统的普及使用户查询扩展到寻求个人建议等复杂任务。作者识别出一类特殊的建议请求——社交冲突中的道德判断（"谁错了？"）——本质上是一种隐含拟人化的查询，可能带来有害的拟人化投射。需要研究LLM如何回应这类查询。
AI.method: 分析了四个主流通用LLM对道德判断请求的回应，从语言、行为和认知三个维度的拟人化线索进行考察。同时构建了一个模拟用户道德判断查询的新数据集。
AI.result: 当前LLM系统会强化查询中隐含的拟人化假设，可能加剧过度依赖或信任错位等风险。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁未来工作扩展对拟人化的理解，纳入用户侧的隐含拟人化因素，并设计既能满足用户需求又能纠正对模型能力不切实际期望的解决方案。

title: An Explicit Solution to Black-Scholes Implied Volatility
summary: This paper identifies what appears to be the first explicit formula for Black-Scholes implied volatility, resolving a 50-year-old problem in option pricing. The key observation is that the call price can be written as a survival probability of an inverse Gaussian distribution. Inverting this identity expresses implied volatility directly through the corresponding quantile function. The formula uses only observable option inputs and requires no initial guess, iterative inversion, approximation, asymptotic expansion, or infinite series. Numerical tests recover implied volatility to machine precision and show the formula to be about 3.4 times faster than a current state-of-the-art reference benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Black-Scholes隐含波动率的首个显式公式，解决了期权定价领域50年未决问题。通过将看涨期权价格表示为逆高斯分布的生存概率，直接利用分位数函数反演出隐含波动率，无需初始猜测、迭代、近似或级数展开，数值测试达到机器精度且速度快3.4倍。
AI.motivation: 解决Black-Scholes隐含波动率长期缺乏显式解析公式的问题，现有方法依赖数值迭代或近似，效率与精度受限。
AI.method: 将看涨期权价格重新表述为逆高斯分布的生存概率，通过反演该恒等式，利用观测到的期权输入数据直接计算分位数函数，从而得到隐含波动率的显式表达式。
AI.result: 数值测试表明，该公式能达到机器精度，且计算速度比现有最先进基准方法快约3.4倍。
AI.conclusion: 该显式公式终结了50年来隐含波动率无闭式解的局面，为期权定价和风险管理提供了更高效、精确的工具。

title: Machine Learning Forecasts of Asymmetric Betas Using Firm-Specific Information
summary: We demonstrate that machine learning methods provide a powerful framework for modelling conditional asymmetric risk. Using a large cross-section of US stocks and a comprehensive set of firm characteristics, we show that allowing for nonlinearities significantly increases the out-of-sample performance across a wide range of asymmetric beta measures and forecasting horizons. Trading frictions, followed by characteristics related to intangibles, momentum and growth, emerge as the most important drivers of future risk dynamics. Reconstructing CAPM beta from forecasts of asymmetric beta components indicates that a more granular decomposition of systematic risk yields a more accurate representation of market beta. We also find that incorporating conditional beta forecasts into discounted cash flow models that account for the term structure of betas enhances equity valuation accuracy. Finally, we show that the statistical outperformance of conditional betas translates into economically significant benefits for market-neutral portfolio investors.

AI.tldr: 本文证明机器学习方法能有效建模条件非对称风险。利用美国股票数据，发现允许非线性显著提升非对称贝塔的预测表现。交易摩擦、无形资产、动量与增长特征是关键驱动因素。条件贝塔预测能改进CAPM贝塔估计、提升股权估值精度，并为市场中性投资者带来显著经济效益。
AI.motivation: 现有风险模型通常假设对称风险或线性关系，忽略了非对称风险（如下行贝塔）的重要性。作者旨在利用机器学习方法捕捉非线性关系，更准确地建模和预测条件非对称风险。
AI.method: 使用多种机器学习模型（允许非线性），基于大量美国股票和广泛的公司特征，对多种非对称贝塔指标进行条件预测；通过特征重要性分析识别关键驱动因素；将条件贝塔预测融入CAPM贝塔重构和贴现现金流模型。
AI.result: 机器学习方法显著提升非对称贝塔的样本外预测性能；交易摩擦、无形资产、动量与增长特征是主要驱动因素；重构的CAPM贝塔更准确；融入条件贝塔的估值模型精度提高；统计优势转化为市场中性投资者的经济收益。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习为建模非对称风险提供了强大框架，更细致的系统风险分解能更准确地表征市场贝塔，且具有实际投资价值。

title: The Randomness Floor: Measuring Intrinsic Non-Randomness in Language Model Token Distributions
summary: Language models cannot be random. This paper introduces Entropic Deviation (ED), the normalised KL divergence between a model's token distribution and the uniform distribution, and measures it systematically across 31,200 generations spanning seven models, two architectures (transformer and state space), nine prompt categories, three temperatures, and five languages. Under semantically neutral prompts (empty strings, random characters, nonsense syllables) transformers still exhibit ED of approximately 0.30, meaning that 88-93% of the non-randomness observed under semantic prompts is intrinsic to the learned weights rather than induced by context. Three transformer families (Gemma, Llama, Qwen) converge on nearly identical ED values despite different training data and vocabularies. A state space model (Mamba2) reveals a qualitatively different regime: twice the ED, three times lower within-sequence variance, and massive sensitivity to temperature (r = -0.78) where transformers are nearly immune (r < 0.05). Cross-lingual experiments with Qwen-32B show a stable gradient across five languages (English, Japanese, Chinese, Polish, Arabic) that does not correlate with token fertility and persists when two languages sharing an identical tokeniser subset are compared. These findings establish a structural lower bound on randomness in pretrained language models, characterise how this bound differs across architectures, and demonstrate that language itself modulates the bound independently of tokenisation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出熵偏差（ED）量化语言模型中的非随机性，发现Transformer在语义中性提示下仍有约0.30的ED，88-93%的非随机性来自权重本身而非上下文；不同Transformer系列ED值几乎一致，而状态空间模型（Mamba2）表现完全不同，且语言本身会独立调节这一边界。
AI.motivation: 语言模型不能是完全随机的，因此需要量化其内在的、与上下文无关的结构性非随机性下限，并探究不同架构、温度、语言下该特性的差异。
AI.method: 提出熵偏差（ED），即模型词分布与均匀分布之间的归一化KL散度；在31,200个生成样本上，对7个模型、2种架构（Transformer与状态空间模型）、9类提示、3种温度、5种语言进行系统测量。
AI.result: Transformer在语义中性提示下ED≈0.30，88-93%的非随机性来自权重；不同Transformer家族ED值几乎相同；Mamba2的ED是Transformer的两倍，序列内方差低三倍，温度敏感性极高（r=-0.78），而Transformer几乎不受温度影响（r<0.05）；跨语言实验显示稳定梯度，且与词元繁殖率无关。
AI.conclusion: 预训练语言模型存在结构性的非随机性下限，该下限在不同架构间存在本质差异，且语言本身会独立于词元化机制调节该下限。

title: Rethinking Trust Region Bayesian Optimization in High Dimensions
summary: Trust Region Bayesian Optimization (TuRBO) is an effective strategy for alleviating the curse of dimensionality in high-dimensional black-box optimization. However, inappropriate lengthscale design can cause the local Gaussian process (GP) model within the trust region to degenerate, leading to suboptimal performance in high dimensions. In this work, we show that TuRBO's local GP may remain either excessively complex or overly simple as the dimension $D$ and trust region side length $L$ vary. To address this issue, we propose a straightforward variant, AdaScale-TuRBO, which scales the GP lengthscale with both the problem dimension and trust region size, thereby preserving kernel geometry and maintaining consistent prior complexity. Empirically, we show that AdaScale-TuRBO can robustly outperform standard TuRBO and other popular high-dimensional BO methods on synthetic benchmarks and real-world trajectory planning tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出AdaScale-TuRBO，通过根据问题维度和信任区域大小缩放GP长度尺度，解决了TuRBO在高维优化中因长度尺度设计不当导致的GP模型退化问题，在合成基准和轨迹规划任务上表现优于标准TuRBO及其他高维BO方法。
AI.motivation: TuRBO在高维黑箱优化中，信任区域内局部GP模型的长度尺度设计不当会导致模型退化——在维度D和信任区域边长L变化时，GP要么过于复杂要么过于简单，从而影响优化性能。
AI.method: 提出AdaScale-TuRBO，核心思路是让GP长度尺度同时随问题维度D和信任区域大小L进行缩放，从而保持核函数的几何结构并维持一致先验复杂度。
AI.result: 在合成基准测试和实际轨迹规划任务中，AdaScale-TuRBO稳健地优于标准TuRBO及其他主流高维贝叶斯优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 合理的长度尺度缩放策略对于高维信任区域贝叶斯优化至关重要，AdaScale-TuRBO提供了一种简单有效的改进方案。

title: Financial Market as a Self-Organized Ecosystem: Simulation via Learning with Heterogeneous Preferences
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2511.05207
summary: Agent-based models provide a constructive approach to studying emergent dynamics in life-like systems composed of interacting, adaptive agents. Financial markets serve as a canonical example of such systems, where collective price dynamics arise from individual decision-making. In this modeling tradition, investor behavior has typically been captured by two distinct mechanisms -- learning and heterogeneous preferences -- which have been explored as separate paradigms in prior studies. However, the impact of their joint modeling on the resulting collective dynamics remains largely unexplored. We develop a multi-agent reinforcement learning framework in which agents endowed with heterogeneous risk aversion, time discounting, and information access learn trading strategies interactively within an artificial market. The experiment reveals that (i) learning under heterogeneous preferences drives agents to develop functionally differentiated strategies through interaction, rather than trait-specific rules, resulting in role specialization, and (ii) the interactions by the differentiated agents are essential for the emergence of realistic market dynamics such as fat-tailed price fluctuations and volatility clustering. Overall, this study demonstrates that the joint design of heterogeneous preferences and learning mechanisms enables the synthesis of an artificial market in which adaptive interactions drive the self-organization of a market ecology, providing a computational realization of the Adaptive Market Hypothesis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多智能体强化学习框架，赋予智能体异质性风险偏好、时间贴现和信息获取能力，让他们在人工市场中交互学习交易策略。研究发现：(1)异质性偏好下的学习促使智能体在交互中形成功能分化的策略专业化，而非基于特质的固定规则；(2)差异化智能体的交互对涌现厚尾波动和波动聚类等真实市场动态至关重要。该研究实现了自适应市场假说的计算模型。
AI.motivation: 以往研究将投资者行为中的学习机制和异质性偏好作为两个独立的范式分别探讨，但二者联合建模对集体动态的影响尚未被探索。本文旨在弥合这一空白，探究学习与异质性偏好共同作用如何塑造市场涌现行为。
AI.method: 开发一个多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架，智能体被赋予异质性风险厌恶、时间贴现和信息获取能力，在人工市场中交互式学习交易策略，通过联合建模学习机制和异质性偏好来观察涌现动态。
AI.result: (1)异质性偏好下的学习导致智能体发展出功能分化的策略，而非特质特定的规则，形成角色专业化；(2)分化的智能体之间的交互对于涌现厚尾价格波动和波动聚类等真实市场动态至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 异质性偏好与学习机制的联合设计能够合成一个人工市场，其中适应性交互驱动市场生态的自组织，为自适应市场假说提供了计算实现。

title: Sliced Wasserstein Steering between Gaussian Measures
comment: Accepted at the European Control Conference 2026
summary: Optimal transport with quadratic cost provides a geometric framework for steering an ensemble, modeled by a probability law, with minimal effort. Yet ambient-space formulations become unwieldy in high dimensions, and sensing or actuation in practice often reveals only linear views of the state -- camera silhouettes, LiDAR beams, tomographic slices. We develop a sliced feedback controller for distribution steering: the evolving law is projected onto one-dimensional directions on the sphere, the optimal one-dimensional velocity is synthesized in each projection, and these velocities are averaged to produce a feedback control in the ambient space. The construction reduces to the Benamou--Brenier problem in one dimension. In addition, it is invariant under orthogonal transforms, nonexpansive under projections, and well posed on $\mathcal{P}_2(\mathbb{R}^n)$. Computation proceeds by sampling directions on the sphere and solving independent one-dimensional subproblems, yielding a scalable method aligned with partial observations. In the Gaussian setting, we show that the developed sliced controller steers the law to the prescribed target. Furthermore, we derive an identity relating the energy consumption incurred by the controller to the sliced Wasserstein distance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种切片反馈控制器，通过将高维分布投影到一维方向、合成最优一维速度并平均回原空间，实现了基于二次成本最优传输的分布式操控，该方法可扩展、支持部分观测，并在高斯设定下证明了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 高维空间中基于二次成本最优传输的分布操控计算复杂，且实际中的传感与执行往往只能获得状态的线性投影（如相机轮廓、激光雷达波束、断层扫描切片），亟需一种可扩展且与部分观测兼容的方法。
AI.method: 将演化分布投影到球面上的多个一维方向，在每个投影上求解一维Benamou–Brenier问题得到最优速度，再将所有一维速度平均以构建原空间中的反馈控制律。
AI.result: 该方法在正交变换下不变、在投影下非扩张、在$\mathcal{P}_2(\mathbb{R}^n)$上适定；通过采样方向并独立求解一维子问题实现可扩展计算；在高斯设定下可确保分布导向目标，并导出了控制器能耗与切片Wasserstein距离之间的恒等式。
AI.conclusion: 提出的切片反馈控制器为高维分布操控提供了一种可扩展、与部分观测兼容的实用方案，兼具理论优美性与计算可行性。

title: An Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Method for General Aviation Aircraft Based on Multi-Fidelity Digital Twin and FMEA Knowledge Enhancement
summary: Fault diagnosis of general aviation aircraft faces challenges including scarce real fault data, diverse fault types, and weak fault signatures. This paper proposes an intelligent fault diagnosis framework based on multi-fidelity digital twin, integrating four modules: high-fidelity flight dynamics simulation, FMEA-driven fault injection, multi-fidelity residual feature extraction, and large language model (LLM)-enhanced interpretable report generation. A digital twin is constructed using the JSBSim six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) flight dynamics engine, generating 23-channel engine health monitoring data via semi-empirical sensor synthesis equations. A three-layer fault injection engine based on failure mode and effects analysis (FMEA) models the physical causal propagation of 19 engine fault types. A multi-fidelity residual computation framework comprising paired-mirror residuals and GRU surrogate prediction residuals is proposed: the high-fidelity path obtains clean fault deviation signals using nominal mirror trajectories with identical initial conditions, while the low-fidelity path achieves online real-time residual computation through a multi-step prediction GRU surrogate model. A 1D-CNN classifier performs end-to-end diagnosis of 20 fault classes. An LLM diagnostic report engine enhanced with FMEA knowledge fuses classification results, residual evidence, and domain causal knowledge to generate interpretable natural language reports. Experiments show the paired-mirror residual scheme achieves a Macro-F1 of 96.2% on the 20-class task, while the GRU surrogate scheme achieves 4.3x inference acceleration at only 0.6% performance cost. Comparison across 24 schemes reveals that residual feature quality contributes approximately 5x more to diagnostic performance than classifier architecture, establishing the "residual quality first" design principle.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多保真数字孪生的通用航空飞机智能故障诊断框架，通过高保真飞行仿真、FMEA驱动的故障注入、多保真残差特征提取及LLM增强的可解释报告生成四个模块，在20类故障诊断任务中达到96.2%的Macro-F1，并实现4.3倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: 通用航空飞机故障诊断面临真实故障数据稀缺、故障类型多样、故障信号微弱三大挑战，现有方法难以兼顾诊断精度与实时性。
AI.method: 构建JSBSim六自由度数字孪生体生成23通道监测数据；设计基于FMEA的三层故障注入引擎模拟19种故障的物理因果传播；提出配对镜像残差与GRU代理预测残差构成的多保真残差计算框架；利用1D-CNN进行20类故障端到端诊断；结合FMEA知识的LLM诊断报告引擎生成可解释自然语言报告。
AI.result: 配对镜像残差方案在20类任务上达到96.2% Macro-F1；GRU代理方案实现4.3倍推理加速，仅损失0.6%性能；残差特征质量对诊断性能的贡献约是分类器架构的5倍。
AI.conclusion: 验证了"残差质量优先"的设计原则，多保真数字孪生框架能有效解决通用航空故障诊断中的数据稀缺与实时性矛盾，LLM增强模块提升了诊断的可解释性。

title: The Spectral Lifecycle of Transformer Training: Transient Compression Waves, Persistent Spectral Gradients, and the Q/K--V Asymmetry
summary: We present the first systematic study of weight matrix singular value spectra \emph{during} transformer pretraining, tracking full SVD decompositions of every weight matrix at 25-step intervals across three model scales (30M--285M parameters). We discover three phenomena: \textbf{(1)~Transient Compression Waves:} stable rank compression propagates as a traveling wave from early to late layers, creating a dramatic gradient that peaks early then \emph{reverses} -- late layers eventually over-compress past early layers. \textbf{(2)~Persistent Spectral Gradients:} the power-law exponent~$α$ develops a permanent depth gradient forming a non-monotonic inverted-U in deeper models, with peaks shifting toward earlier layers as depth increases. \textbf{(3)~Q/K--V Functional Asymmetry:} value/output projections compress uniformly while query/key projections carry the full depth-dependent dynamics. The dissociation between transient compression and persistent spectral shape reveals that \emph{rank and spectral shape encode fundamentally different information about training}. We formalize this as a two-timescale dynamical model and derive scaling laws ($Δα\propto L^{0.26}$, $R^2{=}0.99$). We validate on nine models across three families (custom, GPT-2, Pythia; 30M--1B parameters; 8--36 layers), demonstrate that $α$ predicts layer importance ($ρ{=}0.69$--$0.84$, $p{<}0.02$), and show that spectral-guided pruning outperforms Last-N heuristics by $1.1{\times}$--$3.6{\times}$ across seven models in two families (GPT-2 124M--774M, Pythia 160M--1B), with worst-vs-best gaps up to $23.7{\times}$ confirming the causal role of spectral structure.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了Transformer预训练过程中所有权重矩阵的奇异值谱动态变化，发现了三种新现象：瞬态压缩波、持续谱梯度和Q/K-V功能不对称性。这些发现表明秩和谱形状编码了训练的不同信息，并推导出标度律。基于谱的剪枝方法在七个模型上比Last-N启发式方法提升了1.1倍到3.6倍。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注训练结束后的权重谱特性，缺乏对预训练过程中权重矩阵奇异值谱实时动态变化的系统理解。作者希望揭示谱结构在训练过程中的演化规律及其与模型行为的因果关系。
AI.method: 在三种模型规模（30M-285M参数）上，以25步为间隔对每个权重矩阵进行完整SVD分解，追踪预训练全过程。分析稳定秩压缩、幂律指数α等谱指标的时间演化和层间分布。在九个模型（涵盖GPT-2、Pythia等系列，30M-1B参数）上验证发现，并通过谱引导剪枝实验验证因果作用。
AI.result: 发现三种核心现象：(1)瞬态压缩波：稳定秩压缩从浅层向深层传播，先形成峰值梯度后逆转；(2)持续谱梯度：幂律指数α形成永久深度梯度，在深层模型中呈倒U形非单调分布；(3)Q/K-V功能不对称：V/O投影矩阵压缩均匀，Q/K投影矩阵承载深度依赖动态。推导出标度律Δα∝L^{0.26}，α预测层重要性ρ=0.69-0.84，谱引导剪枝优于Last-N方法1.1-3.6倍。
AI.conclusion: 秩和谱形状编码了训练过程中根本不同的信息，谱结构具有因果作用而非仅仅相关性。谱引导剪枝的高效性证明了谱分析的实际应用价值，为理解Transformer训练动态提供了新视角。

title: The Anatomy of a Decentralized Prediction Market: Microstructure Evidence from the Polymarket Order Book
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. JEL: G14, G12, G19, C58, L86. Replication package and per-market panel artifacts: https://github.com/philippdubach/polymarket-microstructure ; Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19811426
summary: We study the microstructure of Polymarket, the largest on-chain prediction market, using a continuous tick-level archive of the public WebSocket order-book feed (30 billion events over 52 days) joined to the authoritative on-chain trade record. On a pre-registered stratified panel of 600 markets we report eight stylized facts: a longshot spread premium; a depth-concentration profile closer to a uniform geometric grid than to the top-of-book pattern often assumed for prediction markets; a null block-clock alignment effect; broad maker-wallet diversity with a concentrated tail; category-conditional differences in effective spread; a sub-50 ms median archive-ingestion delay with a multi-second tail; a self-counterparty wash share with median 1% and a 22% upper tail, well below the network-classifier benchmarks of Cong et al. (2023) for unregulated cryptocurrency token exchanges (a sanity bound, not an apples-to-apples reference, since the venues face different wash incentives); and a depth decay near resolution with a within-category slope of 0.55 on log seconds-to-close (t=3.85). The paper also contributes a measurement result: trade direction inferred from Polymarket's public order-book feed agrees with on-chain ground truth only ~59% of the time (panel mean 0.615, 95% CI [0.58, 0.65]), barely above the 50% chance baseline. On the comparable subset of the top-100 panel, the effective half-spread changes sign between feed- and on-chain directions on 67% of markets in a first 7-day window and 50% in a second non-overlapping window, with Kyle's lambda flipping on 60% and 43% respectively; neither window recovers the on-chain sign at anything close to the ~80% rate that Lee-Ready achieves on equity venues. Microstructure work on Polymarket therefore needs to source trade direction from on-chain OrderFilled events; we release a replication package that performs the join.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Polymarket链上预测市场的微观结构，通过分析300亿笔订单簿事件和链上交易记录，揭示了八个典型事实，并发现基于公开订单簿推断的交易方向与链上真实方向一致性仅约59%，建议微观结构研究应直接使用链上数据。
AI.motivation: Polymarket作为最大的链上预测市场，其微观结构尚未被系统研究，且公开订单簿数据与链上真实数据的一致性未知，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过连续tick级的WebSocket订单簿数据（300亿事件，52天）与链上交易记录进行关联分析，采用预注册的分层面板（600个市场），比较了订单簿推断的交易方向与链上真实方向。
AI.result: 发现了八个典型事实（如长尾溢价、深度集中、自我对手方交易等），并发现订单簿推断的交易方向与链上真实方向一致性仅59%，远低于传统金融市场的80%水平。
AI.conclusion: 建议Polymarket的微观结构研究应直接使用链上OrderFilled事件获取交易方向，并发布了可复现的研究包。

title: Load constrained wind farm flow control through multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning
comment: Submitted to Journal of Physics: Conference Series (Torque 2026). This is the Accepted Manuscript version of an article accepted for publication in Journal of Physics: Conference Series. IOP Publishing Ltd is not responsible for any errors or omissions in this version of the manuscript or any version derived from it. This Accepted Manuscript is published under a CC BY licence
summary: This study presents a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for load-constrained wind farm flow control (WFFC). While wake steering can enhance total wind farm power, it often introduces increased structural loads on downstream turbines. To address this, we integrate an Independent Soft Actor-Critic (I-SAC) architecture with a data-driven, local inflow sector-averaged surrogate model to provide real-time estimates of Damage Equivalent Loads (DELs). By incorporating these estimates into a shaped reward function, turbine-specific agents are trained to maximize power production while adhering to specific load-increase thresholds ($Δ_{max}$) of 10%, 20%, and 30% relative to a baseline controller. The framework is implemented within the WindGym environment using the DYNAMIKS flow solver with Dynamic Wake Meandering (DWM) model to capture non-stationary wake physics. Results indicate that the MARL agents successfully learn collaborative policies that prioritise power gain while actively retreating from high-DEL control strategies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多智能体强化学习框架，结合独立SAC架构和数据驱动载荷代理模型，在风电场尾流控制中实现发电量提升与结构载荷约束的平衡，成功将载荷增量控制在10%-30%阈值内。
AI.motivation: 传统尾流偏转控制虽能提升总发电量，但会增加下游风机结构载荷，亟需一种能同时优化功率并约束载荷的协同控制方法。
AI.method: 采用独立软演员-评论家（I-SAC）多智能体强化学习架构，结合数据驱动的局部入流扇区平均代理模型实时估算损伤等效载荷（DELs），将DELs估计值融入奖励函数，训练每个风机智能体在特定载荷增量阈值（10%、20%、30%）下最大化发电量。
AI.result: MARL智能体学到了协同策略，在优先获取功率增益的同时主动回避高DEL控制策略，成功将载荷增量控制在预设阈值内。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效平衡风电场功率提升与结构载荷约束，为载荷约束下的风电场协同控制提供了一种可行方案。

title: Realized Regularized Regressions
summary: We develop a continuous-time penalized regression framework for the estimation of time-varying coefficients and variable selection when both the response and covariates are Itô semimartingales with jumps. The coefficient paths are approximated by spline basis expansions and estimated via least squares from truncated high-frequency increments. In a finite-dimensional setting, we establish consistency and derive a feasible asymptotic distribution for the integrated coefficient estimator under infill asymptotics. We then extend the framework to high-dimensional settings in which the number of candidate covariates diverges, and show that a group-wise penalized estimator with a truncated $\ell_1$-penalty attains the oracle property, which delivers both consistent model selection and coefficient estimation. An empirical application to a large panel of more than two hundred high-frequency factors documents sparse factor structure across a large cross-section of stocks and industry portfolios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种连续时间惩罚回归框架，用于估计响应变量和协变量均为带跳跃的伊藤半鞅时的时变系数和变量选择。通过样条基展开逼近系数路径，利用截断高频增量进行最小二乘估计。在有限维设置下建立了一致性并推导了可行渐近分布，在高维设置下证明了带截断L1惩罚的群组惩罚估计量具有Oracle性质。实证应用于两百多个高频因子的大面板数据，揭示了股票和行业投资组合的稀疏因子结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理高频金融数据中带跳跃的伊藤半鞅过程、时变系数以及高维变量选择问题，亟需一个统一的连续时间惩罚回归框架。
AI.method: 采用样条基展开逼近时变系数路径，基于截断高频增量构造最小二乘目标函数；低维情形推导可行渐近分布，高维情形引入截断L1群组惩罚实现Oracle性质。
AI.result: 低维情形下证明了估计量的一致性和渐近正态性；高维情形下证明了截断L1惩罚估计量具有Oracle性质（一致模型选择和系数估计）；实证显示高频因子结构具有稀疏性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架能有效处理带跳跃的高频金融数据中的时变系数估计和变量选择问题，为高频因子模型提供了稀疏结构的实证证据。

title: Algorithmic Administration and the EU AI Act: Legal Principles for Public Sector Use of AI
summary: The increasing use of artificial intelligence (AI) by public authorities introduces both opportunities for innovation and significant challenges for the administrative rule of law. This article examines how the EU AI Act interacts with the fundamental principles of administrative law, with a particular focus on administrative discretion, the duty to state reasons, and proportionality. It analyses the regulatory obligations imposed by the AI Act on public sector deployers of high-risk systems, especially in sensitive domains such as social benefits, migration, education, and law enforcement. It also explores whether the AI Act adequately ensures accountability, transparency, and reviewability in automated public decision-making. The article further considers how the AI Act's risk-based approach aligns (or fails to align) with the principle of proportionality and it proposes safeguards and interpretative strategies to ensure the ethical and lawful deployment of AI in the public sector.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了欧盟AI法案与行政法治原则的互动关系，分析了公共部门部署高风险AI系统时在行政裁量权、说明理由义务和比例原则方面面临的挑战，并提出了确保AI在公共部门合法合规部署的保障措施。
AI.motivation: 随着公共机构越来越多地使用人工智能，行政法治原则（如行政裁量权、说明理由义务、比例原则）面临新的挑战。现有法律框架可能不足以应对AI自动化决策带来的问责性、透明度和可审查性问题，亟需研究欧盟AI法案如何与行政法基本原则相互作用。
AI.method: 本文采用规范性法律分析方法，从行政法基本原则（行政裁量权、说明理由义务、比例原则）的视角，系统审视欧盟AI法案对公共部门部署高风险AI系统施加的监管义务，并评估其在社会保障、移民、教育和执法等敏感领域中的适用性。
AI.result: 研究发现：欧盟AI法案的风险分级方法与行政法比例原则之间存在张力；法案在确保自动化公共决策的问责性、透明度和可审查性方面存在不足；公共部门部署高风险AI系统时面临行政裁量权受限与说明理由义务履行的特殊困难。
AI.conclusion: 欧盟AI法案需要与行政法基本原则进行协调解释，建议通过提出保障措施和解释策略来弥合AI治理与行政法治之间的鸿沟，确保公共部门在合法、道德的前提下部署AI系统。

title: Efficient Multivariate Kelly Optimization Reveals Sigmoidal Scaling Laws
summary:
For a sequence of binary bets, the Kelly criterion provides a closed-form solution that maximizes the expected growth rate of wealth. In contrast, when multiple bets are placed simultaneously (e.g., in portfolio allocation or prediction markets), the optimal Kelly strategy generally requires numerical optimization over a joint outcome space. A naive formulation scales exponentially in the number of bets, requiring $O(2^N)$ time and memory for $N$ simultaneous wagers, which restricts existing methods to small problem sizes.
  We present two complementary methods that dramatically extend the scale of multivariate Kelly problems that can be solved. First, in the case of independent bets, we introduce an integral transform formulation that eliminates explicit enumeration of outcomes, reducing the computational complexity of evaluating the objective from $O(2^N)$ to $O(N)$. Combined with numerically stable quadrature, this enables accurate solutions for problems involving hundreds of bets. Second, we develop a decomposition-based approach that constructs and solves carefully chosen subproblems, yielding feasible lower bounds and infeasible upper bounds on the optimal growth rate. This provides a practical mechanism for quantifying worst-case suboptimality as a function of subproblem size.
  Together, these methods make it possible to study the large-$N$ regime of the multivariate Kelly problem. Using synthetic data inspired by prediction markets, we show that the relationship between subproblem size and solution accuracy follows a simple and highly regular scaling law. In particular, the shortfall ratio between the lower and upper bounds is well-approximated by a sigmoid function of the relative subproblem size, with parameters that can be predicted from low-dimensional summary statistics of the problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种方法（积分变换公式和基于分解的方法）来解决多元Kelly准则在大规模投注场景下的计算复杂度问题，将独立投注下的计算复杂度从O(2^N)降至O(N)，并通过上下界框架量化次优性，实验发现子问题大小与求解精度之间存在规律性的Sigmoid缩放关系。
AI.motivation: 当多个赌注同时下注（如投资组合或预测市场）时，最优Kelly策略需要对联合结果空间进行数值优化，朴素方法的时间与空间复杂度为O(2^N)，严重限制了可求解的问题规模。现有方法无法处理大规模多元Kelly问题。
AI.method: 1) 独立投注情形：提出积分变换公式，避免显式枚举所有结果，将目标函数评估复杂度从O(2^N)降至O(N)，结合数值稳定的求积方法可求解数百个赌注的问题。2) 一般情形：提出基于分解的方法，通过构建并求解精心挑选的子问题，得到可行下界和不可行上界，从而量化最坏情况下的次优性。
AI.result: 在合成预测市场数据上，子问题大小与求解精度之间存在简单且高度规律的缩放关系。具体地，下界与上界之间的短差比率可近似为相对子问题大小的Sigmoid函数，其参数可通过问题的低维汇总统计量预测。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法使研究多元Kelly问题的大N（大规模）区间成为可能，为大规模投注场景下的最优增长策略提供了实用的计算框架。

title: TexOCR: Advancing Document OCR Models for Compilable Page-to-LaTeX Reconstruction
summary: Existing document OCR largely targets plain text or Markdown, discarding the structural and executable properties that make LaTeX essential for scientific publishing. We study page-level reconstruction of scientific PDFs into compilable LaTeX and introduce TexOCR-Bench, a benchmark, and TexOCR-Train, a large-scale training corpus, for this task. TexOCR-Bench features a multi-dimensional evaluation suite that jointly assesses transcription fidelity, structural faithfulness, and end-to-end compilability. Leveraging TexOCR-Train, we train a 2B-parameter model, TexOCR, using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL) with verifiable rewards derived from LaTeX unit tests that directly enforce compilability and referential integrity. Experiments across 21 frontier models on TexOCR-Bench show that existing systems frequently violate key document invariants, including consistent section structure, correct float placement, and valid label-reference links, which undermines compilation reliability and downstream usability. Our analysis further reveals that RL with verifiable rewards yields consistent improvements over SFT alone, particularly on structural and compilation metrics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将科学PDF文档重建为可编译LaTeX代码的任务，构建了基准测试TexOCR-Bench和大规模训练语料TexOCR-Train，并训练了一个20亿参数的模型TexOCR。实验表明，现有模型常违反文档结构不变量，而基于可验证奖励的强化学习在结构和编译指标上优于单纯的有监督微调。
AI.motivation: 现有文档OCR主要针对纯文本或Markdown，忽略了LaTeX的结构性和可执行属性，而这些属性对于科学出版至关重要。
AI.method: 构建了TexOCR-Bench基准（多维评估：转录保真度、结构忠实性、端到端可编译性）和TexOCR-Train大规模训练语料，训练了一个2B参数的TexOCR模型，采用有监督微调（SFT）和带可验证奖励的强化学习（RL），奖励来自LaTeX单元测试（强制执行可编译性和引用完整性）。
AI.result: 在21个前沿模型上的实验表明，现有系统经常违反文档结构不变量（如一致章节结构、正确浮动体放置、有效标签-引用链接），影响编译可靠性和下游可用性。RL优于纯SFT，尤其在结构和编译指标上。
AI.conclusion: 带可验证奖励的强化学习能有效提升LaTeX文档重建的结构忠实性和可编译性，为科学文档OCR提供了新范式。

title: Turtle shell clustering: A mixture approach to discriminative clustering with applications to flow cytometry and other data
summary: Generative approaches to clustering provide information on geometric properties of clusters, whereas discriminative approaches provide boundaries between clusters. Ideas from both approaches are incorporated to present a fully unsupervised, probabilistic, and discriminative clustering method via a regularized mutual information objective function, wherein a mixture of mixtures of Gaussian and uniform distributions is used for formulation of the conditional model. Automatic selection of the number of components is established with the introduction of the regularizing term and a merge step, similar to those applied in reversible jump Markov chain Monte Carlo methods used in Bayesian clustering. Consequently, the turtle shell method -- a fully unsupervised clustering method capable of estimating non-linear boundary lines, automatically selecting the number of components, and capturing intuitive clusters in the presence of data abnormalities such as noise and/or irregular cluster shapes -- is introduced. We test this method on various simulated and real datasets commonly explored in clustering research, and extend the analysis to datasets arising from flow cytometry experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"龟壳法"的全无监督聚类方法，通过正则化互信息目标函数融合生成式与判别式聚类的优势，使用高斯与均匀分布的混合混合模型构建条件模型，能够自动选择聚类数、估计非线性边界，并在噪声和不规则形状数据中捕捉直观的聚类结构。
AI.motivation: 生成式聚类能提供聚类的几何属性信息，而判别式聚类能提供聚类间的边界信息。现有方法往往只侧重某一类，作者希望融合两者的优势，提出一种完全无监督、概率性且判别性的聚类方法。
AI.method: 通过正则化互信息目标函数，构建由高斯分布和均匀分布组成的混合混合模型作为条件模型；引入正则化项和合并步骤实现组件数量的自动选择，类似于贝叶斯聚类中可逆跳转马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛方法；最终形成"龟壳法"聚类方法。
AI.result: 在多种模拟和真实数据集（包括流式细胞术实验数据）上进行了测试，验证了该方法能够在噪声和异常形状数据中有效识别直观的聚类结构。
AI.conclusion: "龟壳法"实现了完全无监督、自动选择聚类数、捕捉非线性边界、鲁棒处理数据异常的全能型聚类方法，融合了生成式与判别式聚类的优势。

title: Modeling Epidemic Spread with Strategic Vaccination and Socialization: a Mean Field Game Analysis
summary: We study a game-theoretic model of epidemic control in a large population with finitely many groups and non-cooperative individuals. In the model, individuals jointly choose their socialization levels and vaccination rates, and vaccination is subject to a linear individual cost structure. We derive a forward-backward ordinary differential equations (FBODE) system that characterizes the mean field Nash equilibrium, show that the equilibrium vaccination rate exhibits an at-most one-jump bang-bang structure, and establish the existence of a Carathéodory solution to the FBODE. This establishes a realistic interpretation of the vaccination decisions, meaning individuals decide to vaccinate until a time point which is determined by model parameters and then stop after. We further consider a population-awareness extension in which individuals incorporate population infection information into their objective functions, and we prove a similar at-most one-jump bang-bang property under suitable conditions. Finally, we propose a numerical algorithm for solving the FBODE and conduct simulations to validate the theoretical findings. The experiments highlight two main insights: the trade-off between socialization and vaccination, and the greater importance of quarantining infected individuals instead of restricting susceptible individuals.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个包含有限群体的非合作博弈模型来研究流行病控制。通过推导前向-后向常微分方程组刻画平均场纳什均衡，证明了疫苗接种率具有至多一次跳跃的bang-bang结构，并扩展了考虑群体信息的模型。数值实验揭示了社交与疫苗接种的权衡关系，以及隔离感染者比限制易感者更重要。
AI.motivation: 现有流行病控制模型多从社会规划者视角出发，忽略了个体非合作行为对防控效果的影响。本文旨在博弈论框架下分析大规模人群中个体在社交水平和疫苗接种之间的策略选择，理解个体自利行为导致的均衡结果。
AI.method: 建立了有限群体非合作博弈模型，个体同时选择社交水平和疫苗接种率，疫苗接种具有线性成本结构。推导出前向-后向常微分方程组（FBODE）刻画平均场纳什均衡，证明了均衡解的存在性和bang-bang结构。进一步扩展了考虑群体感染信息的模型，并提出了数值求解算法。
AI.result: 证明了均衡疫苗接种率具有至多一次跳跃的bang-bang结构（即个体在某一时间点前接种，之后停止），建立了FBODE的Carathéodory解存在性。在群体意识扩展模型中也证明了类似性质。数值实验验证了理论发现，揭示了社交与疫苗接种的权衡，以及隔离感染者比限制易感者更有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文从博弈论角度为理解疫情中个体疫苗接种决策提供了理论依据，揭示了均衡策略的bang-bang结构具有现实解释力。政策启示在于：应优先隔离感染者而非限制易感者，且需关注社交行为与疫苗接种之间的相互影响。

title: Beyond De Prado and Cotton: Hierarchical and Iterative Methods for General Mean-Variance Portfolios
summary:
Hierarchical Risk Parity (De Pardo) and the Schur-complement generalization of Cotton are among the most widely adopted regularised portfolio construction methods, yet both are signal-blind: they solve only the minimum-variance problem and cannot accommodate an arbitrary expected-return forecast. This paper introduces three methods that incorporate alpha signals into hierarchical and regularised portfolio construction.
  HRP-$μ$ is a hierarchical allocator that accepts an arbitrary signal $μ$ and nests standard HRP when $γ= 0$ and $μ=\mathbf{1}$. It preserves the tree-based structure of HRP while extending it beyond the minimum-variance setting. HRP-$Σμ$ strengthens this construction by replacing inverse-variance representatives with recursive local mean-variance optima, thereby using richer within-cluster covariance information at the same $O(N^2)$ asymptotic cost.
  CRISP (Correlation-Regularised Iterative Shrinkage Portfolios) is an iterative solver for $P_γw = μ$ with $P_γ= (1-γ)\operatorname{diag}(Σ) + γΣ$, so that $γ$ interpolates between a diagonal portfolio rule and full Markowitz. At convergence, CRISP is Markowitz applied to a variance-preserving shrunk covariance-diagonal variances unchanged, off-diagonal correlations shrunk-with $γ$ tuned for out-of-sample Sharpe rather than covariance-estimation loss.
  In Monte Carlo experiments across multiple covariance regimes and estimation ratios, HRP-$μ$ and HRP-$Σμ$ both outperform plain HRP with HRP-$Σμ$ consistently improving on HRP-$μ$. CRISP at intermediate $γ$ is the dominant method in both regimes, outperforming HRP, Cotton, Ledoit-Wolf shrinkage, direct Markowitz, and the signal-aware hierarchical methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种结合alpha信号的层级化与正则化投资组合构建方法：HRP-μ（接受任意预期收益信号）、HRP-Σμ（递归局部均值-方差优化）和CRISP（基于相关系数正则化的迭代收缩组合），其中CRISP在蒙特卡洛实验中表现最优，超越HRP、Cotton、Ledoit-Wolf收缩及直接Markowitz等传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有层级风险平价方法（HRP、Cotton）均为信号盲（signal-blind）方法，仅能解决最小方差问题，无法纳入任意预期收益预测。本文旨在将alpha信号引入层级化与正则化投资组合构建框架。
AI.method: 1) HRP-μ：接受任意信号μ的层级分配器，当γ=0且μ=1时退化为标准HRP；2) HRP-Σμ：用递归局部均值-方差最优替代逆方差代表，在O(N²)复杂度下利用更丰富的簇内协方差信息；3) CRISP：迭代求解器P_γ w = μ，P_γ = (1-γ)diag(Σ)+γΣ，γ在纯对角组合与完全Markowitz之间插值，通过保持方差不变的收缩协方差矩阵（对角线不变、非对角线相关系数收缩），γ通过样本外夏普率而非协方差估计损失调优。
AI.result: 蒙特卡洛实验中，HRP-μ与HRP-Σμ均优于标准HRP，HRP-Σμ一致优于HRP-μ。CRISP在中间γ值下是主导方法，在所有对比方法（HRP、Cotton、Ledoit-Wolf收缩、直接Markowitz、信号感知层级方法）中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入alpha信号，层级化与正则化投资组合方法可以显著超越原始的最小方差设定；CRISP作为一种基于相关系数正则化的迭代收缩方法，在兼顾稳健性与信号感知方面具有突出优势。

title: PExA: Parallel Exploration Agent for Complex Text-to-SQL
summary: LLM-based agents for text-to-SQL often struggle with latency-performance trade-off, where performance improvements come at the cost of latency or vice versa. We reformulate text-to-SQL generation within the lens of software test coverage where the original query is prepared with a suite of test cases with simpler, atomic SQLs that are executed in parallel and together ensure semantic coverage of the original query. After iterating on test case coverage, the final SQL is generated only when enough information is gathered, leveraging the explored test case SQLs to ground the final generation. We validated our framework on a state-of-the-art benchmark for text-to-SQL, Spider 2.0, achieving a new state-of-the-art with 70.2% execution accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于测试覆盖的并行化文本到SQL框架，通过原子SQL用例并行执行来提升性能与延迟平衡，在Spider 2.0上达到70.2%执行准确率，实现新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-based文本到SQL智能体面临延迟与性能的权衡困境，性能提升往往伴随延迟增加，反之亦然。作者希望打破这一权衡，找到兼顾两者的方法。
AI.method: 将文本到SQL生成类比软件测试覆盖：为原始查询准备一组包含更简单、原子化SQL的测试用例，并行执行以确保语义覆盖。通过迭代测试用例覆盖过程收集足够信息后，基于探索到的SQL生成最终查询。
AI.result: 在Spider 2.0基准上达到70.2%的执行准确率，实现了新的最优结果（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 测试覆盖视角的并行化策略有效缓解了文本到SQL任务中延迟与性能的权衡问题，验证了该方法在复杂SQL生成上的有效性。

title: KARL: Mitigating Hallucinations in LLMs via Knowledge-Boundary-Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: Enabling large language models (LLMs) to appropriately abstain from answering questions beyond their knowledge is crucial for mitigating hallucinations. While existing reinforcement learning methods foster autonomous abstention, they often compromise answer accuracy because their static reward mechanisms, agnostic to models' knowledge boundaries, drive models toward excessive caution. In this work, we propose KARL, a novel framework that continuously aligns an LLM's abstention behavior with its evolving knowledge boundary. KARL introduces two core innovations: a Knowledge-Boundary-Aware Reward that performs online knowledge boundary estimation using within-group response statistics, dynamically rewarding correct answers or guided abstention; and a Two-Stage RL Training Strategy that first explores the knowledge boundary and bypasses the "abstention trap", and subsequently converts incorrect answers beyond the knowledge boundary into abstentions without sacrificing accuracy. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that KARL achieves a superior accuracy-hallucination trade-off, effectively suppressing hallucinations while maintaining high accuracy across both in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios.

AI.tldr: KARL框架通过知识边界感知奖励和两阶段强化学习训练，动态对齐LLM的拒绝行为与知识边界，在抑制幻觉的同时保持高准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法使用静态奖励机制，无法感知模型知识边界变化，导致模型过度保守，降低回答准确率。
AI.method: 提出KARL框架：1) 知识边界感知奖励：基于组内响应统计在线估计知识边界，动态奖励正确答案或引导拒绝；2) 两阶段RL训练：先探索知识边界绕过"拒绝陷阱"，再将边界外的错误回答转换为拒绝。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，KARL在分布内和分布外场景下均实现了更优的准确率-幻觉权衡，有效抑制幻觉同时保持高准确率。
AI.conclusion: KARL通过动态对齐模型拒绝行为与知识边界，解决了静态奖励机制导致的过度保守问题，实现了更好的准确率与幻觉抑制平衡。

title: Hierarchical RL-MPC Control for Dynamic Wake Steering in Wind Farms
comment: This work has been submitted to IFAC for possible publication
summary: Wind farm wake steering optimization is challenging due to complex flow physics and changing conditions. This paper presents a hierarchical framework that combines reinforcement learning with model predictive control, where an RL agent learns compensatory state estimates for an MPC controller, rather than directly controlling turbines. Evaluated on a three-turbine case, the approach achieves a 23\% power gain over the baseline control and surpasses the idealized MPC with perfect state knowledge. Compared to direct RL control, the hybrid architecture maintains superior safety characteristics during training while achieving comparable performance with more stable control actions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合强化学习（RL）和模型预测控制（MPC）的分层框架，用于风电场尾流偏航优化。RL智能体学习为MPC控制器提供补偿状态估计，而非直接控制风机。在三个风机案例中，该方法相比基线控制实现了23%的功率增益，甚至超过了具有完美状态信息的理想MPC。与直接RL控制相比，该混合架构在训练过程中保持了更好的安全性，同时实现了相当的性能和更稳定的控制动作。
AI.motivation: 风电场尾流偏航优化因复杂的流动物理和不断变化的条件而具有挑战性，现有方法难以兼顾性能和安全性。
AI.method: 提出分层框架，RL智能体学习补偿状态估计，提供给MPC控制器进行优化控制，而非让RL直接控制风机。
AI.result: 在三个风机案例中，相比基线控制实现23%功率增益，超越理想MPC；相比直接RL控制，训练安全性更好，性能相当，控制动作更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该混合架构有效结合了RL的适应性和MPC的安全性，为风电场优化提供了有前途的方案。

title: Misspecification-Averse Estimation
summary: We study optimal estimation when the likelihood may be misspecified. Building on tools from the theory of decision-making under uncertainty, we analyze a class of axiomatically grounded optimality criteria which nests several existing misspecification-robust objectives. Within this class, we introduce the constrained multiplier criterion, which allows for flexible misspecification attitudes. We prove a local asymptotic minimax theorem for this criterion, extending a classical efficiency bound to a limit experiment which incorporates moment-constrained misspecification concerns. We characterize asymptotically optimal estimators as Bayes decision rules under a flat prior and an exponentially tilted likelihood that incorporates the moment constraints, and show that feasible plug-in analogs are asymptotically optimal.

AI.tldr: 本文在似然函数可能设定错误的情况下研究最优估计问题，提出了一种灵活的约束乘子准则，并证明了其局部渐近极小极大定理，刻画了渐近最优估计量。
AI.motivation: 在现实统计建模中，模型设定错误（misspecification）普遍存在，传统似然方法在此情况下不再最优。作者希望建立一套理论框架，在似然可能错误时仍能获得最优估计。
AI.method: 基于不确定性决策理论，分析了一类公理化的最优性准则（包含多种现有错设稳健目标）。提出了约束乘子准则，通过矩约束灵活控制错设程度；证明了局部渐近极小极大定理，将经典效率界推广到包含矩约束错设的极限实验场景。
AI.result: 渐近最优估计量可刻画为在平坦先验和包含矩约束的指数倾斜似然下的贝叶斯决策规则，且可行的插件估计量是渐近最优的。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为模型错设下的最优估计提供了统一的理论框架和可行的渐近最优方法。

title: Artificial General Intelligence Forecasting and Scenario Analysis: State of the Field, Methodological Gaps, and Strategic Implications
summary: In this report, we review the current state of methodologies to forecast the arrival of artificial general intelligence, assess their reliability, and analyze the implications for strategy and policy. We synthesize diverse forecasting approaches, document significant limitations in existing methods, and propose a research agenda for developing more-robust forecasting infrastructure. The report does not endorse a specific forecast or scenario but rather provides a framework for interpreting forecasts under conditions of deep uncertainty. We experimented with an iterative approach to human and artificial intelligence collaboration for this report. The primary drafting of the text was performed by large language models (GPT 5.1, Gemini 3 Pro, and Claude 4.5 Opus), with human researchers providing direction, peer review, fact-checking, and revision.

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了人工通用智能（AGI）到达时间的预测方法现状，评估其可靠性，并分析对战略和政策的影响。研究采用多种预测方法，指出现有方法的显著局限性，并提出开发更稳健预测基础设施的研究议程。值得注意的是，本文主要文本由大语言模型（GPT 5.1、Gemini 3 Pro和Claude 4.5 Opus）起草，人类研究者提供方向、同行评审、事实核查和修订。
AI.motivation: 当前对AGI到达时间的预测方法缺乏系统性的可靠性评估，且现有预测在深度不确定性条件下难以指导战略决策。作者希望建立一套评估框架，帮助政策制定者和研究者更理性地解读各种AGI预测。
AI.method: 采用迭代式人机协作方法：综合多种预测方法（如专家调查、时间线预测、生物锚定法等），评估其局限性，并提出研究议程。文本本身由多个大语言模型协作生成，人类负责方向把控与质量审核。
AI.result: 报告指出当前AGI预测方法存在显著局限性，未给出具体预测结果，但提供了一个在深度不确定性条件下解读预测的框架。
AI.conclusion: 需要建立更稳健的AGI预测基础设施，并提出了相应研究议程。此外，人机协作的写作模式被证明可行，但需要人类严格控制方向和质量。

title: AutoPyVerifier: Learning Compact Executable Verifiers for Large Language Model Outputs
summary: Verification is becoming central to both reinforcement-learning-based training and inference-time control of large language models (LLMs). Yet current verifiers face a fundamental trade-off: LLM-based verifiers are expressive but hard to control and prone to error, while deterministic executable verifiers are reliable and interpretable but often limited in capability. We study the following question: given a development set of LLM outputs and labels for a target objective, such as correctness, can we automatically induce a minimal set of Python verifiers whose joint satisfaction closely matches that objective? We propose AutoPyVerifier, a framework that uses an LLM to synthesize candidate verifier functions and then refines them through search over a directed acyclic graph (DAG). By navigating the DAG, AutoPyVerifier systematically explores the space of deterministic executable verifiers and selects a compact verifier set whose joint satisfaction best approximates the target objective. Across mathematical reasoning, coding, function calling, and instruction-following benchmarks for several state-of-the-art LLMs, AutoPyVerifier improves target-objective prediction by up to 55.0 F1 points over the initial LLM-generated verifier sets. Additional analyses show that the most useful verification targets vary by benchmark and model, and that the DAG-based search shifts the learned verifier sets toward more structural and semantically grounded checks. We further show that exposing the discovered verifier set to an LLM as an external tool improves downstream accuracy by up to 17.0 points. We release our code

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoPyVerifier框架，能自动从LLM输出和标签中归纳出最小化的Python验证器集合，通过DAG搜索优化验证器，在多个基准测试上提升目标预测F1分数最高55.0点，并将发现的验证器作为外部工具提升下游任务准确率最高17.0点。
AI.motivation: 现有验证器面临根本性权衡：基于LLM的验证器表达力强但难以控制且易出错，而确定性可执行验证器可靠可解释但能力有限。本文旨在自动从开发集中归纳出最小化的确定性Python验证器集合，以更好地近似目标目标。
AI.method: 提出AutoPyVerifier框架，使用LLM合成候选验证器函数，然后通过有向无环图（DAG）搜索进行优化，系统探索确定性可执行验证器空间，选择能最佳近似目标目标的紧凑验证器集合。
AI.result: 在数学推理、编码、函数调用和指令遵循等多个基准测试上，AutoPyVerifier相比初始LLM生成的验证器集，目标目标预测F1分数提升最高55.0点；将发现的验证器集作为外部工具暴露给LLM，可提升下游任务准确率最高17.0点。
AI.conclusion: 验证目标的有用性因基准测试和模型而异，基于DAG的搜索使验证器集转向更具结构性和语义基础的检查。该方法能够自动生成可靠且可解释的验证器，有效提升LLM的验证能力和下游性能。

title: MOCA: A Transformer-based Modular Causal Inference Framework with One-way Cross-attention and Cutting Feedback
summary: Causal effect estimation from observational data requires careful adjustment for confounding. Classical estimators such as inverse probability weighting and augmented inverse probability weighting are effective under favorable model specification, but may become unstable when treatment assignment and outcome mechanisms are complex, non-linear, and high-dimensional. Machine learning and representation learning approaches improve flexibility, yet joint training can allow outcome-related information to influence treatment-side representations, which is undesirable from a causal perspective. We propose MOCA (Modular One-way Causal Attention), a transformer-based framework that separates treatment and outcome modeling through a modular design, and performs confounder adjustment using a one-way attention mechanism. A cutting-feedback strategy, implemented via gradient detachment, prevents the outcome loss from updating the treatment module. This design preserves directional information flow while retaining the representational power of transformer architectures for causal inference. Across multiple simulated scenarios, including linear, nonlinear, heavy-tailed, hidden confounding, and high-dimensional settings, MOCA shows competitive or improved performance relative to IPW, AIPW, X-learner, TARNet, and DragonNet. We further illustrate the method on the Infant Health and Development Program dataset and the Dehejia-Wahba dataset as real-world benchmarks. These results suggest that modular attention with one-way information flow provides a promising and interpretable direction for causal inference with modern deep learning models.

AI.tldr: MOCA是一个基于Transformer的模块化因果效应估计框架，通过单向注意力机制和梯度分离策略，在保持表达力的同时防止结果信息污染处理模块，在多种模拟和真实数据集上表现优于传统方法和现有深度学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统因果效应估计方法（如IPW、AIPW）在复杂、非线性、高维数据下不稳定；现有深度学习方法虽然灵活，但联合训练会导致结果相关信息影响处理侧表征，违反因果推断原则。
AI.method: 提出MOCA框架：（1）模块化设计将处理建模和结果建模分离；（2）单向注意力机制实现混杂因子调整；（3）梯度分离（cutting-feedback）策略防止结果损失更新处理模块，保留信息单向流动。
AI.result: 在线性、非线性、厚尾分布、隐藏混杂、高维等多种模拟场景中，MOCA相比IPW、AIPW、X-learner、TARNet、DragonNet具有竞争力或更优表现；在IHDP和Dehejia-Wahba真实数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 模块化注意力架构结合单向信息流为因果推断提供了一条有前景且可解释的方向。

title: A Reinforcement-learning-based Column Generation Algorithm for Integrated Operating Room Planning and Scheduling
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel mixed integer programming model to formulate integrated operating room planning and scheduling problems, where several mandatory and elective surgeries are to be assigned and scheduled in operating rooms on different days. We consider both overtime in operating rooms and surgeons' daily availability limits. We propose a column generation (CG) algorithm to solve large-scale instances. In order to enhance the CG, we integrate the Reinforcement Learning Algorithm and the Genetic Algorithm and develop a hybrid algorithm to generate initial columns for the CG algorithm. For our analysis, we employed two sets of test instances: one consisting of synthetic data and the other based on real-world cases from a local hospital in Naples, Italy. Computational experiments demonstrate that our proposed model and methodology yields an average optimality gap of 1.23% for synthetic instances and 1.49% on real-world scenarios, significantly outperforming previous solution methodologies in the literature. Additionally, we demonstrate that the developed CG algorithm provides a high-quality solution for large-scale instances where other models and methods fail to obtain even a feasible solution. To further evaluate robustness under uncertainty, we examined scenarios with 20% variability in surgery durations. The results indicate that incorporating a 120-minute buffer time minimizes the overall cost. Moreover, we investigated the impact of emergency surgeries by either introducing additional cases or escalating surgical priorities. For synthetic instances, the inclusion of emergency surgeries increased the total rescheduling cost by 4.13%, whereas in the real-world Naples cases, priority escalation led to only a 0.11% increase.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合整数规划模型结合列生成、强化学习和遗传算法的混合算法，解决手术室排程问题，在合成和真实数据上分别实现1.23%和1.49%的最优性差距。
AI.motivation: 手术室作为医院核心资源，其排程直接影响运营效率和成本。现有方法在处理大规模实例时难以获得高质量可行解，且缺乏对不确定性（手术时长波动、急诊手术）的系统性考量。
AI.method: 构建混合整数规划模型，考虑手术室加班和外科医生日常可用性约束；提出列生成算法，并集成强化学习与遗传算法生成初始列以提升性能。
AI.result: 合成实例平均最优性差距1.23%，真实数据1.49%；在大规模实例上其他方法无法获得可行解时仍能提供高质量解；20%手术时长波动下120分钟缓冲时间最优；急诊手术使合成实例重排成本增加4.13%，真实实例优先级提升仅增加0.11%。
AI.conclusion: 所提混合算法在求解质量和鲁棒性上显著优于现有方法，能有效处理大规模排程问题及不确定性场景。

title: The Power of Power Law: Asymmetry Enables Compositional Reasoning
summary: Natural language data follows a power-law distribution, with most knowledge and skills appearing at very low frequency. While a common intuition suggests that reweighting or curating data towards a uniform distribution may help models better learn these long-tail skills, we find a counterintuitive result: across a wide range of compositional reasoning tasks, such as state tracking and multi-step arithmetic, training under power-law distributions consistently outperforms training under uniform distributions. To understand this advantage, we introduce a minimalist skill-composition task and show that learning under a power-law distribution provably requires significantly less training data. Our theoretical analysis reveals that power law sampling induces a beneficial asymmetry that improves the pathological loss landscape, which enables models to first acquire high-frequency skill compositions with low data complexity, which in turn serves as a stepping stone to efficiently learn rare long-tailed skills. Our results offer an alternative perspective on what constitutes an effective data distribution for training models.

AI.tldr: 在组合推理任务中，幂律分布训练数据比均匀分布更有效，因为幂律采样通过优先学习高频技能组合，为学习罕见长尾技能提供了跳板，显著减少了所需训练数据量。
AI.motivation: 挑战"数据应重加权为均匀分布以更好学习长尾技能"的常见直觉，探究何种数据分布对模型训练最有效。
AI.method: 通过组合推理任务（状态追踪、多步算术）的实验验证，并引入最小化技能组合任务进行理论分析，证明幂律分布下训练数据的优势。
AI.result: 幂律分布训练在组合推理任务上始终优于均匀分布；理论分析表明幂律采样能改善损失景观，先学习高频组合（低数据复杂度），再作为跳板学习罕见长尾技能。
AI.conclusion: 幂律分布数据训练更有效，提供了关于有效数据分布的新视角。

title: BiTA: Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator in a Temporal Graph Network Framework for Alert Prediction in Computer Networks
summary: Proactive alert prediction in computer networks is critical for mitigating evolving cyber threats and enabling timely defensive actions. Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNs) provide a principled framework for modeling time-evolving interactions; however, existing TGN-based methods predominantly rely on unidirectional or single-mechanism temporal aggregation, which limits their ability to capture recursive, multi-scale temporal patterns commonly observed in real-world attack behaviors. In this paper, we propose BiTA, a Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator for temporal graph learning. Rather than introducing a deeper or higher-capacity model, BiTA redesigns the temporal aggregation function within the TGN framework by jointly encoding bidirectional sequential dependencies and long-range contextual relations over each node's temporal neighborhood. This aggregation strategy enables complementary temporal reasoning at different scales while preserving the original TGN memory and message-passing structure. We evaluate BiTA on real-world alert datasets, demonstrating significant improvements in key performance metrics such as area under the curve, average precision, mean reciprocal rank, and per-category prediction accuracy when compared to state-of-the-art temporal graph models. BiTA outperforms baseline methods under both transductive and inductive settings, highlighting its robustness and generalization capabilities in dynamic network environments. BiTA is a scalable and interpretable framework for real-time cyber threat anticipation, paving the way toward more intelligent and adaptive intrusion detection systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BiTA，一种双向GRU-Transformer聚合器，用于时序图学习中的主动告警预测。BiTA通过重新设计TGN框架中的时序聚合函数，联合编码双向序列依赖和长程上下文关系，在真实告警数据集上显著优于现有方法，具备良好的鲁棒性、可扩展性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有TGN方法主要依赖单向或单机制时序聚合，难以捕捉真实网络攻击行为中常见的递归、多尺度时序模式，限制了告警预测的性能。
AI.method: 提出BiTA（双向GRU-Transformer聚合器），在TGN框架内重新设计时序聚合函数，通过双向GRU编码双向序列依赖，结合Transformer捕捉长程上下文关系，实现多尺度互补时序推理，同时保留原有TGN的记忆和消息传递结构。
AI.result: 在真实告警数据集上，BiTA在AUC、平均精度、平均倒数排名和逐类别预测准确率等指标上均优于现有最先进时序图模型，且在直推式和归纳式两种设置下均表现出优越的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: BiTA是一个可扩展且可解释的实时网络威胁预判框架，为构建更智能、更自适应的入侵检测系统提供了新方向。

title: Integrated Lander-Propulsion-GNC Framework for Autonomous Lunar Powered Descent
comment: Accepted at IEEE RAST 2026, 13-15 May, Istanbul, Türkiye. 6 pages. \c{opyright} 2026 IEEE. Personal use permitted; other uses require IEEE permission
summary: This paper presents an integrated lander-propulsion-GNC framework for autonomous lunar powered descent. The BUG VTVL test vehicle serves as the reference platform, with the YUNT V0 throttleable bipropellant engine providing variable thrust across a wide operating envelope, integrated with a real-time successive convexification guidance solver. The vehicle design accounts for structural configuration, landing stability, center-of-mass migration, and inertia evolution, while the propulsion architecture defines the throttle ratio, dead-zone behavior, and gimbal authority that constrain the guidance problem. A successive convexification algorithm addresses all nonconvexities; thrust lower bounds, mass depletion coupling, and thruster dead-zone behavior are all handled within a unified second-order cone program solvable in near-real time. Parametric analysis reveals a fundamental coupling between throttle ratio, pointing authority, and surface gravity. Monte Carlo simulations validate guidance robustness, achieving sub-50-meter landing precision under realistic perturbations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成着陆器-推进-GNC框架的自主月球动力下降方法，基于BUG VTVL测试平台和YUNT V0变推力双组元发动机，通过实时逐次凸优化制导求解器，在考虑推进系统约束（节流比、死区、万向节能力）下，实现了亚50米精度的月球着陆。
AI.motivation: 月球动力下降过程中，推进系统的物理约束（节流比、死区、万向节能力）与制导算法之间存在强耦合，现有方法往往未充分整合这些约束，导致实际飞行中制导可行性和鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 1) 集成BUG VTVL测试平台的着陆器结构设计与YUNT V0变推力发动机建模，考虑质心迁移和惯量演化；2) 采用逐次凸优化算法，将推力下限、质量消耗耦合、推力器死区等非凸约束统一处理为二阶锥规划问题，实现近实时求解。
AI.result: 参数分析揭示了节流比、指向能力与表面重力之间的基本耦合关系；蒙特卡洛仿真验证了制导鲁棒性，在真实扰动下着陆精度优于50米。
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成框架有效衔接了推进系统硬件约束与制导算法，实现了高精度、高鲁棒性的自主月球动力下降，为未来月球着陆任务提供了可行的工程解决方案。

title: Bootstrapping with AI/ML-generated labels
summary: AI/ML methods are increasingly used in economics to generate binary variables (or labels) via classification algorithms. When these generated variables are included as covariates in regressions, even small misclassification errors can induce large biases in OLS estimators and invalidate standard inference. We study whether the bootstrap can correct this bias and deliver valid inference. We first show that a seemingly natural fixed-label bootstrap, which generates data using estimated labels but relies on a corrupted version in estimation, is generally invalid unless a strong independence condition between the latent true labels and other covariates holds. We then propose a coupled-label bootstrap that jointly resamples the true and imputed labels, and show it is valid without this condition. Two finite-sample adjustments further improve coverage: a variance correction for uncertainty in estimated misclassification rates and a Hessian rotation for near-singular designs. We illustrate the methods in simulations and apply them to investigate the relationship between wages and remote work status.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了当回归模型中使用AI/ML生成的二值变量时，传统固定标签自助法失效的问题，并提出了一种耦合标签自助法来纠正偏差并实现有效推断。
AI.motivation: AI/ML方法在经济学中常用于生成二值变量，但这些变量的分类误差会导致OLS估计偏误和推断失效，需要有效的偏差纠正和推断方法。
AI.method: 提出了耦合标签自助法（coupled-label bootstrap），联合重抽样真实标签和预测标签；同时引入两种有限样本调整：误分类率不确定性方差校正和近奇异设计的Hessian旋转。
AI.result: 固定标签自助法在缺乏强独立性条件时失效，而耦合标签自助法无需该条件即可有效；有限样本调整进一步改善了覆盖率。
AI.conclusion: 耦合标签自助法为使用机器学习生成变量的回归推断提供了有效且稳健的方法，通过模拟和工资与远程办公关系的实证研究验证了其有效性。

title: Secure On-Premise Deployment of Open-Weights Large Language Models in Radiology: An Isolation-First Architecture with Prospective Pilot Evaluation
summary:
Purpose: To design, implement, evaluate, and report on the regulatory requirements of a self-hosted LLM infrastructure for radiology adhering to the principle of least privilege, emphasizing technical feasibility, network isolation, and clinical utility.
  Materials and Methods: The isolation-first, containerized LLM inference stack relies on strict network segmentation, host-enforced egress filtering, and active isolation monitoring preventing unauthorized external connectivity. An accompanying deployment package provides automated isolation and hardening tests. The system served the open-weights DeepSeek-R1 model via vLLM. In a one-week pilot phase, 22 residents and radiologists were free to use 10 predefined prompt-templates whenever they considered them useful in daily work. Afterward, they rated clinical utility and system stability on an 0-10 Likert scale and reported observed critical errors in model output.
  Results: The applied institutional governance pathway achieved approval from clinic management, compliance, data protection and information security officers for processing unanonymized PHI. The system was rated stable and user friendly during the pilot. Source text-anchored tasks, such as report corrections or simplifications, and radiology guideline recommendations received the highest utility ratings, whereas open-ended conclusion generation based on findings resulted in the highest frequency of critical errors, such as clinically relevant hallucinations or omissions.
  Conclusion: The proposed isolation-first on-premise architecture enabled overcoming regulatory borders, showed promising clinical utility in text-anchored tasks and is the current base to serve open-weights LLMs as an official service of a German University Hospital with over 10,000 employees. The deployment package were made publicly available (https://github.com/ukbonn/ukb-gpt).

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个基于最小权限原则的本地化LLM推理系统，通过严格网络隔离和容器化技术满足德国大学医院的法规要求。一周试点中，22名放射科医师使用该系统，结果显示文本锚定任务（报告修正、简化）临床效用最高，而开放式结论生成任务出现较多关键错误（如幻觉、遗漏）。系统已通过多方监管审批，代码开源。
AI.motivation: 放射科应用LLM面临严格的医疗数据隐私法规（如GDPR）挑战，现有云服务无法满足去匿名化PHI的处理要求，亟需一种既符合监管要求又具备临床实用性的本地化LLM部署方案。
AI.method: 采用"隔离优先"架构：容器化LLM推理栈（vLLM部署DeepSeek-R1模型），严格网络分段、主机级出站过滤、主动隔离监控，配套自动化隔离与加固测试部署包。一周试点中22名医师使用10个预定义提示模板，随后进行0-10 Likert量表评分。
AI.result: 系统获得诊所管理层、合规、数据保护及信息安全官员的批准用于处理去匿名化PHI。文本锚定任务（报告修正、简化、指南推荐）效用评分最高；开放式结论生成任务出现幻觉或遗漏等关键错误频率最高。系统被评为稳定且用户友好。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的隔离优先本地架构成功克服了监管障碍，在文本锚定任务中展现出有前景的临床效用，已成为德国一所拥有超10,000名员工的大学医院提供开放权重LLM官方服务的基础平台，部署包已公开。

title: Self Knowledge Re-expression: A Fully Local Method for Adapting LLMs to Tasks Using Intrinsic Knowledge
summary: While the next-token prediction (NTP) paradigm enables large language models (LLMs) to express their intrinsic knowledge, its sequential nature constrains performance on specialized, non-generative tasks. We attribute this performance bottleneck to the LLMs' knowledge expression mechanism, rather than to deficiencies in knowledge acquisition. To address this, we propose Self-Knowledge Re-expression (SKR), a novel, task-agnostic adaptation method. SKR transforms the LLM's output from generic token generation to highly efficient, task-specific expression. SKR is a fully local method that uses only unannotated data, requiring neither human supervision nor model distillation. Experiments on a large financial document dataset demonstrate substantial improvements: over 40% in Recall@1 for information retrieval tasks, over 76% reduction in object detection latency, and over 33% increase in anomaly detection AUPRC. Our results on the MMDocRAG dataset surpass those of leading retrieval models by at least 12.6%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SKR方法，通过将LLM从逐词预测转为任务特定表达，无需标注数据即可提升非生成式任务性能，在金融文档检索、目标检测、异常检测等任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: LLM的next-token prediction范式虽能表达内在知识，但其顺序生成机制在非生成式任务上存在性能瓶颈。作者认为这一瓶颈源于知识表达机制而非知识获取不足。
AI.method: 提出Self-Knowledge Re-expression (SKR)，一种无需任务特化训练的全局部适应方法。仅使用未标注数据，将LLM的输出从通用token生成转变为高效的任务特定表达，无需人工监督或模型蒸馏。
AI.result: 在金融文档数据集上：信息检索Recall@1提升超40%；目标检测延迟降低超76%；异常检测AUPRC提升超33%。在MMDocRAG数据集上超过领先检索模型至少12.6%。
AI.conclusion: SKR有效解决了LLM知识表达机制在非生成式任务上的瓶颈，是一种轻量、高效、通用的适应方法。

title: Learning Curves and Benign Overfitting of Spectral Algorithms in Large Dimensions
summary: Existing large-dimensional theory for spectral algorithms resolves either the optimally tuned point or the interpolation limit, but leaves the under-regularized regime unexplored. We study the learning curve and benign overfitting of spectral algorithms in the large-dimensional setting where the sample size and dimension are of comparable order, i.e., $n \asymp d^γ$ for some $γ>0$.
