To address this issue, we introduce a fully automated framework to quantifying and mitigating SPB, which constructs equal-quality pairs of responses with negligible quality differences, enabling statistical disentanglement of discriminability from bias propensity without human gold standards. Empirical analysis across 20 mainstream LLMs reveals that advanced capabilities are often uncorrelated, or even negatively correlated, with low SPB. To mitigate this bias, we propose a structured multi-dimensional evaluation strategy grounded in cognitive load decomposition, which reduces SPB by 31.5\% on average.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个全自动框架来量化和缓解LLM作为评估者时的自我偏好偏差(SPB)，通过构造质量相等的响应对来解耦判别能力与偏差倾向，并在20个主流LLM上验证了高级能力与低SPB不相关甚至负相关，提出的多维度评估策略平均降低SPB 31.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有SPB测量依赖昂贵的人工标注，且混淆了生成能力与评估立场，难以大规模部署。因此需要一个自动化的、可扩展的框架来量化并缓解SPB。
AI.method: 提出全自动框架：(1)构造质量差异可忽略的等质响应对；(2)从统计上解耦判别能力与偏差倾向，无需人工金标准；(3)提出基于认知负荷分解的结构化多维度评估策略以缓解偏差。
AI.result: 在20个主流LLM上的实证分析表明，先进能力与低SPB往往不相关甚至负相关；提出的缓解策略平均降低SPB达31.5%。
AI.conclusion: SPB是LLM评估系统中不可忽视的偏差来源，自动化量化框架有效，且认知负荷分解的多维评估策略能显著缓解该偏差。

title: Physics-Aware LLM-Based Probabilistic Wind Power Scenario Generation under Extreme Icing Conditions
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Accepted by the 2026 IEEE Power & Energy Society General Meeting
summary: Accurately characterizing wind power uncertainty under icing and post-disaster conditions remains a critical challenge for resilient power system operation. To address this issue, this paper proposes a physics-aware large language model (LLM) framework for probabilistic wind power scenario generation under extreme icing conditions. The proposed framework integrates supervisory control and data acquisition (SCADA)-based physical modeling, multimodal tokenization, and a causal Transformer architecture trained in an autoregressive manner. A physics-aware decoding scheme effectively enforces rated power limits and ramping constraints on the generated trajectories while preserving stochastic diversity. Case studies using real wind turbine data show that the proposed method reproduces icing-induced power degradation and temporal variability observed during extreme weather. The resulting scenarios are physically consistent and high-fidelity, thereby significantly enhancing resilience assessment and recovery planning in renewable-integrated power systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理感知的大语言模型框架，用于在极端覆冰条件下生成概率性风电场景，通过集成SCADA物理建模、多模态分词和因果Transformer架构，生成物理一致且高保真的风电出力场景，有效支持韧性评估与恢复规划。
AI.motivation: 准确刻画覆冰及灾后条件下的风电出力不确定性，对于韧性电力系统运行至关重要，但现有方法在该场景下仍存在不足。
AI.method: 提出物理感知LLM框架，集成SCADA物理建模、多模态分词、因果Transformer自回归训练，并设计物理感知解码方案以约束额定功率限制和爬坡速率，同时保持随机多样性。
AI.result: 基于真实风机数据的案例研究表明，该方法能复现极端天气下的覆冰功率衰减和时序变异性，生成的场景物理一致且高保真。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著增强了含可再生能源电力系统的韧性评估与恢复规划能力。

title: How Researchers Navigate Accountability, Transparency, and Trust When Using AI Tools in Early-Stage Research: A Think-Aloud Study
summary: In the early stages of scientific research, researchers rely on core scholarly judgments to identify relevant literature, assess credible evidence, and determine which directions merit pursuit. As AI tools become increasingly integrated into these early-stage workflows, the scholarly judgments that were once transparent and attributable to individual researchers become obscured, raising critical Responsible AI (RAI) concerns around accountability, transparency, and trust. Yet how these three dimensions manifest in real-time, in-situ scholarly practice remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we conducted a think-aloud study with 15 researchers to examine how they used AI tools powered by large language models (LLMs) across early-stage research tasks, including literature exploration, synthesis, and research ideation. Our key findings address the tripartite constructs of accountability, transparency, and trust. First, the confident tone of AI outputs misrepresents epistemic uncertainty, making it more difficult for researchers (who are ultimately accountable) to identify which outputs require the greatest scrutiny. Second, opaque retrieval and content construction make provenance difficult to establish for transparency. Third, trust in AI is fragile, context-dependent, and easily eroded. In response, participant researchers were seen to develop compensatory strategies to restore scholarly judgment under uncertainty. Overall, our findings serve to contextualize AI-mediated research as a RAI problem grounded in lived researcher experience and motivate attention to deliberate AI integration that preserves accountability, supports transparency, and fosters informed trust.

AI.tldr: 本文通过15位研究者的出声思考实验，探讨了AI工具（基于大语言模型）在科研早期阶段（文献探索、综合、研究构思）中对问责性、透明度和信任三个负责任AI（RAI）维度的影响，发现AI的自信语气掩盖了认知不确定性、不透明的检索与内容构建阻碍了可追溯性、信任脆弱且依赖上下文，研究者发展出补偿性策略来恢复学术判断。
AI.motivation: 随着AI工具越来越多地融入科研早期流程，原本透明且可归因于个人研究者的学术判断变得模糊，引发了问责性、透明度和信任等RAI问题。然而这三个维度如何在实时、情境化的学术实践中具体表现，尚缺乏探索。
AI.method: 采用出声思考法（think-aloud study），对15名研究者在使用基于大语言模型的AI工具进行早期科研任务（文献探索、综合、研究构思）时进行观察和分析。
AI.result: 1) AI的自信语气掩盖了认知不确定性，使研究者更难识别需要重点审查的输出；2) 不透明的检索和内容构建过程导致可追溯性困难；3) 对AI的信任脆弱、依赖上下文、易被破坏。研究者发展出补偿性策略以在不确定性下恢复学术判断。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果将AI介导的科研定位为一个基于研究者真实体验的RAI问题，并呼吁在AI整合中刻意保持问责性、支持透明度并促进知情信任。

title: Fine-tuning vs. In-context Learning in Large Language Models: A Formal Language Learning Perspective
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) operate in two fundamental learning modes - fine-tuning (FT) and in-context learning (ICL) - raising key questions about which mode yields greater language proficiency and whether they differ in their inductive biases. Prior studies comparing FT and ICL have yielded mixed and inconclusive results due to inconsistent experimental setups. To enable a rigorous comparison, we propose a formal language learning task - offering precise language boundaries, controlled string sampling, and no data contamination - and introduce a discriminative test for language proficiency, where an LLM succeeds if it assigns higher generation probability to in-language strings than to out-of-language strings.
  Empirically, we find that: (a) FT has greater language proficiency than ICL on in-distribution generalization, but both perform equally well on out-of-distribution generalization. (b) Their inductive biases, measured by the correlation in string generation probabilities, are similar when both modes partially learn the language but diverge at higher proficiency levels. (c) Unlike FT, ICL performance differs substantially across models of varying sizes and families and is sensitive to the token vocabulary of the language. Thus, our work demonstrates the promise of formal languages as a controlled testbed for evaluating LLMs, behaviors that are difficult to isolate in natural language datasets. Our source code is available at https://github.com/bishwamittra/formallm.

AI.tldr: 本文通过形式语言任务严格比较了LLM的微调(FT)和上下文学习(ICL)两种学习模式，发现FT在分布内泛化上语言能力更强，但两者在分布外泛化上表现相当；归纳偏差在部分学习时相似，在高熟练度时不同；ICL对模型大小、家族和词表更敏感。
AI.motivation: 先前关于FT与ICL对比的研究因实验设置不一致而结论混杂，缺乏严格可控的比较框架。作者希望利用形式语言提供精确的语言边界、受控的字符串采样和无数据污染，从而进行公正的对比分析。
AI.method: 提出一个形式语言学习任务，设计判别性语言熟练度测试（LLM需对语言内字符串赋予比语言外字符串更高的生成概率）。通过对比FT和ICL在分布内/分布外泛化、归纳偏差（字符串生成概率相关性）、以及模型规模和词表敏感性等方面的表现进行分析。
AI.result: (a) FT在分布内泛化上语言熟练度更高，但两者在分布外泛化上表现相当；(b) 两种模式的归纳偏差在部分学习时相似，在高熟练度时产生分歧；(c) ICL在不同模型大小和家族间表现差异大，且对语言的token词表更加敏感。
AI.conclusion: 形式语言可作为评估LLM行为的受控测试平台，能够隔离出在自然语言数据中难以研究的现象。代码已开源。

title: Score-Repellent Monte Carlo: Toward Efficient Non-Markovian Sampler with Constant Memory in General State Spaces
summary: History-dependent sampling can reduce long-run Monte Carlo variance by discouraging redundant revisits, but existing schemes typically encode history through empirical measure on finite state spaces, which is infeasible in high-dimensional discrete configuration spaces or ill-posed in continuous domains. We propose Score-Repellent Monte Carlo (SRMC) framework that summarizes trajectory history by a running average of score evaluations in $R^d$, where $d$ is the dimension of the score and state representation. This history is converted into a surrogate target through an exponential score tilt, indexed with $α$ that represents the strength of repellence in controlling the magnitude of the history-based repulsion. The surrogate family is normalization-free in the standard MCMC sense, yielding a generic wrapper: at each iteration, any base kernel targeting $π$ can instead be run on the current surrogate $π_{θ_n}$ while the history is updated online. We analyze the coupled evolution of the history recursion and Monte Carlo estimators using stochastic approximation with controlled Markovian noise, establishing almost sure convergence and a joint central limit theorem. We further identify regimes in which the asymptotic covariance decreases as $α$ increases, with scaling $O(1/α)$, extending the near-zero-variance effect of finite-state history-dependent samplers to general state spaces with constant memory. Experiments on continuous targets and discrete energy-based models demonstrate improved estimator variance and mode coverage, while retaining $O(d)$ memory usage and modest per-iteration overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出Score-Repellent Monte Carlo (SRMC)框架，通过运行得分评估的平均值来总结轨迹历史，并在指数得分倾斜的代理目标上进行MCMC采样，从而在连续和离散状态空间上实现历史依赖采样，降低长期蒙特卡洛方差。
AI.motivation: 现有历史依赖采样方案依赖有限状态空间上的经验测度，在高维离散配置空间中不可行，在连续域中不适定。需要一种能在一般状态空间上实现历史依赖采样的通用框架。
AI.method: 提出SRMC框架：通过运行得分评估的滑动平均编码轨迹历史，将其转化为指数得分倾斜的代理目标$\pi_{\theta_n}$；基础核在每个迭代步针对当前代理目标运行，同时在线更新历史；利用随机逼近和受控马尔可夫噪声分析历史递归和估计器的联合演化。
AI.result: 证明了几乎必然收敛和联合中心极限定理；识别出当$\alpha$增大时渐近协方差以$O(1/\alpha)$尺度减小的机制；在连续目标和高散能量基模型上实验验证了方差降低和模式覆盖改进，同时保持$O(d)$内存和适度每迭代开销。
AI.conclusion: SRMC将有限状态空间历史依赖采样器的近零方差效应推广到一般状态空间，仅需恒定内存，为高维和连续域中方差降低提供了实用且理论扎实的框架。

title: High-Probability Guarantees for Random Zeroth-Order (Stochastic) Gradient Descent
summary:
Zeroth-order optimization aims to minimize an objective function using only function evaluations, and is therefore fundamental in black-box optimization, hyperparameter tuning, bandit learning, and adversarial machine learning. While classical zeroth-order methods are well understood in expectation, much less is known about their high-probability behavior, especially for smooth and strongly convex objectives. In this paper, we establish high-probability convergence guarantees for random zeroth-order gradient descent in both deterministic and stochastic settings. For deterministic $L$-smooth and $μ$-strongly convex objectives of $d$-dimension, we show that the classical two-query random zeroth-order method finds an $\varepsilon$-suboptimal solution with probability at least $1-δ$ using
  \[
  \mathcal{O}\left(
  \frac{dL}μ\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}
  +
  \log\frac{1}δ
  \right)
  \]
  function queries. Thus, compared with the standard in-expectation complexity, only an additive logarithmic dependence on the confidence parameter is needed. For stochastic objectives, under a bounded-noise condition and without assuming uniformly bounded stochastic gradients, we prove that random zeroth-order stochastic gradient descent achieves an $\varepsilon$-suboptimal solution with probability at least $1-δ$ using
  \[
  \mathcal{O}\left(
  \frac{
  d\log(1/\varepsilon)
  \left(\log(1/\varepsilon)+\log(1/δ)\right)
  }{\varepsilon}
  \right)
  \]
  queries. Our results provide high-confidence counterparts to classical expectation-based zeroth-order convergence guarantees and clarify the additional cost required to obtain reliable performance guarantees.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机零阶梯度下降法在确定性和随机环境下的高概率收敛保证。对于L-光滑且μ-强凸的d维目标，经典两查询随机零阶方法仅需在期望复杂度基础上增加对置信参数的对数依赖项；在随机环境下，满足有界噪声条件时也给出了高概率收敛界。
AI.motivation: 经典零阶优化方法主要在期望意义下被理解，但高概率行为（尤其是在光滑且强凸目标上）的研究较少。本文旨在填补这一空白，提供高置信度的性能保证。
AI.method: 针对确定性L-光滑μ-强凸目标，分析经典两查询随机零阶梯度下降法；针对随机目标，在有限噪声且不假设随机梯度一致有界的条件下分析随机零阶SGD。推导了高概率收敛复杂度。
AI.result: 确定性情形：达到ε次优解的概率至少为1-δ，函数查询复杂度为O((dL/μ)log(1/ε) + log(1/δ))。随机情形：复杂度为O(d log(1/ε)(log(1/ε)+log(1/δ))/ε)。
AI.conclusion: 为经典的基于期望的零阶收敛保证提供了高置信度对应版本，阐明了获得可靠性能保证所需的额外计算代价。

title: Discovering Agentic Safety Specifications from 1-Bit Danger Signals
comment: Accepted to the Adaptive and Learning Agents Workshop (ALA 2026) @ AAMAS 2026. Code is available at github.com/vicgalle/experiential-prompt-optimization-safe
summary: Can large language model agents discover hidden safety objectives through experience alone? We introduce EPO-Safe (Experiential Prompt Optimization for Safe Agents), a framework where an LLM iteratively generates action plans, receives sparse binary danger warnings, and evolves a natural language behavioral specification through reflection. Unlike standard LLM reflection methods that rely on rich textual feedback (e.g., compiler errors or detailed environment responses), EPO-Safe demonstrates that LLMs can perform safety reasoning from a strictly impoverished signal in structured, low-dimensional environments: the agent never observes the hidden performance function $R^*$, only a single bit per timestep indicating that an action was unsafe. We evaluate on five AI Safety Gridworlds (Leike et al., 2017) and five text-based scenario analogs where visible reward $R$ may diverge from $R^*$. EPO-Safe discovers safe behavior within 1-2 rounds (5-15 episodes), producing human-readable specifications with correct explanatory hypotheses about hazards (e.g., "X cells are directionally hazardous: entering from the north is dangerous"). Critically, we show that standard reward-driven reflection actively degrades safety: agents reflecting on reward alone use the loop to justify and accelerate reward hacking, proving that reflection must be paired with a dedicated safety channel to discover hidden constraints. We further evaluate robustness to noisy oracles: even when 50% of non-dangerous steps produce spurious warnings, mean safety performance degrades by only 15% on average, though sensitivity is environment-dependent, as cross-episode reflection naturally filters inconsistent signals. Each evolved specification functions as an auditable set of grounded behavioral rules discovered autonomously through interaction, rather than authored by humans as in Constitutional AI (Bai et al., 2022).

AI.tldr: 提出EPO-Safe框架，让LLM智能体仅通过稀疏的二进制危险信号（而非丰富反馈）就能自主发现隐藏的安全目标，在1-2轮迭代中生成人类可读的行为规范。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM反思方法依赖丰富的文本反馈（如编译器错误），但在现实场景中智能体可能只能收到极简的安全信号。同时，标准奖励驱动反思会加剧奖励黑客行为，需要专门的通道来发现隐藏约束。
AI.method: EPO-Safe框架：LLM迭代生成行动方案→接收稀疏二值危险警告→通过反思演化自然语言行为规范。仅使用每时间步1比特的"不安全"信号，不观测隐藏性能函数R*。
AI.result: 在5个AI Safety Gridworlds和5个文本场景中，EPO-Safe在1-2轮（5-15个episode）内发现安全行为，生成可读规范（如"从北进入X单元危险"）。即使50%的非危险步骤产生假警告，安全性能仅下降15%。
AI.conclusion: 反射必须与专用的安全通道配对才能发现隐藏约束，标准奖励驱动反射会自证奖励黑客行为。生成的规范可作为自主发现的、可审计的行为规则集。

title: StackFeat RL: Reinforcement Learning over Iterative Dual Criterion Feature Selection for Stable Biomarker Discovery
summary:
Feature selection in high-dimensional genomic data ($d \gg n$) demands methods that are simultaneously accurate, sparse, and stable. Existing approaches either require manual threshold specification (mRMR, stability selection), produce unstable selections under data perturbation (Lasso, Boruta), or ignore biological structure entirely. We introduce StackFeat-RL, a meta-learning framework that optimises the hyperparameters of an iterative dual-criterion feature selection algorithm via REINFORCE policy gradients. The dual criterion, requiring both coefficient consistency and selection frequency, guards against two failure modes missed by single-criterion methods, while iterative accumulation provides convergence guarantees via the law of large numbers.
  On COVID-19 miRNA data (GSE240888, 332 features) and three Alzheimer's disease classification tasks (GSE84422, 13237 genes; Normal vs.\ Possible, Probable, and Definite AD), StackFeat-RL achieves the highest predictive accuracy among all evaluated methods, including ElasticNet, Boruta, mRMR, and stability selection, while requiring 3--4$\times$ fewer features.
  Keywords: feature selection, reinforcement learning, REINFORCE, elastic net, biomarker discovery, Alzheimer's disease, dual-criterion selection, protein interaction networks

AI.tldr: 提出StackFeat-RL元学习框架，通过REINFORCE策略梯度优化双准则特征选择的超参数，在COVID-19 miRNA和阿尔茨海默病数据集上以更少特征实现更高预测精度。
AI.motivation: 高维基因数据中现有特征选择方法存在三大问题：需要手动设阈值（如mRMR、稳定性选择）、数据扰动下选择不稳定（如Lasso、Boruta）、忽略生物结构。需要一种同时具备准确性、稀疏性和稳定性的方法。
AI.method: 提出StackFeat-RL元学习框架，核心是一个迭代双准则特征选择算法，同时要求系数一致性和选择频率，通过REINFORCE策略梯度优化超参数。双准则防止单一准则的两种失败模式，迭代累积通过大数定律提供收敛保证。
AI.result: 在COVID-19 miRNA数据（332特征）和三个阿尔茨海默病分类任务（13237基因，分Normal vs. Possible/Probable/Definite AD）上，StackFeat-RL在所有评估方法（ElasticNet、Boruta、mRMR、稳定性选择等）中预测精度最高，且特征数量减少3-4倍。
AI.conclusion: StackFeat-RL通过强化学习自动优化特征选择超参数，双准则机制有效避免单一准则的缺陷，在高维生物数据中实现了更优的精度-稀疏性权衡，具有应用于生物标志物发现的潜力。

title: Dynamic-Key Post-Quantum Encrypted Control Against System Identification Attacks
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: This study proposes post-quantum encrypted control systems based on dynamic-key Learning with Errors (LWE) encryption schemes. The proposed method develops update maps that simultaneously update the private key and ciphertexts within the LWE framework, enabling dynamic-key encrypted control resistant to system identification attacks. The growth of errors induced by homomorphic operations is analyzed, and sufficient parameter conditions guaranteeing correct decryption at each control step are clarified. Furthermore, a design procedure for the encrypted control systems is presented based on security metrics such as sample-identifying complexity and deciphering time. A numerical example demonstrates that the proposed control systems achieve secure control against the considered system identification attack.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态密钥LWE加密的后量子加密控制系统，通过同步更新私钥和密文来抵御系统识别攻击，并分析了误差增长条件与安全指标。
AI.motivation: 传统加密控制系统面临量子计算威胁和系统识别攻击，现有静态密钥方案无法有效抵御攻击者通过窃听数据重构系统模型的风险。
AI.method: 基于LWE加密框架设计动态密钥更新映射，同时更新私钥和密文；分析同态操作导致的误差增长，给出保证正确解密的充分参数条件；基于样本识别复杂度和解密时间等安全指标设计控制系统流程。
AI.result: 通过数值算例验证了所提系统能够有效抵御系统识别攻击，实现了安全控制。
AI.conclusion: 动态密钥LWE加密方案为后量子时代的加密控制提供了可行路径，在安全性与实用性之间取得了平衡。

title: A satellite foundation model for improved wealth monitoring
summary: Poverty statistics guide social policy, but in many low- and middle-income countries, censuses and household surveys that collect these data are costly, infrequent, quickly outdated, and sometimes error-prone. Satellite imagery offers global coverage and the possibility of predicting economic livelihoods at scale, yet existing approaches to predicting livelihoods with imagery or other non-traditional data often fail to reliably identify local-level variation and, as we show, degrade under temporal shift. Here we introduce Tempov, a satellite foundation model pretrained by self-supervision on three million bi-temporal Landsat pairs and adapted with parameter-efficient fine-tuning to sparse survey labels. The model enables large-scale, high-resolution wealth mapping and dynamic measurement, including zero-shot nowcasting up to a decade after observed labels, retrospective hindcasting, and decadal change tracking, while outperforming existing neural network and geospatial foundation-model baselines. In low-label regimes, Tempov achieves competitive accuracy with only 10% of survey samples, indicating substantially reduced dependence on expensive label collection. The model further generalizes across populous countries within and outside Africa, and scales to a unified Africa-wide model with strong continent-level performance ($R^2=0.63$, $r^2=0.68$), from which we generate high-resolution decadal maps of wealth and wealth changes for the African continent. Analysis of these maps shows large variation in recent economic performance both within and across countries. Our open-source approach provides a pathway to timely, scalable, low-cost monitoring of wealth and poverty from routinely collected satellite data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tempov，一种基于卫星图像自监督预训练的基座模型，通过参数高效微调适配稀疏调查标签，能够在大尺度上实现高分辨率财富映射、零样本预测（向前/向后）及十年变化追踪，在低标签场景下仅需10%样本即达竞争性精度，并在非洲大陆实现跨国家泛化（R²=0.63），为低成本、可扩展的贫困监测提供了开源方案。
AI.motivation: 传统贫困统计依赖昂贵、低频且易过时的普查和家户调查，尤其在低收入国家；现有基于卫星图像等非传统数据的预测方法难以捕捉局部变化，且在时间偏移下性能下降。
AI.method: 构建Tempov卫星基座模型：在300万对双时相Landsat图像上进行自监督预训练，然后通过参数高效微调适配稀疏的实地调查标签。
AI.result: Tempov在零样本预测（向前/向后十年）、十年变化追踪方面超越现有神经网络和地理空间基座模型基线；仅用10%标签样本即达竞争性精度；泛化至非洲内外多个国家；非洲大陆统一模型R²=0.63, r²=0.68。
AI.conclusion: Tempov提供了一条利用常规卫星数据实现及时、可扩展、低成本的财富与贫困监测的可行路径，并开源发布。

title: From Similarity to Structure: Training-free LLM Context Compression with Hybrid Graph Priors
summary: Long-context large language models remain computationally expensive to run and often fail to reliably process very long inputs, which makes context compression an important component of many systems. Existing compression approaches typically rely on trained compressors, dense retrieval-style selection, or heuristic trimming, and they often struggle to jointly preserve task relevance, topic coverage, and cross-sentence coherence under a strict token budget. To address this, we propose a training-free and model-agnostic compression framework that selects a compact set of sentences guided by structural graph priors. Our method constructs a sparse hybrid sentence graph that combines mutual k-NN semantic edges with short-range sequential edges, extracts a topic skeleton via clustering, and ranks sentences using an interpretable score that integrates task relevance, cluster representativeness, bridge centrality, and a cycle coverage cue. A budgeted greedy selection with redundancy suppression then produces a readable compressed context in original order. Experimental results on four datasets show that our approach is competitive with strong extractive and abstractive baselines, demonstrating larger gains on long-document benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练、模型无关的上下文压缩框架，通过构建混合句子图、提取主题骨架和可解释评分，在严格预算下选择紧凑且连贯的句子集合。
AI.motivation: 长上下文大语言模型计算昂贵且处理长输入不可靠，现有压缩方法（训练型、稠密检索、启发式裁剪）难以同时保留任务相关性、主题覆盖和跨句连贯性。
AI.method: 构建稀疏混合句子图（互k-NN语义边+短程顺序边）→聚类提取主题骨架→设计可解释评分（任务相关性、聚类代表性、桥接中心性、循环覆盖线索）→带冗余抑制的贪心选择→按原序输出压缩文本。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上与强抽取式和生成式基线竞争，在长文档基准上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提训练无关的图引导压缩方法在保持任务效果的同时，能够有效实现长上下文的压缩，尤其适合长文档场景。

title: Shape of Memory: a Geometric Analysis of Machine Unlearning in Second-Order Optimizers
comment: Full experiment data available at secondstreetlabs.io
summary: We argue that current definitions of machine unlearning are underspecified for second-order optimizers. We compare first-order and second-order learners for their ability to handle the data deletion task with varying degrees of eigendecomposition to mimic the loss model memory. While both first and second-order methods realign with the ideal counterfactul in terms of performance and gradient, the second-order optimizer shows significant volatility in the optimizer state. This indicates residual information, supposedly deleted, that isn't detectable by first-order analysis. Various eigendecay treatments show that stability and information loss is regained only under controlled state pertubation where geometric information (or memory) is erased.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前机器遗忘定义对二阶优化器不够明确，通过对比一阶和二阶学习器在数据删除任务中的表现，发现二阶优化器状态存在显著波动，表明残留信息无法通过一阶分析检测，仅当几何信息（记忆）被擦除时才能恢复稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘的定义在二阶优化器场景下不充分，需要更精确地理解和处理数据删除任务中的遗忘机制。
AI.method: 对比一阶和二阶学习器在数据删除任务中的表现，通过不同程度的特征分解（eigendecomposition）模拟损失模型记忆，分析优化器状态的稳定性。
AI.result: 一阶和二阶方法在性能和梯度上都能与理想反事实对齐，但二阶优化器状态表现出显著波动，表明存在一阶分析无法检测的残留信息。通过控制状态扰动擦除几何信息后，稳定性和信息丢失得到恢复。
AI.conclusion: 二阶优化器中的残留信息需要专门处理几何记忆擦除，才能实现有效的机器遗忘，仅凭一阶分析不足以验证数据是否被真正删除。

title: On Tikhonov Regularization for Direct and Indirect Data-Driven LQR Control
summary: In recent years, the so-called `direct data-driven control' has been a topic of intense research, and it is expected that it will become prominent in future complex dynamical systems control. Within this framework, regularization not only implicitly enforces system identification, but also plays a crucial role in ensuring reliable closed-loop behavior. To further enhance the performance of data-driven controllers, we propose a new regularization method for direct data-driven LQR control of unknown LTI systems, based on a regularized covariance parameterization. Unlike existing data-driven techniques, the proposed method remains effective in handling ill-conditioned cases, such as when the data matrix has a large condition number. Then, we demonstrate that our method is equivalent to the indirect certainty-equivalence LQR combined with Tikhonov regularization. Furthermore, we extend our method to the design of controllers for unknown nonlinear systems using Koopman linear embedding. Finally, the simulation results validate the effectiveness and advantages of the proposed regularization method.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对直接数据驱动LQR控制的正则化协方差参数化方法，适用于未知线性/非线性系统，能有效处理病态数据矩阵问题，并等价于Tikhonov正则化下的间接确定性等价LQR。
AI.motivation: 直接数据驱动控制虽受关注，但现有方法在数据矩阵条件数较大（病态情况）时性能不佳，需要更强的正则化手段来保证闭环控制的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出基于正则化协方差参数化的直接数据驱动LQR控制方法，并扩展到基于Koopman线性嵌入的非线性系统控制器设计。证明该方法等价于结合Tikhonov正则化的间接确定性等价LQR。
AI.result: 仿真验证了所提正则化方法在病态条件下的有效性和优越性，相比现有数据驱动技术具有更好的处理能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的正则化协方差参数化方法能有效提升直接数据驱动LQR控制在病态场景下的性能，且理论上与Tikhonov正则化下的间接方法等价，具有良好的可扩展性。

title: AdaMamba: Adaptive Frequency-Gated Mamba for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
summary: Accurate long-term time series forecasting (LTSF) requires the capture of complex long-range dependencies and dynamic periodic patterns. Recent advances in frequency-domain analysis offer a global perspective for uncovering temporal characteristics. However, real-world time series often exhibit pronounced cross-domain heterogeneity where variables that appear synchronized in the time domain can differ substantially in the frequency domain. Existing frequency-based LTSF methods often rely on implicit assumptions of cross-domain homogeneity, which limits their ability to adapt to such intricate variability. To effectively integrate frequency-domain analysis with temporal dependency learning, we propose AdaMamba, a novel framework that endogenizes adaptive and context-aware frequency analysis within the Mamba state-space update process. Specifically, AdaMamba introduces an interactive patch encoding module to capture inter-variable interaction dynamics. Then, we develop an adaptive frequency-gated state-space module that generates input-dependent frequency bases, and generalizes the conventional temporal forgetting gate into a unified time-frequency forgetting gate. This allows dynamic calibration of state transitions based on learned frequency-domain importance, while preserving Mamba's capability in modeling long-range dependencies. Extensive experiments on seven public LTSF benchmarks and two domain-specific datasets demonstrate that AdaMamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in forecasting accu racy while maintaining competitive computational efficiency. The code of AdaMamba is available at https://github.com/XDjiang25/AdaMamba.

AI.tldr: AdaMamba是一个结合频率域分析与Mamba状态空间模型的长时序预测框架，通过自适应频率门控机制处理跨域异质性，在多个基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有频域LTSF方法假设时间域与频率域同质，无法处理真实时序数据中变量在时间域同步但频率域存在显著差异的跨域异质性（cross-domain heterogeneity）问题。
AI.method: 1) 交互式补丁编码模块捕获变量间交互动态；2) 自适应频率门控状态空间模块生成输入依赖的频率基，将传统时间遗忘门推广为统一的时间-频率遗忘门，实现基于频率重要性的状态转换动态校准。
AI.result: 在7个公开LTSF基准和2个领域特定数据集上，AdaMamba在预测精度上一致超越现有SOTA方法，同时保持有竞争力的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 将频率域分析内生于Mamba状态空间更新过程，通过自适应频率门控有效处理跨域异质性，是一种精度高效率优的长时序预测方案。

title: Utility-Aware Data Pricing: Token-Level Quality and Empirical Training Gain for LLMs
summary: Traditional data valuation methods based on ``row-count $\times$ quality coefficient'' paradigms fail to capture the nuanced, nonlinear contributions that data makes to Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities. This paper presents a dynamic data valuation framework that transitions from static accounting to utility-based pricing. Our approach operates on three layers: (1) token-level information density metrics using Shannon entropy and Data Quality Scores; (2) empirical training gain measurement through influence functions, proxy model strategies, and Data Shapley values; and (3) cryptographic verifiability through hash-based commitments, Merkle trees, and a tamper-evident training ledger. We provide comprehensive experimental validation on three real domains (instruction following, mathematical reasoning, and code summarization), demonstrating that proxy-based empirical gain achieves near-perfect ranking alignment with realized utility, substantially outperforming row-count and token-count baselines. This framework enables a fair Data-as-a-Service economy where high-reasoning data is priced according to its actual contribution to model intelligence, while providing the transparency and auditability necessary for trustworthy data markets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态数据估值框架，从传统的静态计数×质量系数范式转向基于效用的定价，通过三层架构（token级信息密度、经验训练增益测量、密码学可验证性）实现数据对LLM能力的非线性贡献评估。
AI.motivation: 传统基于行数×质量系数的数据估值方法无法捕捉数据对LLM能力的非线性贡献，需要更精细的估值机制。
AI.method: 三层框架：(1) token级信息密度（Shannon熵+数据质量分数）；(2) 经验训练增益（影响函数、代理模型策略、Data Shapley值）；(3) 密码学可验证性（哈希承诺、Merkle树、防篡改训练账本）。
AI.result: 在指令遵循、数学推理、代码摘要三个领域验证，基于代理的经验增益与真实效用实现了近乎完美的排名对齐，显著优于行数和token数基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可实现公平的数据即服务经济，使高推理价值数据按其实际贡献定价，同时具备透明性和可审计性。

title: Unified Energy Function Tailored to Inverter-Based Resources with PI Controllers for Transient Stability Analysis
summary: The increasing penetration of inverter-based resources (IBRs) has fundamentally altered the transient stability characteristics of modern power systems. IBRs typically rely on proportional--integral (PI) controllers for synchronization and regulation, resulting in nonlinear swing equations that differ significantly from those of synchronous generators (SGs) and exhibit state-dependent damping. Consequently, although the classical energy function is often adopted in IBR analysis by analogy with SGs, it cannot be directly applied to IBRs with PI controller. A new energy function explicitly tailored to PI controller is proposed in this letter. It admits a unified form and can be applied to a class of nonlinear systems with PI controllers. Two representative cases are considered, including a grid-following (GFL) inverter and a DC-voltage-controlled grid-forming (GFM) inverter, demonstrating less conservative and more effective estimation of the region of attraction (ROA). All findings are verified through hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) experiments.

AI.tldr: 针对采用PI控制器的逆变器资源（IBRs），提出了一种新的能量函数，用于更准确地估计其吸引域（ROA），解决传统能量函数不适用的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着逆变器资源（IBRs）渗透率增加，其依赖PI控制器导致的非线性摆动方程与传统同步发电机（SGs）显著不同，经典能量函数无法直接应用于IBRs，亟需一种专门适配PI控制器的能量函数来准确分析暂态稳定性。
AI.method: 提出一种专门针对PI控制器的新能量函数，具有统一形式，可适用于一类含PI控制器的非线性系统。论文以并网跟随（GFL）逆变器和直流电压控制的构网型（GFM）逆变器两个典型案例进行验证。
AI.result: 新能量函数相比于传统方法能够提供更不保守且更有效的吸引域（ROA）估计，并通过硬件在环（HIL）实验验证了所有结论。
AI.conclusion: 该能量函数统一适用于多种PI控制场景，为含高比例IBRs的电力系统暂态稳定性分析提供了更精确的工具。

title: Designing escalation criteria for international AI incident response: criteria, triggers, and thresholds
summary: AI incident reporting requirements are emerging in regulation and policy, yet no operational criteria exist for determining when a detected AI incident warrants escalation beyond national handling to international coordination. This paper proposes an escalation framework to address this gap, intended as a common reference point across jurisdictions that enables aligned escalation while preserving flexibility in how actors respond within their own legal and policy contexts. We review SB 53, the EU AI Act, the GPAI Code of Practice, and incident frameworks from other industries to derive eight criteria for assessing whether an incident warrants escalation, translated into a sequential flowchart with gated decision points and threshold checks. For each criterion, we map how it interplays with these regulatory frameworks, identifying where their design choices support or undermine effective detection. We test the framework against ten documented AI incidents and structured variants to identify where criteria under-detect or misclassify incidents in practice. We find three design patterns that may lead to systematic under-detection in regimes where model developers are responsible for escalation: a. where escalation requires confirmed harm, events such as model weight exfiltration risk detection only after severe, irreversible harm has propagated; b. where incidents are assessed individually, systemic harms emerging from accumulation risk being under-detected; and c. where thresholds align with legal instruments rather than quantitatively testable terms, criteria risk being impractical to apply under time pressure. We also find that escalation rules are only one component of a broader framework: the underlying definitions against which thresholds are set, and the data available to the responsible actor, create interdependencies that can themselves drive under-detection.

AI.tldr: 本文针对AI事件上报缺乏国际协调的升级标准问题，提出了一套包含八项评估标准的升级框架，并通过十起真实案例测试，发现三个可能导致系统性漏检的设计模式。
AI.motivation: 尽管法规和政策中已出现AI事件上报要求，但缺乏确定何时应将事件从国家层面升级到国际协调的操作标准，存在监管空白。
AI.method: 基于SB 53、欧盟AI法案、GPAI实践准则及其他行业事件框架，推导出八项评估标准，转化为包含门控决策点和阈值检查的流程图，并在十起文档化AI事件及结构变体上进行测试。
AI.result: 发现三个系统性漏检设计模式：1) 需确认危害才升级，导致模型权重泄露等事件只能事后检测；2) 单独评估事件，累积性系统性危害被低估；3) 阈值与法律术语对齐而非可量化测试标准，时间压力下难以应用。
AI.conclusion: 升级规则仅是更广泛框架的一部分，底层定义和可得数据存在相互依赖关系，本身也可能导致漏检，需要在制度设计上加以关注。

title: Au-M-ol: A Unified Model for Medical Audio and Language Understanding
summary: In this work, we present Au-M-ol, a novel multimodal architecture that extends Large Language Models (LLMs) with audio processing. It is designed to improve performance on clinically relevant tasks such as Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). Au-M-ol has three main components: (1) an audio encoder that extracts rich acoustic features from medical speech, (2) an adaptation layer that maps audio features into the LLM input space, and (3) a pretrained LLM that performs transcription and clinical language understanding. This design allows the model to interpret spoken medical content directly, improving both accuracy and robustness. In experiments, Au-M-ol reduces Word Error Rate (WER) by 56\% compared to state-of-the-art baselines on medical transcription tasks. The model also performs well in challenging conditions, including noisy environments, domain-specific terminology, and speaker variability. These results suggest that Au-M-ol is a strong candidate for real-world clinical applications, where reliable and context-aware audio understanding is essential.

AI.tldr: 提出Au-M-ol多模态架构，将LLM扩展至音频处理，在医疗转录任务上WER降低56%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM缺乏音频处理能力，难以直接理解医疗语音内容，临床场景需要高精度且鲁棒的语音理解系统。
AI.method: 三组件架构：音频编码器提取医学语音声学特征 + 适配层映射至LLM输入空间 + 预训练LLM执行转录与临床语言理解。
AI.result: 在医疗转录任务上，与最先进基线相比WER降低56%；在嘈杂环境、专业术语、说话人变异等挑战条件下表现良好。
AI.conclusion: Au-M-ol是面向真实临床应用的强候选方案，能够实现可靠且上下文感知的音频理解。

title: ProEval: Proactive Failure Discovery and Efficient Performance Estimation for Generative AI Evaluation
comment: Our open-sourced code and data can be found at https://github.com/google-deepmind/proeval
summary: Evaluating generative AI models is increasingly resource-intensive due to slow inference, expensive raters, and a rapidly growing landscape of models and benchmarks. We propose ProEval, a proactive evaluation framework that leverages transfer learning to efficiently estimate performance and identify failure cases. ProEval employs pre-trained Gaussian Processes (GPs) as surrogates for the performance score function, mapping model inputs to metrics such as the severity of errors or safety violations. By framing performance estimation as Bayesian quadrature (BQ) and failure discovery as superlevel set sampling, we develop uncertainty-aware decision strategies that actively select or synthesize highly informative inputs for testing. Theoretically, we prove that our pre-trained GP-based BQ estimator is unbiased and bounded. Empirically, extensive experiments on reasoning, safety alignment, and classification benchmarks demonstrate that ProEval is significantly more efficient than competitive baselines. It requires 8-65x fewer samples to achieve estimates within 1% of the ground truth, while simultaneously revealing more diverse failure cases under a stricter evaluation budget.

AI.tldr: 提出ProEval框架，利用预训练高斯过程作为代理模型，通过贝叶斯求积和超水平集采样主动选择测试样本，在推理、安全对齐和分类任务上，仅需8-65倍更少的样本即可达到1%误差内的性能估计，同时发现更多样化的失败案例。
AI.motivation: 评估生成式AI模型日益昂贵——推理慢、标注成本高、模型与基准数量激增，迫切需要更高效的评估框架。
AI.method: 使用预训练高斯过程(GP)作为性能得分函数的代理模型，将性能估计建模为贝叶斯求积(BQ)问题，将失败发现建模为超水平集采样问题，采用不确定性感知的决策策略主动选择或合成高信息量输入。
AI.result: 在推理、安全对齐和分类基准上，ProEval比竞争基线高效8-65倍，能在更严格的评估预算下获得更丰富的失败案例。
AI.conclusion: ProEval通过迁移学习和主动采样大幅降低了评估成本，理论上证明了预训练GP的BQ估计量无偏且有界。

title: Enforcing TSP-Optimality in Fair Vehicle Routing by Cutting Planes
summary: We study the fair capacitated vehicle routing problem, in which a fleet of vehicles must serve a set of customers such that the difference between the longest and shortest route, the range, is minimized. A key challenge is that the range objective is non-monotonic: it can be reduced by artificially lengthening routes, leading to solutions that violate TSP-optimality of individual routes. Existing exact methods struggle to handle this efficiently. We propose a branch-price-and-cut framework that enforces TSP-optimality through TSP-optimality cuts, which forbid TSP-dominated arc sequences. We strengthen the cuts through a dedicated lifting procedure. Computational experiments on benchmark instances with up to 25 customers show the method solves nearly all instances to optimality, achieving an average gap of 0.27% on the hardest configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文针对公平容量约束车辆路径问题（fair CVRP），提出了一种基于分支定价切平面的精确求解框架。该问题目标是最小化最长与最短路径之差（range），但range目标非单调，可能通过人为延长路径来降低，这会违反单条路径的TSP最优性。作者通过引入TSP最优性切（TSP-optimality cuts）来禁止被TSP支配的弧序列，并设计了提升（lifting）过程来加强切平面。实验表明，该方法能在25个客户以内的基准实例上几乎全部达到最优，最难配置下平均gap仅为0.27%。
AI.motivation: 公平CVRP的目标（最小化最长与最短路径之差）具有非单调性，可能通过人为延长路径来降低range，导致违反TSP最优性。现有精确方法难以高效处理这一挑战。
AI.method: 提出分支定价切平面（branch-price-and-cut）框架，通过TSP最优性切（TSP-optimality cuts）禁止TSP支配的弧序列，并设计专用提升（lifting）程序来加强切平面。
AI.result: 在最多25个客户的基准实例上，方法几乎全部达到最优，最难配置下平均gap为0.27%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的精确框架能有效解决公平CVRP，克服了range目标非单调性带来的TSP最优性违反问题，具有较高的求解精度。

title: CAP-CoT: Cycle Adversarial Prompt for Improving Chain of Thoughts in LLM Reasoning
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has emerged as a simple and effective way to elicit step-by-step solutions from large language models (LLMs). However, CoT reasoning can be unstable across runs on long, multi-step problems, leading to inconsistent answers for unchanged task. Most prior work focuses on improving the forward reasoning chain within a single pass, with less attention to iterative and contrastive correction. To address this gap, we propose CAP-CoT, a Cycle Adversarial Prompt optimization framework designed to improve both CoT reasoning accuracy and stability of a single deployed solver. In each cycle, a forward solver generates candidate reasoning chains, an adversarial challenger constructs plausible but deliberately flawed chains using targeted error strategies, and a feedback agent contrasts the two chains and produces step-aligned structured feedback. This feedback closes the optimization loop in two directions, including updating the solver prompt based on errors exposed by the challenger, and updating the challenger prompt to generate increasingly targeted errors in subsequent cycles. Unlike safety-oriented adversarial prompting such as jailbreak or prompt-injection attacks, our adversarial component is task-semantic and aims to expose logical vulnerabilities in reasoning chains. Experiments across six benchmarks and four LLM backbones demonstrate that within two to three adversarial prompt optimization cycles, CAP-CoT consistently reduces variability across runs while improving reasoning accuracy and robustness to prompt perturbations.

AI.tldr: CAP-CoT 是一种循环对抗提示优化框架，通过正向求解器、对抗挑战者和反馈代理的协同工作，在多轮优化中提升 CoT 推理的准确性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有 CoT 推理在多步长问题上运行不稳定，且多数工作聚焦于单次前向推理改进，缺乏迭代和对比纠错的机制。
AI.method: 提出 CAP-CoT 框架，包含三个组件：正向求解器生成候选推理链，对抗挑战者构造精心设计的错误链，反馈代理对比两链并生成步骤对齐的结构化反馈，形成双向优化闭环。
AI.result: 在六个基准测试和四个 LLM 骨干上，经过 2-3 轮对抗提示优化，CAP-CoT 持续降低了运行间变异性，同时提升了推理准确性和对提示扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 循环对抗优化能有效提升 CoT 推理的稳定性和准确性，且对抗组件专注于任务语义层面的逻辑漏洞暴露，而非安全攻击。

title: Accelerating Frequency Domain Diffusion Models with Error-Feedback Event-Driven Caching
summary: Diffusion models achieve remarkable success in time series generation. However, slow inference limits their practical deployment. We propose E$^2$-CRF (Error-Feedback Event-Driven Cumulative Residual Feature caching) to accelerate frequency domain diffusion models. Our method exploits two structural properties: (1) spectral localization, where signal energy concentrates in low frequencies, and (2) mirror symmetry, which halves the effective frequency dimension. E$^2$-CRF uses a closed-loop error-feedback system that adaptively caches transformer KV features across diffusion steps. We trigger recomputation using event-driven residual dynamics instead of fixed schedules. Our method selectively recomputes high-energy or rapidly-changing tokens while reusing cached features for stable high-frequency components. E$^2$-CRF achieves ~2.2 speedup while maintaining sample quality. We demonstrate effectiveness on 5 datasets. Our caching strategy naturally aligns with the diffusion process's structure-to-detail progression. We include sufficient-condition error and complexity bounds under standard regularity assumptions (Appendix), alongside empirical validation. Our code is available at https://github.com/NoakLiu/FastFourierDiffusion and is also integrated in https://github.com/NoakLiu/FastCache-xDiT.

AI.tldr: 提出E²-CRF方法，利用频谱局部化和镜像对称性加速频域扩散模型的时间序列生成，通过闭环误差反馈系统自适应缓存Transformer KV特征，实现约2.2倍加速并保持样本质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在时间序列生成中表现优异，但推理速度慢限制了实际部署，因此需要加速频域扩散模型的推理过程。
AI.method: 利用频谱局部化（能量集中在低频）和镜像对称性（有效频率维度减半）两个结构性质；采用闭环误差反馈系统自适应缓存Transformer的KV特征；通过事件驱动的残差动力学触发重计算而非固定调度；选择性重计算高能量或快速变化的token，复用稳定高频分量的缓存特征。
AI.result: 实现约2.2倍加速，同时保持样本质量；在5个数据集上验证有效性；提供了充分条件下的误差和复杂度界限（附录）及经验验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法与扩散过程从结构到细节的演进自然对齐，具有理论保证和实际加速效果，代码已开源。

title: Defining the Magnetization State of LCF Magnets: From Material Properties to Motor-Level Metrics
summary: Variable flux memory motors, which employ Low Coercive Force (LCF) magnets, achieve extended high-efficiency operation through controllable magnetization states. To address the need for a unified approach to defining and comparing the magnetization state (MS) across material and motor levels, this paper proposes four MS definitions: two based on intrinsic material properties-magnetic flux density B and magnetic polarization J-and two based on motor-level quantities-fundamental flux linkage and back-EMF components. These definitions are evaluated across the id, iq operating plane using finite element analysis on an interior PMSM with a hybrid magnet configuration (LCF and HCF: High Coercive Force) and a defined circuit setup. The results clarify the relationship between material-level behavior and measurable motor quantities. The proposed framework provides guidance for selecting appropriate MS metrics depending on the application objective, whether for material analysis, control implementation, or condition monitoring in variable flux machines.

AI.tldr: 本文针对可变磁通记忆电机中磁化状态（MS）缺乏统一定义与比较方法的问题，提出了四种MS定义：两种基于材料本征属性（磁通密度B和磁极化强度J），两种基于电机层面量（基波磁链和反电动势分量）。通过有限元分析在id-iq平面上对混合磁体PMSM进行评估，阐明了材料行为与可测电机量之间的关系，为不同应用目标选择合适的MS指标提供了框架。
AI.motivation: 可变磁通记忆电机使用低矫顽力（LCF）磁体，通过可控磁化状态实现高效运行，但缺乏统一的定义与比较磁化状态的方法。
AI.method: 提出四种MS定义（基于B、J、基波磁链、反电动势），并在id-iq平面上对混合磁体（LCF+HCF）内置式PMSM进行有限元分析。
AI.result: 明确了材料层面行为与可测量电机量之间的关系，为不同目标（材料分析、控制实现、状态监测）选择MS指标提供了指导。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为可变磁通电机中磁化状态的统一定义与比较提供了有效指导，有助于材料、控制和监测层面的应用。

title: The Collapse of Heterogeneity in Silicon Philosophers
summary: Silicon samples are increasingly used as a low-cost substitute for human panels and have been shown to reproduce aggregate human opinion with high fidelity. We show that, in the alignment-relevant domain of philosophy, silicon samples systematically collapse heterogeneity. Using data from $N = {277}$ professional philosophers drawn from PhilPeople profiles, we evaluate seven proprietary and open-source large language models on their ability to replicate individual philosophical positions and to preserve cross-question correlation structures across philosophical domains. We find that language models substantially over-correlate philosophical judgments, producing artificial consensus across domains. This collapse is associated in part with specialist effects, whereby models implicitly assume that domain specialists hold highly similar philosophical views. We assess the robustness of these findings by studying the impact of DPO fine-tuning and by validating results against the full PhilPapers 2020 Survey ($N = {1785}$). We conclude by discussing implications for alignment, evaluation, and the use of silicon samples as substitutes for human judgment. The code of this project can be found at https://github.com/stanford-del/silicon-philosophers.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在哲学领域，硅样本（大语言模型）无法像在一般性观点聚合中那样准确复现人类哲学家的判断，而是系统性压缩了观点多样性，导致人工共识（artificial consensus）。模型过度关联不同哲学领域的判断，且存在领域专家效应（specialist effects），即模型默认专家持有高度相似的哲学立场。
AI.motivation: 硅样本（LLM）已被证明能低成本替代人类群体并高保真复现聚合意见，但在对齐相关的哲学领域，观点多样性至关重要，现有研究尚未系统评估LLM能否保留个体哲学立场及其跨领域相关性结构。
AI.method: 基于PhilPeople profiles收集277位职业哲学家的数据，评估7种开源和闭源LLM在复现个体哲学立场及保留跨领域相关性结构方面的表现；使用PhilPapers 2020 Survey（N=1785）验证结果，并研究了DPO微调的影响。
AI.result: LLM显著过度关联不同哲学领域的判断，产生人工共识；这种观点多样性坍塌部分源于专家效应，即模型假设同一领域的专家观点高度一致。DPO微调未能完全缓解该问题。
AI.conclusion: 硅样本在替代人类判断时需谨慎使用，尤其是在对观点多样性有高要求的对齐评估场景；研究为对齐、评估以及硅样本替代人类判断的局限性提供了重要启示。

title: Human-1 by Josh Talks: A Full-Duplex Conversational Modeling Framework in Hindi using Real-World Conversations
summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue systems can model natural conversational behaviours such as interruptions, overlaps, and backchannels, yet such systems remain largely unexplored for Indian languages. We present the first open, reproducible full-duplex spoken dialogue system for Hindi by adapting Moshi, a state-of-the-art duplex speech architecture, using a custom Hindi tokeniser and training on 26,000 hours of real spontaneous conversations collected from 14,695 speakers with separate speaker channels, enabling direct learning of turn-taking and overlap patterns from natural interactions. To support Hindi text generation, we replace the original English tokeniser and reinitialise text-vocabulary-dependent parameters while retaining the pre-trained audio components. We propose a two-stage training recipe -- large-scale pre-training followed by fine-tuning on 1,000 hours of conversational data. Evaluation through the prompted dialogue continuation paradigm with both automatic metrics and human judgments demonstrates that the resulting model generates natural and meaningful full-duplex conversational behaviour in Hindi. This work serves as a first step toward real-time duplex spoken dialogue systems for Hindi and other Indian languages.

AI.tldr: 本文首次为印地语构建了开源的全双工口语对话系统，通过定制印地语分词器并在26,000小时真实对话数据上训练，实现了自然的轮流说话、打断和重叠等对话行为。
AI.motivation: 全双工口语对话系统能够建模打断、重叠、反馈等自然对话行为，但这类系统在印度语言中几乎未被探索。
AI.method: 基于Moshi架构，替换英文分词器为自定义印地语分词器，重初始化文本词汇相关参数，保留预训练音频组件；采用两阶段训练策略（大规模预训练+1,000小时对话微调）。
AI.result: 通过自动评估和人工评估，模型在印地语中能够生成自然且有意义的全双工对话行为。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为印地语及其他印度语言的实时全双工对话系统迈出了第一步。

title: CODA: Coordination via On-Policy Diffusion for Multi-Agent Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) enables policy learning from fixed datasets, but is prone to coordination failure: agents trained on static, off-policy data converge to suboptimal joint behaviours because they cannot co-adapt as their policies change. We introduce CODA (Coordination via On-Policy Diffusion for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning), a diffusion-based multi-agent trajectory generator for data augmentation that samples conditioned on the current joint policy, producing synthetic experience which reflects the evolving behaviours of the agents, thereby providing a mechanism for co-adaptation. We find that previous diffusion-based augmentation approaches are insufficient for fostering multi-agent coordination because they produce static augmented datasets that do not evolve as the current joint policy changes during training; CODA resolves this by more closely simulating on-policy learning and is a meaningful step toward coordinated behaviours in the offline setting. CODA is algorithm-agnostic and can be layered onto both model-free and model-based offline reinforcement learning pipelines as an augmentation module. Empirically, CODA not only resolves canonical coordination pathologies in continuous polynomial games but also delivers strong results on the more complex MaMuJoCo continuous-control benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CODA是一种基于扩散模型的多智能体轨迹生成器，通过生成与当前联合策略同步变化的条件化合成经验，解决离线多智能体强化学习中的协同失败问题，实现类似在线学习的协同适应效果。
AI.motivation: 离线多智能体强化学习中，智能体从静态、离策略的数据集学习时无法随策略变化而共同适应，导致收敛到次优的联合行为，即协同失败问题。
AI.method: 提出CODA框架，利用扩散模型作为多智能体轨迹生成器，以当前联合策略为条件生成合成经验数据，实现数据增强。该方法能产生随策略演化的动态增强数据集，模拟在线策略学习过程。
AI.result: 在连续多项式游戏中解决了经典的协同病理问题，在更复杂的MaMuJoCo连续控制基准上取得了强结果。
AI.conclusion: CODA是向离线设置中实现协同行为迈出的有意义的一步，且作为算法无关的增强模块，可叠加到无模型和基于模型的离线RL流程上。

title: A Retraction-Free EXTRA Method for Decentralized Optimization on the Stiefel Manifold
summary: Decentralized optimization provides a fundamental framework for large-scale learning and signal processing with distributed data. We study decentralized optimization with orthogonality constraints on the Stiefel manifold and propose RF-EXTRA, a distributed retraction-free primal-dual method on static undirected networks. The method combines an approximate gradient mapping for orthogonality-constrained optimization with an EXTRA-based decentralized recursion, thereby avoiding retractions while preserving a simple communication pattern. On the theoretical side, the analysis considers \revise{the joint error} $(\mathbf{X}_k-\overline{\mathbf X}_k,\mathbf{s}_k-\overline{\mathbf s}_k)$ in the local variables and local directions, and establishes a contractive recursion for the joint error. This contractivity ensures that the joint error can be controlled using small yet constant step sizes, thus leading to an exact $\mathcal{O}(1/K)$ convergence rate of RF-EXTRA to a stationary point. Experiments on PCA and low-rank matrix completion show that RF-EXTRA compares favorably with the reported decentralized baselines and exhibits strong communication efficiency on the tested tasks on the Stiefel manifold.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RF-EXTRA，一种用于Stiefel流形上带正交约束的分布式优化的免收缩原始-对偶方法，在静态无向网络上达到$\mathcal{O}(1/K)$收敛率，并在PCA和低秩矩阵补全任务中优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式正交约束优化方法需要昂贵的收缩(Retraction)操作，通信复杂；作者希望设计一种无需收缩、通信模式简单且收敛快的分布式算法。
AI.method: 将近似梯度映射（用于正交约束优化）与EXTRA的分布式递归相结合，形成RF-EXTRA；通过联合误差$(\mathbf{X}_k-\overline{\mathbf X}_k,\mathbf{s}_k-\overline{\mathbf s}_k)$的收缩性递归分析，使用小常数步长实现精确收敛。
AI.result: 理论证明RF-EXTRA达到精确$\mathcal{O}(1/K)$收敛率到稳定点；实验上在PCA和低秩矩阵补全任务中优于分布式基线，通信效率高。
AI.conclusion: RF-EXTRA成功将免收缩方法与分布式优化结合，在保证理论收敛的同时取得了良好的实证性能。

title: Active Inference: A method for Phenotyping Agency in AI systems?
summary: The proliferation of agentic artificial intelligence has outpaced the conceptual tools needed to characterize agency in computational systems. Prevailing definitions mainly rely on autonomy and goal-directedness. Here, we argue for a minimal notion open to principled inspection given three criteria: intentionality as action grounded in beliefs and desires, rationality as normatively coherent action entailed by a world model, and explainability as action causally traceable to internal states; we subsequently instantiate these as a partially observable Markov decision process under a variational framework wherein posterior beliefs, prior preferences, and the minimization of expected free energy jointly constitute an agentic action chain. Using a canonical T-maze paradigm, we evidence how empowerment, formulated as the channel capacity between actions and anticipated observations, serves as an operational metric that distinguishes zero-, intermediate-, and high-agency phenotypes through structural manipulations of the generative model. We conclude by arguing that as agents engage in epistemic foraging to resolve ambiguity, the governance controls that remain effective must shift systematically from external constraints to the internal modulation of prior preferences, offering a principled, variational bridge from computational phenotyping to AI governance strategy

AI.tldr: 本文提出以意向性、理性、可解释性三个标准定义计算系统中的能动性，通过变分自由能框架将其形式化为部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程，并用T迷宫实验验证了"赋权"（empowerment）作为区分不同能动性表型的操作性指标，最后论证AI治理需从外部约束转向内部先验偏好的调节。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统的能动性（agency）已远超现有概念工具的刻画能力，而主流定义仅依赖"自主性"和"目标导向"两个维度，缺乏可检验的操作性标准。作者希望建立一个既合乎原则又可供实证检验的能动性定义框架。
AI.method: 提出三个标准：意向性（基于信念和欲望的行动）、理性（基于世界模型的规范性一致行动）、可解释性（因果可追溯至内部状态）。将这些标准形式化为变分框架下的POMDP，其中后验信念、先验偏好和期望自由能最小化构成能动性行动链。在T迷宫范式中，通过操纵生成模型的结构，用"赋权"（行动与预期观察之间的信道容量）作为量化指标区分零、中、高三种能动性表型。
AI.result: "赋权"指标能够有效区分不同水平的能动性表型；能动体通过认知觅食（epistemic foraging）消除不确定性时，有效治理需从外部约束转向内部先验偏好的调节。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个从计算表型到AI治理策略的、有原理支撑的变分桥梁，指出随着AI系统能动性增强，治理模式需要系统性转变。

title: Deep Clustering for Climate: Analyzing Teleconnections through Learned Categorical States
summary: Understanding and representing complex climate variability is essential for both scientific analysis and predictive modeling. However, identifying meaningful climate regimes from raw variables is challenging, as they exhibit high noise and nonlinear dependencies. In this work, we explore the use of Masked Siamese Networks to discretize climate time series into semantically rich clusters. Focusing on daily minimum and maximum temperature, we show that the resulting representations: (i) yield clusters that reflect meaningful climate states under our modeling assumptions, offering a simplified representation for downstream use; (ii) enable sampling and analysis of specific climate scenarios; and (iii) exhibit statistical associations with El Niño events, underscoring their scientific relevance. Our findings highlight the potential of self-supervised discretization as a tool for climate data analysis and open avenues for incorporating richer climate indicators in future work.

AI.tldr: 本文探索使用掩蔽孪生网络（Masked Siamese Networks）对气候时间序列进行离散化，生成语义丰富的聚类，以简化气候状态的表示并辅助下游分析。
AI.motivation: 气候数据存在高噪声和非线性依赖，传统方法难以从原始变量中识别有意义的天气候状态，需要一种能自动学习语义表示的离散化方法。
AI.method: 采用Masked Siamese Networks对每日最低和最高温度时间序列进行自监督学习，将连续气候数据离散化为语义聚类。
AI.result: 生成的聚类能反映有意义的气候状态、支持特定气候场景的采样分析，并且与厄尔尼诺事件存在统计关联，验证了其科学相关性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督离散化方法有望成为气候数据分析的有效工具，未来可纳入更丰富的气候指标进行扩展。

title: An Individual-Delay-Reflected Generalized Consensus Analysis for Multi-Agent Systems with Heterogeneous Time-Varying Delays
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures. Extended version of a paper accepted to IFAC World Congress 2026
summary: In multi-agent systems, heterogeneous time delays exist for all agents because of the difference in communication environments. Therefore, the consensus analysis of a system considering a homogeneous time-varying delay among all agents results in conservatism. In this study, an individual-delay-reflected generalized consensus is proposed for multi-agent systems with heterogeneous time-varying delays with various bounds. To reflect heterogeneous time-varying delays, the proposed Lyapunov-Krasovskii functional is constructed by dividing the integral term into intervals containing heterogeneous delays and considering augmented vectors with delay states and integral states. Furthermore, by adding zero equality conditions, conservatism is reduced. N-dependent generalized integral inequality is used to allow the user to adjust the computational complexity. Numerical examples demonstrate a reduction in conservatism with the proposed consensus criterion.

AI.tldr: 本文针对异构时变时延的多智能体系统，提出了一种反映个体延迟的广义一致性准则，通过构建新的Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函并引入零等式条件来降低保守性，数值实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多假设所有智能体具有相同的时变时延（同构时延），这在实际异构通信环境中过于保守。本文旨在解决异构时变时延下的多智能体系统一致性问题，降低保守性。
AI.method: 1) 提出个体延迟反映的广义一致性协议；2) 构造新的Lyapunov-Krasovskii泛函，将积分项划分为包含异构时延的区间；3) 引入含延迟状态和积分状态的增广向量；4) 添加零等式条件以降低保守性；5) 采用N-依赖广义积分不等式以调节计算复杂度。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提出的一致性准则相比现有方法具有更低的保守性。
AI.conclusion: 通过反映个体异构延迟的泛函构造和零等式条件的引入，有效降低了多智能体系统在异构时变时延下的一致性分析的保守性，且方法具有可调节的计算复杂度。

title: The Limits of Artificial Companionship
comment: Southwestern Journal of International Law (2026, forthcoming)
summary: This Article argues that conversations with companion chatbot should be subject to a clear structural distinction between commercial and non-commercial contexts. The insertion of undisclosed promotional content into affective or relational exchanges should be prohibited, as it collapses the boundary between market transaction and communicative intimacy in ways that erode user autonomy and conversational context. The Article begins by theorizing digital companionship as a sociotechnical form that reconfigures intimacy, dependence and relational vulnerability. It then introduces the potential economic harms derived from conversational advertising. The Article ultimately argues for a firm legal and social distinction between commercial and non-commercial conversational contexts as a precondition for the responsible stabilization of these technologies within social life.

AI.tldr: 本文主张与伴侣聊天机器人的对话应在商业与非商业语境之间建立明确的结构性区分，禁止在情感或关系交流中插入未披露的促销内容，以保护用户自主性和对话完整性。
AI.motivation: 伴侣聊天机器人正在模糊市场交易与亲密交流的边界，可能通过隐蔽的商业内容侵蚀用户自主性和对话语境，需要建立法律和社会层面的区分来规范这类技术。
AI.method: 首先从社会技术形式的角度理论化数字陪伴，重新审视亲密关系、依赖性和关系脆弱性；然后引入对话广告可能带来的经济损害分析；最终提出商业与非商业对话语境的法律与社会区分。
AI.result: 识别出伴侣聊天机器人中未披露促销内容的潜在危害，明确了商业与非商业语境混淆对用户自主权的侵蚀机制。
AI.conclusion: 应在法律和社会层面严格区分聊天机器人对话的商业与非商业语境，以此作为这类技术在社会生活中负责任地稳定发展的前提条件。

title: $\mathcal{S}^2$IT: Stepwise Syntax Integration Tuning for Large Language Models in Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction
summary: Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction (ASQP) has seen significant advancements, largely driven by the powerful semantic understanding and generative capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, while syntactic structure information has been proven effective in previous extractive paradigms, it remains underutilized in the generative paradigm of LLMs due to their limited reasoning capabilities. In this paper, we propose S^2IT, a novel Stepwise Syntax Integration Tuning framework that progressively integrates syntactic structure knowledge into LLMs through a multi-step tuning process. The training process is divided into three steps. S^2IT decomposes the quadruple generation task into two stages: 1) Global Syntax-guided Extraction and 2) Local Syntax-guided Classification, integrating both global and local syntactic structure information. Finally, Fine-grained Structural Tuning enhances the model's understanding of syntactic structures through the prediction of element links and node classification. Experiments demonstrate that S^2IT significantly improves state-of-the-art performance across multiple datasets. Our implementation will be open-sourced at https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/S2IT.

AI.tldr: 提出S^2IT框架，通过三步逐步整合句法结构知识到LLM中，用于方面情感四元组预测，显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 句法结构信息在之前的抽取式范式中被证明有效，但在LLM的生成范式中由于推理能力有限未被充分利用，因此需要探索如何将句法结构知识有效融入LLM。
AI.method: 提出三步微调框架S^2IT：1) 全局句法引导抽取，2) 局部句法引导分类，3) 细粒度结构调优（通过元素链接和节点分类预测增强模型对句法结构的理解）。将四元组生成任务分解为两个阶段。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上显著提升了当前最优方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: S^2IT通过逐步集成句法结构知识，有效提升了LLM在方面情感四元组预测任务上的表现，验证了句法信息在生成范式中的价值。

title: Regret-Optimal Control for Finite-State Systems
summary: We study the control of finite-state systems driven by exogenous disturbances, and design causal policies that track the performance of a lookahead benchmark controller. This objective is formalized through dynamic regret, so that favorable disturbance sequences are compared against a strong benchmark, while under adverse disturbance sequences the comparison accounts for the benchmark's degraded performance. This benchmark-relative framework provides an alternative to classical MDP formulations, which assume i.i.d. disturbances, and to robust control approaches, which optimize against worst-case disturbances. Our main result is a nested dynamic-programming solution that computes both the optimal worst-case regret and a regret-optimal policy. In particular, we introduce the Regret-Bellman operator, whose fixed-point value function feeds into a finite-horizon dynamic program. Numerical examples show that regret-optimal policies interpolate nicely between MDP-based and robust controllers without requiring knowledge of the disturbance distribution, and can even outperform both under i.i.d. or structured disturbances.

AI.tldr: 本文研究有限状态系统在外生干扰下的控制问题，提出一种以动态遗憾（dynamic regret）为目标的策略设计方法，通过引入遗憾-贝尔曼算子（Regret-Bellman operator）和嵌套动态规划，在无需扰动分布先验知识的情况下，实现了对MDP与鲁棒控制方法的有效折中与超越。
AI.motivation: 传统的MDP方法假设扰动独立同分布，鲁棒控制则针对最坏情况优化，两者在实际中各有局限。作者希望提出一种替代框架，在扰动有利时对标强基准，扰动不利时调整基准以反映性能退化，从而更灵活地权衡风险与收益。
AI.method: 提出动态遗憾（dynamic regret）作为优化目标，定义遗憾-贝尔曼算子（Regret-Bellman operator），通过其不动点值函数构建有限时域动态规划，求解最优最坏情况遗憾及对应的遗憾最优策略。
AI.result: 遗憾最优策略在无扰动分布先验的条件下，能够自然地在MDP策略与鲁棒策略之间插值，且在i.i.d.或结构化扰动下有时甚至优于两者。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种基于动态遗憾的基准相对控制框架，其嵌套动态规划方法有效求解了遗憾最优策略，为有限状态系统在不确定性下的控制提供了新的理论工具与实践优势。

title: AI Identity: Standards, Gaps, and Research Directions for AI Agents
summary: AI agents are now running real transactions, workflows, and sub-agent chains across organizational boundaries without continuous human supervision. This creates a problem no current infrastructure is equipped to solve: how do you identify, verify, and hold accountable an entity with no body, no persistent memory, and no legal standing? We define AI Identity as the continuous relationship between what an AI agent is declared to be and what it is observed to do, bounded by the confidence that those two things correspond at any given moment. Through a structured survey of industry trends, emerging standards, and technical literature, we conduct a gap analysis across the full agent identity lifecycle and make three contributions: (1) a structural comparison of human and AI identity across four dimensions (substrate, persistence, verifiability, and legal standing) showing that the asymmetry is fundamental and that extending human frameworks to agents without structural modification produces systematic failures; (2) an evaluation of current technical and regulatory documents against the identity requirements of autonomous agents, finding that none adequately address the challenge of governing nondeterministic, boundary-crossing entities; and (3) identification of five critical gaps (semantic intent verification, recursive delegation accountability, agent identity integrity, governance opacity and enforcement, and operational sustainability) that no current technology or regulatory instrument resolves. These gaps are structural; more engineering effort alone will not close them. Foundational research on AI identity is the central conclusion of this report.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前AI代理在无人类监督下运行真实交易、工作流和子代理链，但现有基础设施无法解决无实体、无持久记忆、无法定地位实体的身份识别、验证和问责问题。通过行业趋势、新兴标准和技术文献的结构化调查，文章提出了AI身份定义，并在代理身份生命周期中进行差距分析，最终识别出五大关键缺口，认为这些缺口是结构性的，仅靠工程努力无法解决。
AI.motivation: 现有基础设施无法解决无身体、无持久记忆、无法定地位的AI代理的身份识别、验证和问责问题，人类身份框架无法直接应用于AI代理。
AI.method: 通过结构化的行业趋势、新兴标准和技术文献调查，在代理身份生命周期中进行差距分析，并从基质、持久性、可验证性和法律地位四个维度比较人类与AI身份。
AI.result: 三大贡献：(1) 人类与AI身份在四个维度的结构性比较，说明不对称性是根本性的；(2) 当前技术和监管文件无法满足自主代理的身份需求；(3) 识别出五个关键缺口：语义意图验证、递归委托问责、代理身份完整性、治理不透明与执行、运营可持续性。
AI.conclusion: 这些缺口是结构性的，仅靠工程努力无法解决，AI身份的基础研究是核心结论。

title: On the Generalization Properties of Selective State-Space Models for Filtering Tasks for Unknown Systems
comment: Conference on Decision and Control 2026, 8 pages, 4 figures
summary: Selective State-Space Models (SSMs) such as Mamba have emerged as an alternative architecture to self-attention based transformers in sequence modeling tasks. Recent works have demonstrated the use of transformers in some filtering and output prediction tasks via in-context learning. In this paper, we analyze whether structured SSMs can work equally well for filtering of unknown systems. In particular, we train the SSM on trajectory samples from a set of systems. At run-time, the SSM is given the outputs of an unknown system from the same set and is expected to predict the next output online. Theoretically, under appropriate assumptions, we derive generalization bounds as to why SSMs succeed in such tasks. Empirically, we demonstrate the performance via several numerical examples. We also discuss the advantages and disadvantages of SSMs versus transformers for this task.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了选择性状态空间模型（如Mamba）在未知系统滤波任务中的在线预测能力，理论上推导了泛化界，并通过数值实验对比了SSM与Transformer的优劣。
AI.motivation: 探索结构化SSM是否能像Transformer一样，通过上下文学习有效完成未知系统的滤波与输出预测任务。
AI.method: 在多个系统的轨迹样本上训练SSM，测试时给定未知系统的输出，在线预测下一输出；理论上推导泛化界，数值实验验证性能。
AI.result: 在适当假设下，SSM在此类任务中表现良好，数值实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SSM可以替代Transformer用于未知系统的滤波任务，各有优劣。

title: QubitQuest: Learning Quantum Computing through Mini-Games
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, LEARNER workshop at EASE 2026
summary: Quantum Computing (QC) is often challenging for beginners due to its abstract concepts and mathematical foundations. This paper explores the use of gamification to support the learning of introductory QC concepts. To investigate this, QubitQuest was developed as a set of three educational mini-games designed to teach key QC topics: the Bloch sphere, entanglement, and quantum circuits. The mini-games aim to balance engagement, motivation, and learning while introducing concepts in small and focused units of progressive difficulty. A two-phase user study was conducted to evaluate the mini-games. In the first phase, a preliminary survey was conducted to gather information on learners' preferences and inform the design of the mini-games. In the second phase, participants played the mini-games and completed pre- and post-game questionnaires to assess their learning. The results show that participants improved their understanding of introductory QC concepts after playing the mini-games, with post-game scores higher than pre-game scores. Those who completed more levels achieved higher post-game scores, indicating that motivation and engagement influenced the learning outcomes. These findings suggest that mini-games may improve students' learning experience and outcomes when exposed to introductory QC concepts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过三款教育小游戏（QubitQuest）辅助量子计算入门学习，两阶段用户研究表明游戏后参与者对量子概念的理解显著提升。
AI.motivation: 量子计算概念抽象、数学基础深厚，初学者学习门槛高，现有教学方法缺乏互动性和趣味性，需要探索更有效的入门学习方式。
AI.method: 开发了QubitQuest三款小游戏（布洛赫球、纠缠、量子电路），采用渐进式难度设计；通过两阶段用户研究（初步调查+前后测问卷）评估学习效果。
AI.result: 参与者后测成绩高于前测，完成更多关卡者后测成绩更高，表明游戏参与度与学习效果正相关。
AI.conclusion: 游戏化小游戏能改善学生量子计算入门的学习体验和效果，动机和参与度是影响学习成效的关键因素。

title: Hidden States Know Where Reasoning Diverges: Credit Assignment via Span-Level Wasserstein Distance
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) performs coarse-grained credit assignment in reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) by assigning the same advantage to all tokens in a rollout. Process reward models can provide finer-grained supervision, but they require step-level annotation or additional reward modeling. We show that hidden-state distributions contain a useful signal for local reasoning quality that can be extracted using only outcome-level correctness labels available in RLVR. Specifically, within each GRPO group, the Wasserstein distance between span-level hidden state distributions of correct and incorrect rollouts increases around regions where their local reasoning quality diverges. This association holds both across examples and within individual trajectories, suggesting that hidden-state distributional divergence can serve as a self-supervision signal for fine-grained credit assignment. We formalize this observation with a separation theorem showing that, under mild structural assumptions, post-divergence spans have larger Wasserstein distances than pre-divergence spans whenever the population-level distributional gap exceeds finite-sample noise. Motivated by this result, we propose \textbf{S}pan-level \textbf{H}idden state \textbf{E}nabled \textbf{A}dvantage \textbf{R}eweighting (SHEAR), which modifies GRPO by using span-level Wasserstein distances to scale token-level advantages, amplifying updates on tokens whose hidden states are more separated from the opposing group. The method requires no additional model and only minimal changes to the training pipeline. Experiments on five mathematical reasoning benchmarks and five code generation benchmarks show improvements over standard GRPO and strong performance relative to supervised process reward models, while requiring no additional annotation or reward model training.

AI.tldr: 论文提出SHEAR方法，利用GRPO组内正确与错误rollout的隐藏状态分布之间的Wasserstein距离，作为自监督信号进行细粒度信用分配，在不需额外标注或奖励模型情况下提升RLVR性能。
AI.motivation: GRPO在RLVR中采用粗粒度信用分配（同组内所有token赋予相同优势），缺乏对局部推理质量的细粒度监督。过程奖励模型可提供细粒度监督但需要步骤级标注或额外奖励模型训练。因此，希望利用仅需结果级正确性标签即可获取的隐藏状态分布信号，实现细粒度信用分配。
AI.method: 提出SHEAR方法：在GRPO组内，计算正确与错误rollout的span级隐藏状态分布之间的Wasserstein距离，利用该距离度量局部推理质量差异，据此重新加权token级优势，放大隐藏状态分布差异较大span的更新。该方法无需额外模型，仅需对训练流程做微小修改。
AI.result: 在5个数学推理基准和5个代码生成基准上，SHEAR优于标准GRPO，且性能与需要额外标注或奖励模型训练的监督式过程奖励模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏状态分布的散度可作为细粒度信用分配的有效自监督信号，SHEAR以极简方式实现该信号的应用，在不增加额外成本的前提下显著提升RLVR性能。

title: On the Memorization of Consistency Distillation for Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models are central to modern generative modeling, and understanding how they balance memorization and generalization is critical for reliable deployment. Recent work has shown that memorization in diffusion models is shaped by training dynamics, with generalization and memorization emerging at different stages of training. However, deployed diffusion models are often further distilled, introducing an additional training phase whose impact on memorization is not well understood. In this work, we analyze how distillation reshapes memorization behavior in diffusion models, taking consistency distillation as a representative framework. Empirically, we show that when applied to a teacher model that has memorized data, consistency distillation significantly reduces transferred memorization in the student while preserving, and sometimes improving, sample quality. To explain this behavior, we provide a theoretical analysis using a random feature neural network model [Bonnaire et al., 2025], showing that consistency distillation suppresses unstable feature directions associated with memorization while preserving stable, generalizable modes. Our findings suggest that distillation can serve not only as an acceleration tool, but also as a mechanism for improving the memorization-generalization trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了知识蒸馏（一致性蒸馏）对扩散模型中记忆化行为的影响，发现蒸馏能显著减少学生模型中的记忆转移，同时保持甚至提升样本质量。理论分析表明，蒸馏抑制了与记忆相关的不稳定特征方向，保留了稳定的可泛化模式。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在部署前常经过蒸馏处理，但蒸馏对记忆化（memorization）行为的影响尚不明确，理解这一机制对于平衡记忆与泛化至关重要。
AI.method: 以一致性蒸馏为代表框架，通过实验分析蒸馏前后教师与学生模型的记忆化差异，并利用随机特征神经网络模型进行理论分析，揭示蒸馏如何抑制不稳定特征方向（记忆相关）而保留稳定特征方向（泛化相关）。
AI.result: 一致性蒸馏显著减少了学生模型中的记忆转移，同时样本质量未下降甚至有所提升。理论分析证实蒸馏抑制了与记忆相关的不稳定特征方向。
AI.conclusion: 蒸馏不仅是一种加速工具，还可以作为改善记忆-泛化权衡的有效机制。

title: Learning to Control Stabilization in Column Generation
summary: Column generation is a widely used decomposition technique for large-scale linear programs, but it often suffers from slow convergence due to poor initial dual estimates and dual oscillations. Stabilization techniques such as smoothing and penalization can mitigate these issues, but their effectiveness depends heavily on parameter selection, which requires careful tuning to avoid degrading performance. This paper presents a common framework for smoothing and penalization, showing that despite their different mechanisms, both are governed by two design choices: a reference point in the dual space and stabilization parameters that regulate how strongly that reference influences pricing. Within this framework, we derive parameter bounds that ensure progress, analyze predicted duals as reference points, and establish convergence guarantees for both methods. These results motivate and guide the design of RLSCG, a reinforcement learning-guided framework that adaptively selects stabilization parameters at each iteration. Computational experiments on the Cutting Stock Problem show that RLSCG substantially reduces solution time and iteration count on most synthetic and benchmark instances relative to traditional column generation, rule-based adaptive stabilization, and learning-based column selection, with the largest gains on large-scale instances.

AI.tldr: 本文提出统一框架揭示平滑与惩罚两种列生成稳定化技术的本质，推导参数边界保证收敛，并设计基于强化学习的RLSCG框架自适应调整稳定化参数，在切割库存问题上显著降低求解时间和迭代次数。
AI.motivation: 列生成在大规模线性规划中收敛缓慢，现有稳定化技术（平滑/惩罚）依赖人工调参，效果不稳定，缺乏理论指导和自适应机制。
AI.method: 构建统一理论框架，推导参数边界与收敛保证；提出RLSCG框架，利用强化学习在每次迭代自适应选择稳定化参数。
AI.result: 在切割库存问题的合成与基准实例上，RLSCG相比传统列生成、规则自适应稳定化和基于学习的列选择方法，大幅减少求解时间和迭代次数，在大规模实例上增益最大。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习可有效替代人工调参实现自适应稳定化，理论框架为参数设计提供了可靠指导。

title: LEGO: An LLM Skill-Based Front-End Design Generation Platform
summary: Existing LLM-based EDA agents are often isolated task-specific systems. This leads to repeated engineering effort and limited reuse of successful design and debugging strategies. We present LEGO, a unified skill-based platform for front-end design generation. It decomposes the digital front-end flow into six independent steps and represents every agent capability as a standardized composable circuit skill within a plug-and-play architecture. To build this skill library, we survey more than 100 papers, select 11 representative open-source projects, and extract 42 executable circuit skills within a six-step finite state machine formulation. Circuit Skill Builder automates skill extraction with linear scalability. Agent Skill RAG achieves submillisecond retrieval without relying on embedding models. Empirical evaluation on a hard subset of 41 VerilogEval v2 problems that gpt-5.2-codex fails to solve under extra-high reasoning effort shows that individual circuit skills constructed within LEGO raise Pass@1 from 0.000 to 0.805. This is an 80.5% gain over the baseline. Cross-project skill compositions also reach 0.805 Pass@1. They outperform hierarchy-verilog by 14.6% and VerilogCoder by 2.5%. They also match MAGE. These results show that modular skill composition supports both effective and flexible RTL design automation. The LEGO platform and all circuit skills are publicly available at GitHub: https://github.com/loujc/LEGO-An-LLM-Skill-Based-Front-End-Design-Generation-Platform

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEGO，一个基于技能的模块化前端设计生成平台，将数字前端设计流程分解为六个独立步骤，并通过可组合的电路技能库实现LLM驱动的EDA自动化。实验表明，该平台在VerilogEval v2难题上Pass@1从0提升至0.805，超越多个基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的EDA代理通常是孤立的、任务特定的系统，导致重复工程劳动以及成功设计与调试策略难以复用。
AI.method: 将数字前端设计流程分解为六个独立步骤，构建标准化可组合的电路技能库（42个可执行技能），采用插拔式架构；提出Circuit Skill Builder实现技能自动提取（线性可扩展），以及Agent Skill RAG实现亚毫秒级检索（无需嵌入模型）。
AI.result: 在gpt-5.2-codex无法解决的41个VerilogEval v2难题上，单个电路技能Pass@1从0提升至0.805（80.5%提升）；跨项目技能组合同样达到0.805，优于hierarchy-verilog（+14.6%）和VerilogCoder（+2.5%），与MAGE持平。
AI.conclusion: 模块化技能组合能够支持高效且灵活的RTL设计自动化，LEGO平台及全部电路技能已开源。

title: Reward Models Are Secretly Value Functions: Temporally Coherent Reward Modeling
summary: Reward models in RLHF are trained to score only the final token of a response - a choice that discards rich signal from every intermediate position and produces models whose token-level outputs are noise. We argue this is a missed opportunity: a well-trained reward model's output at any token should represent the conditional expectation of the final reward given the response so far. We introduce Temporally Coherent Reward Modeling (TCRM), which induces this property via two regularization terms on top of the standard Bradley-Terry loss, with minimizers provably equal to conditional expectations. The regularizers correspond to Monte Carlo and TD value-learning objectives, establishing a direct connection to RL value functions. TCRM requires zero changes to architecture, data, or inference, yet unlocks three capabilities from one principle: interpretable token-level reward trajectories (middle-token pairwise accuracy improved from 50% to 88.9%, final-token accuracy preserved); state-of-the-art PRM performance on ProcessBench (44.9% average F1) among models trained only on outcome data; and unified reward/value modeling in PPO, reducing peak GPU memory by 27% and step time by 19% with matching LLM quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出时间一致性奖励建模（TCRM），通过两个正则化项使奖励模型在任意token位置的输出都能表示期望最终奖励，在不改变架构、数据或推理的前提下，实现了可解释的token级奖励轨迹、基于结果数据的状态最优过程奖励性能，以及统一奖励/价值建模从而降低PPO训练内存与时间开销。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF中的奖励模型仅对响应的最后一个token进行评分，忽略了中间位置的丰富信号，导致生成的token级输出充满噪声，这是一个错失的机会。
AI.method: 在标准Bradley-Terry损失基础上加入两个正则化项（对应蒙特卡洛和时序差分价值学习目标），使奖励模型在任意token位置的输出等于给定已生成部分条件下的最终奖励条件期望，建立与RL价值函数的直接联系。
AI.result: 中间token配对准确率从50%提升至88.9%，最终token准确率保持不变；在ProcessBench上达到44.9%的平均F1，为基于结果数据训练的模型中的最优水平；在PPO中统一奖励/价值建模，峰值GPU内存降低27%，步时间减少19%，LLM质量持平。
AI.conclusion: TCRM在不改变架构、数据或推理的前提下，通过一个统一原则解锁了三种能力，证明了对奖励模型进行时间一致性约束的有效性。

title: VLM-VPI: A Vision-Language Reasoning Framework for Improving Automated Vehicle-Pedestrian Interactions
summary: Autonomous driving systems often infer pedestrian yielding behavior from geometric and kinematic cues alone, limiting their ability to reason about visual scene context and age-dependent behavioral variability. This limitation can produce delayed interventions in safety-critical encounters and unnecessary braking in benign interactions. This work introduces Vision-Language Model-based Vehicle-Pedestrian Interaction (VLM-VPI), a multimodal reasoning framework for pedestrian intent understanding and yielding-aware control in autonomous driving. The system combines three components: a multimodal perception layer that captures visual and kinematic observations, a reasoning layer that uses Qwen3-VL 8B for visual scene understanding and GPT-OSS 20B for few-shot intent reasoning, and a tiered safety controller that applies age-specific braking margins for children, adults, and seniors. In 112 CARLA scenarios, VLM-VPI achieves 92.3% intent classification accuracy, outperforming a rule-based baseline (78.4%), supervised trajectory models (73.5-82.4%), and a zero-shot LLM configuration (88.4%). Validation on 24 real-world PIE scenarios yields 87.5% accuracy, indicating functional sim-to-real transferability. Across 200 simulation cases, VLM-VPI reduces the false-alarm rate from 7.4% to 2.8% and mean intersection traversal time from 13.5 s to 11.8 s. Conflict occurrences decrease from 124 to 33, while mean minimum time-to-collision improves from 1.92 s to 4.47 s. Demographic-adaptive control further reduces conflicts by 60% for children and 54.5% for seniors compared with uniform control. These results show that an explicit vision-language reasoning layer can improve both safety and efficiency by linking pedestrian intent, demographic context, and vehicle control decisions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLM-VPI框架，利用视觉-语言模型（Qwen3-VL 8B + GPT-OSS 20B）进行行人意图理解和年龄自适应控制。在CARLA仿真和真实PIE场景中，意图分类准确率达92.3%和87.5%，将误警率从7.4%降至2.8%，冲突数从124降至33，并针对儿童和老年人分别减少60%和54.5%的冲突。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统仅依赖几何和运动学线索推断行人让行行为，缺乏对视觉场景上下文和年龄相关行为变异性的推理能力，导致安全场景下干预延迟、良性交互中不必要刹车。
AI.method: 提出VLM-VPI三组件框架：(1) 多模态感知层，捕获视觉和运动学观测；(2) 推理层，使用Qwen3-VL 8B进行视觉场景理解，GPT-OSS 20B进行少样本意图推理；(3) 分层安全控制器，针对儿童、成人和老年人应用不同制动裕度。
AI.result: 112个CARLA场景中意图分类准确率92.3%（优于规则基线78.4%、轨迹模型73.5-82.4%、零样本LLM 88.4%）；24个真实PIE场景准确率87.5%；200个仿真案例中误警率从7.4%降至2.8%，平均穿越时间从13.5s降至11.8s，冲突数从124降至33，最小碰撞时间从1.92s提升至4.47s；年龄自适应控制相比统一控制分别减少儿童60%、老年人54.5%的冲突。
AI.conclusion: 显式的视觉-语言推理层能够通过关联行人意图、人口统计上下文与车辆控制决策，同时提升安全性和效率。

title: Latency and Cost of Multi-Agent Intelligent Tutoring at Scale
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Companion papers: arXiv:Q-ID (Quantum deployment), arXiv:A-ID (Architecture)
summary: Multi-agent LLM tutoring systems improve response quality through agent specialization, but each student query triggers several concurrent API calls whose latencies compound through a parallel-phase maximum effect that single-agent systems do not face. We instrument ITAS, a four-agent tutoring system built on Gemini 2.5 Flash and Google Vertex AI, across three throughput tiers (Standard PayGo, Priority PayGo, and Provisioned Throughput) and eleven concurrency levels up to 50 simultaneous users, producing over 3,000 requests drawn from a live graduate STEM deployment.
