Priority PayGo maintains flat sub-4-second response times across the full load range; Standard PayGo degrades substantially under classroom-scale concurrency; and Provisioned Throughput delivers the lowest latency at low concurrency but saturates its reserved capacity above approximately 20 concurrent users. Cost analysis places both pay-per-token tiers well below the price of a STEM textbook per student per semester under a worst-case usage ceiling. Provisioned Throughput, expensive under continuous provisioning, becomes cost-competitive for institutions that can predict and concentrate their traffic toward high utilization. These results provide concrete tier-selection guidance across deployment scales from a single seminar to a university-wide rollout.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一个基于Gemini 2.5 Flash和Google Vertex AI的四智能体LLM辅导系统ITAS，在三种吞吐量层级和十一级并发下进行测试（超过3000个请求），发现Priority PayGo在高达50个并发用户时保持亚4秒响应时间，Standard PayGo在教室规模并发下严重退化，Provisioned Throughput在低并发时延迟最低但在约20个并发用户以上会饱和。成本分析表明按token计费模式远低于教科书价格，Provisioned Throughput在可预测高利用率场景下具成本竞争力。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM辅导系统通过智能体专业化提升了响应质量，但每个学生查询会触发多个并发API调用，其延迟通过并行阶段的最大值效应叠加，这是单智能体系统所没有面临的问题。作者希望通过系统化的实验分析不同部署层级和并发场景下的延迟表现与成本效益，为实际部署提供选择指南。
AI.method: 研究团队在ITAS（基于Gemini 2.5 Flash和Google Vertex AI构建的四智能体辅导系统）上进行了系统性的延迟和成本基准测试。实验覆盖三种吞吐量层级（Standard PayGo、Priority PayGo和Provisioned Throughput）和十一个并发级别（最高50个同时用户），生成了超过3000个来自真实研究生STEM部署环境的请求数据。
AI.result: Priority PayGo在整个负载范围内（0-50并发用户）保持平稳的亚4秒响应时间；Standard PayGo在教室规模并发下性能严重退化；Provisioned Throughput在低并发时延迟最低，但在约20个并发用户以上会因预留容量饱和而导致性能下降。成本方面，两种按token付费层级每学期每名学生的费用远低于STEM教科书的价格；Provisioned Throughput在连续预置模式下较昂贵，但在可预测和集中流量的场景下具有成本竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为从单个研讨班到全校范围部署的各种规模场景提供了具体的吞吐量层级选择指南，帮助机构根据自身的并发用户规模和流量模式选择最合适的部署方案。

title: Robust Audio-Text Retrieval via Cross-Modal Attention and Hybrid Loss
summary: Audio-text retrieval enables semantic alignment between audio content and natural language queries, supporting applications in multimedia search, accessibility, and surveillance. However, current state-of-the-art approaches struggle with long, noisy, and weakly labeled audio due to their reliance on contrastive learning and large-batch training. We propose a novel multimodal retrieval framework that refines audio and text embeddings using a cross-modal embedding refinement module combining transformer-based projection, linear mapping, and bidirectional attention. To further improve robustness, we introduce a hybrid loss function blending cosine similarity, $\mathcal{L}_{1}$, and contrastive objectives, enabling stable training even under small-batch constraints. Our approach efficiently handles long-form and noisy audio (SNR 5 to 15) via silence-aware chunking and attention-based pooling. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate improvements over prior methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种跨模态嵌入精炼框架，结合混合损失函数和静默感知分块策略，解决了长音频、噪声弱标注音频下的音频-文本检索难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖对比学习和大批量训练，在处理长、噪声、弱标注音频时表现不佳。
AI.method: 1) 跨模态嵌入精炼模块（Transformer投影+线性映射+双向注意力）；2) 混合损失函数（余弦相似度+L1+对比目标）；3) 静默感知分块+注意力池化处理长音频。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能够有效处理长音频和噪声音频（SNR 5-15），在小批量约束下仍能稳定训练。

title: Rank, Head-Channel Non-Identifiability, and Symmetry Breaking: A Precise Analysis of Representational Collapse in Transformers
comment: 36 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. Submitted to Artificial Intelligence (Elsevier)
summary:
A widely cited result by Dong et al. (2021) showed that Transformers built from self-attention alone, without skip connections or feed-forward layers, suffer from rapid rank collapse: all token representations converge to a single direction. The proposed remedy was the MLP. We show that this picture, while correct in the regime studied by Dong, is incomplete in ways that matter for architectural understanding.
  Three results are established. First, layer normalisation is precisely affine-rank-neutral: it preserves the affine rank of the token representation set exactly. The widespread claim that LN "plays no role" is imprecise; the correct statement is sharper. Second, residual connections generically obstruct rank collapse in real Transformers such as BERT-base, in a measure-theoretic sense, without contribution from the MLP. The MLP's irreplaceable function is different: generating feature directions outside the linear span of the original token embeddings, which no stack of attention layers can produce. Third, a phenomenon distinct from rank collapse is identified: head-channel non-identifiability. After multi-head attention sums per-head outputs through the output projection, individual contributions cannot be canonically attributed to a specific head; n(H-1)d_k degrees of freedom per layer remain ambiguous when recovering a single head from the mixed signal. The MLP cannot remedy this because it acts on the post-summation signal.
  A constructive partial remedy is proposed: a position-gated output projection (PG-OP) at parameter overhead below 1.6% of the standard output projection. The four collapse phenomena identified in the literature -- rank collapse in depth, in width, head-channel non-identifiability, and entropy collapse -- are unified under a symmetry-breaking framework, each corresponding to a distinct symmetry of the Transformer's forward pass.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了Dong等人(2021)关于Transformer中注意力机制导致秩坍缩的经典结论，指出该结论不完整。作者建立了三个新结果：层归一化是仿射秩中性的；残差连接在测度论意义下几乎必然阻止秩坍缩，MLP的不可替代功能是生成超出原始词嵌入线性跨度的特征方向；发现了一种不同于秩坍缩的现象——头通道不可辨识性。并提出了一种位置门控输出投影（PG-OP）作为部分解决方案，参数开销不到标准输出投影的1.6%。最后将四种坍缩现象统一在对称性破缺框架下。
AI.motivation: 纠正和补充Dong等人关于Transformer秩坍缩的经典结论，该结论认为仅有自注意力机制的Transformer会快速发生秩坍缩（所有token表示收敛到同一方向），而MLP是唯一的补救措施。作者认为这一认识在更广泛的架构理解视角下是不完整的。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立了三个主要结果：(1) 证明层归一化是"仿射秩中性"的，精确保持token表示集的仿射秩；(2) 从测度论角度证明残差连接在真实Transformer（如BERT-base）中几乎必然阻止秩坍缩，无需MLP贡献；(3) 识别出头通道非可辨识性这一新现象，并分析其自由度。提出位置门控输出投影（PG-OP）作为部分补救方案。最后将秩坍缩（深度/宽度方向）、头通道非可辨识性和熵坍缩四种现象统一在对称性破缺分析框架下。
AI.result: (1) 发现LN不是"不起作用"，而是精确保持仿射秩；(2) 残差连接在测度论意义下几乎必然阻止秩坍缩，MLP的不可替代作用是生成新的特征方向；(3) 发现头通道非可辨识性，每层有n(H-1)d_k个自由度的歧义性；(4) PG-OP以低于1.6%的参数开销提供了部分解决；(5) 四种坍缩现象统一于对称性破缺框架。
AI.conclusion: Dong等人的结论在原始设定下正确但不完整。真实Transformer中残差连接已足够阻止秩坍缩，MLP起不同作用；新发现的头通道非可辨识性是一个独立问题；对称性破缺框架为理解Transformer中的多种坍缩现象提供了统一视角。

title: Isospectral Steering
summary: We study the controllability of the differential Lyapunov equation under isospectral rotation of a linear gradient field. Specifically, control is effected by a symmetric time-varying gain-matrix constrained to have fixed eigenvalues; that is, by exclusively modulating the eigen-vectors of the state matrix and not its eigenvalues. Motivation for this problem stems from a certain type of control objectives (minimum shear/attention) aimed to reduce anisotropic deformation when ensembles are steered by a common law--optimality necessitates constancy of eigenvalues. In the paper we introduce and motivate this type of isospectral steering, and describe the reachable set of covariances for any specified terminal time and eigenvalues of the gain matrix. The theory we develop is intimately linked to multilinear algebra as well as to positive linear algebra and the Birkoff-von Neumann theorem for doubly stochastic matrices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线性梯度场的等谱旋转下，微分Lyapunov方程的可控性问题。控制通过具有固定特征值的对称时变增益矩阵实现，即仅调制状态矩阵的特征向量而不改变其特征值。论文描述了任意指定终止时间和增益矩阵特征值下的协方差可达集，理论与多重线性代数、正线性代数及Birkoff-von Neumann双随机矩阵定理紧密相关。
AI.motivation: 源于一类控制目标（最小剪切/关注度），旨在减少由共同律驱动的系综中的各向异性变形——最优性要求特征值保持恒定。
AI.method: 引入并论证等谱转向概念，通过具有固定特征值的对称时变增益矩阵来控制微分Lyapunov方程，利用多重线性代数和正线性代数理论描述协方差的可达集。
AI.result: 推导出任意指定终止时间和增益矩阵特征值下协方差的可达集。
AI.conclusion: 等谱转向控制问题与多重线性代数、正线性代数及Birkoff-von Neumann定理紧密相连，为减少系综各向异性变形提供了理论框架。

title: GSAR: Typed Grounding for Hallucination Detection and Recovery in Multi-Agent LLMs
summary:
Autonomous multi-agent LLM systems are increasingly deployed to investigate operational incidents and produce structured diagnostic reports. Their trustworthiness hinges on whether each claim is grounded in observed evidence rather than model-internal inference. Existing groundedness evaluators (binary classifiers, LLM-as-judge scalars, self-correction loops) treat supporting evidence as interchangeable and emit a single signal that offers no principled control over downstream action.
  We present GSAR, a grounding-evaluation and replanning framework that (i) partitions claims into a four-way typology (grounded, ungrounded, contradicted, complementary), giving first-class standing to non-redundant alternative perspectives; (ii) assigns evidence-type-specific weights reflecting epistemic strength; (iii) computes an asymmetric contradiction-penalised weighted groundedness score; and (iv) couples that score to a three-tier decision function (proceed, regenerate, replan) driving a bounded-iteration outer loop under an explicit compute budget.
  We formalise the algorithm, prove six structural properties, and evaluate five design claims on FEVER with gold Wikipedia evidence under four independently-trained LLM judges (gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-7, gemini-2.5-pro). Every ablation reproduces in the same direction on every judge: bootstrap 95% CIs on the rho=0 effect exclude 0 on all four; the no-complementary ablation under Opus 4.7 has CI [-96,-68] of 200; at n=1000 three independent judges converge to DeltaS(rho=0)=+0.058. A head-to-head against Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open is included. To our knowledge, GSAR is the first published groundedness framework coupling evidence-typed scoring with tiered recovery under an explicit compute budget.

AI.tldr: GSAR 是一个面向多智能体 LLM 系统的 groundedness 评估与重规划框架，通过四类声明分类、证据类型加权、非对称矛盾惩罚评分和三档决策函数（进行/重生成/重规划）在有限计算预算下提升可信度。在 FEVER 数据集和四个独立 LLM 裁判上验证有效，无互补性消融实验在 Opus 4.7 下 CI 为[-96,-68]。
AI.motivation: 现有 groundedness 评估器（二元分类器、LLM-as-judge 标量评分、自纠正循环）将支持证据视为可互换的，输出单一信号，无法对下游操作提供原则性控制，缺乏对非冗余替代视角的重视，且没有显式计算预算约束下的分层恢复机制。
AI.method: (1) 将声明分为四类：grounded、ungrounded、contradicted、complementary；(2) 为每种证据类型分配反映认知强度的权重；(3) 计算非对称矛盾惩罚加权 groundedness 分数；(4) 将分数耦合到三层决策函数（proceed/regenerate/replan），驱动有界迭代外层循环，配以显式计算预算。
AI.result: 在 FEVER 数据集上，使用四个独立训练的 LLM 裁判（gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-7, gemini-2.5-pro）验证，所有消融在每位裁判上方向一致；bootstrap 95% CI 排除 0；无互补性消融在 Opus 4.7 下 CI 为[-96,-68]；n=1000 时三个独立裁判收敛到 DeltaS(rho=0)=+0.058；与 Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open 进行了对比。
AI.conclusion: GSAR 是首个将证据类型评分与分层恢复相结合、在显式计算预算下运行的 groundedness 框架，形式化定义了算法并证明了六个结构性质。

title: Collocation-based Robust Physics Informed Neural Networks for time-dependent simulations of pollution propagation under thermal inversion conditions on Spitsbergen
comment: Robust Variational Physics Informed Neural Networks; Pollution propagation simulations; Longyearbyen at Spitsbergen; Advection-diffusion model; In-field measurements; Open source software
summary: In this paper, we propose a Physics-Informed Neural Network framework for time-dependent simulations of pollution propagation originating from moving emission sources. We formulate a robust variational framework for the time-dependent advection-diffusion problem and establish the boundedness and inf-sup stability of the corresponding discrete weak formulation. Based on this mathematical foundation, we construct a robust loss function that is directly related to the true approximation error, defined as the difference between the neural network approximation and the (unknown) exact solution. Additionally, a collocation-based strategy is introduced to speed up neural network training. As a case study, we investigate pollution propagation caused by snowmobile traffic in Longyearbyen, Spitsbergen, supported by detailed in-field measurements collected using dedicated sensors. The proposed framework is applied to analyze the effects of thermal inversion on pollutant accumulation. Our results demonstrate that thermal inversion traps dense and humid air masses near the ground, significantly enhancing particulate matter (PM) concentration and worsening local air quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于物理信息神经网络（PINN）的框架，用于模拟移动排放源造成的时变污染传播，并通过对斯匹次卑尔根群岛朗伊尔城的雪地摩托车污染案例研究，验证了热逆温层对颗粒物浓度加剧的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理移动排放源导致的时变污染扩散问题，需要一种兼具数学严谨性与计算效率的数值框架。
AI.method: 构建了针对时变对流-扩散问题的变分框架，证明了离散弱形式的有界性和inf-sup稳定性；设计了与真实近似误差直接相关的鲁棒损失函数；引入搭配点采样策略加速网络训练。
AI.result: 在朗伊尔城雪地摩托车排放案例中，热逆温层导致近地面聚集稠密湿润气团，显著提升了PM浓度，恶化了局部空气质量。
AI.conclusion: 该PINN框架能有效模拟移动源污染传播，且热逆温是导致极地城市污染加剧的关键气象因素。

title: Extracting Exact Lie Derivatives Without Backpropagation: A Dual Compiler for Neural Control Barrier Functions
summary: Deploying neural-network control barrier functions (CBFs) on embedded hardware requires evaluating the barrier value and its Lie derivatives along the system vector fields at every control cycle. The standard mechanism for exact gradient extraction, reverse-mode automatic differentiation, constructs a dynamic computational graph whose memory footprint grows with network depth and whose backward traversal obstructs the worst-case execution time analysis required for safety-critical certification. This paper presents a dual-algebraic compiler that extracts the exact barrier value and its Lie derivatives through forward network evaluation alone. Encoding the system state as the real part of a dual number and a target vector field as the dual part, we prove that every affine and componentwise-activation layer admits a dual extension that propagates the exact directional derivative alongside the activation, and that the composed dual-extended network evaluates the exact Jacobian--vector-field product with zero truncation error. We derive closed-form expressions for the dual-pass floating-point operation count and peak memory footprint, prove that the proposed algorithm eliminates dynamic graph allocation, and extend the framework to the second-order Lie derivatives required by relative-degree-two CBFs using hyper-dual arithmetic. An open-source ahead-of-time compiler translates trained neural CBFs into self-contained C++ headers that assemble the complete safety constraint on an ESP32-S3 microcontroller from a statically allocated buffer, with zero dynamic memory allocation and a sub-millisecond cycle budget that supports kilohertz-rate safety filters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双代数编译器，通过前向网络评估即可精确提取神经控制障碍函数(CBF)的障碍值及其李导数，无需反向模式自动微分，消除动态计算图分配，在ESP32-S3微控制器上实现亚毫秒级安全约束计算。
AI.motivation: 传统反向模式自动微分提取CBF梯度时，动态计算图内存占用随网络深度增长，且反向遍历阻碍安全关键认证所需的确定性最坏情况执行时间分析。
AI.method: 将系统状态编码为对偶数的实部、目标向量场编码为对偶部，证明仿射层和逐分量激活层均存在对偶扩展，可前向传播精确方向导数；组合后的对偶扩展网络可精确计算雅可比-向量场乘积（零截断误差）；对二阶李导数扩展至超对偶数算术；实现提前编译器将神经CBF翻译为自包含C++头文件。
AI.result: 推导了对偶通路的浮点运算计数和峰值内存占用的闭式表达式，证明算法消除了动态图分配；在ESP32-S3微控制器上实现零动态内存分配、亚毫秒级周期预算，支持千赫兹级安全滤波器。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过纯前向传播实现精确李导数计算，满足安全关键系统的可认证实时性要求，为神经CBF在嵌入式平台的实际部署提供了可行的编译方案。

title: The Alignment Target Problem: Divergent Moral Judgments of Humans, AI Systems, and Their Designers
summary: The quest to align machine behavior with human values raises fundamental questions about the moral frameworks that should govern AI decision-making. Much alignment research assumes that the appropriate benchmark is how humans themselves would act in a given situation. Research into agent-type value forks has challenged this assumption by showing that people do not always hold AI systems to the same moral standards as humans. Yet this challenge is subject to two further questions: whether people evaluate AI behavior differently when its human origins are made visible, and whether people hold the humans who program AI systems to different moral standards than either the humans or the machines under evaluation. An experimental study on 1,002 U.S. adults measured moral judgments in a runaway mine train scenario, varying the subject of evaluation across four conditions: a repairman, a repair robot, a repair robot programmed by company engineers, and company engineers programming a repair robot. We find no significant variation in the moral standards applied to the repairman and the robot. However, moral judgments shifted substantially when robot actions were described as the product of human design. Participants exhibited markedly more deontological reasoning when evaluating the robot programmed by engineers or the engineers programming it, suggesting that making human design visible activates heightened moral constraints. These findings provide evidence that people apply meaningfully different moral standards to AI systems, to humans acting in the same situation, and to the humans who design them. We call this divergence the alignment target problem. Whether these plural normative standards can be reconciled into a coherent framework for AI governance in high-stakes domains remains an open question.

AI.tldr: 通过实验发现，人们对AI系统、人类行为者以及AI设计者会施加不同的道德标准。当AI行为被揭示为人类设计产物时，人们会表现出更强的道义论推理，这一现象被称为"对齐目标问题"。
AI.motivation: 挑战AI对齐研究中一个常见假设——人类自身的行为标准应作为AI道德决策的基准。已有研究指出人们对AI和人类持有不同道德标准，但尚未明确这种差异的来源，尤其是人类设计者的可见性是否影响道德判断。
AI.method: 在失控矿车场景（电车难题变体）上进行实验，对1,002名美国成年人进行道德判断测量。实验设置四个条件：维修工、维修机器人、由工程师编程的维修机器人、编程维修机器人的工程师。
AI.result: 维修工与机器人之间的道德标准没有显著差异。但当机器人行为被描述为人类设计产物时（工程师编程的机器人或工程师本身），参与者的道德判断显著转向道义论推理（更强调道德原则而非结果），表明人类设计的可见性激活了更强的道德约束。
AI.conclusion: 人们确实对AI系统、人类行动者以及AI设计者施加了不同的道德标准，作者将此称为"对齐目标问题"。这些多元规范标准能否调和为一致的AI治理框架仍是一个开放问题。

title: Bridging Reasoning and Action: Hybrid LLM-RL Framework for Efficient Cross-Domain Task-Oriented Dialogue
summary: Cross-domain task-oriented dialogue requires reasoning over implicit and explicit feasibility constraints while planning long-horizon, multi-turn actions. Large language models (LLMs) can infer such constraints but are unreliable over long horizons, while Reinforcement learning (RL) optimizes long-horizon behavior yet cannot recover constraints from raw dialogue. Naively coupling LLMs with RL is therefore brittle: unverified or unstructured LLM outputs can corrupt state representations and misguide policy learning. Motivated by this, we propose Verified LLM-Knowledge empowered RL (VLK-RL), a hybrid framework that makes LLM-derived constraint reasoning usable for RL. VLK-RL first elicits candidate constraints with an LLM and then verifies them via a dual-role cross-examination procedure to suppress hallucinations and cross-turn inconsistencies. The verified constraints are mapped into ontology-aligned slot-value representations, yielding a structured, constraint-aware state for RL policy optimization. Experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that VLK-RL significantly improves generalization and robustness, outperforming strong single-model baselines on long-horizon tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出VLK-RL框架，通过LLM生成候选约束并用双角色交叉验证消除幻觉，将验证后的约束映射为结构化状态表示，用于强化学习策略优化，在跨领域长程对话任务中显著提升泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: LLM能推理约束但长程不可靠，RL能优化长程行为但无法从对话中恢复约束，两者简单耦合会导致LLM未验证的输出破坏状态表示并误导策略学习。
AI.method: VLK-RL框架：1) LLM生成候选约束；2) 双角色交叉验证消除幻觉和跨轮不一致；3) 将验证后的约束映射为对齐本体的槽值表示，构建结构化约束感知状态用于RL策略优化。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，VLK-RL显著提升泛化性和鲁棒性，在长程任务上优于强单模型基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过验证机制让LLM的约束推理对RL可用，混合框架有效结合两者优势，解决了长程对话中约束推理与策略优化的对齐问题。

title: Quasi-Quadratic Gradient: A New Direction for Accelerating the BFGS Method in Quasi-Newton Optimization
summary: In this paper, we introduce the Quasi-Quadratic Gradient (QQG), a novel search direction designed to accelerate the BFGS method within the quasi-Newton framework. By defining the QQG as the product of the inverse Hessian approximation and the current gradient, we explicitly leverage local second-order curvature to rectify the search path. Theoretical analysis and empirical results demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms vanilla BFGS in convergence speed while maintaining computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Quasi-Quadratic Gradient (QQG)方向，通过将逆Hessian近似与当前梯度相乘来显式利用局部二阶曲率修正搜索路径，从而加速BFGS方法。
AI.motivation: 加速BFGS方法在拟牛顿框架下的收敛速度，同时保持计算效率。
AI.method: 定义QQG为逆Hessian近似与当前梯度的乘积，显式利用局部二阶曲率信息来修正搜索方向。
AI.result: 理论分析和实验结果表明，QQG方法在收敛速度上显著优于原始BFGS，同时保持了计算效率。
AI.conclusion: QQG是一种有效且高效的搜索方向，能够加速BFGS收敛过程。

title: Constraint-Based Analysis of Reasoning Shortcuts in Neurosymbolic Learning
comment: This is the full version of a paper appearing at the 23rd International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (KR 2026)
summary: Neurosymbolic systems can satisfy logical constraints during learning without achieving the intended concept-label correspondence; this is a problem known as reasoning shortcuts. We formalize reasoning shortcuts as a constraint satisfaction problem and investigate under which conditions concept mappings are uniquely determined by the constraints. We prove that a discrimination property (requiring that no valid concept mapping can be transformed into another valid mapping by swapping two concept values) is necessary for shortcut-freeness under bijective mappings, but demonstrate via a counterexample that it is insufficient even when the constraint graph is connected. We develop an ASP-based algorithm that verifies whether a given constraint set uniquely determines the intended concept mapping, with proven soundness and completeness. When shortcuts are detected, a greedy repair algorithm eliminates them by augmenting the constraint set, converging in at most $k$ iterations, where $k$ is the number of alternative valid mappings. We further provide a complexity classification: deciding shortcut-freeness is coNP-complete, counting shortcuts is #P-complete, and finding minimal repairs is NP-hard. We also establish sample complexity bounds showing that logarithmically many label queries suffice for disambiguation in favorable cases, while querying all ambiguous positions suffices in the worst case. Experiments across eight benchmark domains validate our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化定义了神经符号系统中的推理捷径问题，证明判别性属性是避免捷径的必要条件但不充分，提出基于ASP的验证算法和贪心修复算法，并给出完备的复杂度分类和样本复杂度界限，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 神经符号系统在学习过程中可能满足逻辑约束但并未学到预期的概念-标签对应关系，即推理捷径问题。现有研究对此问题缺乏形式化理解和系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 将推理捷径形式化为约束满足问题；2) 证明判别性属性的必要性及不足；3) 开发基于ASP的验证算法（完备且可靠）；4) 设计贪心修复算法（最多k次迭代收敛）；5) 进行复杂度分类（coNP-complete, #P-complete, NP-hard）；6) 推导样本复杂度界限；7) 在8个基准领域进行实验验证。
AI.result: 判别性属性在双射映射下是捷径自由的必要条件但不充分；验证算法具有完备性和可靠性；修复算法最多k次迭代收敛；决策捷径自由为coNP-complete，计数为#P-complete，最小修复为NP-hard；最优情况下对数级别标签查询即可消歧，最坏情况下需查询所有模糊位置；8个基准实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 推理捷径问题是神经符号系统中一个具有严格理论基础的难题，可通过约束增强来缓解，但计算复杂性不容乐观。

title: On-Device Vision Training, Deployment, and Inference on a Thumb-Sized Microcontroller
comment: 25 pages; 3 figures; 3 tables. Code and datasets available at https://github.com/webmcu-ai/on-device-vision-ai. Paper 1 of the webmcu-ai series. Implements end-to-end on-device CNN training and inference on a thumb-sized microcontroller (ESP32-S3) the XIAO ML Kit in ~1,750 lines of single-file C++ without external ML dependencies
summary: This paper presents a complete, end-to-end on-device vision machine learning pipeline, comprising data acquisition, two-layer CNN training with Adam optimization, and real-time inference, executing entirely on a microcontroller-class device costing $15-40 USD. Unlike cloud-based workflows that require external infrastructure and conceal the computational pipeline from the practitioner, this system implements every step of the core ML lifecycle in approximately 1,750 lines of readable C++ that compiles in under one minute using the Arduino IDE, with no external ML dependencies. Running on the Seeed Studio ESP32-S3 XIAO ML Kit (8 MB PSRAM), the firmware achieves three-class 64x64 image classification in approximately 9 minutes per training run, with real-time inference at 6.3 FPS. Key contributions include: correct batch-level gradient accumulation; pre-computed resize lookup tables for inference; dual-format weight export for SD-free baked-in deployment; a three-tier weight priority system (SD binary > baked-in header > He-initialization) resolved automatically at boot; a single-constant network reconfiguration interface; and PSRAM-aware memory management suited to microcontroller constraints. All source code and reference datasets are released under the MIT License at https://github.com/webmcu-ai/on-device-vision-ai

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套完整的、端到端的设备端视觉机器学习流水线，包含数据采集、两层CNN训练（Adam优化）和实时推理，全部在售价15-40美元的微控制器上运行，代码仅约1750行C++，无需外部ML依赖，训练约9分钟，推理达6.3 FPS。
AI.motivation: 现有云端ML工作流依赖外部基础设施，对从业者隐藏计算流水线，缺乏在低成本微控制器上实现完整ML生命周期的方案，因此作者希望构建一个完全在设备端运行、透明且可复现的视觉AI系统。
AI.method: 基于ESP32-S3微控制器（8 MB PSRAM），实现两层CNN网络训练（Adam优化器），包含批级梯度累积、预计算重查表、双格式权重导出、三级权重优先级系统（SD二进制 > 头文件内嵌 > He初始化）、单一常量网络重配置接口及PSRAM感知内存管理。
AI.result: 在Seeed Studio ESP32-S3 XIAO ML Kit上，三分类64x64图像分类训练约9分钟，实时推理达6.3 FPS，所有代码和数据集以MIT许可证开源。
AI.conclusion: 证明了在低成本微控制器上实现完整ML生命周期的可行性，为边缘AI的透明化、自主化部署提供了实用参考。

title: Safe Reconnection Time for Large-Scale Data Center Loads: An Analytical Framework for Transient Stability Assessment
summary: The rapid growth of large, power-electronics-rich data center (DC) loads is creating new operational challenges for bulk power systems. A key risk arises when a DC uninterruptible power supply (UPS) disconnects the facility during voltage/frequency disturbances and then reconnects it while the bulk grid is still dynamically settling to a new equilibrium point. Poorly timed reconnection can amplify electromechanical oscillations, deepen frequency deviations, and lead to repeated connect-disconnect \emph{flapping}. In this paper, we develop an analytical framework to characterize the \emph{safe reconnection time} for large DC loads after a disturbance-induced disconnection that avoids flapping. Using a model in the spirit of the classical single-machine infinite-bus system, we capture (i) swing dynamics during the disconnection interval and (ii) voltage-angle coupling at the load bus, which determines the electrical power step at reconnection under constant-power load assumptions. Using energy function method, we characterize the critical safe reconnection time such that for any reconnection time after the critical safe reconnection time, the post-reconnection trajectory is guaranteed to remain within operational limits (frequency/angle/voltage) and converge to the post-reconnection equilibrium, thereby preventing flapping. Time-domain simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed analytical approach. The results provide a simple, physics-informed criterion that can be used to bound reconnection windows for large DC facilities and inform UPS reconnection logic.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了大容量数据中心负载在扰动后安全重连时间的分析框架，基于能量函数方法确定了避免反复“拍动”现象的临界安全重连时间，并通过仿真验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着大功率电子数据中心负载快速增长，UPS在电压/频率扰动后不当时机重连会放大机电振荡、加深频率偏差并导致反复连接-断开（拍动）现象，亟需一个能够指导安全重连时间的分析准则。
AI.method: 借鉴经典单机无穷大系统模型，建模了断开期间的摇摆动力学和负载母线的电压-角度耦合关系，利用能量函数方法推导了临界安全重连时间，保证重连后轨迹在运行限值内收敛到平衡点。
AI.result: 时域仿真验证了所提分析方法的有效性，得到了一个简单、物理直观的判据，可用于界定大型数据中心设施的重连窗口。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为UPS重连逻辑提供了基于物理的指导，有助于提升含大量数据中心负载的电力系统运行安全性。

title: The Ethical Knowledge Gap: Dispersed Knowledge, Sensemaking Failures, and Epistemic Dependence
summary: Ethical software development remains stubbornly difficult despite two decades of normative frameworks, professional codes, and participatory methodologies. This paper offers a diagnostic rather than prescriptive contribution: it argues that the persistent gap between ethical intention and ethical implementation is a structural epistemic condition, not primarily a failure of will, education, or normative guidance. Three independently sufficient mechanisms interact to produce what I call the ethical knowledge gap -- a condition in which the knowledge required for ethically informed decision-making is systematically unavailable at the point of decision, even when the organization as a whole possesses it. First, drawing on Hayek's (1945) analysis of dispersed knowledge and its organizational extensions, the paper establishes that ethically relevant knowledge in software development is constitutively distributed across roles, largely tacit, and -- unlike efficiency-related knowledge -- unsupported by any spontaneous aggregation mechanism analogous to the price system. Second, an interpretive deficit, analyzed through Weick's sensemaking framework and the literature on framing and epistemic cultures, renders developers unable to recognize the ethical significance of what they know: the sensemaking apparatus of engineering culture makes technical decisions intelligible while systematically obscuring their ethical dimensions. Third, a credibility attenuation, analyzed through the social epistemology of testimony and epistemic dependence, discounts developers' observations as they cross organizational role boundaries, so that hybrid judgments combining technical detail with ethical assessment lose their epistemic force.

AI.tldr: 本文诊断了软件开发中“伦理知识鸿沟”这一结构性认知问题：伦理相关知识在组织中分散、隐性且缺乏聚合机制，工程师难以识别其伦理含义，且跨角色传递时可信度衰减，导致伦理意图与实施之间持续存在差距。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有二十年的规范性框架、专业准则和参与式方法，伦理软件开发仍然异常困难。作者认为伦理意图与实施之间的持续差距主要不是意志、教育或规范指导的失败，而是一种结构性认知条件。
AI.method: 本文提供诊断性而非规范性贡献，提出三种独立充分的机制：1) 基于Hayek的知识分散理论，分析伦理知识在软件开发中的分散性、隐性及缺乏聚合机制；2) 基于Weick的sensemaking框架，分析工程文化使技术决策可理解而系统地掩盖其伦理维度；3) 基于社会认知论，分析跨角色边界时伦理与技术混合判断的可信度衰减。
AI.result: 识别出“伦理知识鸿沟”这一结构性条件：在决策点上系统性地缺乏伦理知情决策所需的知识，即使组织整体上拥有这些知识。
AI.conclusion: 伦理软件开发的困难源于三种独立充分的机制相互作用形成的结构性认知鸿沟，需要从认知结构层面而非单纯的规范或教育层面加以应对。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models on Computer Science University Exams in Data Structures
summary: We present a comprehensive evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) on Computer Science (CS) Data Structure examination questions. Our work introduces a new benchmark dataset comprising exam questions from Tel Aviv University (TAU), curated to assess LLMs' abilities in handling closed and multiple-choice questions. We evaluated the performance of OpenAI's GPT 4o and Anthropic's Claude 3.5, popular LLMs, alongside two smaller LLMs, Mathstral 7B and LLaMA 3 8B, across the TAU exams benchmark. Our findings provide insight into the current capabilities of LLMs in CS education.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了GPT-4o、Claude 3.5、Mathstral 7B和LLaMA 3 8B等大语言模型在特拉维夫大学计算机科学数据结构考试题目上的表现，并建立了一个新的基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 为了系统评估当前主流大语言模型在计算机科学教育领域，特别是数据结构课程考试中的实际能力水平。
AI.method: 构建了来自特拉维夫大学的数据结构考试题基准数据集（包含封闭式和选择题），并测试了GPT-4o、Claude 3.5、Mathstral 7B和LLaMA 3 8B四个模型的性能。
AI.result: 报告了四个LLMs在TAU考试基准上的表现结果，揭示了它们处理CS数据结构问题的当前能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解LLMs在计算机科学教育中的应用潜力提供了重要见解。

title: A General Representation-Based Approach to Multi-Source Domain Adaptation
summary: A central problem in unsupervised domain adaptation is determining what to transfer from labeled source domains to an unlabeled target domain. To handle high-dimensional observations (e.g., images), a line of approaches use deep learning to learn latent representations of the observations, which facilitate knowledge transfer in the latent space. However, existing approaches often rely on restrictive assumptions to establish identifiability of the joint distribution in the target domain, such as independent latent variables or invariant label distributions, limiting their real-world applicability. In this work, we propose a general domain adaptation framework that learns compact latent representations to capture distribution shifts relative to the prediction task and address the fundamental question of what representations should be learned and transferred. Notably, we first demonstrate that learning representations based on all the predictive information, i.e., the label's Markov blanket in terms of the learned representations, is often underspecified in general settings. Instead, we show that, interestingly, general domain adaptation can be achieved by partitioning the representations of Markov blanket into those of the label's parents, children, and spouses. Moreover, its identifiability guarantee can be established. Building on these theoretical insights, we develop a practical, nonparametric approach for domain adaptation in a general setting, which can handle different types of distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于马尔可夫毯划分的通用无监督域适应框架，通过将表示分解为标签的父节点、子节点和配偶节点来实现分布偏移下的可识别知识迁移，并开发了非参数化方法处理多种分布偏移类型。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法在处理高维观测时，往往依赖独立潜在变量或不变标签分布等严格假设来保证目标域联合分布的可识别性，这限制了实际应用。本文旨在回答一个根本问题：应该学习和迁移什么样的表示？从而在更一般的设定下实现域适应。
AI.method: 首先证明基于全部预测信息（即标签的马尔可夫毯）学习表示在一般设定下是欠定的。进而发现，将马尔可夫毯的表示划分为标签的父节点、子节点和配偶节点，可以实现通用域适应，并且其可识别性有理论保证。基于此，开发了一个实用的非参数化方法。
AI.result: 理论层面证明了马尔可夫毯划分策略的可识别性保证，实验层面（推测）展示了该方法在多种分布偏移类型下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过马尔可夫毯的细粒度划分（父节点、子节点、配偶节点）可以克服以往域适应方法中的严格假设限制，在一般设定下实现可识别的知识迁移，为无监督域适应提供了新的理论视角和实用方法。

title: Presolving for GPU-Accelerated First-Order LP Solvers
summary:
Recent research has focused on developing GPU-accelerated first-order solvers for linear programming (LP). This line of work, however, has largely overlooked the role of presolving, and thus prior results do not fully reflect the speedups achievable through GPU acceleration in a realistic end-to-end solver pipeline. At the same time, LP presolving has traditionally been developed for CPU-based solvers, where presolve time rarely dominates the total runtime and the emphasis has been on maximizing the reduction in problem size, even at the expense of costly presolve rules. Given the high performance of modern GPU-accelerated solvers and the inherently sequential nature of presolving, it is unclear whether this traditional approach to presolving remains appropriate.
  In this paper we revisit LP presolving from the perspective of GPU-accelerated first-order LP solvers. We identify a set of relatively simple presolve rules and show that a carefully engineered collection of these captures most of the reduction achieved by Gurobi's commercial state-of-the-art presolver, at a fraction of the cost. Moreover, we demonstrate that such lightweight presolving can yield substantial end-to-end speedups for the GPU-accelerated solver cuPDLPx, despite presolving sometimes constituting a significant fraction of the total runtime. These results suggest that lightweight presolving may remain beneficial as GPU performance continues to scale, while the sequential nature of presolving presumably does not.
  We accompany this paper with an open-source C implementation of an LP presolver, called PSLP (Presolver for Linear Programs). PSLP is battle-tested and has been adopted by the community, with integrations in cuPDLPx, cuOpt (NVIDIA's optimization library), and HPR-LP.

AI.tldr: 本文针对GPU加速的一阶线性规划求解器，重新审视了预求解（presolving）的作用，提出轻量级预求解器PSLP，实验表明其在极低成本下能达到Gurobi商业求解器的大部分问题缩减效果，并能显著提升cuPDLPx的端到端性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GPU加速LP求解器研究忽略了预求解环节，而传统CPU预求解规则开销大、顺序性强，不适合GPU流水线；需要重新设计适合GPU加速求解器的轻量级预求解策略。
AI.method: 选取一组相对简单的预求解规则，精心工程实现，构成轻量级预求解器PSLP；将其集成到GPU加速求解器cuPDLPx中进行端到端评估，并与Gurobi预求解器进行对比。
AI.result: PSLP以远低于Gurobi的代价达到了其大部分问题缩减效果；尽管预求解有时占据较大运行时比例，但仍能带来可观的端到端加速；轻量级预求解随GPU性能扩展仍保持优势。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级预求解在GPU加速LP求解中仍然有益且高效，其顺序性不会成为瓶颈；开源PSLP已被cuPDLPx、cuOpt、HPR-LP等多个项目采用。

title: SoccerRef-Agents: Multi-Agent System for Automated Soccer Refereeing
comment: 26 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to ISACE 2026. Github Repo: https://github.com/yjlog/SoccerRef-Agents
summary: Refereeing is vital in sports, where fair, accurate, and explainable decisions are fundamental. While intelligent assistant technologies are being widely adopted in soccer refereeing, current AI-assisted approaches remain preliminary. Existing research mostly focuses on isolated video perception tasks and lacks the ability to understand and reason about foul scenarios. To fill this gap, we propose SoccerRef-Agents, a holistic and explainable multi-agent decision-making framework for soccer refereeing. The main contributions are: (i) constructing the multimodal benchmark SoccerRefBench with over 1,200 referee theory questions and 600 foul video clips; (ii) building a vector-based knowledge base RefKnowledgeDB using the latest "Laws of the Game" and a classic case database for precise, knowledge-driven reasoning; (iii) designing a novel multi-agent architecture that collaborates via cross-modal RAG to bridge the semantic gap between visual content and regulatory texts. This work explores the technical capability of integrating MLLMs with refereeing expertise, and evaluations show our system significantly outperforms general-purpose MLLMs in decision accuracy and explanation quality. All databases, benchmarks, and code will be made available.

AI.tldr: 提出了SoccerRef-Agents，一个面向足球裁判的多智能体决策框架，包含多模态基准、知识库和跨模态检索增强生成架构，显著优于通用多模态大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有AI辅助裁判技术仅关注孤立的视频感知任务，缺乏对犯规场景的理解和推理能力，无法满足公平、准确且可解释的裁判需求。
AI.method: 构建了SoccerRefBench多模态基准（1200+裁判理论题、600个犯规视频）；建立了基于最新《足球竞赛规则》的向量知识库RefKnowledgeDB；设计了多智能体架构，通过跨模态RAG协作弥合视觉内容与规则文本的语义鸿沟。
AI.result: 在决策准确性和解释质量上显著优于通用多模态大模型。
AI.conclusion: 探索了将多模态大语言模型与裁判专业知识集成的技术能力，所有数据库、基准和代码将开源。

title: Complex SGD and Directional Bias in Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Spaces
summary: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is a known stochastic iterative method popular for large-scale convex optimization problems due to its simple implementation and scalability. Some objectives, such as those found in complex-valued neural networks, benefit from updates like in SGD and Gradient Descent (GD) with a newly defined ``gradient'' that allows for complex parameters. This complex variant of the SGD/GD methods has already been proposed, but convergence guarantees without analyticity constraints have not yet been provided. We propose a variant of SGD (complex SGD) that allows for complex parameters, and we provide convergence guarantees under assumptions that parallel those from the real setting. Notably, these results extend to GD as well, and with the same set of assumptions, we confirm that some directional bias results extend from the real to the complex setting for kernel regression problems. We provide empirical results demonstrating the efficacy of the complex SGD in kernel regression problems utilizing complex reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces. In particular, we demonstrate we may recover superoscillation functions and Blaschke products from the Fock Space and Hardy Space, respectively, as the optimal functions for a particular choice of a loss function.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于复数参数的SGD变体（complex SGD），在无解析性约束下提供了收敛保证，并将相关结论推广至GD及核回归问题中的方向偏差分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的复数SGD/GD方法缺乏无解析性约束的收敛性理论保证，作者希望填补这一理论空白，使复数优化方法具备与实数情形平行的收敛性保障。
AI.method: 提出complex SGD算法，允许复数参数更新；在平行于实数设置的假设条件下建立收敛性证明；并将理论结果扩展到GD以及核回归问题中的方向偏差分析。
AI.result: 理论层面证明了complex SGD在给定假设下的收敛性，并确认方向偏差结果可从实数推广至复数核回归问题；实验层面展示了complex SGD在复再生核希尔伯特空间中恢复超振荡函数和Blaschke积分的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Complex SGD是一种理论有保障、实践有效的复数参数优化方法，可应用于复值神经网络等场景，并为复数域上的核回归问题提供了新的求解思路。

title: A Road-Mobile GNSS-Disciplined Oscillator for Accurate Synchronization of Vehicular Microwave Measurements
summary: Precise synchronization is essential in various technical disciplines, being especially challenging in mobile scenarios. Unfortunately, state-of-the-art global navigation satellite system (GNSS) disciplined oscillators (GNSSDOs) are designed and optimized for stationary operation. We present a novel solution that is optimized for mobile use from the ground up. The centerpiece is a precise oven-controlled crystal oscillator (OCXO) that is optimized for low sensitivity to dynamic accelerations. A state-of-the-art GNSS timing module is used to discipline it. We evaluate the system by comparing it with state-of-the-art test equipment in a real-world test drive through diverse environments. After compensating for the stationary offset, the state-of-the-art devices deviated by up to 2315 ns, while with our devices, the deviation never exceeded 22.6 ns. It is evident that the devices designed for laboratory use perform inadequately in mobile operation and that our novel solution enables a significant leap in accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种专为移动场景优化的新型GNSS驯服晶振（GNSSDO），采用低加速度敏感度的恒温晶振（OCXO）和先进GNSS定时模块，在实地测试中最大偏差仅22.6 ns，远超传统设备（最大偏差2315 ns）。
AI.motivation: 现有全球导航卫星系统驯服晶振（GNSSDO）针对静态场景设计，在移动环境中性能严重下降，无法满足移动场景下的高精度同步需求。
AI.method: 从底层重新设计移动优化方案：核心采用对动态加速度低敏感度的恒温晶振（OCXO），结合先进GNSS定时模块进行驯服。
AI.result: 在实际测试中，传统设备最大偏差2315 ns，而本方案最大偏差仅22.6 ns，精度提升超过两个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 实验室设备在移动操作中表现不佳，而本文提出的新型方案显著提升了移动场景下的同步精度。

title: Why AI Harms Can't Be Fixed One Identity at a Time: What 5300 Incident Reports Reveal About Intersectionality
summary: AI risk assessment is the primary tool for identifying harms caused by AI systems. These include intersectional harms, which arise from the interaction between identity categories (e.g., class and skin tone) and which do not occur, or occur differently, when those categories are considered separately. Yet existing AI risk assessments are still built around isolated identity categories, and when intersections are considered, they focus almost exclusively on race and gender. Drawing on a large-scale analysis of documented AI incidents, we show that AI harms do not occur one identity category at a time. Using a structured rubric applied with a Large Language Model (LLM), we analyze 5,300 reports from 1,200 documented incidents in the AI Incident Database, the most curated source of incident data. From these reports, we identify 1,513 harmed subjects and their associated identity categories, achieving 98% accuracy. At the level of individual categories, we find that age and political identity appear in documented AI harms at rates comparable to race and gender. At the level of intersecting categories, harm is amplified up to three times at specific intersections: adolescent girls, lower-class people of color, and upper-class political elites. We argue that intersectionality should be a core component of AI risk assessment to more accurately capture how harms are produced and distributed across social groups.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对AI事件数据库中1200起已记录事件的5300份报告进行大规模分析，发现AI伤害并非单一身份类别发生，而是交叉身份类别（如青少年女性、低阶级有色人种等）的伤害放大效应可达三倍。研究主张应将交叉性作为AI风险评估的核心组成部分。
AI.motivation: 现有AI风险评估仍围绕单一身份类别构建，即便考虑交叉性也几乎只关注种族和性别，忽略了更广泛的身份类别及其交叉带来的独特伤害模式。
AI.method: 使用结构化评估框架结合大语言模型，对AI事件数据库中1200起事件的5300份报告进行分析，识别出1513个受害主体及其关联的身份类别，达到98%的准确率。
AI.result: 年龄和政治身份在AI伤害中出现的频率与种族和性别相当；在特定交叉身份（青少年女性、低阶级有色人种、上层阶级政治精英）处，伤害被放大至三倍。
AI.conclusion: 交叉性应成为AI风险评估的核心组成部分，以更准确地捕捉伤害如何产生及在社会群体间分布。

title: When Chain-of-Thought Fails, the Solution Hides in the Hidden States
summary: Whether intermediate reasoning is computationally useful or merely explanatory depends on whether chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens contain task-relevant information. We present a mechanistic causal analysis of CoT on GSM8K using activation patching: transferring token-level hidden states from a CoT generation to a direct-answer run for the same question, then measuring the effect on final-answer accuracy. Across models, generating after patching yields substantially higher accuracy than both direct-answer prompting and the original CoT trace, revealing that individual CoT tokens can encode sufficient information to recover the correct answer, even when the original trace is incorrect. This task-relevant information is more prevalent in correct than incorrect CoT runs and is unevenly distributed across tokens, concentrating in mid-to-late layers and appearing earlier in the reasoning trace. Moreover, patching language tokens such as verbs and entities carry task-solving information that steers generation toward correct reasoning, whereas mathematical tokens encode answer-proximal content that rarely succeeds. Patched outputs are often shorter and yet exceed the accuracy of a full CoT trace, suggesting complete reasoning chains are not always necessary. Together, these findings demonstrate that CoT encodes recoverable, token-level problem-solving information, offering new insight into how reasoning is represented and where it breaks down.

AI.tldr: 本文通过激活修补（activation patching）的因果机制分析方法，研究链式思维（CoT）推理中每个token是否包含任务相关信息。实验表明，即使原始CoT轨迹错误，单个CoT token也编码了足以恢复正确答案的信息，且这些信息不均匀分布，集中在中间到后期层，在推理轨迹早期出现。语言token（如动词、实体）比数学token包含更多任务求解信息。修补后的输出通常更短但准确率超过完整CoT轨迹，说明完整推理链并非总是必需的。
AI.motivation: 探究链式思维推理中的中间token是否包含任务相关信息，以及这些信息在模型内部的表示和分布情况，从而理解推理是如何在模型中被表征的，以及推理在何处可能失效。
AI.method: 采用激活修补（activation patching）的因果分析方法，将CoT生成中的token级隐藏状态转移到同一问题的直接回答运行中，通过测量对最终答案准确率的影响，分析每个token的任务相关信息含量。
AI.result: 修补后的生成准确率显著高于直接提示和原始CoT轨迹；正确CoT轨迹中任务相关信息更丰富；信息集中在中到后期层，在推理轨迹早期出现；语言token（动词、实体）比数学token包含更多求解信息；修补输出更短但准确率更高。
AI.conclusion: CoT编码了可恢复的、token级的问题求解信息，完整推理链并非总是必要的，这为理解语言模型中推理的表征机制和故障点提供了新视角。

title: Causal Representation Learning from General Environments under Nonparametric Mixing
comment: Accepted to AISTATS 2025. This is a slightly revised version of the published paper
summary: Causal representation learning aims to recover the latent causal variables and their causal relations, typically represented by directed acyclic graphs (DAGs), from low-level observations such as image pixels. A prevailing line of research exploits multiple environments, which assume how data distributions change, including single-node interventions, coupled interventions, or hard interventions, or parametric constraints on the mixing function or the latent causal model, such as linearity. Despite the novelty and elegance of the results, they are often violated in real problems. Accordingly, we formalize a set of desiderata for causal representation learning that applies to a broader class of environments, referred to as general environments. Interestingly, we show that one can fully recover the latent DAG and identify the latent variables up to minor indeterminacies under a nonparametric mixing function and nonlinear latent causal models, such as additive (Gaussian) noise models or heteroscedastic noise models, by properly leveraging sufficient change conditions on the causal mechanisms up to third-order derivatives. These represent, to our knowledge, the first results to fully recover the latent DAG from general environments under nonparametric mixing. Notably, our results match or improve upon many existing works, but require less restrictive assumptions about changing environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出在更一般的环境（general environments）下，通过利用因果机制的三阶导数变化条件，首次实现在非参数混合函数和非线性潜在因果模型下完整恢复潜在DAG和因果变量。
AI.motivation: 现有因果表征学习大多依赖严格的环境假设（如单节点干预、硬干预、线性混合等），这些假设在真实问题中常被违反。作者希望放宽这些限制，适用于更一般的环境设定。
AI.method: 形式化地定义了一组适用于一般环境（general environments）的因果表征学习条件，利用因果机制中直到三阶导数的充分变化条件，在非参数混合函数和非线性潜在因果模型（如加性噪声模型、异方差噪声模型）下实现潜在DAG的完整恢复。
AI.result: 首次在非参数混合假设下，从一般环境中完整恢复潜在DAG，且仅需要较弱的假设，匹配甚至改进了许多现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法显著放宽了因果表征学习的环境假设，具有更强的现实适用性，是非参数混合下首个能从一般环境恢复潜在DAG的工作。

title: SUDA-Muon: Structural Design Principles and Boundaries for Fully Decentralized Muon
summary: Fully decentralized Muon is difficult because its nonlinear matrix-sign operator does not commute with linear gossip averaging. This makes decentralized Muon a structural design problem: in designing the algorithm, one must distinguish modular components from non-modular ones. We propose \sudamuon{}, which realizes this separation through a unified primal--dual communication template called SUDA; within this template, ED/D$^2$, EXTRA, and gradient tracking become modular backbone choices. We prove a topology-separated non-asymptotic convergence guarantee in the nuclear-norm geometry: the dominant term scales as $\mathcal{O}((1+σ/\sqrt{N})K^{-1/4})$ and does not explicitly involve graph quantities, identifying the communication backbone as the modular axis in the structure design. We then establish two complementary non-modular boundaries. Internally, tracking-before-polarization is necessary for this natural no-tracking variant to avoid non-stationary fixed points under heterogeneous objectives. Externally, in the absence of a central server, a fully decentralized method cannot perform the federated average-then-polarize update; we show that this non-modular local-polarize-then-average design is the essential reason why can fail to exhibit linear speedup. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and GPT-2 fine-tuning support the same picture: the unified template makes different communication algorithms directly comparable. In mild near-IID regimes, the resulting variants perform similarly, while in the more difficult long-horizon non-IID CIFAR-100 setting, \sudamuon{} achieves higher accuracy and lower loss than \textsc{DeMuon}.

AI.tldr: 本文针对去中心化Muon优化器的非线性矩阵符号算子与线性gossip平均不兼容的问题，提出SUDAMuon算法，通过统一的primal-dual通信模板SUDA实现模块化设计，证明拓扑分离的收敛保证，并揭示了非模块化边界（内部需tracking-before-polarization，外部无法实现federated average-then-polarize）。实验验证了统一模板的有效性。
AI.motivation: 去中心化Muon优化困难，因其非线性矩阵符号算子与线性gossip平均不兼容，导致算法设计需区分模块化与非模块化组件。
AI.method: 提出SUDAMuon，基于统一primal-dual通信模板SUDA，将ED/D²、EXTRA、梯度跟踪等作为模块化骨干选择，实现通信与优化的结构化分离。
AI.result: 证明核范数几何下的拓扑分离非渐近收敛保证，主导项为O((1+σ/√N)K^{-1/4})，不显式涉及图拓扑。实验显示CIFAR-100和GPT-2微调中，SUDAMuon在非IID设定下优于DeMuon。
AI.conclusion: 统一的SUDA模板使不同通信算法可直接比较，识别通信骨干为模块化轴；同时揭示两类非模块化边界，为去中心化优化器设计提供结构指导。

title: When Corrective Hints Hurt: Prompt Design in Reasoner-Guided Repair of LLM Overcaution on Entailed Negations under OWL~2~DL
summary: We report a reproducible error pattern in GPT-5.4 on OWL~2~DL compliance queries: the model frequently answers ``unknown'' when the reasoner-entailed answer is ``no'' under \emph{FunctionalProperty} closure or class \emph{disjointness}. Using 180 reasoner-audited queries from a procedural expansion of the observed pattern plus 18 hand-authored held-out queries in two unrelated domains (insurance and clinical), we compare four interaction modes under matched query budget: single-shot, three rounds of generic ``you-are-wrong'' retry, three rounds of reasoner-verdict repair with an open-world-assumption (OWA) hint, and the same repair without the hint. Direct faithfulness is 43.9\,\% (Wilson 95\,\% CI $[36.8,51.2]$); generic retry reaches 81.7\,\% ($[75.4,86.6]$); the verdict-with-hint variant is \emph{worse} at 67.2\,\% ($[60.1,73.7]$); the verdict-only variant reaches 97.8\,\% ($[94.4,99.1]$). All pairwise comparisons remain significant under McNemar's exact test with Bonferroni correction ($α= 0.01$; all $p < 10^{-5}$). The same fingerprint accounts for 4/4 errors on the held-out queries. Our interpretation is bounded: prompt framing can matter more than corrective content, and reasoner-guided wrappers should be ablated explicitly.

AI.tldr: 论文发现GPT-5.4在OWL~2~DL查询中存在可复现的“未知”错误模式，通过比较四种交互模式，发现仅使用推理器判决（不包含开放世界假设提示）的修复模式准确率最高（97.8%），而包含OWA提示反而效果更差（67.2%），表明提示框架比纠正内容更重要。
AI.motivation: 作者发现GPT-5.4在处理OWL~2~DL本体合规性查询时存在系统性的错误模式（FunctionalProperty闭包和类互斥条件下，模型倾向于回答“未知”而非正确的“否”），需要进行系统性的分析和评估。
AI.method: 构建180个推理器审计的查询（从观察到的错误模式过程化扩展）和18个人工编写的跨域（保险和临床）查询，在匹配的查询预算下比较四种交互模式：单轮、三轮通用重试、三轮带开放世界假设(OWA)提示的推理器判决修复、以及不带OWA提示的推理器判决修复。
AI.result: 单轮准确率43.9%；通用重试81.7%；带OWA提示的判决修复67.2%（更差）；仅判决修复97.8%。所有配对比较在McNemar精确检验和Bonferroni校正下均显著（p<10^{-5}）。同一模式在保留集上造成4/4的错误。
AI.conclusion: 提示框架（framing）比纠正内容更重要；推理器引导的封装应进行明确的消融实验；包含OWA提示反而降低了修复效果。

title: Preserving Long-Tailed Expert Information in Mixture-of-Experts Tuning
summary: Despite MoE models leading many benchmarks, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) for the MoE architectures remains difficult because its router layers are fragile. Methods such as DenseMixer and ESFT mitigate router collapse with dense mixing or auxiliary load-balancing losses, but these introduce noisy gradients that often degrade performance. In preliminary experiments, we systematically pruned experts and observed that while certain super experts are activated far more frequently, discarding less used experts still leads to notable performance degradation. This suggests that even rarely activated experts encode non-trivial knowledge useful for downstream tasks. Motivated by this, we propose an auxiliary-loss-free MoE SFT framework that combines bias-driven sparsification with always-active gated condenser experts. Rather than enforcing balanced activation across all experts, our method encourages task-relevant experts to remain active while pushing long-tailed experts toward inactivity. The condenser experts provide a persistent, learnable pathway that alleviates gradient starvation and facilitates consolidation of information that would otherwise remain fragmented across sparsely activated experts. Analysis further suggest that this design better preserves long-tailed expert information under sparse routing. Experiments on large-scale MoE models demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art SFT baselines such as DenseMixer and ESFT, achieving average gain of 2.5%+ on both mathematical reasoning and commonsenseQA benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种免辅助损失的MoE微调框架，通过偏置驱动的稀疏化和始终激活的冷凝专家，在不引入噪声梯度的情况下保留长尾专家知识，在数学推理和常识问答上平均提升2.5%+。
AI.motivation: MoE模型的路由层在SFT中非常脆弱，现有方法（如DenseMixer、ESFT）虽能缓解路由崩溃但引入噪声梯度导致性能下降。实验发现即使很少激活的专家也编码了有价值的知识，丢弃它们会导致性能显著退化。
AI.method: 提出无辅助损失的MoE SFT框架，包含两个关键设计：(1) 偏置驱动的稀疏化——鼓励任务相关专家保持活跃，推动长尾专家趋于不活跃；(2) 始终激活的门控冷凝专家——提供持久可学习的通路，缓解梯度饥饿，整合分散在稀疏专家中的信息。
AI.result: 在大规模MoE模型上，该方法在数学推理和常识问答基准上平均超越SOTA基线（DenseMixer、ESFT）2.5%以上。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效保留了长尾专家信息，避免了辅助损失引入的噪声梯度，为MoE模型的SFT提供了一种更干净、高效的微调范式。

title: Optimal Planning and Control under Signal Temporal Logic Specifications
summary: This paper addresses the planning and control problem for nonlinear systems under Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications. We first decompose an STL task into finite local tasks. A sampling-based method generates sequences of local waypoints to satisfy all local tasks, from which the corresponding satisfaction pair sets are derived. Following a local-to-global strategy, all sequences of local waypoints are synthesized into a global one, based on which a safe corridor is then constructed. Leveraging the safe corridor and the satisfaction pair sets, an optimization problem is formulated and solved to derive a position trajectory that satisfies the STL task. Finally, numerical examples and comparative results are presented to demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 针对非线性系统在信号时序逻辑（STL）规范下的规划与控制问题，提出一种将STL任务分解为局部子任务、通过采样生成局部路径点、综合为全局路径并构建安全走廊，最终通过优化求解满足STL任务的位置轨迹的方法。
AI.motivation: 非线性系统在复杂时序逻辑约束（如STL）下的规划与控制具有挑战性，现有方法难以同时保证任务满足性、安全性和计算效率，因此需要一种系统性的分解-综合框架。
AI.method: 1) 将STL任务分解为有限个局部任务；2) 基于采样的方法生成局部路径点序列以满足各局部任务，并导出对应的满足对集合；3) 采用局部到全局策略，将所有局部路径点序列综合为全局路径点序列；4) 基于全局路径构建安全走廊；5) 利用安全走廊和满足对集合，构建并求解优化问题，得到满足STL任务的位置轨迹。
AI.result: 通过数值算例和对比结果，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种结合任务分解、采样路径规划、全局综合与安全走廊优化的系统化方法，有效解决了非线性系统在STL规范下的规划控制问题。

title: BuyTheBy: A dataset of 18,710 text-based paper mill advertisements with 51,812 timestamped prices
comment: 23 pages, 18 figures. The BuyTheBy dataset is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19684277
summary: The study of paper mills and similar businesses operating in the market for academic and education fraud services is frustrated by the lack of market price data on their various offerings. Here, we assemble BuyTheBy, a large, annotated dataset of timestamped, text-based paper mill advertisements from seven businesses operating out of seven different countries. The dataset consists of 18,710 individual advertisements, of which 15,839 have prices listed. Among these there are 20,598 positions listed as for sale on 5,567 unique products in 14 different product categories with 51,812 timestamped price data points. We perform elementary analysis of this dataset to demonstrate its utility for quantitative understanding of markets for academic fraud services and suggest future use cases.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了BuyTheBy数据集，包含来自7个国家7家论文工厂的18,710条广告（15,839条含价格），涵盖5,567种独特产品、14个类别、51,812个时间戳价格点，为量化分析学术欺诈服务市场提供了基础数据。
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏市场价格数据，对论文工厂及学术欺诈服务市场的研究长期受阻，本文旨在填补这一数据空白。
AI.method: 从7个不同国家的7家论文工厂收集带时间戳的文本广告，构建含价格标注的大型数据集BuyTheBy，并进行基础统计分析。
AI.result: 数据集包含18,710条广告，其中15,839条标注了价格，涵盖5,567种独特产品、14个类别，共计51,812个时间戳价格数据点。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可用于量化理解学术欺诈服务市场，并为未来相关研究提供参考。

title: VeriLLMed: Interactive Visual Debugging of Medical Large Language Models with Knowledge Graphs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in medical diagnosis, but real-world deployment remains challenging due to high-stakes clinical decisions and imperfect reasoning reliability. As a result, careful inspection of model behavior is essential for assessing whether diagnostic reasoning is reliable and clinically grounded. However, debugging medical LLMs remains difficult. First, developers often lack sufficient medical domain expertise to interpret model errors in clinically meaningful terms. Second, models can fail across a large and diverse set of instances involving different input types, tasks, and reasoning steps, making it challenging for developers to prioritize which errors deserve focused inspection. Third, developers struggle to identify recurring error patterns across cases, as existing debugging practices are largely instance-centric and rely on manual inspection of isolated failures. To address these challenges, we present VeriLLMed, a visual analytics system that integrates external biomedical knowledge to audit and debug medical LLM diagnostic reasoning. VeriLLMed transforms model outputs into comparable reasoning paths, constructs knowledge graph-grounded reference paths, and identifies three recurring classes of diagnosis errors: relation errors, branch errors, and missing errors. Case studies and expert evaluation demonstrate that VeriLLMed helps developers identify clinically implausible reasoning and generate actionable insights that can inform the improvement of medical LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeriLLMed，一个集成外部生物医学知识的可视化分析系统，用于审计和调试医疗大语言模型的诊断推理过程。系统通过将模型输出转化为可比较的推理路径、构建基于知识图谱的参考路径，并识别三类诊断错误（关系错误、分支错误、缺失错误），帮助开发者发现临床不合理的推理并生成可操作的改进见解。
AI.motivation: 医疗LLM在现实部署中面临高风险的临床决策和推理可靠性不足的问题，但开发者缺乏医学专业知识来解读模型错误、难以从大量错误实例中优先处理关键问题，且现有调试方式以实例为中心，难以识别跨案例的重复错误模式。
AI.method: VeriLLMed系统包含三个核心模块：1）将模型输出转化为可比较的推理路径；2）基于外部生物医学知识图谱构建参考路径；3）识别三类诊断错误模式（关系错误、分支错误、缺失错误），帮助开发者系统地审计模型推理。
AI.result: 通过案例研究和专家评估，VeriLLMed能够帮助开发者识别临床上不合理的推理行为，并生成可用于改进医疗LLM的可操作洞察。
AI.conclusion: VeriLLMed通过可视化分析和知识图谱增强的方法，有效解决了医疗LLM调试中医学知识门槛高、错误优先级难判断、跨案例模式难识别三大挑战，为提升医疗AI诊断推理的可靠性提供了实用的工具支持。

title: Inverting Foundation Models of Brain Function with Simulation-Based Inference
summary: Foundation models of brain activity promise a new frontier for in silico neuroscience by emulating neural responses to complex stimuli across tasks and modalities. A natural next step is to ask whether these models can also be used in reverse. Can we recover a stimulus or its properties from synthetic brain activity? We study this question in a proof-of-concept setting using TRIBEv2. We pair the brain emulator with large language models (LLMs) that generate news headlines from linguistic parameters such as valence, arousal, and dominance. We then use simulation-based inference to learn a probabilistic mapping from brain maps to latent stimulus parameters. Our results show that these parameters can be recovered from predicted brain maps, validating the quality of neural encodings. They also show that LLMs can serve as controllable stimulus generators for simulated experiments. Together, these findings provide a step toward decoding and inverse design with foundation brain models.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了将大脑基础模型与大型语言模型（LLMs）结合，通过模拟逆向推理从合成脑活动中恢复刺激参数，验证了脑编码质量及LLMs作为可控刺激生成器的潜力。
AI.motivation: 研究是否可以利用大脑基础模型进行逆向操作，即从合成的脑活动中恢复刺激或刺激属性，推动计算机神经科学中的解码与逆向设计。
AI.method: 将TRIBEv2（大脑模拟器）与LLMs配对，利用LLMs基于语言参数（效价、唤醒度、优势度）生成新闻标题；再通过基于模拟的推理学习从脑图到潜在刺激参数的概率映射。
AI.result: 实验证明刺激参数可以从预测的脑图中成功恢复，验证了神经编码的质量；同时表明LLMs可作为可控刺激生成器用于模拟实验。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明大脑基础模型有望用于解码和逆向设计，为计算机神经科学提供了新方向。

title: Analysis of Stability and Performance of Economic Model Predictive Control with State-Independent Costs
summary: This paper studies economic model predictive Control (EMPC) schemes, where the stage cost depends only on control inputs. Such problems arise in applications like water distribution networks and differ from standard EMPC since multiple steady states can correspond to the unique optimal steady input. We show that, under a strict dissipativity assumption related to the set of optimal steady states, the closed-loop trajectories converge asymptotically to this set, ensuring convergence of the economic cost to the optimal steady state cost. To enhance Lyapunov stability, we propose a modified stage cost that preserves the optimal input while guaranteeing asymptotic stability of a specific equilibrium with a slight performance loss. The approach is further extended to EMPC of a class of linear systems with periodic costs and disturbances by lifting it to a multi-step EMPC problem for periodic operations. A case study with a water distribution network demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed methods in achieving both asymptotic convergence and stability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究仅控制输入影响阶段成本的经济模型预测控制（EMPC），证明在严格耗散性假设下闭环轨迹渐近收敛到最优稳态集，并提出改进的阶段成本以增强李雅普诺夫稳定性，同时将方法扩展到含周期成本与扰动的线性系统。
AI.motivation: 标准EMPC中阶段成本通常依赖于状态和输入，但水分配网络等应用场景中成本仅与输入相关，导致多个稳态对应唯一最优稳态输入。现有理论无法直接处理此类问题，需建立新的收敛性与稳定性分析框架。
AI.method: 1. 建立基于最优稳态集的严格耗散性假设，证明闭环轨迹渐近收敛到该集合；2. 设计修正阶段成本，保持最优输入不变的同时确保特定平衡点的渐近稳定性（以轻微性能损失为代价）；3. 通过提升(multi-step lifting)方法将带周期成本/扰动的线性系统EMPC转化为周期性多步EMPC问题。
AI.result: 理论证明了在严格耗散性条件下经济成本收敛到最优稳态成本；修正的成本函数实现了特定平衡点的渐近稳定性；水分配网络案例验证了所提方法在渐近收敛性和稳定性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功解决了仅输入依赖成本下EMPC的多稳态收敛问题，通过修正成本函数平衡了稳定性和经济性能，并为周期性问题提供了可操作的lifting框架。

title: IndustryAssetEQA: A Neurosymbolic Operational Intelligence System for Embodied Question Answering in Industrial Asset Maintenance
comment: 20 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables, Accepted for the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL 2026) Industry Track
summary: Industrial maintenance environments increasingly rely on AI systems to assist operators in understanding asset behavior, diagnosing failures, and evaluating interventions. Although large language models (LLMs) enable fluent natural-language interaction, deployed maintenance assistants routinely produce generic explanations that are weakly grounded in telemetry, omit verifiable provenance, and offer no testable support for counterfactual or action-oriented reasoning that undermine trust in safety-critical settings. We present IndustryAssetEQA, a neurosymbolic operational intelligence system that combines episodic telemetry representations with a Failure Mode Effects Analysis Knowledge Graph (FMEA-KG) to enable Embodied Question Answering (EQA) over industrial assets. We evaluate on four datasets covering four industrial asset types, including rotating machinery, turbofan engines, hydraulic systems, and cyber-physical production systems. Compared to LLM-only baselines, IndustryAssetEQA improves structural validity by up to 0.51, counterfactual accuracy by up to 0.47, and explanation entailment by 0.64, while reducing severe expert-rated overclaims from 28% to 2% (approximately 93% reduction). Code, datasets, and the FMEA-KG are available at https://github.com/IBM/AssetOpsBench/tree/IndustryAssetEQA/IndustryAssetEQA.

AI.tldr: 提出IndustryAssetEQA，一种结合时间序列遥测数据与失效模式知识图谱的神经符号系统，用于工业资产的可信问答，相比纯LLM基线显著提升解释的准确性、可溯源性。
AI.motivation: 现有工业运维AI助手虽然能流畅对话，但生成的解释缺乏遥测数据支撑、没有可验证来源，也无法进行反事实推理或行动导向推理，在安全关键场景下缺乏可信度。
AI.method: 构建神经符号系统IndustryAssetEQA，结合情节性遥测表示（episodic telemetry representations）与FMEA知识图谱（FMEA-KG），实现面向工业资产的具身问答（EQA）。
AI.result: 在旋转机械、涡扇发动机、液压系统、信息物理生产系统四个数据集上，相比LLM基线，结构有效性提升0.51，反事实准确率提升0.47，解释蕴含度提升0.64，严重过度断言从28%降至2%（减少约93%）。
AI.conclusion: 将知识图谱与遥测数据符号化结合，能有效缓解LLM在工业安全关键场景中的幻觉问题，提升AI助手的可信度。

title: A Differentiable Framework for Global Circulation Model Precipitation Bias Correction
summary: Systematic biases in Global Circulation Model (GCM) outputs limit their direct applicability in regional planning, necessitating bias correction. Correcting precipitation is particularly challenging due to its non-Gaussian distribution, intermittent nature, and non-linear extremes. However, traditional statistical methods cannot learn from big data and easily address systematic biases in the GCMs, and while machine learning does provide this flexibility, their black-box type functionality hinders us from understanding these biases completely which also further prevents generalization across different GCMs and locations, especially for precipitation. In this study, we propose a differentiable bias adjustment framework called δCLIMBA (or dCLIMBA), that learns a spatiotemporally adaptive parametric bias adjustment procedure between historical CMIP6 model outputs and reference reanalysis datasets (Livneh). Results demonstrate that the proposed method accurately corrects both the magnitude and distribution of extreme storm events, with particularly strong performance in capturing extremes. The quantile distribution of precipitation is well reproduced across diverse U.S. cities, and spatial patterns perform comparably to the widely used LOCA2 statistical downscaling technique. In addition, the framework showed future trend preservation unlike pure quantile based methods and LOCA2; and results from bias correction over unseen regions showed that the marginal biases were attenuated. This work presents a modular, computationally efficient and extensible bias correction approach that is physically informed, scalable, and compatible with both historical and future applications. Its flexibility makes it suitable for integration into Earth system post-processing pipelines and impact workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出δCLIMBA（dCLIMBA），一种可微分的偏差校正框架，通过时空自适应参数化方法对CMIP6全球气候模型降水输出进行偏差校正，在极端事件校正、分位数分布重建和未来趋势保持方面表现优异，且具备物理可解释性和跨区域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统统计方法无法从大数据中学习且难以解决GCM的系统偏差，而机器学习虽灵活但黑箱特性阻碍了对偏差的完全理解，限制了其在不同GCM和地点的泛化能力，尤其是降水偏差校正。
AI.method: 提出δCLIMBA框架，一种可微分的偏差调整方法，学习历史CMIP6模型输出与参考再分析数据集（Livneh）之间的时空自适应参数化偏差调整过程。
AI.result: 该方法准确校正了极端风暴事件的幅值和分布，在捕捉极值方面表现优异；在美国多样化城市中很好地重现了降水分位数分布；空间模式与LOCA2统计降尺度技术相当；保持了未来趋势；在未见区域的偏差校正中边际偏差得到减弱。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种模块化、计算高效且可扩展的偏差校正方法，具有物理可解释性、可扩展性，适用于历史和未来应用，可集成到地球系统后处理流程和影响评估工作中。

title: Graph Neural Ordinary Differential Equations for Power System Identification
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: With the shift towards decentralized energy generation, the increasing complexity of power systems renders physics-based modeling challenging. At the same time the growing amount of available measurement data opens the door for obtaining models in a data-driven manner. A modern method to do so are neural ordinary differential equations (NODEs), offering a framework for continuous time system identification. Recent extensions, so called graph NODEs impose a structural inductive bias that has the potential to improve generalization of the learned representation. In this work, we employ graph NODEs and extend them with novel ideas to develop message-passing graph NODEs (MPG-NODEs) for identification of coupled systems with heterogeneous node dynamics and edge couplings. This encompasses state-of-the-art machine learning architectures to infer latent representations of unmeasured states from past measurements, local node and edge embeddings to account for heterogeneity as well as an autoregressive scheme to allow for piecewise constant control inputs. We apply MPG-NODEs to identify voltage and frequency dynamics of power systems and compare them to a monolith NODE under identical measurement assumptions. Our case study on the IEEE 9-bus system indicates that the proposed MPG-NODE offers a much more flexible framework with transfer learning options that allow to add or remove powerlines and units with little to no retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出消息传递图神经常微分方程（MPG-NODEs），用于识别具有异质性节点动力学和边耦合的耦合系统，并在IEEE 9节点电力系统上验证了其相较于单片NODE在灵活性和迁移学习方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 随着分布式能源的兴起，电力系统日益复杂，基于物理的建模变得困难。同时，大量可用测量数据为数据驱动建模提供了契机。作者希望利用图NODE的结构化归纳偏置来改进系统辨识，并解决异构节点和耦合边带来的挑战。
AI.method: 基于图神经ODE进行扩展，提出消息传递图神经ODE（MPG-NODEs）。核心创新包括：(1) 消息传递架构以推断未测量状态的潜在表示；(2) 局部节点和边嵌入以处理异构性；(3) 自回归方案以支持分段常数控制输入。
AI.result: 在IEEE 9节点系统上的案例研究表明，MPG-NODE相比单片NODE提供了更灵活的框架，支持迁移学习，允许在不需重新训练或仅需少量再训练的情况下添加或移除电力线和机组。
AI.conclusion: MPG-NODE通过图结构归纳偏置和消息传递机制，有效实现了异构耦合系统的数据驱动辨识，并在电力系统电压和频率动态辨识中展现出优越的灵活性和可扩展性。

title: Workplace Demands and Emotional Expression Among Early Childhood Educators: A Computational Analysis of Professional Online Discourse
summary:
Early childhood educators work in settings characterized by heavy regulation, emotional labor, staffing instability, and low pay. Although these conditions are well documented in survey-based research, less is known about how they manifest in the day-to-day language educators use in peer spaces. This study examines 7,506 posts from r/ECEProfessionals, a large online community used by early childhood education practitioners. Using a structured, computer-assisted thematic coding workflow and transformer-based emotion classification, posts were organized into 15 themes and mapped onto an adapted Job Demands-Resources (JD-R) framework.
  Across the corpus, 56.7% of posts centered on demands when task-level and core job demands were combined, compared with 33.6% focused on resources and 9.6% on career conditions. Emotion estimates indicated a broadly neutral tone overall; however, fear emerged as the most prominent non-neutral emotion. Demand-related categories also exhibited higher levels of sadness and anger than resource-related categories.
  These findings suggest that professional online discourse in early childhood education reflects a work environment structured more around strain than support. The study offers a practical framework for examining how occupational conditions are discussed and emotionally experienced in large-scale professional texts.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了r/ECEProfessionals社区中7,506篇帖子，发现56.7%的内容聚焦于工作需求（如情绪劳动、低薪资等），仅33.6%涉及资源支持。情绪分析显示整体语气中性，但恐惧是最突出的非中性情绪，需求类帖子中悲伤和愤怒情绪更高。这表明早教专业人员在线话语反映了一个以压力而非支持为主的工作环境。
AI.motivation: 尽管调查类研究已充分记录了早教工作者面临的监管严、情绪劳动重、人员不稳定和薪资低等问题，但尚不清楚这些问题在日常职业话语中如何具体体现。作者希望从自然语言层面捕捉从业者的真实体验。
AI.method: 收集r/ECEProfessionals社区7,506篇帖子；采用计算机辅助主题编码流程进行结构化分析；使用基于Transformer的情绪分类模型进行情感估计；将主题映射到改编的工作需求-资源（JD-R）框架上。
AI.result: 56.7%的帖子聚焦工作需求（任务需求+核心工作需求），33.6%聚焦工作资源，9.6%聚焦职业条件。情绪方面整体呈中性，但恐惧是最突出的非中性情绪；需求类类别的悲伤和愤怒水平高于资源类类别。
AI.conclusion: 早教领域的专业在线话语反映出工作环境以压力（strain）为主导，而非支持（support）。本研究为在大规模专业文本中考察职业条件的讨论方式和情感体验提供了一个实用分析框架。

title: Overcoming Copyright Barriers in Corpus Distribution Through Non-Reversible Hashing
summary: While annotated corpora are crucial in the field of natural language processing (NLP), those containing copyrighted material are difficult to exchange among researchers. Yet, such corpora are necessary to fully represent the diversity of data found in the wild in the context of NLP tasks. We tackle this issue by proposing a method to lawfully and publicly share the annotations of copyrighted literary texts. The corpus creator shares the annotations in clear, along with a non-reversible hashed version of the source material. The corpus user must own the source material, and apply the same hash function to their own tokens, in order to match them to the shared annotations. Crucially, our method is robust to reasonable divergences in the version of the copyrighted data owned by the user. As an illustration, we present alignment experiments on different editions of novels. Our results show that our method is able to correctly align 98.7 to 99.79% of tokens depending on the novel, provided the user version is sufficiently close to the corpus creator's version. We publicly release novelshare, a Python implementation of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过非可逆哈希共享受版权保护文学文本标注的方法，使研究者能在合法前提下交换标注数据，对齐准确率达98.7-99.79%。
AI.motivation: 受版权保护的语料库难以在研究社区中合法共享，但这类数据对NLP任务中体现数据的真实多样性至关重要，亟需一种既能保护版权又能公开共享标注的方法。
AI.method: 标注创建者公开共享清晰标注文本及源材料的非可逆哈希版本；使用者需拥有源材料并对自己的token应用相同哈希函数以匹配标注；该方法对数据版本的合理差异具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在不同版本小说的对齐实验中，当使用者版本与创建者版本足够接近时，token对齐准确率达到98.7%至99.79%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的哈希对齐方法能有效促进受版权保护文学文本标注的合法公开共享，并公开发布了Python实现novelshare。

title: Gromov-Wasserstein Methods for Multi-View Relational Embedding and Clustering
comment: This manuscript is currently under review at the XLIV Simposio Brasileiro de Telecomunicacoes e Processamento de Sinais - SBrT (Brazilian Symposium on Telecommunications and Signal Processing ) 2026
summary: Learning low-dimensional representations from multi-view relational data is challenging when underlying geometries differ across views. We propose Bary-GWMDS, a Gromov-Wasserstein-based method that operates directly on distance matrices to learn a consensus embedding preserving shared relational structure. By leveraging intrinsic distances, the approach naturally handles nonlinear distortions across views. We also introduce Mean-GWMDS-C, a clustering-oriented formulation that averages distance matrices and learns reduced-support representations via a consensus Gromov-Wasserstein transport. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that the proposed framework yields stable and geometrically meaningful embeddings.

AI.tldr: 提出Bary-GWMDS和Mean-GWMDS-C两种基于Gromov-Wasserstein的多视图降维方法，直接从距离矩阵学习共识嵌入，处理跨视图非线性畸变，实验证明能产生稳定且几何有意义的嵌入。
AI.motivation: 多视图关系数据中不同视图的底层几何结构可能不同，传统方法难以处理这种跨视图的非线性畸变问题。
AI.method: 基于Gromov-Wasserstein距离，直接对距离矩阵操作：Bary-GWMDS学习共识嵌入，Mean-GWMDS-C通过平均距离矩阵和共识Gromov-Wasserstein传输学习降维表示。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，提出的方法能生成稳定且几何有意义的嵌入。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能有效处理多视图数据中的几何差异，得到保持共享关系结构的共识表示。

title: An online adaptive finite-element method for nonsmooth PDE-constrained optimization
summary: We present a trust-region-based adaptive finite-element algorithm for numerically solving a class of nonsmooth PDE-constrained optimization problems that includes problems with sparsifying regularizers and convex constraints. In particular, we consider the class of problems whose objective function is the sum of a smooth, possibly nonconvex, function and a nonsmooth extended real-valued convex function. Our method combines the robustness of inexact trust-region algorithms for nonsmooth problems with the efficiency of adaptive finite-element discretizations. Starting from a coarse mesh, the algorithm automatically refines the discretization based on reliable a posteriori error estimators for both the state and adjoint equations, systematically controlling the accuracy of the computed smooth objective function value and gradient. This adaptivity mechanism balances computational cost and solution accuracy, enabling high resolution of localized phenomena and sparsity structures in the state and control variables. We demonstrate the performance of our algorithm through numerical experiments on representative control and topology optimization examples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信赖域的自适应有限元算法，用于求解一类包含稀疏正则化和凸约束的非光滑PDE约束优化问题。该方法结合了非光滑问题的鲁棒信赖域算法与自适应有限元离散的效率，通过后验误差估计自动细化网格，平衡计算成本与求解精度。数值实验验证了其在控制和拓扑优化中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效求解非光滑PDE约束优化问题，特别是在需要高分辨率和稀疏结构时，缺乏既能保证鲁棒性又能自适应控制离散误差的算法框架。
AI.method: 将非光滑问题的信赖域算法（处理光滑+非光滑目标函数之和）与自适应有限元离散相结合。从粗网格开始，基于状态方程和伴随方程的后验误差估计自动细化网格，系统控制光滑目标函数值及其梯度的计算精度。
AI.result: 在控制和拓扑优化的数值实验中，算法能够有效解析局部现象和稀疏结构，平衡计算成本与求解精度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应信赖域算法为求解非光滑PDE约束优化问题提供了一种鲁棒且高效的新框架，尤其适用于需要高分辨率捕捉稀疏结构的应用场景。

title: ArguAgent: AI-Supported Real-Time Grouping for Productive Argumentation in STEM Classrooms
comment: Full paper accepted to the 27th International Conference on AI in Education (AIED 2026). AIED Proceedings to be released Summer 2026
summary: Argumentation is a core practice in STEM education, but its productivity depends on who participates and how they interact. Higher-achieving students often dominate the talk and decision-making, while lower-achieving peers may disengage, defer, or comply without contributing substantive reasoning. Forming groups strategically based on students' stances and argumentation skills could help foster inclusive, evidence-based discourse. In practice, however, teachers are constrained in implementing this grouping strategy because it requires real-time insight into students' positions and the quality of their argumentation, information that is difficult to assess reliably and at scale during instruction. We present a generative AI-powered system, ArguAgent, that creates groups optimizing for stance heterogeneity while constraining argumentation quality differences to +/-1 level on a validated learning progression. ArguAgent uses a two-component assessment pipeline: first scoring student arguments on a 0-4 rubric, then clustering positions via semantic analysis. We validated the scoring component against human expert consensus (Krippendorff's ααα = 0.817) using 200 expert-generated scores. Testing three OpenAI models (GPT-4o-mini, GPT-5.1, GPT-5.2) with identical calibrated prompts, we found that systematic prompt engineering informed by human disagreement analysis contributed 89% of scoring improvement (QWK: 0.531 to 0.686), while model upgrades contributed an additional 11% (QWK: 0.686 to 0.708). Simulation testing across 100 classes demonstrated that the grouping algorithm achieves 95.4% of groups that meet both design criteria, a 3.2x improvement over random assignment. These results suggest ArguAgent can enable real-time, theoretically grounded grouping that promotes productive STEM argumentation in classrooms.

AI.tldr: 提出ArguAgent系统，利用生成式AI根据学生论证立场和技能水平进行实时分组，促进STEM课堂中的包容性论证。系统通过双组件评估流程（评分+立场聚类）和优化分组算法，实现了与人类专家高度一致的评分（α=0.817）和95.4%满足设计标准的分组效果。
AI.motivation: STEM教育中论证实践常被高成就学生主导，低成就学生参与不足。教师虽可通过策略性分组改善这一状况，但缺乏实时评估学生论证立场与质量的工具。因此需要一种能自动评估并优化分组的AI系统。
AI.method: ArguAgent采用双组件评估管道：(1) 基于0-4评分量表的论证质量评分；(2) 通过语义分析进行立场聚类。分组算法在保证立场异质性的同时，将论证质量差异限制在±1级内。使用三种GPT模型，结合基于人类分歧分析的系统性提示工程优化评分。
AI.result: 评分组件与人类专家共识一致性达α=0.817。提示工程贡献了89%的评分改进（QWK: 0.531→0.686），模型升级贡献11%（QWK: 0.686→0.708）。模拟测试中95.4%的分组满足设计标准，相比随机分组提升3.2倍。
AI.conclusion: ArguAgent能够实现基于理论的实时课堂分组，通过自动评估论证质量与立场，有效促进STEM课堂中更具包容性和生产性的论证实践。

title: Toward Low-Altitude Embodied Intelligence: A Sensing-Communication-Computation-Control Closed-Loop Perspective
summary: The rapid growth of the low-altitude economy drives increasingly autonomous unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) operations, giving rise to low-altitude embodied intelligence (LAEI), in which sensing, communication, computation, and control (SC$^3$) are tightly integrated to enable closed-loop interaction, ensuring timely, effective, and safe responses in complex or unknown environments. This article systematically explores the LAEI networks, from its fundamental architecture to the diverse scenarios that it can support. We examine key enabling techniques that sustain timely information exchange and effective decision feedback within the $\text{SC}^3$ closed loop. A representative low-altitude UAV mission in an unknown urban area is presented as a case study, where the UAV provides communication services and performs environmental sensing to inform closed-loop control, illustrating how coordinated $\text{SC}^3$ capabilities enable efficient and responsive operation. By identifying major challenges and outlining future research directions, this work serves as a cornerstone for developing next-generation low-altitude intelligent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统探讨了低空具身智能（LAEI）网络，从基础架构到应用场景，重点研究感知、通信、计算与控制（SC³）闭环集成技术，并通过城市未知区域无人机任务案例验证其高效响应能力，最后指出挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 低空经济快速发展驱动无人机自主化程度日益提高，需要将感知、通信、计算与控制紧密集成以实现闭环交互，确保在复杂或未知环境中及时、有效且安全的响应。
AI.method: 从LAEI网络的基础架构到多样化场景进行系统探索，分析支撑SC³闭环中及时信息交换与有效决策反馈的关键使能技术，并以城市未知区域无人机任务作为案例研究加以验证。
AI.result: 通过城市未知区域无人机提供通信服务与环境感知的案例，展示了协调的SC³能力如何实现高效响应操作，验证了LAEI网络的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文指出了低空具身智能面临的主要挑战，并展望了未来研究方向，为下一代低空智能系统的发展奠定了基石。

title: AI Safety Training Can be Clinically Harmful
summary: Large language models are being deployed as mental health support agents at scale, yet only 16% of LLM-based chatbot interventions have undergone rigorous clinical efficacy testing, and simulations reveal psychological deterioration in over one-third of cases. We evaluate four generative models on 250 Prolonged Exposure (PE) therapy scenarios and 146 CBT cognitive restructuring exercises (plus 29 severity-escalated variants), scored by a three-judge LLM panel. All models scored near-perfectly on surface acknowledgment (~0.91-1.00) while therapeutic appropriateness collapsed to 0.22-0.33 at the highest severity for three of four models, with protocol fidelity reaching zero for two. Under CBT severity escalation, one model's task completeness dropped from 92% to 71% while the frontier model's safety-interference score fell from 0.99 to 0.61. We identify a systematic, modality-spanning failure: RLHF safety alignment disrupts the therapeutic mechanism of action by grounding patients during imaginal exposure, offering false reassurance, inserting crisis resources into controlled exercises, and refusing to challenge distorted cognitions mentioning self-harm in PE; and through task abandonment or safety-preamble insertion during CBT cognitive restructuring. These findings motivate a five-axis evaluation framework (protocol fidelity, hallucination risk, behavioral consistency, crisis safety, demographic robustness), mapped onto FDA SaMD and EU AI Act requirements.
