We argue that no AI mental health system should proceed to deployment without passing multi-axis evaluation across all five dimensions.

AI.tldr: 当前心理健康LLM聊天机器人存在严重安全缺陷：在PE和CBT治疗场景下，模型表面应答良好但治疗适当性极低，RLHF安全对齐反而破坏了治疗机制。作者提出五轴评估框架，要求AI心理健康系统必须通过所有维度测试才能部署。
AI.motivation: 仅有16%的LLM心理健康干预经过严格临床测试，模拟显示超三分之一案例出现心理恶化，亟需系统评估LLM在真实治疗方案下的安全性与有效性。
AI.method: 在250个PE场景和146个CBT认知重构练习（含29个严重升级变体）上评估4个生成模型，由三人LLM评审团评分。
AI.result: 所有模型表面认可得分接近完美（0.91-1.00），但治疗适当性在高严重度下骤降至0.22-0.33，方案保真度部分降至0。RLHF安全对齐导致系统性失败：在PE中"接地"患者、提供虚假安慰、插入危机资源；在CBT中放弃任务或插入安全前言。
AI.conclusion: 提出五轴评估框架（方案保真度、幻觉风险、行为一致性、危机安全、人口统计鲁棒性），映射到FDA SaMD和EU AI Act要求。主张未通过五维评估的AI心理健康系统不得部署。

title: Beyond Local vs. External: A Game-Theoretic Framework for Trustworthy Knowledge Acquisition
summary: Cloud-hosted Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unmatched reasoning capabilities and dynamic knowledge, yet submitting raw queries to these external services risks exposing sensitive user intent. Conversely, relying exclusively on trusted local models preserves privacy but often compromises answer quality due to limited parameter scale and knowledge. To resolve this dilemma, we propose Game-theoretic Trustworthy Knowledge Acquisition (GTKA), a framework that formulates the trade-off between knowledge utility and privacy as a strategic game. GTKA consists of three components: (i) a privacy-aware sub-query generator that decomposes sensitive intent into generalized, low-risk fragments; (ii) an adversarial reconstruction attacker that attempts to infer the original query from these fragments, providing adaptive leakage signals; and (iii) a trusted local integrator that synthesizes external responses within a secure boundary. By training the generator and attacker in an alternating adversarial manner, GTKA optimizes the sub-query generation policy to maximize knowledge acquisition accuracy while minimizing the reconstructability of the original sensitive intent. To validate our approach, we construct two sensitive-domain benchmarks in the biomedical and legal fields. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GTKA significantly reduces intent leakage compared to state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining high-fidelity answer quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了GTKA框架，通过博弈论方法在利用云端大模型知识的同时保护用户意图隐私，将原始查询分解为低风险子查询，并训练对抗攻击者来优化隐私保护策略。
AI.motivation: 云端大模型能力强但存在隐私泄露风险，本地模型保护隐私但回答质量有限，现有方法难以同时兼顾知识效用与隐私保护。
AI.method: GTKA由三部分组成：(1)隐私感知子查询生成器，将敏感意图分解为泛化低风险片段；(2)对抗性重建攻击者，尝试从片段推断原始查询；(3)可信本地集成器，在安全边界内整合外部响应。通过生成器与攻击者的交替对抗训练，优化子查询策略。
AI.result: 在生物医学和法律两个敏感领域基准测试上，GTKA相比现有方法显著降低了意图泄露，同时保持了高保真的回答质量。
AI.conclusion: 博弈论框架能有效权衡云端大模型的知识效用与隐私保护，在不牺牲回答质量的前提下大幅提升隐私安全性。

title: DecompKAN: Decomposed Patch-KAN for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures, 8 tables. Preprint; under review
summary: Accurate time series forecasting in scientific domains such as climate modeling, physiological monitoring, and energy systems benefits from both competitive predictions and model transparency. This work proposes DecompKAN, a lightweight attention-free architecture that combines trend-residual decomposition, channel-wise patching, learned instance normalization, and B-spline Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) edge functions. Each KAN edge learns an explicit, inspectable 1D scalar function over learned patch-embedding coordinates that can be directly visualized. On standard benchmarks, DecompKAN achieves best or tied-best MSE on 15 of 32 dataset-horizon combinations among selected published baselines, and achieves best or tied-best MSE on 20 of 36 comparisons under a controlled same-recipe evaluation across 9 datasets including the physiological PPG-DaLiA benchmark. The architecture shows particular strength on datasets with smooth temporal dynamics (Solar -17%, ECL -10% vs. iTransformer, Weather) and physiological time series. Visualization of learned edge functions reveals qualitatively different latent nonlinearities across domains. Ablation analysis shows that the architectural pipeline (decomposition, patching, normalization) drives performance more than the choice of nonlinear layer, while the KAN formulation enables inspection of learned latent transformations.

AI.tldr: DecompKAN是一种轻量级、无注意力机制的时间序列预测架构，结合趋势-残差分解、通道级分块、学习实例归一化和B样条KAN边函数，在多个基准上达到最优或接近最优性能，尤其在平滑动态数据上表现突出，并支持对学习到的非线性变换进行可视化检查。
AI.motivation: 科学领域（如气候建模、生理监测、能源系统）的时间序列预测既需要高精度预测，也需要模型透明性，而现有方法在这两方面难以兼顾。
AI.method: 提出DecompKAN架构，包含趋势-残差分解、通道级分块（channel-wise patching）、学习实例归一化（learned instance normalization）以及B样条KAN边函数（B-spline Kolmogorov-Arnold Network edge functions），且整个架构无注意力机制。
AI.result: 在32个数据集-时间范围组合中，15个达到最佳或并列最佳MSE；在9个数据集的36项受控对比中，20个达到最佳或并列最佳MSE。在Solar（-17%）、ECL（-10% vs iTransformer）、Weather等平滑动态数据集以及生理PPG-DaLiA基准上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 架构管道（分解、分块、归一化）对性能贡献大于非线性层的选择，而KAN公式使得学习到的潜在变换可检查，不同领域间KAN边函数展现出定性不同的非线性特征。

title: Optimal control for a fourth-order nonisothermal tumor growth model of Caginalp type
comment: 35 pages. The keywords are: tumor growth model, Cahn--Hilliard system, nonisothermal model, optimal control, adjoint system, necessary optimality conditions
summary: We study a distributed optimal control problem for a nonisothermal Caginalp-type phase-field model that describes tumour growth under thermal therapy. The PDE system couples a possibly viscous Cahn-Hilliard equation, governing the evolution of the healthy and tumor phases, with an equation for the heat balance, and a reaction-diffusion equation for the nutrient concentration. Chemotaxis and active transport effects are taken into account, and hyperthermia appears as a control variable. We introduce a suitable tracking-type cost functional and show the existence of optimal controls. Then, we analyse the differentiability of the control-to-state operator and establish necessary first-order conditions expressed through a variational inequality involving the adjoint state variables.

AI.tldr: 本文研究肿瘤热疗中非等温Caginalp相场模型的分布式最优控制问题，证明了最优控制的存在性，并推导了基于伴随变量的一阶最优性条件。
AI.motivation: 为肿瘤热疗（高温疗法）提供数学理论基础，通过最优控制方法优化治疗过程中温度场的调控，以更有效地抑制肿瘤生长。
AI.method: 将热疗作为控制变量，构建追踪型代价泛函；利用偏微分方程理论分析控制-状态算子的可微性；通过伴随状态变量建立变分不等式，推导一阶必要条件。
AI.result: 成功证明了最优控制的存在性，并建立了由伴随变量表达的变分不等式形式的一阶最优性条件。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为肿瘤热疗中的分布式最优控制提供了严谨的数学分析框架，有望指导临床治疗中的温度场优化策略。

title: Ulterior Motives: Detecting Misaligned Reasoning in Continuous Thought Models
summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has emerged as a key technique for eliciting complex reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). Although interpretable, its dependence on natural language limits the model's expressive bandwidth. Continuous thought models address this bottleneck by reasoning in latent space rather than human-readable tokens. While they enable richer representations and faster inference, they raise a critical safety question: how can we detect misaligned reasoning in an uninterpretable latent space? To study this, we introduce MoralChain, a benchmark of 12,000 social scenarios with parallel moral/immoral reasoning paths. We train a continuous thought model with backdoor behavior using a novel dual-trigger paradigm - one trigger that arms misaligned latent reasoning ([T]) and another that releases harmful outputs ([O]). We demonstrate three findings: (1) continuous thought models can exhibit misaligned latent reasoning while producing aligned outputs, with aligned and misaligned reasoning occupying geometrically distinct regions of latent space; (2) linear probes trained on behaviorally-distinguishable conditions ([T][O] vs [O]) transfer to detecting armed-but-benign states ([T] vs baseline) with high accuracy; and (3) misalignment is encoded in early latent thinking tokens, suggesting safety monitoring for continuous thought models should target the "planning" phase of latent reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MoralChain基准测试，揭示了连续思维模型可能进行不可解释的潜在空间推理，并通过双触发后门范式证明：即使输出对齐，潜在空间中也可能存在未对齐推理，且可通过线性探针检测早期规划阶段的恶意思维。
AI.motivation: 连续思维模型在潜在空间中进行推理，虽然提升了表达能力和推理效率，但丧失了可解释性。因此，如何检测潜在空间中是否存在未对齐（恶意）推理成为一个关键的安全问题。
AI.method: 构建MoralChain基准（12,000个社交场景，含平行道德/不道德推理路径）；设计双触发后门范式（[T]触发恶意潜在推理，[O]释放有害输出）；训练带有后门行为的连续思维模型；使用线性探针进行检测。
AI.result: (1) 未对齐推理与对齐推理在潜在空间中占据几何上不同的区域；(2) 基于行为可区分状态训练的线性探针可用于检测武装但良性状态；(3) 未对齐编码出现在早期潜在思维token中。
AI.conclusion: 连续思维模型的安全监控应聚焦于潜在推理的"规划"阶段（早期token），而非仅检查最终输出。

title: ML-Guided Primal Heuristics for Mixed Binary Quadratic Programs
summary: Mixed Binary Quadratic Programs (MBQPs) are an important and complex set of problems in combinatorial optimization. As solving large-scale combinatorial optimization problems is challenging, primal heuristics have been developed to quickly identify high-quality solutions within a short amount of time. Recently, a growing body of research has also used machine learning to accelerate solution methods for challenging combinatorial optimization problems. Despite the increasing popularity of these ML-guided methods, a large body of work has focused on Mixed-Integer Linear Programs (MILPs). MBQPs are challenging to solve due to the combinatorial complexity coupled with nonlinearities. This work proposes ML-guided primal heuristics for Mixed Binary Quadratic Programs (MBQPs) by adapting and extending existing work on ML-guided MILP solution prediction to MBQPs. We introduce a new neural network architecture for MBQP solution prediction and a new training data collection procedure. Moreover, we extend existing loss functions in solution prediction and propose to combine contrastive and weighted cross-entropy losses. We evaluate the methods on standard and real-world MBQP benchmarks and show that the developed ML-guided methods significantly outperform existing primal heuristics and state-of-the-art solvers. Furthermore, models trained with our proposed extension with combined losses outperform other ML-based methods adapted from MILPs and improve generalization in cross-regional inference on a real-world wind farm layout optimization problem.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向混合二元二次规划（MBQP）的ML引导初始启发式方法，通过新神经网络架构、训练数据收集流程及结合对比损失与加权交叉熵损失的损失函数，在标准与真实基准上显著超越现有启发式算法和求解器，并在风电场布局优化中展现良好泛化能力。
AI.motivation: MBQP是组合优化中重要且复杂的问题，求解难度高（组合复杂性+非线性）。现有ML引导方法多聚焦于混合整数线性规划（MILP），而对MBQP的研究不足。本文动机是将ML引导的初始启发式方法从MILP扩展到MBQP，以快速获得高质量解。
AI.method: 1) 提出新的神经网络架构用于MBQP解预测；2) 设计新的训练数据收集流程；3) 扩展已有损失函数，提出结合对比损失（contrastive loss）和加权交叉熵损失（weighted cross-entropy loss）的组合损失函数。
AI.result: 在标准MBQP基准和真实风电场布局优化问题上，所提出的ML引导方法显著优于现有初始启发式方法和最先进求解器。采用组合损失训练的模型优于从MILP改编的ML方法，并在跨区域推理中展现更好的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 将ML引导的初始启发式扩展至MBQP是可行且有效的，新的架构、数据收集流程及组合损失函数共同提升了求解质量和泛化能力，尤其在真实场景中表现出色。

title: AI-Native Autonomous Infrastructure (ANAI): A Formal Framework for the Next General-Purpose Technology
summary: Artificial intelligence is increasingly described as a candidate next generation general purpose technology (GPT). However, existing interpretations predominantly emphasize performance scaling rather than structural transformation. This paper introduces a formal framework for evaluating AI as a systemic infrastructural transition rather than merely a computational breakthrough. We propose the concept of AI Native Autonomous Infrastructure (ANAI), defined as a regime in which decision autonomy becomes embedded within critical infrastructures. The framework operationalizes this transition through three quantitative constructs: the Autonomy Index (AIx), the Infrastructure Coupling Coefficient (ICC), and the Technological Transition Potential (TTP). We formalize the joint scaling dynamics of autonomy and infrastructural embedding, derive threshold conditions for paradigm transition, and introduce a phase-space representation of systemic transformation. A temporal transition model further illustrates how nonlinear coevolution between autonomy and infrastructure integration produces super linear growth in transition potential. Unlike prior GPT cycles, the ANAI regime exhibits a recursive energy computation feedback loop in which AI systems both increase computational demand and optimize the infrastructures that sustain them. This feedback mechanism accelerates infrastructural embedding and differentiates AI driven transformation from previous technological revolutions. By shifting analytical focus from model performance to infrastructural autonomy and coupling intensity, this study offers a conceptual and mathematical foundation for assessing whether artificial intelligence constitutes the next general purpose technology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ANAI框架，通过自主性指数、基础设施耦合系数和技术转型潜力三个量化指标，论证AI作为系统性基础设施转型（而非单纯性能突破）的GPT特征，并揭示自主性与基础设施嵌入的非线性共演化机制。
AI.motivation: 现有AI研究过度强调性能扩展而忽视结构性转型，缺乏评估AI作为下一代通用目的技术的系统性框架。
AI.method: 提出ANAI概念，构建三个定量指标（AIx、ICC、TTP），形式化自主性与基础设施嵌入的联合标度动力学，推导范式转变的阈值条件，引入相空间表征，建立时间转变模型刻画非线性共演化。
AI.result: ANAI体制呈现递归能量计算反馈循环，AI系统同时增加计算需求并优化支撑基础设施，产生转型潜力的超线性增长，区别于以往技术革命。
AI.conclusion: 应将分析重心从模型性能转向基础设施自主性与耦合强度，以评估AI是否构成下一代GPT。

title: Your Students Don't Use LLMs Like You Wish They Did
summary: Educational NLP systems are typically evaluated using engagement metrics and satisfaction surveys, which are at best a proxy for meeting pedagogical goals. We introduce six computational metrics for automated evaluation of pedagogical alignment in student-AI dialogue. We validate our metrics through analysis of 12,650 messages across 500 conversations from four courses. Using our metrics, we identify a fundamental misalignment: educators design conversational tutors for sustained learning dialogue, but students mainly use them for answer-extraction. Deployment context is the strongest predictor of usage patterns, outweighing student preference or system design: when AI tools are optional, usage concentrates around deadlines; when integrated into course structure, students ask for solutions to verbatim assignment questions. Whole-dialogue evaluation misses these turn-by-turn patterns. Our metrics will enable researchers building educational dialogue systems to measure whether they are achieving their pedagogical goals.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了六种计算指标来自动评估教育对话系统中学生与AI对话的教学对齐程度，通过分析四个课程500次对话的12650条消息，发现教育者设计的是持续性学习对话，但学生主要将其用于提取答案，且部署环境是使用模式的最强预测因素。
AI.motivation: 现有教育NLP系统通常使用参与度指标和满意度调查来评估，这些指标最多只是教学目标的代理指标，无法真正衡量系统是否实现了教学对齐。
AI.method: 提出了六种用于自动评估学生-AI对话教学对齐的计算指标，并通过四个课程500次对话（12650条消息）的数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 发现教育者设计的是持续性学习对话，但学生主要将其用于提取答案；部署环境是使用模式的最强预测因素（超过学生偏好或系统设计）；整体对话评估会遗漏逐轮交互模式。
AI.conclusion: 提出的指标能够帮助构建教育对话系统的研究人员衡量系统是否实现了教学目标，揭示了当前教育AI系统在教学目标与学生实际使用之间存在根本性错配。

title: Revisiting Greedy Decoding for Visual Question Answering: A Calibration Perspective
summary: Stochastic sampling strategies are widely adopted in large language models (LLMs) to balance output coherence and diversity. These heuristics are often inherited in Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) without task-specific justification. However, we contend that stochastic decoding can be suboptimal for Visual Question Answering (VQA). VQA is a closed-ended task with head-heavy answer distributions where uncertainty is usually epistemic, arising from missing or ambiguous visual evidence rather than plausible continuations. In this work, we provide a theoretical formalization of the relationship between model calibration and predictive accuracy, and derive the sufficient conditions for greedy decoding optimality. Extensive experiments provide empirical evidence for the superiority of greedy decoding over stochastic sampling across multiple benchmarks. Furthermore, we propose Greedy Decoding for Reasoning Models, which outperforms both stochastic sampling and standard greedy decoding in multimodal reasoning scenarios. Overall, our results caution against naively inheriting LLMs decoding heuristics in MLLMs and demonstrate that greedy decoding can be an efficient yet strong default for VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文证明在视觉问答(VQA)任务中，贪心解码优于随机采样解码，并提出适用于多模态推理场景的改进贪心解码方法。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)继承了大语言模型(LLMs)的随机采样解码策略，但这种策略在VQA这一封闭式任务中可能并非最优，因为VQA的答案分布是头重脚轻的，不确定性主要源于视觉证据缺失而非合理延续。
AI.method: 1. 理论形式化模型校准与预测准确性之间的关系；2. 推导贪心解码最优性的充分条件；3. 提出适用于推理模型的贪心解码方法(Greedy Decoding for Reasoning Models)。
AI.result: 实验证明：1)贪心解码在多个VQA基准上优于随机采样解码；2)提出的贪心解码方法在多模态推理场景中同时优于随机采样和标准贪心解码。
AI.conclusion: 不应将LLM的解码启发式方法不加验证地迁移到MLLM中，贪心解码可以作为VQA任务高效且强大的默认解码策略。

title: Continuum-marginal optimal transport: a mesh-free kernel method
summary: In this paper we study continuum-marginal optimal transport. Given a time-continuous family of probability marginals, the problem is to recover the minimum-energy velocity field whose flow reproduces every marginal. This problem is the continuum limit of the classical two-marginal Benamou--Brenier formulation, and also the deterministic limit of the Nelson problem of stochastic optimal transport. We propose a practical mesh-free solver for this problem. The weak continuity equation is embedded in a reproducing kernel Hilbert space, yielding a sample-only objective that requires no spatial discretization. The velocity is parametrized by any linear-in-parameters dictionary or neural network, and is optimized by mini-batch stochastic methods. Synthetic experiments confirm that the method achieves accurate drift recovery and marginal consistency. The same computational framework also applies to the stochastic Nelson problem.

AI.tldr: 本文针对连续边际最优传输问题，提出了一种免网格的求解器，通过将弱连续性方程嵌入再生核希尔伯特空间，实现了仅依赖样本的目标函数，无需空间离散化，并使用随机优化方法高效求解。
AI.motivation: 解决连续边际最优传输问题——给定连续时间族概率边际，恢复最小能量速度场。该问题是经典Benamou-Brenier公式的连续极限与Nelson随机最优传输的确定性极限，但缺乏实用的免网格求解器。
AI.method: 将弱连续性方程嵌入再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS），得到无需空间离散化的样本目标函数；速度场采用线性参数化字典或神经网络参数化，通过小批量随机方法优化。
AI.result: 合成实验验证了该方法能准确恢复漂移场并保持边际一致性；该框架同样适用于随机Nelson问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种实用、灵活的免网格求解器，为连续边际最优传输及随机Nelson问题提供了有效计算方案。

title: The Benjamin-Ono equation with 2D control input: approximate controllability and its application
summary: We establish the approximate controllability in $L^2$ for the nonlinear Benjamin-Ono equation on torus via two-dimensional control input. Our proof is based on adaptations of geometric control approach introduced by Agrachev and Sarychev. As an application of this control result, we study long-time dynamics of a randomly forced equation. It is proved that the trajectories are unbounded in Sobolev norms almost surely, when the random force is nondegenerate and statistically periodic in time.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了环面上非线性Benjamin-Ono方程的近似可控性，通过二维控制输入实现，并应用此结果分析了随机强迫方程的长时间动力学，证明在非退化且统计周期随机力作用下，轨迹在Sobolev范数下几乎必然无界。
AI.motivation: 建立非线性Benjamin-Ono方程在环面上的近似可控性，并利用该控制结果研究随机强迫下方程的长时间动力学行为，特别是Sobolev范数的有界性。
AI.method: 采用Agrachev和Sarychev提出的几何控制方法进行适应性调整，证明近似可控性；随后结合该控制结果分析随机强迫方程的轨迹行为。
AI.result: 在非退化且统计周期随机力作用下，方程的轨迹在Sobolev范数下几乎必然无界。
AI.conclusion: 成功建立了Benjamin-Ono方程的近似可控性，并揭示了随机强迫下长时间动力学的无界性这一重要现象。

title: Escher-Loop: Mutual Evolution by Closed-Loop Self-Referential Optimization
comment: The first three authors contributed equally. Corresponding Authors: Han Hao, Liu Yang
summary: While recent autonomous agents demonstrate impressive capabilities, they predominantly rely on manually scripted workflows and handcrafted heuristics, inherently limiting their potential for open-ended improvement. To address this, we propose Escher-Loop, a fully closed-loop framework that operationalizes the mutual evolution of two distinct populations: Task Agents that solve concrete problems, and Optimizer Agents that recursively refine both the task agents and themselves. To sustain this self-referential evolution, we propose a dynamic benchmarking mechanism that seamlessly reuses the empirical scores of newly generated task agents as relative win-loss signals to update optimizers' scores. This mechanism leverages the evolution of task agents as an inherent signal to drive the evaluation and refinement of optimizers without additional overhead. Empirical evaluations on mathematical optimization problems demonstrate that Escher-Loop effectively pushes past the performance ceilings of static baselines, achieving the highest absolute peak performance across all evaluated tasks under matched compute. Remarkably, we observe that the optimizer agents dynamically adapt their strategies to match the shifting demands of high-performing task agents, which explains the system's continuous improvement and superior late-stage performance.

AI.tldr: Escher-Loop 提出一个完全闭环的框架，通过任务智能体与优化智能体的共同进化，配合动态基准测试机制，在数学优化任务上超越了静态基线的性能上限。
AI.motivation: 现有自主智能体严重依赖人工脚本和手工启发式方法，限制了其开放式改进的潜力，亟需一种能实现自动持续优化的框架。
AI.method: 构建两个种群——任务智能体（解决具体问题）与优化智能体（递归地改进任务智能体和自身）；提出动态基准测试机制，将新任务智能体的经验分数作为相对胜负信号来更新优化智能体的评分，实现无额外开销的自我进化。
AI.result: 在数学优化问题上，Escher-Loop 在同等计算量下超越了所有静态基线的绝对峰值性能；优化智能体的策略会动态适应高性能任务智能体的需求变化，从而驱动持续改进。
AI.conclusion: Escher-Loop 通过闭环共同进化框架有效打破了静态性能天花板，展现了自指式演化的可行性与优越性，为构建持续自我改进的智能体系统提供了新范式。

title: K-Score: Kalman Filter as a Principled Alternative to Reward Normalization in Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted in NewInML Workshop, The 42nd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2025).\href{https://icml.cc/virtual/2025/affinity-event/39980}{Event Page}
summary: We propose a simple yet effective alternative to reward normalization in policy gradient reinforcement learning by integrating a 1D Kalman filter for online reward estimation. Instead of relying on fixed heuristics, our method recursively estimates the latent reward mean, smoothing high-variance returns and adapting to non-stationary environments. This approach incurs minimal overhead and requires no modification to existing policy architectures. Experiments on \textit{LunarLander} and \textit{CartPole} demonstrate that Kalman-filtered rewards significantly accelerate convergence and reduce training variance compared to standard normalization techniques. Code is available at https://github.com/Sumxiaa/Kalman_Normalization.

AI.tldr: 提出使用一维卡尔曼滤波器替代传统的奖励归一化方法，在线估计奖励均值，平滑高方差回报并适应非平稳环境，在LunarLander和CartPole上加速收敛并降低训练方差。
AI.motivation: 传统奖励归一化依赖固定启发式规则，难以适应非平稳环境和高方差回报，作者希望找到一种简单且有效的替代方案。
AI.method: 将一维卡尔曼滤波器集成到策略梯度强化学习中，递归估计潜在奖励均值，实现平滑与自适应，无需修改现有策略架构。
AI.result: 在LunarLander和CartPole环境中，卡尔曼滤波奖励相比标准归一化技术显著加速收敛并降低训练方差。
AI.conclusion: 卡尔曼滤波奖励归一化是一种轻量级、高效的替代方案，能有效提升策略梯度方法的训练稳定性和收敛速度。

title: A Realistic Discrete Event Simulation model for Ambulance Location and Deployment within a regional Emergency Medical Service
summary: The objective of Emergency Medical Services (EMSs) is to promptly respond to calls from citizens for first aid, providing pre-hospital care and, if necessary, to transfer patients to an appropriate Emergency Department (ED) by ambulance. The efficiency of such a system strongly depends on the deployment of ambulance home bases, i.e., locations where ambulances and their crews are strategically positioned, ready to respond to emergency calls. This paper presents a general Discrete Event Simulation (DES) model designed to capture the stochastic behaviour and workflow of regional ambulance emergency systems. The proposed model incorporates and integrates information collected from different sources, reproducing very accurately the operation of the ambulance system, thus allowing a more comprehensive and realistic analysis. To show the applicability and reliability of the proposed general model, a case study provided by the Azienda Regionale Emergenza Sanitaria - ARES 118 (an Italian Regional Emergency Medical Services Authority - ARES~118}) is presented. It concerns a territory within the Lazio region of Italy, including a medium-size city along with sparsely populated areas. The reported results about scenario analyses highlight how the model we propose can be fruitfully used by the managers to improve effectiveness and quickness of the entire regional EMS system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个通用的离散事件仿真（DES）模型，用于模拟区域救护车紧急医疗系统的随机行为和工作流程。通过整合多源数据，该模型能准确复现救护车系统运行，并以意大利拉齐奥大区ARES 118机构的实际案例验证了其有效性，证明可帮助管理者提升区域EMS系统的效率和响应速度。
AI.motivation: 紧急医疗服务（EMS）的效率高度依赖于救护车基地的部署策略，但现有模型在捕捉系统随机性和多源数据整合方面存在不足，难以进行真实、全面的分析。
AI.method: 构建一个通用的离散事件仿真（DES）模型，整合来自不同来源的数据，精确复现救护车系统的操作流程，并通过意大利ARES 118的案例进行场景分析验证。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，该模型能够准确模拟区域救护车系统运行，场景分析结果显示出模型可有效帮助管理者提升EMS系统的效率和响应速度。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的通用DES模型具有高度的可靠性和适用性，可作为一种实用工具，辅助区域EMS管理者优化救护车基地部署，提高整个系统的效能。

title: Towards Lawful Autonomous Driving: Deriving Scenario-Aware Driving Requirements from Traffic Laws and Regulations
summary: Driving in compliance with traffic laws and regulations is a basic requirement for human drivers, yet autonomous vehicles (AVs) can violate these requirements in diverse real-world scenarios. To encode law compliance into AV systems, conventional approaches use formal logic languages to explicitly specify behavioral constraints, but this process is labor-intensive, hard to scale, and costly to maintain. With recent advances in artificial intelligence, it is promising to leverage large language models (LLMs) to derive legal requirements from traffic laws and regulations. However, without explicitly grounding and reasoning in structured traffic scenarios, LLMs often retrieve irrelevant provisions or miss applicable ones, yielding imprecise requirements. To address this, we propose a novel pipeline that grounds LLM reasoning in a traffic scenario taxonomy through node-wise anchors that encode hierarchical semantics. On Chinese traffic laws and OnSite dataset (5,897 scenarios), our method improves law-scenario matching by 29.1\% and increases the accuracy of derived mandatory and prohibitive requirements by 36.9\% and 38.2\%, respectively. We further demonstrate real-world applicability by constructing a law-compliance layer for AV navigation and developing an onboard, real-time compliance monitor for in-field testing, providing a solid foundation for future AV development, deployment, and regulatory oversight.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用大语言模型(LLM)结合交通场景分类法(node-wise anchors)的管道，用于从交通法规中自动提取自动驾驶车辆的合规需求，在中文交通法规和OnSite数据集上显著提升了法律-场景匹配和需求提取的准确性，并构建了实车合规监控层。
AI.motivation: 传统方法使用形式逻辑语言显式编码行为约束，但劳动密集、难以扩展且维护成本高；而直接使用LLM提取法律需求又因缺乏结构化场景的锚定和推理，常检索到不相关或遗漏适用条款。因此需要一种将LLM推理锚定在结构化交通场景中的方法。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖管道，通过node-wise anchors将LLM推理锚定在交通场景分类法中，编码层次化语义，实现法律条款与交通场景的精确匹配与需求提取。
AI.result: 在中文交通法规和OnSite数据集（5,897个场景）上，法律-场景匹配提升29.1%，强制性需求准确率提升36.9%，禁止性需求准确率提升38.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法构建了AV导航的法律合规层，并开发了车载实时合规监控器，为未来自动驾驶开发、部署和监管提供了坚实基础。

title: Stochastic simultaneous optimistic optimization
comment: Published in International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2013)
summary: We study the problem of global maximization of a function f given a finite number of evaluations perturbed by noise. We consider a very weak assumption on the function, namely that it is locally smooth (in some precise sense) with respect to some semi-metric, around one of its global maxima. Compared to previous works on bandits in general spaces (Kleinberg et al., 2008; Bubeck et al., 2011a) our algorithm does not require the knowledge of this semi-metric. Our algorithm, StoSOO, follows an optimistic strategy to iteratively construct upper confidence bounds over the hierarchical partitions of the function domain to decide which point to sample next. A finite-time analysis of StoSOO shows that it performs almost as well as the best specifically-tuned algorithms even though the local smoothness of the function is not known.

AI.tldr: 提出StoSOO算法，在未知函数局部光滑性的条件下，通过乐观策略和分层分区构建置信上界，实现噪声环境下的全局函数最大化，性能接近已知光滑性的专用算法。
AI.motivation: 现有bandit算法（如Kleinberg 2008, Bubeck 2011a）需要预先知道函数的局部光滑性（半度量），这在实际中往往不可得。本文旨在消除这一先验知识要求。
AI.method: 提出StoSOO算法：基于乐观策略，对函数域进行层次化分区，迭代构建每个区域的置信上界，据此选择下一个采样点，无需事先知道半度量。
AI.result: 有限时间分析表明，StoSOO在未知局部光滑性的情况下，性能几乎与已知光滑性的最优专用算法相当。
AI.conclusion: 成功去除了对局部光滑性先验知识的需求，同时保持了接近最优的理论性能，拓展了bandit算法在一般空间中的适用性。

title: Agentic Adversarial Rewriting Exposes Architectural Vulnerabilities in Black-Box NLP Pipelines
comment: Submitted to IEEE TRANSACTIONS ON INFORMATION FORENSICS AND SECURITY
summary: Multi-component natural language processing (NLP) pipelines are increasingly deployed for high-stakes decisions, yet no existing adversarial method can test their robustness under realistic conditions: binary-only feedback, no gradient access, and strict query budgets. We formalize this strict black-box threat model and propose a two-agent evasion framework operating in a semantic perturbation space. An Attacker Agent generates meaning-preserving rewrites while a Prompt Optimization Agent refines the attack strategy using only binary decision feedback within a 10-query budget. Evaluated against four evidence-based misinformation detection pipelines, the framework achieves evasion rates of 19.95 to 40.34% on modern large language model (LLM) based systems, compared to at most 3.90% for token-level perturbation baselines that rely on surrogate models because they cannot operate under our threat model. A legacy system relying on static lexical retrieval exhibits near-total vulnerability 97.02%, establishing a lower bound that exposes how architectural choices govern the attack surface. Evasion effectiveness is associated with three architectural properties: evidence retrieval mechanism, retrieval-inference coupling, and baseline classification accuracy. The iterative prompt optimization yields the largest marginal gains against the most robust targets, confirming that adaptive strategy discovery is essential when evasion is non-trivial. Analysis of successful rewrites reveals four exploitation patterns, each targeting failures at distinct pipeline stages. A pattern-informed defense reduces the evasion rate by up to 65.18%.

AI.tldr: 提出并验证了一种严格黑盒条件下的两智能体对抗攻击框架，能在10次查询预算内以语义扰动有效绕过基于LLM的 misinformation 检测管线（逃逸率19.95%-40.34%），并基于四个利用模式提出防御策略降低逃逸率最高65.18%。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗方法无法在现实威胁条件下（二值反馈、无梯度访问、严格查询预算）测试多组件NLP管线的鲁棒性，亟需能够反映真实攻击场景的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出双智能体框架：攻击者智能体生成语义保留改写，提示优化智能体在10次查询预算内仅利用二值反馈迭代优化攻击策略。在四个基于证据的 misinformation 检测管线上评估。
AI.result: 在基于LLM的现代系统上逃逸率19.95%-40.34%（基线token扰动仅≤3.90%）；传统词法检索系统逃逸率97.02%；逃逸效果与三种架构属性相关；迭代提示优化对最鲁棒目标增益最大；发现四种利用模式，基于模式的防御降低逃逸率最高65.18%。
AI.conclusion: 严格黑盒条件下的语义级对抗攻击对LLM管线构成真实威胁；攻击面由架构设计主导；自适应策略发现对于非平凡逃逸至关重要；利用模式可指导有效防御设计。

title: C-MORAL: Controllable Multi-Objective Molecular Optimization with Reinforcement Alignment for LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise for molecular optimization, but aligning them with selective and competing drug-design constraints remains challenging. We propose C-Moral, a reinforcement learning post-training framework for controllable multi-objective molecular optimization. C-Moral combines group-based relative optimization, property score alignment for heterogeneous objectives, and continuous non-linear reward aggregation to improve stability across competing properties. Experiments on the C-MuMOInstruct benchmark show that C-Moral consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models across both in-domain and out-of-domain settings, achieving the best Success Optimized Rate (SOR) of 48.9% on IND tasks and 39.5% on OOD tasks, while largely preserving scaffold similarity. These results suggest that RL post-training is an effective way to align molecular language models with continuous molecular design objectives. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Rwigie/C-MORAL.

AI.tldr: 提出C-Moral框架，通过强化学习后训练实现对多目标分子优化的可控对齐，在C-MuMOInstruct基准上超越现有模型。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在分子优化中虽具潜力，但难以对齐选择性和竞争性的药物设计约束，现有方法在多目标优化中表现有限。
AI.method: 提出C-Moral框架，包含三部分：基于组的相对优化、异构目标的属性分数对齐、连续非线性奖励聚合，以提升竞争属性间的优化稳定性。
AI.result: 在C-MuMOInstruct基准上，IND任务SOR达48.9%，OOD任务SOR达39.5%，均优于现有最优模型，且较好保持骨架相似性。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习后训练是使分子语言模型对齐连续分子设计目标的有效途径。

title: The Fragility of Learning LQG Controllers
summary: Learning methods are increasingly used to synthesize controllers from data, yet existing sample-complexity characterizations for continuous control are sharp only in the fully observed setting. This paper studies the partially observed case by deriving information-theoretic lower bounds for learning Linear Quadratic Gaussian (LQG) controllers from offline trajectories generated by a (linear) exploration policy. We prove an $\varepsilon$-local minimax excess-cost lower bound that applies to any algorithm mapping the offline dataset to a stabilizing linear controller. The bound is expressed in terms of the Hessian of the LQG cost with respect to model parameters and the inverse Fisher Information induced by the exploration policy. We further provide system-theoretic characterizations of these objects, enabling transparent construction of hard instances. Instantiating the bound on classical fragile robust-control examples, including variants of the Doyle LQG fragility counterexample and non-minimum-phase systems, demonstrates when fragile robust control problems translate into high sample complexity for learning-enabled control. These results suggest the asymptotic optimality of certainty-equivalent synthesis and motivate the importance of both task-directed experiment design and system co-design for sample-efficient learning in partially observed control.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了部分观测条件下学习LQG控制器的样本复杂度下界，证明了基于离线数据学习稳定线性控制器的ε-局部极小极大超额代价下界，并将其与Hessian矩阵和Fisher信息量联系起来。在经典脆弱鲁棒控制实例上的结果表明，脆弱性会导致高样本复杂度，并暗示了确定性等价合成的渐近最优性。
AI.motivation: 现有的连续控制样本复杂度刻画仅在完全观测设定下是精确的，部分观测情形下的理论界限尚不清晰。本文旨在填补这一空白，为部分观测下的学习控制提供信息论下界。
AI.method: 通过推导ε-局部极小极大超额代价下界，将该下界表示为LQG代价关于模型参数的Hessian矩阵与探索策略逆Fisher信息量的函数，并给出这些对象的系统理论刻画，从而构建困难的实例。
AI.result: 证明了部分观测下学习LQG控制器的样本复杂度下界；在Doyle LQG脆弱性反例和非最小相位系统等经典脆弱鲁棒控制实例上，展示了脆弱性如何转化为高样本复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 确定性等价合成可能是渐近最优的；任务导向的实验设计和系统协同设计对于部分观测下样本高效的学习控制至关重要。

title: A Benchmark Suite of Reddit-Derived Datasets for Mental Health Detection
comment: In the proceedings of 12th Annual Conference on Computational Science & Computational Intelligence (CSCI'25)
summary: The growing availability of online support groups has opened up new windows to study mental health through natural language processing (NLP). However, it is hindered by a lack of high-quality, well-validated datasets. Existing studies have a tendency to build task-specific corpora without collecting them into widely available resources, and this makes reproducibility as well as cross-task comparison challenging. In this paper, we present a uniform benchmark set of four Reddit-based datasets for disjoint but complementary tasks: (i) detection of suicidal ideation, (ii) binary general mental disorder detection, (iii) bipolar disorder detection, and (iv) multi-class mental disorder classification. All datasets were established upon diligent linguistic inspection, well-defined annotation guidelines, and human-judgmental verification. Inter-annotator agreement metrics always exceeded the baseline agreement score of 0.8, ensuring the labels' trustworthiness. Previous work's evidence of performance on both transformer and contextualized recurrent models demonstrates that these models receive excellent performances on tasks (F1 ~ 93-99%), further validating the usefulness of the datasets. By combining these resources, we establish a unifying foundation for reproducible mental health NLP studies with the ability to carry out cross-task benchmarking, multi-task learning, and fair model comparison. The presented benchmark suite provides the research community with an easy-to-access and varied resource for advancing computational approaches toward mental health research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的基准数据集，包含四个基于Reddit的心理健康NLP任务（自杀意念检测、一般心理障碍检测、双相障碍检测、多类心理障碍分类），均经过严格的语言学审查、标注规范和人工验证，标注者间一致性>0.8，模型F1达93-99%，为可复现的心理健康NLP研究提供了统一基础。
AI.motivation: 现有心理健康NLP研究缺乏高质量、经过充分验证的公开数据集，研究者倾向于构建任务专属语料库而不将其整合为广泛可用的资源，导致可复现性和跨任务比较困难。
AI.method: 构建了四个基于Reddit的互补任务数据集，经过语言学审查、明确定义的标注准则和人工验证，确保标注者间一致性超过0.8，并在transformer和上下文循环模型上验证性能。
AI.result: 所有数据集标注一致性>0.8，模型在四个任务上F1分数达93-99%，验证了数据集的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该基准套件为可复现的心理健康NLP研究提供了统一基础，支持跨任务基准测试、多任务学习和公平模型比较，为研究社区提供了易于获取的多样化资源。

title: Efficient learning by implicit exploration in bandit problems with side observations
comment: Published at Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2014
summary: We consider online learning problems under a partial observability model capturing situations where the information conveyed to the learner is between full information and bandit feedback. In the simplest variant, we assume that in addition to its own loss, the learner also gets to observe losses of some other actions. The revealed losses depend on the learner's action and a directed observation system chosen by the environment. For this setting, we propose the first algorithm that enjoys near-optimal regret guarantees without having to know the observation system before selecting its actions. Along similar lines, we also define a new partial information setting that models online combinatorial optimization problems where the feedback received by the learner is between semi-bandit and full feedback. As the predictions of our first algorithm cannot be always computed efficiently in this setting, we propose another algorithm with similar properties and with the benefit of always being computationally efficient, at the price of a slightly more complicated tuning mechanism. Both algorithms rely on a novel exploration strategy called implicit exploration, which is shown to be more efficient both computationally and information-theoretically than previously studied exploration strategies for the problem.

AI.tldr: 本文针对部分可观测的在线学习问题（介于全信息与bandit反馈之间），提出了基于“隐式探索”策略的算法，在不预知观测系统的情况下实现接近最优的遗憾保证，并在组合优化场景中提供了高效版本。
AI.motivation: 现有在线学习算法要么依赖全信息反馈，要么仅依赖bandit反馈，但现实场景中学习者往往能观察到部分而非全部动作的损失。作者希望设计一种无需预先知晓观测系统结构、同时能获得接近最优遗憾保证的通用算法。
AI.method: 1. 提出**隐式探索（Implicit Exploration）**策略，区别于传统的显式探索方法，在信息论和计算效率上更优。2. 针对一般部分可观测情形，设计首个无需知晓观测系统的近最优遗憾算法。3. 针对组合优化部分反馈场景，提出第二个算法，保证计算高效性，但调节机制稍复杂。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，第一个算法在一般部分可观测设置下实现了近最优遗憾；第二个算法在组合优化场景下保持计算效率的同时，同样具有近最优遗憾保证。隐式探索策略在信息论和计算复杂度上均优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: 隐式探索为部分可观测在线学习提供了一种更优的探索范式，能够在不依赖先验观测系统知识的情况下达到近乎最优的后悔界，并且可推广到计算受限的组合优化场景，具有重要的理论价值和实践潜力。

title: Heterogeneous-Horizon Exact-Weight Local SGD
summary: We study adaptive aggregation for heterogeneous local SGD in convex finite-sum optimization, allowing heterogeneous local horizons, minibatch sizes, gradient noise, and participation. We introduce HEW-Local SGD, a corrected local-SGD method that chooses nodewise server weights by minimizing an explicit one-round upper bound on the next objective value. This yields an exact local-control formulation with a threshold simplex update, separable amplitude updates, and a one-step guarantee under arbitrary predictable participation. We also introduce two post-local variants: a corrected heterogeneous method and a simpler homogeneous specialization. We establish one-step guarantees and global benchmark-style convergence results. In the regimes where comparison is appropriate, the theory matches the qualitative communication-efficient picture of recent LocalSGD/SCAFFOLD analyses, while also giving explicit guarantees for unequal local horizons.

AI.tldr: 本文针对凸有限和优化中的异构局部SGD，提出自适应聚合方法HEW-Local SGD及其变体，通过最小化单轮上界来动态选择节点权重，在异构局部视野、小批量大小、梯度噪声和参与度的场景下给出了理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有局部SGD方法通常假设同构设置（均匀局部更新量），但在实际分布式环境中，各节点的计算资源、数据分布和参与模式高度异构。需要一种自适应的聚合策略来处理这种异构性。
AI.method: 提出HEW-Local SGD，通过最小化下一目标值的显式单轮上界来选择节点权重；引入阈值单纯形更新和可分离幅度更新；还提出校正后的异构后局部变体和简化的同质特化版本。
AI.result: 建立了单步保证和全局收敛结果；在可比场景下，理论结果匹配近期LocalSGD/SCAFFOLD分析的通信高效特征，并为非均匀局部视野提供了显式保证。
AI.conclusion: HEW-Local SGD及其变体能够在异构局部训练条件下实现自适应聚合，理论分析表明其在通信效率和收敛性方面与现有方法相当，同时更适合实际异构环境。

title: Do Transaction-Level and Actor-Level AML Queues Agree? An Empirical Evaluation of Granularity Effects on the Elliptic++ Graph
summary: Graph-based anti-money laundering (AML) systems on blockchain networks can score suspicious activity at two granularity levels -- transactions or actor addresses -- yet compliance action is conducted per actor. This paper contributes an evaluation methodology for measuring how scoring granularity affects investigation queue composition under fixed review budgets. We formalize the evaluation through a projection framework mapping transaction-level scores to the actor-level action unit via four aggregation operators, and introduce budgeted investigation metrics -- yield@budget, burden decomposition, and case fragmentation. Using the public Elliptic++ Bitcoin dataset (203,769 transactions; 822,942 address occurrences), we train independent random forest classifiers at each level under a causal temporal protocol and compare review queues through Jaccard overlap, burden decomposition, and feature-matching ablations. At one-percent budget, temporal evaluation yields mean Jaccard of 0.374 (SD 0.171); static pooled evaluation yields 0.087 (95% CI [0.079, 0.094]). An enriched address model receiving all 237 features produces even lower overlap (Jaccard=0.051), with 4.3% illicit per 100 reviews versus 30.2% for the transaction-projected queue. Address-level detection value is temporally concentrated: two timesteps exceed 91% illicit per 100 reviews while the static burden is only 3.4%. A fixed hybrid policy underperforms the best single-level queue by 5.05pp (CI [-10.2pp, -0.9pp]). These findings establish that scoring granularity is a consequential design variable for AML investigation systems -- same data, same budget, different queues, different addresses investigated.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了区块链反洗钱系统中，交易级与地址级两种评分粒度如何影响调查队列构成。通过投影框架和聚合算子，在Elliptic++数据集上发现：评分粒度是AML系统设计中重要的变量——相同数据、相同预算下，不同粒度导致完全不同的调查队列和地址审查结果。
AI.motivation: 现有AML系统可在交易或地址两个粒度进行评分，但合规行动是以地址为单位进行的。这种粒度不匹配导致了一个未被充分研究的问题：评分粒度如何影响调查队列的构成和效率。本文旨在建立评估方法论来量化这种影响。
AI.method: 提出投影框架，通过四种聚合算子将交易级分数映射到地址级行动单元。定义预算约束下的调查指标（yield@budget、burden decomposition、case fragmentation）。在Elliptic++数据集（203,769笔交易，822,942次地址出现）上，使用因果时序协议训练随机森林分类器，通过Jaccard重叠度、负担分解和特征匹配消融实验比较不同粒度的审查队列。
AI.result: 1%预算下，时序评估Jaccard均值0.374（SD 0.171）；静态评估为0.087（95% CI [0.079, 0.094]）。增强地址模型（237特征）Jaccard仅0.051，每100审查中仅4.3%非法，而交易投影队列为30.2%。地址级检测价值在时序上集中：两个时间步每100审查中非法率超91%，而静态负担仅3.4%。固定混合策略比最优单级队列低5.05pp（CI [-10.2pp, -0.9pp]）。
AI.conclusion: 评分粒度是AML调查系统的关键设计变量——即使使用相同数据、相同预算，不同粒度会导致不同的调查队列和地址被调查，这对AML系统的实际部署具有重要指导意义。

title: RL Token: Bootstrapping Online RL with Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models can learn to perform diverse manipulation skills "out of the box," but achieving the precision and speed that real-world tasks demand requires further fine-tuning -- for example, via reinforcement learning (RL). We introduce a lightweight method that enables sample-efficient online RL fine-tuning of pretrained VLAs using just a few hours of real-world practice. We (1) adapt the VLA to expose an "RL token," a compact readout representation that preserves task-relevant pretrained knowledge while serving as an efficient interface for online RL, and (2) train a small actor-critic head on this RL token to refine the actions, while anchoring the learned policy to the VLA. Online RL with the RL token (RLT) makes it possible to fine-tune even large VLAs with RL quickly and efficiently. Across four real-robot tasks (screw installation, zip tie fastening, charger insertion, and Ethernet insertion), RLT improves the speed on the hardest part of the task by up to 3x and raises success rates significantly within minutes to a few hours of practice. It can even surpass the speed of human teleoperation on some of the tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLT方法，通过在VLA模型中引入"RL token"作为紧凑的读出表征，并结合小型演员-评论家网络进行在线强化学习微调，使预训练的视觉-语言-行动模型仅需几小时真实世界训练就能显著提升操作任务的精度和速度（最高提速3倍），甚至在部分任务上超越人类遥操作速度。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA模型虽然能"开箱即用"执行多种操作技能，但在实际任务所需的精度和速度上仍有差距，需要进一步微调。然而，对大规模VLA模型进行高效的在线RL微调是一个挑战，需要一种轻量级方法来实现样本高效的微调。
AI.method: (1) 修改VLA模型，暴露一个"RL token"——一种紧凑的读出表征，既能保留与任务相关的预训练知识，又能作为在线RL的高效接口；(2) 在这个RL token上训练一个小型的演员-评论家网络来精炼动作，同时将学到的策略锚定在VLA模型上。
AI.result: 在四个真实机器人任务（螺丝安装、扎带紧固、充电器插入、以太网插入）上，RLT使任务中最困难部分的速度提升高达3倍，并在几分钟到几小时的实践时间内显著提高了成功率，部分任务甚至超越了人类遥操作的速度。
AI.conclusion: RLT方法证明了通过精心设计的表征（RL token）和小型策略头，即使是大型VLA模型也能通过在线RL快速高效地微调，实现实际应用中所需的精度和速度。

title: Sliding Mode Control for Safe Trajectory Tracking with Moving Obstacles Avoidance: Experimental Validation on Planar Robots
summary: This paper presents a unified control framework for robust trajectory tracking and moving obstacle avoidance applicable to a broad class of mobile robots. By formulating a generalized kinematic transformation, we convert diverse vehicle dynamics into a strict feedback form, facilitating the design of a Sliding Mode Control (SMC) strategy for precise and robust reference tracking. To ensure operational safety in dynamic environments, the tracking controller is integrated with a Collision Cone Control Barrier Function (C3BF) based safety filter. The proposed architecture guarantees asymptotic tracking in the presence of external disturbances while strictly enforcing collision avoidance constraints. The novelty of this work lies in designing a sliding mode controller for ground robots like the Ackermann drive, which has not been done before. The efficacy and versatility of the approach are validated through numerical simulations and extensive real-world experiments on three distinct platforms: an Ackermann-steered vehicle, a differential drive robot, and a quadrotor drone. Video of the experiments are available at https://youtu.be/dWcxwum96vk

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的控制框架，将滑模控制（SMC）与碰撞锥控制障碍函数（C3BF）相结合，实现了多种移动机器人的鲁棒轨迹跟踪与动态避障，并在阿克曼转向车、差速驱动机器人和四旋翼无人机上进行了仿真与实物验证。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多种移动机器人的统一鲁棒控制与安全避障方面存在局限，且滑模控制尚未被应用于阿克曼驱动等地面机器人。
AI.method: 通过广义运动学变换将不同车辆动力学转化为严格反馈形式，设计滑模控制（SMC）实现鲁棒轨迹跟踪，并集成碰撞锥控制障碍函数（C3BF）作为安全滤波器，严格保证避障约束。
AI.result: 在数值仿真和三种不同平台（阿克曼车、差速驱动机器人、四旋翼无人机）的真实实验中验证了方法的有效性与通用性。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架能够在外部扰动下保证渐近跟踪，同时严格满足碰撞避免约束，具有广泛的适用性。

title: JudgeSense: A Benchmark for Prompt Sensitivity in LLM-as-a-Judge Systems
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Code: https://github.com/rohithreddybc/judgeSense. Dataset (JudgeSense Benchmark): https://huggingface.co/datasets/Rohithreddybc/judgesense-benchmark
summary:
Large language models are increasingly deployed as automated judges for evaluating other models, yet the stability of their verdicts under semantically equivalent prompt paraphrases remains unmeasured. We introduce JudgeSense, a framework and benchmark for quantifying this property via the Judge Sensitivity Score (JSS), defined as the fraction of paraphrase pairs on which a judge returns an identical decision.
  Evaluating nine judge models on 494 validated paraphrase pairs, we find that coherence is the only task where judges meaningfully differ, with JSS ranging from 0.389 to 0.992. On factuality, all judges cluster near JSS about 0.63, driven by a polarity-inverted prompt artifact; after correction, factuality JSS rises to about 0.9. Pairwise tasks (preference and relevance) exhibit degenerate always-A behavior in 8 of 9 judges, indicating strong position bias.
  Model scale does not predict consistency. We release code, decision logs, and a validated paraphrase dataset to support standardized JSS reporting.

AI.tldr: 提出JudgeSense框架，通过JSS指标量化大模型作为裁判时对提示词改写的稳定性。发现模型在事实性任务上表现一致（JSS≈0.9修正后），但存在极性反转伪影；配对任务中8/9模型表现出强位置偏好；模型规模不能预测一致性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型被广泛用作自动评估模型，但它们在语义等价的提示词改写下判断的稳定性尚未被量化衡量。
AI.method: 提出JudgeSense框架和Judge Sensitivity Score (JSS)指标，定义为模型对改写对返回相同决策的比例。在494个验证过的改写对上评估9个裁判模型。
AI.result: 一致性仅在不同任务上有差异：连贯性任务JSS范围0.389-0.992；事实性任务JSS≈0.63（存在极性反转伪影，修正后升至≈0.9）；偏好和相关性任务中8/9模型表现出始终选A的退化行为（强位置偏见）。模型规模不预测一致性。
AI.conclusion: 发布了代码、决策日志和验证过的改写数据集，以支持标准化的JSS报告。

title: Learning to Think from Multiple Thinkers
comment: Comments are welcome. There are 78 pages and 5 Figures
summary:
We study learning with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) supervision from multiple thinkers, all of whom provide correct but possibly systematically different solutions, e.g., step-by-step solutions to math problems written by different thinkers, or step-by-step execution traces of different programs solving the same problem.
  We consider classes that are computationally easy to learn using CoT supervision from a single thinker, but hard to learn with only end-result supervision, i.e., without CoT (Joshi et al. 2025). We establish that, under cryptographic assumptions, learning can be hard from CoT supervision provided by two or a few different thinkers, in passive data-collection settings.
  On the other hand, we provide a generic computationally efficient active learning algorithm that learns with a small amount of CoT data per thinker that is completely independent of the target accuracy $\varepsilon$, a moderate number of thinkers that scales as $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log \log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$, and sufficient passive end-result data that scales as $\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\cdot poly\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多思维链（CoT）监督学习，发现被动收集多个正确但不同CoT数据时学习可能很困难（基于密码学假设），但提出了一个高效的主动学习算法，只需少量CoT数据和适量被动结果数据即可学习。
AI.motivation: 探索在多个不同思维者提供正确但不同的CoT监督时，学习的计算复杂性，特别是对比单思维者CoT监督和仅结果监督的学习难度。
AI.method: 通过密码学假设建立硬性下界，证明被动收集多CoT数据时学习困难；同时提出一种主动学习算法，结合少量CoT数据（与精度无关）、适量思维者数量和大量被动结果数据。
AI.result: 1）在密码学假设下，被动收集来自两个或多个不同思维者的CoT数据时，学习可能是困难的；2）主动学习算法可用与精度无关的少量CoT数据、$O(\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon})$个思维者和$\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\cdot poly\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}$的被动结果数据高效学习。
AI.conclusion: 多思维者CoT监督在被动设置下可能带来计算困难，但通过主动学习策略可以克服这一困难，实现高效学习。

title: Scheduling and Routing in the Flexible Job Shop with Heterogeneous Transbots and Zoning: A Constraint Programming Approach
summary: Coordinating production and material transfers is increasingly important in modern manufacturing systems equipped with mobile transfer robots, known as transbots. This study considers a flexible job shop environment in which heterogeneous transbots transport parts between machines. The shop floor is partitioned into zones, with each transbot assigned to a specific zone, and inter-zone movements are facilitated through designated handoff points. These zoning constraints, transbot heterogeneity, and inter-zone handoffs give rise to a challenging variant of the flexible job shop problem with embedded transbot-routing features, resulting in substantial computational complexity. Motivated by a real manufacturing setting, two constraint programming formulations that integrate production scheduling with transbot routing are proposed: an arc-based formulation that explicitly models machine-to-machine transfers, and an operation-embedded formulation that embeds transfer decisions directly within the operation scheduling structure, leading to tighter synchronization between production and transportation decisions. Both formulations capture machine flexibility, zoning restrictions, handoff coordination, and collision-free path planning. To efficiently solve the resulting problem, a book-and-release strategy is proposed. It coordinates transbot movements without enforcing rigid routing patterns. Computational experiments on case study-adapted benchmark-based demonstrate that the proposed formulations generate high-quality solutions with strong computational performance. The generation of instances is described in detail to support future work in this emerging area.

AI.tldr: 本文针对配备异构移动运输机器人（transbot）的柔性作业车间问题，提出两种约束规划公式（弧基公式和操作嵌入公式）来集成生产调度与运输机器人路径规划，并提出一种"预订与释放"策略协调机器人移动，实验表明该方法能生成高质量解。
AI.motivation: 现代制造系统中移动运输机器人（transbot）的普及使得协调生产与物料运输变得日益重要，而分区约束、异构运输机器人及区域间交接点等实际因素给传统柔性作业车间问题带来了巨大计算复杂性，现有方法难以有效解决这一集成问题。
AI.method: 1) 提出两种约束规划(CP)公式：弧基公式显式建模机器间转移，操作嵌入公式将运输决策嵌入操作调度结构中；2) 提出"预订与释放"策略，协调运输机器人移动但避免僵化路径模式；3) 两种公式均考虑了机器灵活性、分区限制、交接点协调和无碰撞路径规划。
AI.result: 基于案例适配的基准测试计算实验表明，所提出的公式能生成高质量解，且计算性能优异。研究还详细描述了实例生成方法以支持未来研究。
AI.conclusion: 本文有效解决了集成生产调度与异构运输机器人路径规划的复杂问题，提出的约束规划公式和协调策略为实际制造环境中的生产与物料运输协同提供了可行方案。

title: MetaGAI: A Large-Scale and High-Quality Benchmark for Generative AI Model and Data Card Generation
summary: The rapid proliferation of Generative AI necessitates rigorous documentation standards for transparency and governance. However, manual creation of Model and Data Cards is not scalable, while automated approaches lack large-scale, high-fidelity benchmarks for systematic evaluation. We introduce MetaGAI, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,541 verified document triplets constructed through semantic triangulation of academic papers, GitHub repositories, and Hugging Face artifacts. Unlike prior single-source datasets, MetaGAI employs a multi-agent framework with specialized Retriever, Generator, and Editor agents, validated through four-dimensional human-in-the-loop assessment, including human evaluation of editor-refined ground truth. We establish a robust evaluation protocol combining automated metrics with validated LLM-as-a-Judge frameworks. Extensive analysis reveals that sparse Mixture-of-Experts architectures achieve superior cost-quality efficiency, while a fundamental trade-off exists between faithfulness and completeness. MetaGAI provides a foundational testbed for benchmarking, training, and analyzing automated Model and Data Card generation methods at scale. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/haoxuan-unt2024/MetaGAI-Benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaGAI，一个包含2,541个经过验证的文档三元组的大规模基准数据集，用于评估自动化模型和数据卡的生成方法。通过多智能体框架和人类参与验证，揭示了稀疏MoE架构在成本质量效率上的优势，以及忠实度与完整性之间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速普及需要严格的文档标准以保障透明度和治理，但手动创建模型卡和数据卡不可扩展，而自动化方法缺乏大规模、高保真的基准数据集用于系统评估。
AI.method: 通过学术论文、GitHub仓库和Hugging Face工件的语义三角测量构建2,541个验证过的文档三元组；采用包含检索、生成、编辑智能体的多智能体框架；通过四维人类参与循环评估（包括对编辑优化后的真实数据进行人工评估）；结合自动评估指标和经过验证的LLM-as-a-Judge评估框架。
AI.result: 稀疏MoE架构在成本-质量效率上表现优异；存在忠实度（faithfulness）与完整性（completeness）之间的根本性权衡。
AI.conclusion: MetaGAI为自动化模型和数据卡生成方法的基准测试、训练和分析提供了一个基础性测试平台，数据与代码已开源。

title: Channel Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models: A Systematic Benchmark Across Architectures, Tasks, and Training Regimes
summary: Scaling EEG foundation models requires pooling data across heterogeneous electrode montages, a prerequisite both for larger pretraining corpora and for downstream deployment. We present the first systematic comparison of four channel adaptation methods (Conv1d projection, spherical spline interpolation (SSI), source-space decomposition, and Riemannian re-centering) across five pretrained EEG foundation models (5M--157M parameters), five downstream tasks, and two training regimes with 10--15 random seeds each. We find that rigid-montage models (BENDR, Neuro-GPT) require external adaptation, while flexible models (EEGPT, CBraMod) match or exceed it natively when fine-tuned but benefit from external methods under frozen-encoder deployment. A probe-SFT asymmetry exists: external adaptation can cause severe negative transfer during fine-tuning of flexible models. The optimal method is architecture-dependent (Conv1d for BENDR, SSI/Riemannian for Neuro-GPT, source-space decomposition for depression detection), and 5M-parameter CBraMod outperforms models up to 31$\times$ larger on 4/5 datasets, consistent with independent findings that compact EEG-specific architectures can match larger models.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了四种电极通道适配方法在五种预训练EEG基础模型上的效果，发现最优方法依赖于模型架构和任务，且紧凑型EEG专用模型（5M参数CBraMod）在多数任务上优于大模型。
AI.motivation: 扩展EEG基础模型需要聚合来自异构电极蒙太奇的数据，这是构建更大预训练语料库和实现下游部署的前提条件，但目前缺乏对不同通道适配方法的系统比较。
AI.method: 对四种通道适配方法（Conv1d投影、球面样条插值SSI、源空间分解、黎曼重定中心）在五种预训练EEG模型（5M-157M参数）、五个下游任务和两种训练体制下进行系统比较，每项实验使用10-15个随机种子。
AI.result: 刚性蒙太奇模型需外部适配；灵活模型在微调时可原生匹配或超越外部适配方法，但在冻结编码器部署下需外部方法辅助。存在探针-SFT不对称性，外部适配可能在微调灵活模型时导致严重负迁移。最优方法取决于架构（BENDR用Conv1d，Neuro-GPT用SSI/黎曼，抑郁检测用源空间分解）。5M参数的CBraMod在4/5数据集上优于大31倍的大模型。
AI.conclusion: 通道适配方法的选择需根据模型架构和任务定制，紧凑型EEG专用架构可以匹配甚至超越更大模型的性能，为EEG基础模型的规模化提供了实用指导。

title: Reduced-Order Data Assimilation for Thermospheric Density Using Physics-informed SINDyc Models
summary: Accurate estimation of thermospheric mass density is a prerequisite for orbit prediction and space situational awareness, where the upper atmosphere responds nonlinearly to solar and geomagnetic forcing across several orders of magnitude. Physics-based general circulation models resolve this response but are computationally expensive, while empirical models run cheaply but lack a time-evolving atmospheric state. This work couples a data-driven reduced-order thermospheric model with a Kalman filter that assimilates in situ density observations. An autoregressive Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics with control (SINDy$_c$-AR) reduced-order model derived from the Thermosphere-Ionosphere-Electrodynamics General Circulation Model (TIE-GCM) captures the dominant modes of variability and their dependence on solar and geomagnetic drivers at a fraction of the parent model's cost. Density observations from CHAMP, GRACE, GRACE-FO, GOCE, and Swarm are assimilated across a range of orbital configurations and geomagnetic conditions, with a linear DMDc model evaluated as a reference. Assimilation reduces density estimation error relative to open-loop predictions, most visibly during geomagnetic storms and under single-satellite coverage. SINDy$_c$-AR and DMDc perform comparably on assimilated orbits; on withheld orbits, SINDy$_c$-AR is more accurate in the in-training scenarios while DMDc is better in the out-of-training 2024 Swarm-C case. Benchmarks against NRLMSIS~2.1 and HASDM (2000--2019, where available) show that empirical references can outperform the assimilated model far from the assimilated track, so results are framed as improvements over the open-loop forecast.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将数据驱动的降阶热层模型（SINDy_c-AR）与卡尔曼滤波结合的方法，通过同化多颗卫星（CHAMP、GRACE等）的原位密度观测数据，以较低计算成本实现了对热层质量密度的准确估计，在电磁暴等复杂条件下优于开环预测，但与经验模型相比在远离同化轨迹时仍有差距。
AI.motivation: 热层质量密度的准确估计是轨道预测和空间态势感知的前提，但现有物理模型计算昂贵，经验模型缺乏时变状态，因此需要一种兼具精度和效率的建模方法。
AI.method: 基于TIE-GCM构建自回归稀疏非线性动力学降阶模型（SINDy_c-AR），并耦合卡尔曼滤波器同化CHAMP、GRACE、GRACE-FO、GOCE、Swarm等多颗卫星的原位密度观测数据；以DMDc线性模型作为参考对照。
AI.result: 同化后的密度估计误差相比开环预测显著降低，尤其在电磁暴和单卫星覆盖条件下表现突出。在同化轨道上SINDy_c-AR与DMDc性能相当；在未同化轨道上，SINDy_c-AR在训练场景内更优，DMDc在2024年Swarm-C外推场景中更好。与NRLMSIS 2.1和HASDM对比显示，经验模型在远离同化轨迹时仍可超越同化模型。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的降阶模型结合卡尔曼滤波同化能有效提升热层密度估计精度，但模型泛化能力仍受限于训练数据覆盖范围，在远离同化轨迹时经验模型仍有优势。

title: The Optimal Sample Complexity of Multiclass and List Learning
summary:
While the optimal sample complexity of binary classification in terms of the VC dimension is well-established, determining the optimal sample complexity of multiclass classification has remained open. The appropriate complexity parameter for multiclass classification is the DS dimension, and despite significant efforts, a gap of $\sqrt{\text{DS}}$ has persisted between the upper and lower bounds on sample complexity.
  Recent work by Hanneke et al. (2026) shows a novel algebraic characterization of multiclass hypothesis classes in terms of their DS dimension. Building up on this, we show that the maximum hypergraph density of any multiclass hypothesis class is upper-bounded by its DS dimension. This proves a longstanding conjecture of Daniely and Shalev-Shwartz (2014). As a consequence, we determine the optimal dependence of the sample complexity on the DS dimension for multiclass as well as list learning.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了多类假设类的最大超图密度上界为其DS维数，解决了Daniely和Shalev-Shwartz(2014)的长期猜想，从而确定了多类分类和列表学习样本复杂度对DS维数的最优依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 多类分类的最优样本复杂度一直未确定，存在√DS的上下界差距，需要填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 基于Hanneke等人(2026)关于DS维数的代数刻画，证明多类假设类的最大超图密度受其DS维数所界定。
AI.result: 证明了Daniely和Shalev-Shwartz(2014)的猜想，确定了样本复杂度对DS维数的最优依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 该结果不仅确定了多类分类的最优样本复杂度，也推广到了列表学习场景。

title: PRP, HS and LS Conjugate Gradient Methods for Interval-Valued Multiobjective Optimization Problems
summary: In this article, we develop an efficient algorithm based on three special variants of the nonlinear conjugate gradient method, namely, the Polak--Ribiere--Polyak, Hestenes--Stiefel, and Liu--Story schemes for computing Pareto critical points in unconstrained interval-valued multiobjective optimization problems. The proposed algorithm incorporates a Wolfe line search strategy to determine a suitable range of step size that satisfies the standard Wolfe conditions. For each of the proposed variants of the nonlinear conjugate gradient method, we establish rigorous global convergence results under appropriate assumptions. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods, we conduct numerical experiments on a set of benchmark test problems and present a comprehensive performance profile analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文针对无约束区间值多目标优化问题，基于Polak-Ribiere-Polyak、Hestenes-Stiefel和Liu-Storey三种非线性共轭梯度法变体，开发了一种高效算法来计算Pareto临界点，并采用Wolfe线搜索策略确定步长，在适当假设下证明了全局收敛性，通过数值实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理区间值多目标优化问题的Pareto临界点计算方面存在效率不足的问题，需要开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于PRP、HS和LS三种非线性共轭梯度法变体，结合Wolfe线搜索策略，设计用于求解无约束区间值多目标优化问题Pareto临界点的算法。
AI.result: 在适当假设下证明了三种变体的全局收敛性，并通过基准测试问题的数值实验和性能分析，展示了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的三种非线性共轭梯度法变体能够有效计算区间值多目标优化问题的Pareto临界点，具有良好的收敛性能。

title: FinGround: Detecting and Grounding Financial Hallucinations via Atomic Claim Verification
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Industry Track. 14 pages, 1 figure, 14 tables
summary: Financial AI systems must produce answers grounded in specific regulatory filings, yet current LLMs fabricate metrics, invent citations, and miscalculate derived quantities. These errors carry direct regulatory consequences as the EU AI Act's high-risk enforcement deadline approaches (August 2026). Existing hallucination detectors treat all claims uniformly, missing 43% of computational errors that require arithmetic re-verification against structured tables. We present FinGround, a three-stage verify-then-ground pipeline for financial document QA. Stage 1 performs finance-aware hybrid retrieval over text and tables. Stage 2 decomposes answers into atomic claims classified by a six-type financial taxonomy and verified with type-routed strategies including formula reconstruction. Stage 3 rewrites unsupported claims with paragraph- and table-cell-level citations. To cleanly isolate verification value from retrieval quality, we propose retrieval-equalized evaluation as standard methodology for RAG verification research: when all systems receive identical retrieval, FinGround still reduces hallucination rates by 68% over the strongest baseline ($p < 0.01$). The full pipeline achieves a 78% reduction relative to GPT-4o. An 8B distilled detector retains 91.4% F1 at 18x lower per-claim latency, enabling $0.003/query deployment, supported by qualitative signals from a four-week analyst pilot.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FinGround，一个三阶段验证-然后-归因的金融文档问答系统，通过金融感知的混合检索、原子声明分解与类型路由验证、以及带段落/表格级引用的重写，在检索质量平等条件下相比最强基线降低68%的幻觉率，全流程相较GPT-4o降低78%，8B蒸馏模型在18倍低延迟下保持91.4%的F1分数。
AI.motivation: 金融AI系统必须产生基于特定监管文件的答案，但现有LLM会捏造指标、编造引用、错误计算衍生量，这些问题在EU AI Act高风险强制执行期限（2026年8月）临近时具有直接监管后果。现有幻觉检测器对所有声明一视同仁，遗漏了43%需要算术复核的计算错误。
AI.method: 三阶段验证-然后-归因流水线：Stage 1进行金融感知的混合检索（文本+表格）；Stage 2将答案分解为原子声明，通过六类金融分类法分类，并使用类型路由策略（包括公式重构）进行验证；Stage 3对不支持声明进行重写并添加段落级和表格单元格级引用。此外提出检索平等化评估方法以隔离验证价值与检索质量。
AI.result: 在检索质量平等设定下，FinGround相比最强基线降低68%幻觉率（p<0.01）；全流程相比GPT-4o降低78%；8B蒸馏检测器以18倍低延迟保持91.4% F1；实现$0.003/查询的部署成本，四周分析师试点提供定性信号支持。
AI.conclusion: FinGround通过金融领域定制的声明分类与类型路由验证策略，显著降低了金融文档问答中的幻觉率，验证了领域特定验证方法的价值。提出的检索平等化评估为RAG验证研究提供了标准化方法论。

title: Reachability Analysis of the State Transition and State Covariance Matrices for an LTV System
summary: In this paper, we study the reachability of two closely related matrices appearing in the analysis of linear time-varying (LTV) systems over a finite time interval, namely, its closed-loop state transition matrix via a state feedback control and its state covariance matrix starting from some given initial state covariance matrix. Under a mild assumption, we first characterize the set of closed-loop terminal state transition matrices reachable from the identity matrix using controls of the state feedback form. Then, we provide the set of terminal state covariance matrices reachable from any given positive definite initial state covariance matrix when the LTV system is not necessarily controllable. Both results are based on the solutions of corresponding matrix Riccati differential equations (RDE).

AI.tldr: 研究线性时变系统中闭环状态转移矩阵和状态协方差矩阵的可达性，基于Riccati微分方程的解给出刻画。
AI.motivation: 对于有限时间区间上的线性时变系统，其闭环状态转移矩阵和状态协方差矩阵的可达性分析在控制理论中具有基础重要性，但目前缺乏系统性的刻画。
AI.method: 在温和假设下，利用状态反馈控制形式，基于矩阵Riccati微分方程的解，分别刻画从单位矩阵出发的闭环终端状态转移矩阵可达集，以及从任意正定初始协方差出发的终端状态协方差矩阵可达集。
AI.result: 给出了闭环终端状态转移矩阵的可达集特征，以及在系统不可控情况下终端状态协方差矩阵的可达集。
AI.conclusion: 两个可达性结果均基于Riccati微分方程的解，为LTV系统的分析和设计提供了理论工具。

title: K-SENSE: A Knowledge-Guided Self-Augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health Conditions on Social Media
summary: Early detection of mental health conditions, particularly stress and depression, from social media text remains a challenging open problem in computational psychiatry and natural language processing. Automated systems must contend with figurative language, implicit emotional expression, and the high noise inherent in user-generated content. Existing approaches either leverage external commonsense knowledge to model mental states explicitly, or apply self-augmentation and contrastive training to improve generalization, but seldom do both in a principled, unified framework. We propose K-SENSE (Knowledge-guided Self-augmented Encoder for Neuro-Semantic Evaluation of Mental Health), a framework that jointly exploits external psychological reasoning and internal representation robustness. K-SENSE adopts a three-stage encoding pipeline: (1) inferential commonsense knowledge is extracted from the COMET model across five mental state dimensions; (2) a semantic anchor is constructed by combining hidden representations from two parallel encoding streams, projected into a shared space before fusion; and (3) a supervised contrastive learning objective aligns same-class representations while encouraging the attention mechanism to suppress irrelevant knowledge noise. We evaluate K-SENSE on Dreaddit (stress detection) and Depression_Mixed (depression detection), achieving mean F1-scores of 86.1 (0.6%) and 94.3 (0.8%), respectively, over five independent runs. These represent improvements of approximately 2.6 and 1.5 percentage points over the strongest prior baselines. Ablation experiments confirm the contribution of each architectural component, including the temporal knowledge integration strategy and the choice to keep the knowledge encoder frozen during fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出K-SENSE框架，通过三阶段编码（常识推理、语义锚点构建、监督对比学习）联合利用外部心理知识和内部表征鲁棒性，在压力/抑郁检测任务上分别达到86.1和94.3的F1分数，超越基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么利用外部常识知识显式建模心理状态，要么通过自增强和对比训练提升泛化能力，但很少有方法在统一框架中同时做到这两点。
AI.method: 三阶段编码流水线：(1) 用COMET模型提取五个心理维度的推理常识知识；(2) 构建语义锚点，融合两个并行编码流的隐藏表示；(3) 监督对比学习对齐同类表示，注意力机制抑制无关知识噪声。
AI.result: Dreaddit数据集F1=86.1(0.6%)，Depression_Mixed数据集F1=94.3(0.8%)，分别比最优基线提升约2.6和1.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 外部常识知识与内部对比学习可以互补，三阶段架构中各组件（知识时序集成策略、冻结知识编码器等）均对性能有贡献。

title: Dual Control of Linear Systems from Bilinear Observations with Belief Space Model Predictive Control
summary: We study finite-horizon quadratic control of linear systems with bilinear observations, in which the control input affects not only the state dynamics but also the partial observations of the state. In this setting, the separation principle can fail because control inputs influence the future quality of state estimates. State estimation requires an input-dependent Kalman filter whose gain and error covariance evolve as functions of the control inputs. To address this challenge, we propose a belief-space model predictive control ($\texttt{B-MPC}$) method that plans directly over both the estimated state and its error covariance. In particular, $\texttt{B-MPC}$ plans with a deterministic surrogate of the belief evolution defined by the input-dependent Kalman filter. Through numerical experiments in two synthetic settings, we show that $\texttt{B-MPC}$ can outperform both the separation-principle controller and its MPC variant in favorable regimes, and that these gains are accompanied by lower estimation covariance and more uncertainty-aware action choices.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有双线性观测的线性系统有限时域二次控制问题，提出了一种信念空间模型预测控制（B-MPC）方法，该方法直接在估计状态及其误差协方差上进行规划，通过输入依赖的卡尔曼滤波器进行信念演化，实验表明其优于分离原则控制器及其MPC变体。
AI.motivation: 在线性系统中，控制输入不仅影响状态动态，还影响观测质量，导致分离原则失效（控制输入影响未来状态估计质量），因此需要一种能联合考虑控制与估计的方法。
AI.method: 提出信念空间模型预测控制（B-MPC），在信念空间（估计状态+误差协方差）中直接规划，使用输入依赖的卡尔曼滤波器作为信念演化的确定性替代模型，进行有限时域优化控制。
AI.result: 在两类合成场景中，B-MPC优于分离原则控制器及其MPC变体，同时具有更低的估计协方差和更鲁棒的决策。
AI.conclusion: B-MPC通过联合优化控制与估计，有效克服了分离原则在双线性观测系统中的失效问题，实现了更优的估计质量与更不确定性感知的控制决策。

title: When AI reviews science: Can we trust the referee?
summary: The volume of scientific submissions continues to climb, outpacing the capacity of qualified human referees and stretching editorial timelines. At the same time, modern large language models (LLMs) offer impressive capabilities in summarization, fact checking, and literature triage, making the integration of AI into peer review increasingly attractive -- and, in practice, unavoidable. Yet early deployments and informal adoption have exposed acute failure modes. Recent incidents have revealed that hidden prompt injections embedded in manuscripts can steer LLM-generated reviews toward unjustifiably positive judgments. Complementary studies have also demonstrated brittleness to adversarial phrasing, authority and length biases, and hallucinated claims. These episodes raise a central question for scholarly communication: when AI reviews science, can we trust the AI referee? This paper provides a security- and reliability-centered analysis of AI peer review. We map attacks across the review lifecycle -- training and data retrieval, desk review, deep review, rebuttal, and system-level. We instantiate this taxonomy with four treatment-control probes on a stratified set of ICLR 2025 submissions, using two advanced LLM-based referees to isolate the causal effects of prestige framing, assertion strength, rebuttal sycophancy, and contextual poisoning on review scores. Together, this taxonomy and experimental audit provide an evidence-based baseline for assessing and tracking the reliability of AI peer review and highlight concrete failure points to guide targeted, testable mitigations.

AI.tldr: 本文从安全性和可靠性角度分析了AI同行评审，提出了覆盖评审全生命周期的攻击分类体系，并通过实验验证了多种攻击方式（如声望框架、断言强度、反驳谄媚和上下文投毒）对AI评审分数的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着科学论文数量激增，人工评审不堪重负，LLM被引入同行评审流程。然而，早期部署暴露了严重的安全隐患（如提示注入、对抗性措辞、偏见和幻觉），引发了对AI评审可信度的根本性质疑。
AI.method: 1. 构建覆盖评审全生命周期（训练/数据检索、桌面评审、深度评审、反驳、系统层面）的攻击分类体系；2. 在ICLR 2025投稿数据集上，使用两种先进LLM评审器进行四项治疗-对照探针实验，分离因果效应。
AI.result: 识别并量化了四种攻击方式（声望框架、断言强度、反驳谄媚、上下文投毒）对AI评审分数的因果影响，揭示了AI评审在多个环节存在可被利用的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 该分类体系和实验审计为评估和追踪AI同行评审的可靠性提供了基于证据的基线，指出了具体的失败点以指导有针对性的、可测试的缓解措施。

title: Unstable Rankings in Bayesian Deep Learning Evaluation
summary: Standard evaluations of Bayesian deep learning methods assume that metric estimates are reliable, but we show this assumption fails under data scarcity. Method rankings are not only unreliable at small $n$, but also dataset-dependent in ways that point estimates cannot reveal: the same method comparison yields $P(\mathrm{MCD} \prec \mathrm{Ensemble}) = 1.000$ at $n = 50$ on one dataset and remains below $0.95$ even at $n = 500$ on another. Across the datasets we consider, no universal sample size threshold exists, which is precisely why dataset-specific posterior inference is necessary. To address this, we use a Bayesian hierarchical model with method-specific variances to treat evaluation metrics as random variables across data realizations, and we use a predictive Minimum Detectable Difference curve to assess whether an observed gap would be detectable at a given training size. Across six Bayesian deep learning methods and five regression datasets, our results show that uncertainty-aware evaluation is necessary in low-data settings, because current evidence for method superiority and predictive detectability at the same training size can diverge substantially. Our framework provides practitioners with principled tools to determine whether their evaluation data is sufficient before drawing conclusions about method superiority.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了在数据稀缺情况下，贝叶斯深度学习方法的评估指标不可靠，并提出了一个贝叶斯层次模型框架，通过预测最小可检测差异曲线来判断评估数据是否充足，从而避免得出不可靠的方法优越性结论。
AI.motivation: 标准评估假设指标估计可靠，但数据稀缺时这一假设不成立。方法排名不仅在小样本下不可靠，还呈现数据集依赖性，且不存在通用的样本量阈值，因此需要数据集特定的后验推断。
AI.method: 使用带方法特定方差的贝叶斯层次模型，将评估指标视为跨数据实现下的随机变量，并利用预测性最小可检测差异（MDD）曲线来评估在给定训练规模下观测到的方法差距是否可检测。
AI.result: 在六个贝叶斯深度学习方法和五个回归数据集上的实验表明，低数据设置下不确定性感知的评估是必要的，当前方法优越性的证据与预测可检测性在同一训练规模下可能存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为实践者提供了原则性的工具，用于在得出方法优越性结论之前判断评估数据是否充分。

title: Exploiting Differential Flatness for Efficient Learning-based Model Predictive Control of Constrained Multi-Input Control Affine Systems
comment: Accepted for publication in 2026 European Control Conference
summary: Learning-based control techniques use data from past trajectories to control systems with uncertain dynamics. However, learning-based controllers are often computationally inefficient, limiting their practicality. To address this limitation, we propose a learning-based controller that exploits differential flatness, a property of many robotic systems. Recent research on using flatness for learning-based control either is limited in that it (i) ignores input constraints, (ii) applies only to single-input systems, or (iii) is tailored to specific platforms. In contrast, our approach uses a system extension and block-diagonal cost formulation to control general multi-input, nonlinear, affine systems. Furthermore, it satisfies input and half-space flat state constraints and guarantees probabilistic Lyapunov decrease using only two sequential convex optimizations. We show that our approach performs similarly to, but is multiple times more efficient than, a Gaussian process model predictive controller in simulation, and achieves competitive tracking in real hardware experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用微分平坦性实现高效学习的控制器，通过系统扩展和块对角化代价公式，仅需两次顺序凸优化即可满足输入和状态约束，并保证概率Lyapunov下降。实验表明其计算效率显著优于高斯过程模型预测控制器，且跟踪性能相当。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的控制器计算效率低，限制了实际应用；而利用微分平坦性的现有方法存在忽略输入约束、仅适用于单输入系统或针对特定平台等局限性。
AI.method: 采用系统扩展和块对角化代价公式，将控制问题转化为仅需两次顺序凸优化求解，处理多输入非线性仿射系统，同时满足输入约束和半空间平坦状态约束，并保证概率Lyapunov下降。
AI.result: 仿真中性能与高斯过程模型预测控制器相当，但计算效率高出数倍；在真实硬件实验中实现了有竞争力的跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保证控制性能的同时显著提升了计算效率，为学习控制在机器人系统中的实际部署提供了可行的解决方案。

title: MTRouter: Cost-Aware Multi-Turn LLM Routing with History-Model Joint Embeddings
comment: This work has accepted by ACL 2026
summary: Multi-turn, long-horizon tasks are increasingly common for large language models (LLMs), but solving them typically requires many sequential model invocations, accumulating substantial inference costs. Here, we study cost-aware multi-turn LLM routing: selecting which model to invoke at each turn from a model pool, given a fixed cost budget. We propose MTRouter, which encodes the interaction history and candidate models into joint history-model embeddings, and learns an outcome estimator from logged trajectories to predict turn-level model utility. Experiments show that MTRouter improves the performance-cost trade-off: on ScienceWorld, it surpasses GPT-5 while reducing total cost by 58.7%; on Humanity's Last Exam (HLE), it achieves competitive accuracy while reducing total cost by 43.4% relative to GPT-5, and these gains even carry over to held-out tasks. Further analyses reveal several mechanisms underlying its effectiveness: relative to prior multi-turn routers, MTRouter makes fewer model switches, is more tolerant to transient errors, and exhibits emergent specialization across models. Code: https://github.com/ZhangYiqun018/MTRouter

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTRouter，一种面向多轮长时任务的大模型成本感知路由方法。通过在每轮从模型池中选择最优模型，它在ScienceWorld上超越GPT-5并降低58.7%成本，在HLE上降低43.4%成本，且泛化到未见任务。
AI.motivation: 多轮长时任务中频繁调用大模型产生高昂推理成本，现有方法缺乏对成本的显式控制，亟需一种能在固定预算下自适应选择模型的路由策略。
AI.method: MTRouter：将交互历史与候选模型编码为联合历史-模型嵌入，从历史轨迹中学习轮次级别的效用预测器，实现成本约束下的最优模型选择。
AI.result: ScienceWorld：超越GPT-5，成本降低58.7%；HLE：精度与GPT-5相当，成本降低43.4%；少切换、容错强、模型间出现专业化分工。
AI.conclusion: MTRouter在性能-成本权衡上显著优于现有方法，展现出强泛化能力和鲁棒性，为多轮LLM推理的经济部署提供了有效方案。

title: Thinking Like a Clinician: A Cognitive AI Agent for Clinical Diagnosis via Panoramic Profiling and Adversarial Debate
summary: The application of large language models (LLMs) in clinical decision support faces significant challenges of "tunnel vision" and diagnostic hallucinations present in their processing unstructured electronic health records (EHRs). To address these challenges, we propose a novel chain-based clinical reasoning framework, called DxChain, which transforms the diagnostic workflow into an iterative process by mirroring a clinician's cognitive trajectory that consists of "Memory Anchoring", "Navigation" and "Verification" phases. DxChain introduces three key methodological innovations to elicit the potential of LLM: (i) a Profile-Then-Plan paradigm to mitigate cold-start hallucinations by establishing a panoramic patient baseline, (ii) a Medical Tree-of-Thoughts (Med-ToT) algorithm for strategic look ahead planning and resource aware navigation, and (iii) a Dialectical Diagnostic Verification procedure utilizing "Angel-Devil" adversarial debates to resolve complex evidence conflicts. Evaluated on two real world benchmarks, MIMIC-IV-Ext Cardiac Disease and MIMIC-IV-Ext CDM, DxChain achieves state-of-the-art performances in both diagnostic accuracy and logical consistency, offering a modular and reliable architecture for next-generation clinical AI. The code is at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Dx-Chain.

AI.tldr: DxChain是一个基于链式推理的临床诊断框架，通过模仿医生的"记忆锚定-导航-验证"认知过程，结合Profile-Then-Plan范式、医学思维树(Med-ToT)算法和"天使-恶魔"辩论验证机制，有效缓解了大语言模型在临床决策中的隧道视野和诊断幻觉问题，在两个真实基准上达到了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在临床决策支持中存在"隧道视野"（tunnel vision）和诊断幻觉（diagnostic hallucinations）两大问题，限制了其处理非结构化电子健康记录的有效性。
AI.method: 三个关键创新：(1) Profile-Then-Plan范式——通过建立全景患者基线缓解冷启动幻觉；(2) 医学思维树(Med-ToT)算法——实现战略性前瞻规划和资源感知导航；(3) 辩证诊断验证机制——利用"天使-恶魔"对抗性辩论解决复杂证据冲突。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV-Ext心脏病和MIMIC-IV-Ext CDM两个真实世界基准上，诊断准确率和逻辑一致性均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: DxChain提供了一种模块化、可靠的架构，为下一代临床AI系统奠定了基础。

title: Conditional Imputation for Within-Modality Missingness in Multi-Modal Federated Learning
comment: Wugeng Zheng and Ziwen Kan contributed equally to this work. Song Wang is the corresponding author. Accepted to FedVision 2026
summary: Multimodal Federated Learning (MMFL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative training, but real-world clinical applications often suffer from within-modality missingness caused by sensor intermittency or irregular sampling. Existing methods implicitly represent unobserved data via architectural alignment or missing embeddings, often failing to recover the true distribution and yielding sub-optimal performance. We propose CondI, a federated framework explicitly addressing this missingness using conditional diffusion models. CondI employs a two-phase training pipeline: first, imputing unobserved temporal components using available multimodal context and conditional embeddings; second, optimizing modality-specific extractors and joint embedding spaces. During inference, imputed raw data pass through trained extractors to generate robust features, providing a holistic representation for downstream tasks. Explicit data imputation ensures models operate on complete semantic structures, significantly enhancing resilience against severe data incompleteness. Experiments on three clinical datasets (PTB-XL, SLEEP-EDF, MIMIC-IV) demonstrate CondI achieves comparable results to state-of-the-art baselines. Code: https://github.com/ZhengWugeng/CondI

AI.tldr: CondI是一个基于条件扩散模型的多模态联邦学习框架，通过显式数据插补解决临床应用中因传感器间歇性导致的模态内数据缺失问题，在三个临床数据集上达到与先进基线相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MMFL方法在处理模态内数据缺失时，仅通过架构对齐或缺失嵌入隐式表示未观测数据，无法恢复真实数据分布，导致次优性能。
AI.method: 提出CondI框架，采用两阶段训练流程：第一阶段利用可用多模态上下文和条件嵌入插补缺失的时间组分；第二阶段优化模态特定提取器和联合嵌入空间。推理时，插补后的原始数据通过训练好的提取器生成鲁棒特征。
AI.result: 在PTB-XL、SLEEP-EDF、MIMIC-IV三个临床数据集上，CondI达到了与最先进基线可比的实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 显式数据插补确保了模型基于完整语义结构进行运算，显著增强了对严重数据不完整性的鲁棒性，为多模态联邦学习中的缺失数据处理提供了有效方案。

title: Data-Driven Privacy-Preserving Modeling and Frequency Regulation with Aggregated Electric Vehicles via Bilinear Hidden Markov Model
comment: 12 Pages, 10 figures, Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid
summary: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) technology allows bidirectional power flow for real-time grid support, making electric vehicles (EVs) well-suited for ancillary services such as frequency regulation. However, existing methods for flexibility estimation and coordinating aggregated EVs often rely on individual EV traveling information (e.g., arrival/departure time) and/or characteristic parameters (e.g., charging efficiency, battery capacity) as well as real-time state-of-charge (SOC), which raises privacy concerns and faces data quality issues. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a data-driven, privacy-preserving modeling and control framework for frequency regulation using aggregated EVs.
