A circularity-controlled test (n=35) shows the Benchmark+Sentiment sub-composite, which contains no GitHub-derived signals, predicts external adoption proxies it does not aggregate: GitHub stars ($ρ_s=0.52$, $p<0.01$) and Stack Overflow question volume ($ρ_s=0.49$, $p<0.01$), with VS Code installs ($ρ_s=0.44$, $p<0.05$) reported as illustrative given that only 11 of 35 agents have non-zero installs. On the n=11 subset with published SWE-bench scores, composite and benchmark-only rankings are nearly uncorrelated ($ρ_s=0.25$; 9 of 11 agents shift by at least 2 ranks), driven by a strong negative Adoption-Capability correlation among closed-source high-capability agents within this subset. This is precisely why we rest the framework's validity claim on the broader n=35 test rather than the SWE-bench overlap. AgentPulse surfaces deployment signal absent from benchmarks; it is a methodology, not a ground-truth ranking. The framework, all collected signals, scoring outputs, and evaluation harness are released under CC BY 4.0.

AI.tldr: AgentPulse是一个持续评估框架，通过18个实时信号综合衡量50个AI代理的基准性能、采用情况、社区情绪和生态健康，发现基准排名与实际部署信号存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 静态基准只能衡量AI代理在固定时间点的能力，无法反映它们在部署中的采用、维护和实际体验情况，因此需要一种持续评估方法。
AI.method: 构建AgentPulse框架，从GitHub、包注册表、IDE市场、社交平台和基准榜单收集18个实时信号，评估50个代理在10个工作量类别上的四个因素（基准性能、采用信号、社区情绪、生态健康），并通过三项分析验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 四个因素信息互补（最大相关ρ=0.61）；无GitHub信号的子组合能预测外部采用指标（GitHub星标ρ=0.52, p<0.01）；在SWE-bench子集上，复合排名与基准排名几乎不相关（ρ=0.25），9/11代理排名偏移≥2位。
AI.conclusion: AgentPulse揭示了基准测试无法捕捉的部署信号，是一个方法论框架而非绝对排名，所有资源已公开。

title: Hybrid JIT-CUDA Graph Optimization for Low-Latency Large Language Model Inference
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across natural language and multimodal tasks, yet their practical deployment remains constrained by inference latency and kernel launch overhead, particularly in interactive, short-sequence settings. This paper presents a hybrid runtime framework that combines Just-In-Time (JIT) compilation with CUDA Graph execution to reduce launch overhead while preserving runtime flexibility during autoregressive decoding. The framework partitions transformer inference into static components executed via CUDA Graph replay and dynamic components handled through JIT-compiled kernels, enabling asynchronous graph capture and reuse across decoding steps.
  We evaluate the proposed approach on LLaMA-2 7B using single-GPU, batch-size-one inference across prompt lengths from 10 to 500 tokens. Experimental results show that the hybrid runtime reduces Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) by up to 66.0% and achieves lower P99 latency compared with TensorRT-LLM in this regime. These results indicate that hybrid JIT-CUDA Graph execution can effectively reduce inference latency and variance for short-sequence LLM workloads, making it a practical optimization strategy for latency-sensitive AI applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合JIT编译与CUDA Graph的混合运行时框架，将Transformer推理拆分为静态组件（CUDA Graph重放）和动态组件（JIT编译内核），在短序列场景下TTFT降低最高66.0%，P99延迟也优于TensorRT-LLM。
AI.motivation: LLM在交互式、短序列场景中部署受限于推理延迟和内核启动开销，现有方案难以同时兼顾低延迟与运行时灵活性。
AI.method: 将Transformer推理划分为静态组件（通过CUDA Graph重放执行）和动态组件（通过JIT编译内核处理），实现异步图捕获与跨解码步骤重用。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-2 7B单GPU、batch-size=1、提示长度10-500 tokens条件下，TTFT最高降低66.0%，P99延迟优于TensorRT-LLM。
AI.conclusion: 混合JIT-CUDA Graph执行能有效降低短序列LLM工作负载的推理延迟和方差，是面向延迟敏感型AI应用的实用优化策略。

title: EPM-RL: Reinforcement Learning for On-Premise Product Mapping in E-Commerce
summary: Product mapping, the task of deciding whether two e-commerce listings refer to the same product, is a core problem for price monitoring and channel visibility. In real marketplaces, however, sellers frequently inject promotional keywords, platform-specific tags, and bundle descriptions into titles, causing the same product to appear under many different names. Recent LLM-based and multi-agent frameworks improve robustness and interpretability on such hard cases, but they often rely on expensive external APIs, repeated retrieval, and complex inference-time orchestration, making large-scale deployment costly and difficult in privacy-sensitive enterprise settings. To address these issues, we present EPM-RL, a reinforcement-learning-based framework for building an accurate and efficient on-premise e-commerce product mapping model. Our central idea is to distill high-cost agentic reasoning into a trainable in-house model. Starting from a curated set of product pairs with LLM-generated rationales and human verification, we first perform parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) on a small student model using structured reasoning outputs. We then further optimize the model with Reinforcement Learning (RL) using an agent-based reward that jointly evaluates output-format compliance, label correctness, reasoning--preference scores from specially designed judge models. Preliminary results show that EPM-RL consistently improves over PEFT-only training and offers a stronger quality--cost trade-off than commercial API-based baselines, while enabling private deployment and lower operational cost. These findings suggest that reinforcement learning can turn product mapping from a high-latency agentic pipeline into a scalable, inspectable, and production-ready in-house system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EPM-RL框架，通过强化学习将高成本的智能体推理蒸馏到可部署的内部模型中，实现了高效、准确且可私有化部署的电商产品映射。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM和多智能体的产品映射方法虽然准确且可解释，但依赖昂贵的外部API、重复检索和复杂推理，导致大规模部署成本高昂且难以在隐私敏感的企业环境中使用。
AI.method: 1) 使用LLM生成推理过程并经过人工验证，构建带结构化推理的训练数据；2) 在小学生模型上进行参数高效微调（PEFT）；3) 利用基于智能体的奖励函数（综合评估格式合规性、标签正确性和推理偏好得分）进行强化学习（RL）优化。
AI.result: EPM-RL持续优于纯PEFT训练，相比基于商业API的基线方法提供了更优的质量-成本权衡，同时支持私有化部署和更低的运营成本。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习能够将产品映射从高延迟的智能体流程转化为可扩展、可检查、可投入生产环境的内部系统。

title: A2DEPT: Large Language Model-Driven Automated Algorithm Design via Evolutionary Program Trees
summary: Designing heuristics for combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) is a fundamental yet challenging task that traditionally requires extensive domain expertise. Recently, Large Language Model (LLM)-based Automated Heuristic Design (AHD) has shown promise in autonomously generating heuristic components with minimal human intervention. However, most existing LLM-based AHD methods enforce fixed algorithmic templates to ensure executability, which confines the search to component-level tuning and limits system-level algorithmic expressiveness. To enable open-ended solver synthesis beyond rigid templates, we propose Automated Algorithm Design via Evolutionary Program Trees (A2DEPT), which treats LLMs as system-level algorithm architects. A2DEPT explores the vast program space via a tree-structured evolutionary search with hybrid selection and hierarchical operators, enabling iterative refinement of complete algorithms. To make open-ended generation practical, we enforce executability with a lightweight program-maintenance loop that performs feedback-driven repair. In experiments, A2DEPT consistently outperforms representative LLM-based baselines on both standard and highly constrained benchmarks. On the standard benchmarks, it reduces the mean normalized optimality gap by 9.8% relative to the strongest competing AHD baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出A2DEPT方法，将LLM作为算法架构师，通过进化程序树进行开放式求解器合成，在组合优化问题上超越现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-based自动启发式设计（AHD）方法受限于固定算法模板，只能在组件级别调优，缺乏系统级的算法表达能力和开放性。
AI.method: 提出A2DEPT，将LLM视为系统级算法架构师，通过树结构的进化搜索（混合选择+层次化算子）探索程序空间，并引入轻量级程序维护循环实现反馈驱动的可执行性修复。
AI.result: 在标准基准和强约束基准上，A2DEPT一致优于代表性LLM基线；在标准基准上，相比最强AHD基线，平均标准化最优性差距降低9.8%。
AI.conclusion: 突破固定模板限制，实现开放式算法自动设计，验证了树结构进化搜索结合LLM在组合优化求解器合成中的有效性。

title: GeoCert: Certified Geometric AI for Reliable Forecasting
summary: Forecasting systems in science must be accurate, physically consistent, and certifiably reliable. Most existing models address prediction, constraint enforcement, and verification separately, limiting scalability and interpretability. We introduce GeoCert, a geometric AI framework that unifies forecasting, physical reasoning, and formal verification within a single differentiable computation. GeoCert formulates forecasting as evolution along a hyperbolic manifold, where negative curvature induces contraction dynamics, intrinsic robustness, and logarithmic-time certification. A hierarchical constraint architecture separates universal physical laws from domain-specific dynamics, enabling certified generalization across energy, climate, finance, and transportation systems. GeoCert achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while reducing computational cost by 97.5% and maintaining better certification rates. By embedding verification into the geometry of learning, GeoCert transforms forecasting from empirical approximation to formally verified inference, offering a scalable foundation for trustworthy, reproducible, and physically grounded scientific AI.

AI.tldr: GeoCert是一个统一的几何AI框架，将预测、物理推理和形式验证整合到单一可微计算中，在双曲流形上演化实现预测，通过分层约束架构分离普遍物理定律与领域特定动态，实现高精度、低成本（降低97.5%）且可认证的科学预测。
AI.motivation: 现有科学预测系统将预测、约束执行和验证分开处理，限制了可扩展性和可解释性，缺乏统一的、可认证的预测框架。
AI.method: 基于双曲流形的几何演化（利用负曲率诱导收缩动力学和内在鲁棒性），结合分层约束架构（分离普遍物理定律与领域特定动态），实现预测、推理与验证的统一可微计算。
AI.result: 达到最先进预测精度，计算成本降低97.5%，同时保持更好的认证率。
AI.conclusion: 通过将验证嵌入学习的几何结构中，GeoCert将预测从经验近似转变为形式化验证的推理，为可信、可复现且基于物理的科学AI提供了可扩展基础。

title: Stabilizing Efficient Reasoning with Step-Level Advantage Selection
summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong reasoning performance by allocating substantial computation at inference time, often generating long and verbose reasoning traces. While recent work on efficient reasoning reduces this overhead through length-based rewards or pruning, many approaches are post-trained under a much shorter context window than base-model training, a factor whose effect has not been systematically isolated. We first show that short-context post-training alone, using standard GRPO without any length-aware objective, already induces substantial reasoning compression-but at the cost of increasingly unstable training dynamics and accuracy degradation. To address this, we propose Step-level Advantage Selection (SAS), which operates at the reasoning-step level and assigns a zero advantage to low-confidence steps in correct rollouts and to high-confidence steps in verifier-failed rollouts, where failures often arise from truncation or verifier issues rather than incorrect reasoning. Across diverse mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks, SAS improves average Pass@1 accuracy by 0.86 points over the strongest length-aware baseline while reducing average reasoning length by 16.3%, yielding a better accuracy-efficiency trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Step-level Advantage Selection (SAS)方法，在推理步骤层面分配优势值，在保持或提升准确率的同时显著压缩推理长度，解决了短上下文后训练带来的不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 发现短上下文后训练（即使没有长度感知目标）会自然压缩推理长度，但导致训练不稳定和准确率下降。现有方法（基于长度奖励或剪枝）未系统隔离上下文窗口缩短这一因素的影响。
AI.method: 提出Step-level Advantage Selection (SAS)：在推理步骤级别运作，对正确rollout中的低置信度步骤和验证失败rollout中的高置信度步骤分配零优势值，从而过滤不稳定信号。
AI.result: 在多个数学和通用推理基准上，SAS相比最强长度感知基线，Pass@1准确率平均提升0.86个百分点，推理长度平均减少16.3%，实现了更优的准确率-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: SAS通过步骤级别的优势选择机制，有效缓解了短上下文后训练导致的不稳定性和准确率下降问题，在压缩推理长度的同时甚至提升了推理准确率。

title: Grounding Before Generalizing: How AI Differs from Humans in Causal Transfer
summary: Extracting abstract causal structures and applying them to novel situations is a hallmark of human intelligence. While Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong performance on a wide range of reasoning tasks, their capacity for interactive causal learning -- inducing latent structures through sequential exploration and transferring them across contexts -- remains uncharacterized. Human learners accomplish such transfer after minimal exposure, whereas classical Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents fail catastrophically. Whether state-of-the-art Artificial Intelligence (AI) models possess human-like mechanisms for abstract causal structure transfer is an open question. Using the OpenLock paradigm requiring sequential discovery of Common Cause (CC) and Common Effect (CE) structures, here we show that models exhibit fundamentally delayed or absent transfer: even successful models require initial environmental-specific mapping -- what we term environmental grounding -- before efficiency gains emerge, whereas humans leverage prior structural knowledge from the very first solution attempt. In the text-only condition, models matched or exceeded human discovery efficiency. In contrast, visual information -- in both the image-only and text-and-image conditions -- overall degraded rather than enhanced performance, revealing a broad reliance on symbolic processing rather than integrated multimodal reasoning. Models further exhibited systematic CC/CE asymmetries absent in humans, suggesting heuristic biases rather than direction-neutral causal abstraction. These findings reveal that large-scale statistical learning does not produce the decontextualized causal schemas underpinning human analogical reasoning, establishing grounding-dependent transfer as a fundamental limitation of current LLMs and VLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文通过OpenLock范式测试发现，LLMs和VLMs在因果结构迁移中表现出根本性延迟或缺失：模型需要环境特定映射（"环境接地"）才能实现效率提升，而人类从第一次尝试即可利用先验结构知识。视觉信息反而降低性能，模型依赖符号处理而非多模态推理，且存在人类没有的系统性因果结构不对称性。
AI.motivation: 探索当前最先进的AI模型（LLMs和VLMs）是否具备类似人类的抽象因果结构迁移能力，即通过顺序探索诱导潜在结构并将其跨情境迁移的能力。这是人类智能的标志性特征，但经典RL模型在此任务上表现极差。
AI.method: 使用OpenLock范式，要求模型在Common Cause (CC)和Common Effect (CE)两种因果结构中进行顺序发现和迁移。设置三种条件：纯文本、纯图像、文本+图像，比较模型与人类的表现差异。
AI.result: 1) 模型需要环境接地（environmental grounding）才能实现迁移效率提升，而人类从第一次尝试就利用先验结构知识；2) 纯文本条件模型达到或超过人类发现效率；3) 视觉信息（纯图像或文本+图像）整体上降低了而非提升了性能；4) 模型表现出系统性CC/CE不对称性，而人类没有。
AI.conclusion: 大规模统计学习并未产生支撑人类类比推理的去语境化因果图式，环境依赖的迁移（grounding-dependent transfer）是当前LLMs和VLMs的根本性局限。模型缺乏人类那种方向中立的因果抽象能力，表现出启发式偏差。

title: Supernodes and Halos: Loss-Critical Hubs in LLM Feed-Forward Layers
summary: We study the organization of channel-level importance in transformer feed-forward networks (FFNs). Using a Fisher-style loss proxy (LP) based on activation-gradient second moments, we show that loss sensitivity is concentrated in a small set of channels within each layer. In Llama-3.1-8B, the top 1% of channels per layer accounts for a median of 58.7% of LP mass, with a range of 33.0% to 86.1%. We call these loss-critical channels supernodes. Although FFN layers also contain strong activation outliers, LP-defined supernodes overlap only weakly with activation-defined outliers and are not explained by activation power or weight norms alone. Around this core, we find a weaker but consistent halo structure: some non-supernode channels share the supernodes' write support and show stronger redundancy with the protected core. We use one-shot structured FFN pruning as a diagnostic test of this organization. At 50% FFN sparsity, baselines that prune many supernodes degrade sharply, whereas our SCAR variants explicitly protect the supernode core; the strongest variant, SCAR-Prot, reaches perplexity 54.8 compared with 989.2 for Wanda-channel. The LP-concentration pattern appears across Mistral-7B, Llama-2-7B, and Qwen2-7B, remains visible in targeted Llama-3.1-70B experiments, and increases during OLMo-2-7B pretraining. These results suggest that LLM FFNs develop a small learned core of loss-critical channels, and that preserving this core is important for reliable structured pruning.

AI.tldr: 本文发现Transformer FFN层中损失敏感性高度集中于少数关键通道（称为supernodes），并基于此提出保护性剪枝策略SCAR-Prot，在50%稀疏度下显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 探究Transformer FFN层中通道级重要性的组织规律，理解损失敏感性是否集中在少数通道，以及这种结构对结构化剪枝的影响。
AI.method: 1) 使用基于激活-梯度二阶矩的Fisher风格损失代理(LP)衡量通道重要性；2) 定义LP质量高度集中的通道为supernodes；3) 分析supernodes与激活异常值、权重范数的重叠关系；4) 提出SCAR系列剪枝变体（SCAR-Prot为核心保护版本），通过保护supernode核心进行结构化剪枝。
AI.result: Llama-3.1-8B中，每层前1%的通道集中了33.0%-86.1%的LP质量（中位数58.7%）。SCAR-Prot在50% FFN稀疏度下困惑度54.8，远优于Wanda-channel的989.2。该模式在多个7B模型及70B实验中一致存在，且随预训练过程增强。
AI.conclusion: LLM的FFN层会发展出少量损失关键通道的核心结构，保护这一核心对可靠的结构化剪枝至关重要。

title: From Skill Text to Skill Structure: The Scheduling-Structural-Logical Representation for Agent Skills
summary: LLM agents increasingly rely on reusable skills, capability packages that combine instructions, control flow, constraints, and tool calls. In most current agent systems, however, skills are still represented by text-heavy artifacts, including SKILL.md-style documents and structured records whose machine-usable evidence remains embedded largely in natural-language descriptions. This poses a challenge for skill-centered agent systems: managing skill collections and using skills to support agent both require reasoning over invocation interfaces, execution structure, and concrete side effects that are often entangled in a single textual surface. An explicit representation of skill knowledge may therefore help make these artifacts easier for machines to acquire and leverage. Drawing on Memory Organization Packets, Script Theory, and Conceptual Dependency from Schank and Abelson's classical work on linguistic knowledge representation, we introduce what is, to our knowledge, the first structured representation for agent skill artifacts that disentangles skill-level scheduling signals, scene-level execution structure, and logic-level action and resource-use evidence: the Scheduling-Structural-Logical (SSL) representation. We instantiate SSL with an LLM-based normalizer and evaluate it on a corpus of skills in two tasks, Skill Discovery and Risk Assessment, and superiorly outperform the text-only baselines: in Skill Discovery, SSL improves MRR from 0.573 to 0.707; in Risk Assessment, it improves macro F1 from 0.744 to 0.787. These findings reveal that explicit, source-grounded structure makes agent skills easier to search and review. They also suggest that SSL is best understood as a practical step toward more inspectable, reusable, and operationally actionable skill representations for agent systems, rather than as a finished standard or an end-to-end mechanism for managing and using skills.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SSL（Scheduling-Structural-Logical）的结构化表示方法，用于解耦智能体技能中的调度信号、执行结构和逻辑动作信息。实验表明，该方法在技能发现和风险评估任务上显著优于纯文本基线。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体系统中的技能仍以文本为主（如SKILL.md），机器可用的证据被嵌入在自然语言描述中，导致技能管理和使用都需要对复杂的文本表面进行推理。亟需一种显式的、机器可获取的技能知识表示。
AI.method: 借鉴Schank和Abelson经典语言知识表示工作（MOPs、脚本理论、概念依赖），提出SSL表示：调度层（scheduling-level）捕获技能级调度信号、场景层（scene-level）描述执行结构、逻辑层（logic-level）刻画动作和资源使用证据。使用基于LLM的归一化器实例化SSL。
AI.result: 在技能发现任务中，SSL将MRR从0.573提升至0.707；在风险评估任务中，将macro F1从0.744提升至0.787，显著优于纯文本基线。
AI.conclusion: 显式的、源于源码的结构化表示使智能体技能更易于搜索和审查。SSL应被理解为迈向更可检查、可复用、可操作的技能表示的实际步骤，而非一个完备的标准或端到端机制。

title: An Information-Geometric Framework for Stability Analysis of Large Language Models under Entropic Stress
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes and operational settings, evaluation strategies based solely on aggregate accuracy are often insucient to characterize system reliability. This study proposes a thermodynamic inspired modeling framework for analyzing the stability of LLM outputs under conditions of uncertainty and perturbation. The framework introduces a composite stability score that integrates task utility, entropy as a measure of external uncertainty, and two internal structural proxies: internal integration and aligned reective capacity. Rather than interpreting these quantities as physical variables, the formulation is intended as an interpretable abstraction that captures how internal structure may modulate the impact of disorder on model behavior. Using the IST-20 benchmarking protocol and associated metadata, we analyze 80 modelscenario observations across four contemporary LLMs. The proposed formulation consistently yields higher stability scores than a reduced utilityentropy baseline, with a mean improvement of 0.0299 (95% CI: 0.02470.0351). The observed gain is more pronounced under higher entropy conditions, suggesting that the framework captures a form of nonlinear attenuation of uncertainty. We do not claim a fundamental physical law or a complete theory of machine ethics. Instead, the contribution of this work is a compact and interpretable modeling perspective that connects uncertainty, performance, and internal structure within a unied evaluation lens. The framework is intended to complement existing benchmarking approaches and to support ongoing discussions in AI safety, reliability, and governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种热力学启发的建模框架，通过整合任务效用、熵（外部不确定性）以及两种内部结构代理指标（内部整合与对齐反思能力），构建复合稳定性评分来分析大语言模型在不确定性和扰动下的输出稳定性。在IST-20基准测试中，该框架相比简化基线模型平均提升0.0299，在高熵条件下效果更显著。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估策略过度依赖聚合准确率，难以充分刻画系统在高压或操作场景中的可靠性，亟需一种能够综合考虑不确定性、性能与内部结构的评估视角。
AI.method: 借鉴热力学思想，定义复合稳定性评分=任务效用+熵（外部不确定性）+内部整合+对齐反思能力。通过IST-20基准协议及元数据，对4个当代LLM在80个模型-场景观测点上进行分析，并与简化效用-熵基线对比。
AI.result: 所提框架在所有场景下均获得更高的稳定性评分，平均提升0.0299（95% CI: 0.0247–0.0351）；在高熵条件下增益更明显，表明框架具有非线性衰减不确定性的能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提供一个紧凑、可解释的建模视角，将不确定性、性能与内部结构统一到评估框架中，旨在补充现有基准方法，并支持AI安全、可靠性与治理领域的讨论。作者明确不声称发现了基本物理定律或完整的机器伦理理论。

title: Do Synthetic Trajectories Reflect Real Reward Hacking? A Systematic Study on Monitoring In-the-Wild Hacking in Code Generation
summary: Reward hacking in code generation, where models exploit evaluation loopholes to obtain full reward without correctly solving the tasks, poses a critical challenge for Reinforcement Learning (RL) and the deployment of reasoning models. Existing studies have been conducted primarily on synthetic hacking trajectories. However, whether these synthetic behaviors faithfully represent naturally emerging hacking in the wild remains unclear. In this work, we present a systematic analysis of the synthetic vs. in-the-wild discrepancy in reward hacking. We examine to what extent hacking behaviors induced by prompting resemble those emerging during RL training, and whether monitors trained on synthetic trajectories generalize to naturally arising but previously unseen hacking. To scale up the curation of in-the-wild reward hacking trajectories, we modified Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) by injecting conflicting unit tests as tracers and applying a "resampling-until-hack" mechanism. Through controlled comparisons between monitors trained on synthetic versus in-the-wild data, we find that (1) synthetic-data-trained monitors fail to generalize to "in-the-wild" hacking, and (2) monitors trained on our "in-the-wild" trajectories demonstrate stronger generalizability to unseen hacking types. Our results indicate that synthetic reward hacking data may not fully reflect natural reward hacking behaviors, and that relying solely on synthetic data can lead to misleading conclusions. The codebase is available at https://github.com/LichenLillc/CoTMonitoring.git

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了代码生成中的奖励黑客（reward hacking）现象，发现合成数据与真实世界中的黑客行为存在显著差异，基于合成数据训练的监控器无法泛化到真实黑客行为，而基于真实轨迹训练的监控器具有更强的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有关于代码生成中奖励黑客的研究主要基于合成数据，但合成行为是否能真实代表RL训练中自然涌现的黑客行为尚不清楚，存在合成与真实世界之间的差异问题。
AI.method: 作者修改了GRPO算法，通过注入冲突单元测试作为追踪器，并采用"重新采样直到黑客"机制来大规模收集真实世界的奖励黑客轨迹。随后对比基于合成数据和真实数据训练的监控器的泛化性能。
AI.result: (1) 基于合成数据训练的监控器无法泛化到真实世界的黑客行为；(2) 基于真实轨迹训练的监控器对未见过的黑客类型表现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 合成奖励黑客数据可能无法充分反映自然奖励黑客行为，仅依赖合成数据可能导致误导性结论。

title: Improving Robustness of Tabular Retrieval via Representational Stability
summary: Transformer-based table retrieval systems flatten structured tables into token sequences, making retrieval sensitive to the choice of serialization even when table semantics remain unchanged. We show that semantically equivalent serializations, such as $\texttt{csv}$, $\texttt{tsv}$, $\texttt{html}$, $\texttt{markdown}$, and $\texttt{ddl}$, can produce substantially different embeddings and retrieval results across multiple benchmarks and retriever families. To address this instability, we treat serialization embedding as noisy views of a shared semantic signal and use its centroid as a canonical target representation. We show that centroid averaging suppresses format-specific variation and can recover the semantic content common to different serializations when format-induced shifts differ across tables. Empirically, centroid representations outrank individual formats in aggregate pairwise comparisons across $\texttt{MPNet}$, $\texttt{BGE-M3}$, $\texttt{ReasonIR}$, and $\texttt{SPLADE}$. We further introduce a lightweight residual bottleneck adapter on top of a frozen encoder that maps single-serialization embeddings towards centroid targets while preserving variance and enforcing covariance regularization. The adapter improves robustness for several dense retrievers, though gains are model-dependent and weaker for sparse lexical retrieval. These results identify serialization sensitivity as a major source of retrieval variance and show the promise of post hoc geometric correction for serialization-invariant table retrieval. Our code, datasets, and models are available at $\href{https://github.com/KBhandari11/Centroid-Aligned-Table-Retrieval}{https://github.com/KBhandari11/Centroid-Aligned-Table-Retrieval}$.

AI.tldr: 本文发现基于Transformer的表格检索系统对不同序列化格式（CSV、TSV、HTML等）敏感，导致检索结果不稳定。提出通过质心平均抑制格式噪声，并设计轻量级残差瓶颈适配器将单序列化嵌入映射到质心目标，提升检索鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有表格检索系统将结构化表格展平为token序列，但不同序列化格式（如CSV、TSV、HTML等）虽保持语义不变，却产生显著不同的嵌入和检索结果，导致检索不稳定。
AI.method: 1) 将不同序列化嵌入视为共享语义信号的噪声视图，用质心平均作为规范目标表示；2) 提出轻量级残差瓶颈适配器，叠加在冻结编码器上，将单序列化嵌入映射向质心，同时保留方差并施加协方差正则化。
AI.result: 质心表示在MPNet、BGE-M3、ReasonIR、SPLADE等多个检索器上优于单一格式。适配器提升密集检索器的鲁棒性，但对稀疏词法检索提升较弱，且效果依赖具体模型。
AI.conclusion: 序列化敏感是表格检索方差的主要来源，后验几何校正是一种有前景的序列化不变表格检索方案。

title: The Kerimov-Alekberli Model: An Information-Geometric Framework for Real-Time System Stability
summary: This study introduces the Kerimov-Alekberli model, a novel information-geometric framework that redefines AI safety by formally linking non-equilibrium thermodynamics to stochastic control for the ethical alignment of autonomous systems. By establishing a formal isomorphism between non-equilibrium thermodynamics and stochastic control, we define systemic anomalies as deviations from a Riemannian manifold. The model utilizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence as the primary metric, governed by a dynamic threshold derived from the Fisher Information Metric. We further ground this framework in the Landauer Principle, proving that adversarial perturbations perform measurable physical work by increasing the system's informational entropy. Validation on the NSL-KDD dataset and unmanned aerial vehicle trajectory simulations demonstrated that our model achieves effective real-time detection via the FPT trigger, with strong performance metrics (e.g., high accuracy and low FPR) on benchmark datasets. This study provides a rigorous physical foundation for AI safety, transitioning from heuristic, rule-based ethical frameworks to a thermodynamics-based stability paradigm by grounding ethical violations in quantifiable physical work and entropic information.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Kerimov-Alekberli模型，将非平衡热力学与随机控制形式化同构，基于黎曼流形偏差定义系统异常，利用KL散度和Fisher信息度量作为动态阈值，并通过Landauer原理证明对抗扰动执行可测量的物理功，在NSL-KDD数据集和无人机轨迹仿真中验证了实时检测的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全框架多基于启发式规则，缺乏严格的物理基础。作者希望通过热力学原理为AI伦理对齐提供可量化的物理支撑，将安全性问题从经验规则转向基于热力学的稳定性范式。
AI.method: 1. 建立非平衡热力学与随机控制的形式化同构关系；2. 将系统异常定义为黎曼流形上的偏差；3. 以KL散度为核心度量，Fisher信息度量导出动态阈值；4. 基于Landauer原理证明对抗扰动通过增加信息熵执行物理功；5. 在NSL-KDD数据集和无人机轨迹仿真中验证。
AI.result: 在NSL-KDD数据集和无人机轨迹仿真中实现高效实时检测（通过FPT触发），在基准数据集上取得高准确率和低假阳性率等强性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为AI安全提供了严格的物理基础，将伦理违规锚定在可量化的物理功和信息熵上，实现从启发式规则框架到热力学稳定性范式的转变。

title: Interpretable Physics-Informed Load Forecasting for U.S. Grid Resilience: SHAP-Guided Ensemble Validation in Hybrid Deep Learning Under Extreme Weather
summary: Accurate short-term electricity load forecasting is a cornerstone of U.S. grid reliability; however, prevailing deep learning models remain opaque, limiting operator trust during extreme weather. A unified, interpretable, physics-informed ensemble framework is proposed, integrating a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) branch for local feature extraction and a Transformer branch for long-range dependency modeling; the branches are fused through a validation-optimized weighted ensemble and regularized by a physics-informed loss derived from the piecewise parabolic temperature-demand relationship of the Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) system. Post-hoc interpretability is provided through SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) with the DeepExplainer backend, yielding global and event-level attributions. Using eight years of ERCOT hourly load data (2018-2025) fused with Automated Surface Observing System (ASOS) records from three Texas stations, the framework achieves 713 MW MAE, 812 MW RMSE, and 1.18% MAPE on the test window. For Hampel-flagged extreme events, MAPE falls by 20.7% relative to its Transformer branch and by 40.5% relative to its CNN branch; an ablation confirms that the parabolic and ramp constraints drive a 14.7% RMSE reduction. SHAP analysis reveals a regime shift: temperature dominates under normal operation, whereas wind speed and precipitation become more influential during cold fronts and heatwaves.

AI.tldr: 提出一种融合CNN与Transformer的物理信息集成框架，用于美国短期电力负荷预测，在ERCOT数据集上达到713 MW MAE，并通过SHAP揭示不同天气条件下的特征重要性转移。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在极端天气下可解释性不足，限制了电网调度员对模型预测的信任。亟需一种既准确又透明的预测框架。
AI.method: 构建双分支集成：CNN分支提取局部特征，Transformer分支建模长程依赖，通过验证集优化加权融合。采用基于ERCOT抛物线型温度-需求关系的物理信息损失进行正则化，并使用SHAP DeepExplainer提供后验可解释性。
AI.result: 测试集上MAE 713 MW，RMSE 812 MW，MAPE 1.18%。极端事件下MAPE相比Transformer分支降低20.7%，相比CNN分支降低40.5%。物理约束消融实验带来14.7%的RMSE下降。
AI.conclusion: 物理信息集成框架在准确性和可解释性上均优于单分支模型；SHAP分析揭示了从温度主导到风/降水主导的机制转变，有助于极端天气下的电网决策。

title: Distilling Self-Consistency into Verbal Confidence: A Pre-Registered Negative Result and Post-Hoc Rescue on Gemma 3 4B
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Pre-registered on OSF (https://osf.io/mpcr5). Code and data: https://github.com/synthiumjp/metacog-engineering
summary: Small instruct-tuned LLMs produce degenerate verbal confidence under minimal elicitation: ceiling rates above 95%, near-chance Type-2 AUROC, and Invalid validity profiles. We test whether confidence-conditioned supervised fine-tuning (CSFT) with self-consistency-derived targets can close the gap between internal information and verbal readout. A pre-registered Phase 0 protocol on Gemma 3 4B-it with a modal filter restricting training to items with correct modal answers produced a negative result: AUROC2 dropped from 0.554 to 0.509 due to label-entropy collapse in the training targets. An exploratory rescue removed the filter, training on all 2,000 calibration items. This produced a binary verbal correctness discriminator with AUROC2 = 0.774 on held-out TriviaQA, compressing a 10-sample self-consistency signal (AUROC2 = 0.999) into a single-pass readout exceeding logit entropy (0.701). The shuffled-target control showed no improvement (0.501). On MMLU, accuracy improved from 54.2% to 77.4% with the shuffled model at baseline (56.1%), supporting a target-dependent interpretation. The result is exploratory, binary rather than continuously calibrated, and observed at a single scale. It identifies two design lessons: confidence training requires label entropy, and correct targets regularise output format.

AI.tldr: 本文发现小型指令微调LLM在简单提示下会产生退化的口头置信度（>95%的置信率、接近随机的Type-2 AUROC、无效的效度曲线）。作者测试了基于自一致性目标的置信度条件监督微调（CSFT），在Gemma 3 4B-it上进行预注册的Phase 0实验。初始使用模态过滤器仅训练正确答案项，结果导致标签熵崩溃，AUROC2从0.554降至0.509；移除过滤器后，在所有2000个校准项上训练，二元口头正确性判别器在TriviaQA上达到AUROC2=0.774，超过了logit熵（0.701），而打乱目标对照组无改善（0.501）。在MMLU上，准确率从54.2%提升至77.4%（打乱模型基线56.1%）。结果仅为探索性、二元而非连续校准，并在单一尺度上观察。得出两个设计教训：置信训练需要标签熵，正确目标正则化输出格式。
AI.motivation: 小型指令微调LLM即使在最简单的置信度询问下也会产生严重退化的口头置信度表达（高置信率、低AUROC2、无效效度曲线），这表明模型内部的确定性信息与口头输出的置信度之间存在巨大鸿沟。作者试图通过置信度条件监督微调（CSFT）来缩小这一差距。
AI.method: 使用Gemma 3 4B-it模型进行置信度条件监督微调（CSFT），训练目标基于自一致性（self-consistency）生成。第一阶段使用模态过滤器仅保留模型回答正确且自一致性高的样本，导致标签熵崩溃；第二阶段移除过滤器，对所有2000个校准项进行训练，生成二元口头正确性判别器。对照组使用打乱目标训练。评估在TriviaQA和MMLU上进行。
AI.result: 初始带模态过滤器的CSFT导致AUROC2从0.554降至0.509（负结果）。移除过滤器后，口头置信判别器在TriviaQA上AUROC2达到0.774，超过logit熵（0.701）但仍低于10样本自一致性（0.999）。打乱目标对照组无改善（0.501）。在MMLU上，准确率从54.2%提升至77.4%（打乱模型基线56.1%）。
AI.conclusion: 口头置信度训练需要足够的标签熵，模态过滤器导致的标签同质化会损害训练效果。正确的（而非随机的）目标对输出格式有正则化作用。当前结果仅为探索性、二元判别而非连续校准，且仅在单一尺度上验证，需进一步研究。

title: SemML 2.0: Synthesizing Controllers for LTL
summary: Synthesizing a reactive system from specifications given in linear temporal logic (LTL) is a classical problem, finding its applications in safety-critical systems design. These systems are typically represented using either Mealy machines or AIGER circuits. We present the second version of SemML, which outperforms all state-of-the-art tools for finding either solution. Aside from implementing the classical automata-theoretic approach, our tool utilizes partial exploration and machine-learning guidance for obtaining solutions efficiently, and numerous heuristics and improvements of classic algorithms for extracting small representations of these solutions. We evaluate our tool against the existing state-of-the-art tools (in particular Strix, LtlSynt, and the previous version of SemML) on the dataset of the synthesis competition SYNTCOMP. We show that we solve significantly more instances and do so much faster than other tools, while maintaining state-of-the-art solution quality.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SemML工具的第二版，用于从LTL规范综合反应式系统。该工具在经典自动机理论方法基础上，引入了部分探索和机器学习引导策略，在SYNTCOMP数据集上相比Strix、LtlSynt等现有工具，能够解决更多实例且速度更快，同时保持领先的解质量。
AI.motivation: 安全关键系统设计需要高效的反应式系统综合工具，而现有工具在求解效率和解的表示质量上仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 结合经典自动机理论方法与部分探索（partial exploration）和机器学习引导（machine-learning guidance）策略，并采用多种启发式算法和改进的经典算法来提取小型表示。
AI.result: 在SYNTCOMP竞赛数据集上，相比Strix、LtlSynt以及SemML旧版本，SemML能够求解显著更多的实例，运行速度更快，且解的质量达到当前最优水平。
AI.conclusion: SemML v2在LTL综合任务中全面超越了现有最先进工具，证明了部分探索与机器学习引导在自动综合中的有效性。

title: Autocorrelation Reintroduces Spectral Bias in KANs for Time Series Forecasting
summary: Existing theory suggests that Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) can overcome the spectral bias commonly observed in neural networks under the assumption that inputs are statistically independent. However, this assumption does not hold in time series forecasting (TSF), where inputs are lagged observations with strong temporal autocorrelation. Through theoretical analysis and empirical validation, we obtain an unexpected finding: temporal autocorrelation reintroduces spectral bias in KANs, and the bias becomes increasingly pronounced as the degree of autocorrelation increases. This suggests that standard KANs may face substantial difficulties in TSF with strongly autocorrelated inputs. To address this problem, we introduce the Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) to reduce the correlations among the network inputs. As expected, experimental results reveal that DCT preprocessing substantially reduces the observed low-frequency preference in TSF. This result also corroborates that the spectral bias of KANs in TSF tasks is indeed induced by the autocorrelation among input variables.

AI.tldr: 本文发现时间序列预测中，输入变量的时序自相关会重新引入KAN网络的谱偏差，并且自相关越强偏差越明显。提出用离散余弦变换(DCT)预处理来降低输入相关性，实验验证了该方法能有效减少低频偏好，也证实了谱偏差确实由输入自相关导致。
AI.motivation: 现有理论认为KAN在统计独立输入下可克服谱偏差，但时间序列预测的输入（滞后观测值）具有强时序自相关，不满足独立性假设。作者想探究自相关是否导致KAN重新出现谱偏差，以及如何解决。
AI.method: 1) 理论分析自相关对KAN谱偏差的影响；2) 实证验证自相关程度与谱偏差的关系；3) 引入离散余弦变换(DCT)对输入进行预处理以降低变量间相关性。
AI.result: 1) 时间自相关确实重新引入了KAN的谱偏差，且自相关越强偏差越明显；2) DCT预处理显著降低了低频偏好；3) 这一结果反向验证了谱偏差的成因是输入变量的自相关。
AI.conclusion: 标准KAN在处理强自相关时间序列预测时面临困难，DCT预处理是一种有效的缓解方案。同时，该发现深化了对KAN谱偏差机制的理解。

title: PeeriScope: A Multi-Faceted Framework for Evaluating Peer Review Quality
summary: The increasing scale and variability of peer review in scholarly venues has created an urgent need for systematic, interpretable, and extensible tools to assess review quality. We present PeeriScope, a modular platform that integrates structured features, rubric-guided large language model assessments, and supervised prediction to evaluate peer review quality along multiple dimensions. Designed for openness and integration, PeeriScope provides both a public interface and a documented API, supporting practical deployment and research extensibility. The demonstration illustrates its use for reviewer self-assessment, editorial triage, and large-scale auditing, and it enables the continued development of quality evaluation methods within scientific peer review. PeeriScope is available both as a live demo at https://app.reviewer.ly/app/peeriscope and via API services at https://github.com/Reviewerly-Inc/Peeriscope.

AI.tldr: PeeriScope 是一个模块化平台，结合结构化特征、基于评分的LLM评估和监督预测，用于多维度评价同行评审质量，支持评审者自评、编辑筛选和大规模审计。
AI.motivation: 学术评审的规模和差异性日益增长，急需系统性、可解释且可扩展的工具来评估评审质量。
AI.method: 模块化平台，整合结构化特征、基于评分准则的大语言模型评估以及监督预测方法，提供公开界面和API。
AI.result: 平台支持评审者自我评估、编辑筛选和大规模审计三种应用场景，并提供在线演示和API服务。
AI.conclusion: PeeriScope 为科学同行评审中的质量评估方法提供了开放、可扩展的持续开发基础。

title: An Analysis of the Coordination Gap between Joint and Modular Learning for Job Shop Scheduling with Transportation Resources
comment: Supported by the Chips Joint Undertaking and its members, including top-up funding by National Authorities, within the Cynergy4MIE project (Grant Agreement No. 101140226). This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Efficient job-shop scheduling with transportation resources is critical for high-performance manufacturing. With the rise of "decentralized factories", multi-agent reinforcement learning has emerged as a promising approach for the combined scheduling of production and transportation tasks. Prior work has largely focused on developing novel cooperative architectures while overlooking the question of when joint training is necessary. Joint training denotes the simultaneous training of job and automatic guided vehicle scheduling agents, whereas modular training involves independently training each agent followed by post-hoc integration. In this study, we systematically investigate the conditions under which joint training is essential for optimal performance in the job-shop scheduling problem with transportation resources. Through a rigorous sensitivity analysis of resource scarcity and temporal dominance, we quantify the coordination gap -- the performance difference between these two training modalities. In our evaluation, the joint training can produce superior performance compared to the best-performing combinations of dispatching rules and modular training. However, the coordination gap advantage diminishes in bottleneck environments, particularly under severe transport and processing constraints. These findings indicate that modular training represents a viable alternative in environments where a single scheduling task dominates. Overall, our work provides practical guidance for selecting between training modalities based on environmental conditions, enabling decision-makers to optimize reinforcement learning-based scheduling performance.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了在车间调度问题中，联合训练（同时训练作业和AGV调度智能体）与模块化训练（独立训练后整合）的性能差异，发现联合训练在非瓶颈环境下表现更优，但在资源极度稀缺的瓶颈环境中优势减弱，为实际选择训练方式提供了指导。
AI.motivation: 先前的多智能体强化学习研究大多关注新型协作架构，但忽视了"何时需要联合训练"这一根本问题。本文旨在系统探究在车间调度问题中，联合训练相对于模块化训练在什么条件下是必要的。
AI.method: 通过灵敏度分析，系统考察了资源稀缺性和时间主导性两个维度，量化了联合训练与模块化训练之间的"协调差距"（性能差异）。
AI.result: 联合训练在非瓶颈环境下优于最优的调度规则组合和模块化训练；但在瓶颈环境（尤其是运输和加工资源严重受限）下，协调差距优势减弱。
AI.conclusion: 当单一调度任务主导时，模块化训练是可行的替代方案。研究为根据环境条件选择训练模式提供了实用指导，帮助决策者优化基于强化学习的调度性能。

title: When PINNs Go Wrong: Pseudo-Time Stepping Against Spurious Solutions
summary: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide a promising machine learning framework for solving partial differential equations, but their training often breaks down on challenging problems, sometimes converging to physically incorrect solutions despite achieving small residual losses. This failure, we argue, is not merely an optimization difficulty. Rather, it reflects a fundamental weakness of the empirical PDE residual loss, which can admit trivial or spurious solutions during training. From this perspective, we revisit pseudo-time stepping, a technique that has recently shown strong empirical success in PINNs. We show that its main benefit is not simply to ease optimization; instead, when combined with collocation-point resampling, it helps reveal and avoid spurious solutions. At the same time, we find that the effectiveness of pseudo-time stepping depends critically on the choice of step size, which cannot be tuned reliably from the training loss alone. To overcome this limitation, we propose an adaptive pseudo-time stepping strategy that selects the step size from a finite-difference surrogate of the local residual Jacobian, yielding the largest step permitted by local stability without per-problem tuning. Across a diverse set of PDE benchmarks, the proposed method consistently improves both accuracy and robustness. Together, these findings provide a clearer understanding of why PINNs fail and suggest a practical pathway toward more reliable physics-informed learning. All code and data accompanying this manuscript are available at https://github.com/sifanexisted/jaxpi2.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了PINNs训练失败的根本原因在于经验PDE残差损失本身存在伪解，而非单纯的优化困难。作者重新审视了伪时间步进技术，指出其与配置点重采样结合能有效避免伪解，但步长选择对训练损失不可靠。为此提出自适应伪时间步进策略，通过有限差分代理选择局部稳定最大步长，在多个PDE基准测试中显著提升了精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管PINNs在求解偏微分方程方面展现出潜力，但在具有挑战性的问题上经常训练失败，有时即使残差损失很小也会收敛到物理上错误的解。作者认为这一失败并非单纯的优化困难，而是反映了经验PDE残差损失的一个根本缺陷——它可能允许平凡解或伪解出现。
AI.method: 1) 重新审视伪时间步进技术，发现其主要优势在于与配置点重采样结合后能揭示并避免伪解；2) 指出伪时间步进的步长选择对训练损失不可靠；3) 提出自适应伪时间步进策略，通过有限差分代理从局部残差雅可比矩阵选取局部稳定允许的最大步长，无需针对每个问题调整超参数。
AI.result: 在多种PDE基准测试上，所提出的自适应伪时间步进方法一致地提升了模型的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为PINNs失败的原因提供了更清晰的理解，并提出了一条通往更可靠的物理信息学习的实用路径。

title: How Sensitive Are Safety Benchmarks to Judge Configuration Choices?
comment: Accepted by the 22nd International Conference on Intelligent Computing (ICIC 2026). Final version to appear in Springer CCIS
summary: Safety benchmarks such as HarmBench rely on LLM judges to classify model responses as harmful or safe, yet the judge configuration, namely the combination of judge model and judge prompt, is typically treated as a fixed implementation detail. We show this assumption is problematic. Using a 2 x 2 x 3 factorial design, we construct 12 judge prompt variants along two axes, evaluation structure and instruction framing, and apply them using a single judge model, Claude Sonnet 4-6, producing 28,812 judgments over six target models and 400 HarmBench behaviors. We find that prompt wording alone, holding the judge model fixed, shifts measured harmful-response rates by up to 24.2 percentage points, with even within-condition surface rewording causing swings of up to 20.1 percentage points. Model safety rankings are moderately unstable, with mean Kendall tau = 0.89, and category-level sensitivity ranges from 39.6 percentage points for copyright to 0 percentage points for harassment. A supplementary multi-judge experiment using three judge models shows that judge-model choice adds further variance. Our results demonstrate that judge prompt wording is a substantial, previously under-examined source of measurement variance in safety benchmarking.

AI.tldr: 安全基准测试中，LLM法官的提示词措辞变化可导致有害响应率测量偏差高达24.2个百分点，且模型安全排名不稳定（Kendall tau=0.89），提示词选择是先前被忽视的重要测量方差来源。
AI.motivation: 现有安全基准测试（如HarmBench）依赖LLM法官判断响应安全性，但法官配置（模型+提示词）被视为固定细节，未系统评估其对测量结果的影响。
AI.method: 采用2x2x3因子设计，构建12种法官提示词变体（沿评估结构和指令框架两个轴），使用单一法官模型Claude Sonnet 4-6对6个目标模型的400个HarmBench行为产生28,812条判断，并补充多法官模型实验。
AI.result: 提示词措辞导致有害响应率测量偏差高达24.2个百分点；同一条件下表面措辞修改引起20.1个百分点波动；模型安全排名中等不稳定（Kendall tau=0.89）；类别级灵敏度从版权39.6个百分点到骚扰0个百分点不等；法官模型选择增加额外方差。
AI.conclusion: 法官提示词措辞是安全基准测试中先前未被充分研究的、重大的测量方差来源。

title: Right-to-Act: A Pre-Execution Non-Compensatory Decision Protocol for AI Systems
comment: 14 pages, 3 figures. Introduces a pre-execution decision protocol for AI systems
summary: Current AI systems increasingly operate in contexts where their outputs directly trigger real-world actions. Most existing approaches to AI safety, risk management, and governance focus on post-hoc validation, probabilistic risk estimation, or certification of model behavior. However, these approaches implicitly assume that once a decision is produced, it is eligible for execution. In this work, we introduce the Right-to-Act protocol, a deterministic, non-compensatory pre-execution decision layer that evaluates whether an AI-generated decision is permitted to be realized at all. Unlike compensatory systems, where high-confidence signals can override failed conditions, the proposed framework enforces strict structural constraints: if any required condition is unmet, execution is halted or deferred. We formalize the distinction between compensatory and non-compensatory decision regimes and define a pre-execution legitimacy boundary. Through a scenario-based case study, we demonstrate how identical AI outputs can lead to divergent outcomes when evaluated under a Right-to-Act protocol, preserving reversibility and preventing premature or irreversible actions. The proposed approach reframes AI control from optimizing decisions to governing their admissibility, introducing a protocol-level abstraction that operates independently of model architecture or training methodology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"行动权协议"（Right-to-Act protocol），一种在AI决策执行前进行确定性、非补偿性审查的机制，只有所有必要条件均满足时才允许执行，否则暂停或终止。
AI.motivation: 现有AI安全方法（事后验证、风险评估、模型认证）隐含假设：AI生成的决策天然具有执行资格。然而在AI直接触发现实行动的场景中，这一假设存在重大风险。
AI.method: 定义了补偿性（compensatory）与非补偿性（non-compensatory）决策体制的区别，构建了执行前合法性边界（pre-execution legitimacy boundary），提出行动权协议作为独立于模型架构和训练方法的协议层抽象。
AI.result: 通过情景案例研究证明，相同的AI输出在行动权协议下可能产生截然不同的结果——保留可逆性，防止过早或不可逆的行动。
AI.conclusion: 将AI控制的焦点从"优化决策"转向"管辖决策的合法性"，引入了一种协议级别的安全抽象，与底层模型解耦。

title: The Pragmatic Persona: Discovering LLM Persona through Bridging Inference
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) reveal inherent and distinctive personas through dialogue. However, most existing persona discovery approaches rely on surface-level lexical or stylistic cues, treating dialogue as a flat sequence of tokens and failing to capture the deeper discourse-level structures that sustain persona consistency. To address this limitation, we propose a novel analytical framework that interprets LLM dialogue through bridging inference -- implicit conceptual relations that connect utterances via shared world knowledge and discourse coherence. By modeling these relations as structured knowledge graphs, our approach captures latent semantic links that govern how LLMs organize meaning across turns, enabling persona discovery at the level of discourse coherence rather than surface realizations. Experimental results across multiple reasoning backbones and target LLMs, ranging from small-scale models to 80B-parameter systems, demonstrate that bridging-inference graphs yield significantly stronger semantic coherence and more stable persona identification than frequency or style-based baselines. These results show that persona traits are consistently encoded in the structural organization of discourse rather than isolated lexical patterns. This work presents a systematic framework for probing, extracting, and visualizing latent LLM personas through the lens of Cognitive Discourse Theory, bridging computational linguistics, cognitive semantics, and persona reasoning in large language models. Codes are available at https://github.com/JiSoo-Yang/Persona_Bridging.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于桥接推理的框架，通过构建话语连贯性的知识图谱来发现LLM的内在人格，实验证明该方法比基于词汇或风格的方法更能稳定识别模型人格特征。
AI.motivation: 现有的人格发现方法仅依赖表层词汇或风格线索，将对话视为平面化的token序列，无法捕捉维持人格一致性的深层话语结构。
AI.method: 通过桥接推理（bridging inference）——利用共享世界知识和话语连贯性建立隐式概念关系，并将其建模为结构化知识图谱，在话语连贯层面而非表层实现中建模LLM的人格。
AI.result: 在多种推理主干和从小型到80B参数规模的目标LLM上，桥接推理图在语义连贯性和人格识别稳定性上显著优于基于频率或风格的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 人格特质一致地编码在话语的结构化组织之中，而非孤立的词汇模式中；该框架为认知话语理论下LLM人格的探测、提取和可视化提供了系统性方案。

title: Multi-Dimensional Evaluation of Sustainable City Trips with LLM-as-a-Judge and Human-in-the-Loop
summary: Evaluating nuanced conversational travel recommendations is challenging when human annotations are costly and standard metrics ignore stakeholder-centric goals. We study LLMs-as-Judges for sustainable city-trip lists across four dimensions -- relevance, diversity, sustainability, and popularity balance, and propose a three-phase calibration framework: (1) baseline judging with multiple LLMs, (2) expert evaluation to identify systematic misalignment, and (3) dimension-specific calibration via rules and few-shot examples. Across two recommendation settings, we observe model-specific biases and high dimension-level variance, even when judges agree on overall rankings. Calibration clarifies reasoning per dimension but exposes divergent interpretations of sustainability, highlighting the need for transparent, bias-aware LLM evaluation. Prompts and code are released for reproducibility: https://github.com/ashmibanerjee/trs-llm-calibration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个三阶段校准框架，利用LLM作为裁判评估可持续城市旅游推荐列表的质量，发现模型存在特定偏差和维度级差异，强调了透明和偏差感知的LLM评估必要性。
AI.motivation: 评估细粒度对话式旅行推荐具有挑战性，因为人工标注成本高且标准指标忽略了以利益相关者为中心的目标。因此需要一种可扩展且可靠的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出三阶段校准框架：(1) 使用多个LLM进行基线评判；(2) 专家评估识别系统性偏差；(3) 通过规则和少样本示例进行维度特定的校准。评估维度包括相关性、多样性、可持续性和流行度平衡。
AI.result: 发现模型存在特定偏差和高的维度级方差，即使裁判在整体排名上一致。校准虽能澄清每个维度的推理过程，但暴露出对"可持续性"的不同解读。
AI.conclusion: 需要透明且具有偏差感知能力的LLM评估方法，强调对维度级推理进行校准的重要性，并公开了提示词和代码以确保可复现性。

title: CAPSULE: Control-Theoretic Action Perturbations for Safe Uncertainty-Aware Reinforcement Learning
summary: Ensuring safe exploration in high-dimensional systems with unknown dynamics remains a significant challenge. Existing safe reinforcement learning methods often provide safety guarantees only in expectation, which can still lead to safety violations. Control-theoretic approaches, in contrast, offer hard constraint-based safety guarantees but typically assume access to known system dynamics or require accurate estimation of control-affine models. In this paper, we propose a safe reinforcement learning framework that learns a probabilistic control-affine dynamics model in an offline setting. The learned model is leveraged to explicitly construct control barrier functions (CBFs) that incorporate model uncertainty to provide conservative safety constraints. These CBF constraints are enforced through an online constraint-based action correction mechanism, enabling safe exploration without overly restricting task performance. Empirical evaluations on nonlinear, complex continuous-control benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves returns comparable to those of existing baselines while significantly reducing safety violations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种安全强化学习框架，通过离线学习概率控制仿射动力学模型并构建考虑模型不确定性的控制屏障函数（CBF），在在线动作修正中强制执行保守安全约束，从而在复杂高维连续控制任务中实现安全探索且不显著牺牲任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习方法仅在期望意义上提供安全保证，仍可能导致安全违规；而控制理论方法虽能提供硬约束安全保证，但通常假设已知系统动力学或需要精确估计控制仿射模型。因此需要一种能结合两者优势、在高维未知动力学系统中实现安全探索的方法。
AI.method: 离线学习概率控制仿射动力学模型 → 利用该模型显式构建考虑模型不确定性的控制屏障函数（CBF）→ 通过在线约束性动作修正机制强制执行保守安全约束，实现安全探索。
AI.result: 在非线性、复杂连续控制基准任务上，该方法在取得与现有基线相当的任务回报的同时，显著减少了安全违规次数。
AI.conclusion: 通过概率建模与CBF结合，能够在不严重限制任务性能的前提下实现高维未知动力学系统的安全探索，有效弥合了期望安全保证与硬约束安全保证之间的差距。

title: BiMol-Diff: A Unified Diffusion Framework for Molecular Generation and Captioning
summary: Bridging molecular structures and natural language is essential for controllable design. Autoregressive models struggle with long-range dependencies, while standard diffusion processes apply uniform corruption across positions, which can distort structurally informative tokens. We present BiMol-Diff, a unified diffusion framework for the paired tasks of text-conditioned molecule generation and molecule captioning. Our key component is a token-aware noise schedule that assigns position-dependent corruption based on token recovery difficulty, preserving harder-to-recover substructures during the forward process. On ChEBI-20 and M3-20M, BiMol-Diff improves molecule reconstruction with a 15.4% relative gain in Exact Match and achieves strong captioning results, attaining best BLEU and BERTScore among compared baselines. These results indicate token-aware noising improves fidelity in molecular structure-language modelling.

AI.tldr: BiMol-Diff是一个统一的扩散框架，用于分子结构和自然语言之间的双向任务（文本生成分子和分子描述生成），其核心是提出了基于token恢复难度的位置感知噪声调度，在ChEBI-20和M3-20M数据集上，分子重建的Exact Match提升了15.4%，并在分子描述任务上取得了最优的BLEU和BERTScore。
AI.motivation: 现有方法中，自回归模型难以处理长程依赖，而标准扩散过程对所有位置的噪声处理是均匀的，这会破坏结构信息丰富的token，导致分子结构建模不准确。
AI.method: 提出BiMol-Diff统一扩散框架，核心是token-aware噪声调度，根据token恢复难度分配位置相关的噪声，在前向过程中保留更难恢复的子结构。
AI.result: 在ChEBI-20和M3-20M上，分子重建Exact Match相对提升15.4%；分子描述生成任务达到最优BLEU和BERTScore。
AI.conclusion: token-aware的噪声策略能够提升分子结构-语言建模的保真度，证明位置感知噪声在分子扩散模型中的有效性。

title: Credal Concept Bottleneck Models for Epistemic-Aleatoric Uncertainty Decomposition
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) predict through human-interpretable concepts, but they typically output point concept probabilities that conflate epistemic uncertainty (reducible model underspecification) with aleatoric uncertainty (irreducible input ambiguity). This makes concept-level uncertainty hard to interpret and, more importantly, hard to act upon. We introduce CREDENCE (Credal Ensemble Concept Estimation), a CBM framework that decomposes concept uncertainty by construction. CREDENCE represents each concept as a credal prediction (a probability interval), derives epistemic uncertainty from disagreement across diverse concept heads, and estimates aleatoric uncertainty via a dedicated ambiguity output trained to match annotator disagreement when available. The resulting signals support prescriptive decisions: automate low-uncertainty cases, prioritize data collection for high-epistemic cases, route high-aleatoric cases to human review, and abstain when both are high. Across several tasks, we show that epistemic uncertainty is positively associated with prediction errors, whereas aleatoric uncertainty closely tracks annotator disagreement, providing guidance beyond error correlation. Our implementation is available at the following link: https://github.com/Tankiit/Credal_Sets/tree/ensemble-credal-cbm

AI.tldr: 提出CREDENCE框架，通过信度预测集合将概念瓶颈模型中的认知不确定性和偶然不确定性分离，支持自动化、数据收集、人工审查等决策。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型输出点概率，混淆了认知不确定性（模型欠拟合）和偶然不确定性（输入歧义），导致概念级不确定性难以解释和操作。
AI.method: 将每个概念表示为概率区间（信度预测），通过多样概念头之间的分歧导出认知不确定性，通过专用模糊输出（匹配标注者分歧）估计偶然不确定性。
AI.result: 认知不确定性与预测错误正相关，偶然不确定性与标注者分歧紧密匹配，为低不确定性自动化、高认知不确定性数据收集、高偶然性人工审查等决策提供指导。
AI.conclusion: CREDENCE通过明确分解两类不确定性，提升了CBM的可解释性和实用性，支持更可靠的预测和主动式决策。

title: Hamiltonian Graph Inference Networks: Joint structure discovery and dynamics prediction for lattice Hamiltonian systems from trajectory data
summary: Lattice Hamiltonian systems underpin models across condensed matter, nonlinear optics, and biophysics, yet learning their dynamics from data is obstructed by two unknowns: the interaction topology and whether node dynamics are homogeneous. Existing graph-based approaches either assume the graph is given or, as in $α$-separable graph Hamiltonian network, infer it only for separable Hamiltonians with homogeneous node dynamics. We introduce the Hamiltonian Graph Inference Network (HGIN), which jointly recovers the interaction graph and predicts long-time trajectories from state data alone, for both separable and non-separable Hamiltonians and under heterogeneous node dynamics. HGIN couples a structure-learning module -- a learnable weighted adjacency matrix trained under a Hamilton's-equations loss -- with a trajectory-prediction module that partitions edges into physically distinct subgraphs via $k$-means clustering, assigning each subgraph its own encoder and thereby breaking the parameter-sharing bottleneck of conventional GNNs. On three benchmarks -- a Klein--Gordon lattice with long-range interactions and two discrete nonlinear Schrödinger lattices (homogeneous and heterogeneous) -- HGIN reduces long-time energy prediction error and trajectory prediction error by six to thirteen orders of magnitude relative to baselines. A symmetry argument on the Hamiltonian loss further shows that the learned weights encode the parity of the underlying pair potential, yielding an interpretable readout of the system's interaction structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HGIN，一种能从状态数据中同时恢复相互作用图并预测长时间轨迹的哈密顿图推断网络，适用于可分离/非可分离哈密顿量及异质节点动力学，在三个基准上将能量和轨迹预测误差降低了6-13个数量级。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于图的方法要么假设图是已知的，要么（如α-分离图哈密顿网络）仅适用于具有同质节点动力学的可分离哈密顿量。因此需要一种能从状态数据中同时恢复相互作用拓扑并预测长时间轨迹的方法，且支持不可分离哈密顿量和异质节点动力学。
AI.method: HGIN包含两个模块：(1) 结构学习模块——在哈密顿方程损失下训练可学习的加权邻接矩阵来推断图结构；(2) 轨迹预测模块——通过k-means聚类将边划分为物理上不同的子图，为每个子图分配独立的编码器，打破传统GNN的参数共享瓶颈。
AI.result: 在Klein-Gordon晶格、同质和异质离散非线性薛定谔晶格三个基准上，HGIN的长时能量预测误差和轨迹预测误差相比基线降低了6到13个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 学习到的权重编码了底层对势的宇称性，能对系统的相互作用结构进行可解释的解读；哈密顿损失具有对称性，为系统的相互作用结构提供了可解释性。

title: Factual and Edit-Sensitive Graph-to-Sequence Generation via Graph-Aware Adaptive Noising
summary: Fine-tuned autoregressive models for graph-to-sequence generation (G2S) often struggle with factual grounding and edit sensitivity. To tackle these issues, we propose a non-autoregressive diffusion framework that generates text by iterative refinement conditioned on an input graph, named as Diffusion Language Model for Graphs (DLM4G). By aligning graph components (entities/relations) with their corresponding sequence tokens, DLM4G employs an adaptive noising strategy. The proposed strategy uses per-token denoising error as a signal to adaptively modulate noise on entity and relation tokens, improving preservation of graph structure and enabling localized updates under graph edits. Evaluated on three datasets, DLM4G consistently outperforms competitive G2S diffusion baselines trained on identical splits across both surface-form and embedding-based metrics. DLM4G further exceeds fine-tuned autoregressive baselines up to 12x larger (e.g., T5-Large) and is competitive with zero-shot LLM transfer baselines up to 127x larger. Relative to the strongest fine-tuned PLM baseline, DLM4G improves factual grounding (FGT@0.5) by +5.16% and edit sensitivity (ESR) by +7.9%; compared to the best diffusion baseline, it yields gains of +3.75% in FGT@0.5 and +23.6% in ESR. We additionally demonstrate applicability beyond textual graphs through experiments on molecule captioning, indicating the method's generality for scientific G2S generation.

AI.tldr: 提出非自回归扩散框架DLM4G，通过自适应噪声策略实现图到序列生成，在事实基础、编辑敏感性及多项指标上显著优于自回归模型和扩散基线，并适用于分子标注等科学任务。
AI.motivation: 自回归模型在图到序列生成中面临事实基础不准确和编辑敏感性差的问题，亟需一种能更好保持图结构信息、支持局部更新且对编辑鲁棒的生成方法。
AI.method: 提出非自回归扩散语言模型DLM4G：通过将图组件（实体/关系）与序列令牌对齐，设计自适应加噪策略，利用逐令牌去噪误差信号自适应调节实体和关系令牌上的噪声强度，以保留图结构并实现图编辑下的局部更新。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上，DLM4G全面优于同等条件下的扩散基线；超越参数大12倍的微调自回归模型（如T5-Large）；与参数大127倍的零样本LLM基线竞争力相当；在FGT@0.5和ESR上分别比最强微调PLM提升5.16%和7.9%，比最优扩散基线提升3.75%和23.6%。分子标注实验验证了方法的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 非自回归扩散框架能有效解决图到序列生成中的事实基础与编辑敏感性问题，且具备跨领域（包括科学文本生成）的泛化能力。

title: Explanation Quality Assessment as Ranking with Listwise Rewards
summary: We reformulate explanation quality assessment as a ranking problem rather than a generation problem. Instead of optimizing models to produce a single "best" explanation token-by-token, we train reward models to discriminate among multiple candidate explanations and learn their relative quality. Concretely, we construct per-instance candidate sets with graded quality levels and train listwise and pairwise ranking models (ListNet, LambdaRank, RankNet) to preserve ordinal structure and avoid score compression typical of pointwise regression or binary preference objectives. We observe three findings: First, ranking losses consistently outperform regression on score separation across all domains tested. Second, the optimal ranking loss depends on data characteristics: listwise objectives excel with well-separated quality tiers, while pairwise methods are more robust to noisy natural annotations. Third, when trained on carefully curated and well-structured data, small encoder models can match models that are orders of magnitude larger, suggesting that data quality matters more than model scale. Finally, when used as rewards in policy optimization, ranking-based scores enable stable convergence in settings where regression-based rewards fail entirely. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/Tankiit/PPO_Learning_to_rank

AI.tldr: 本文提出将解释质量评估重构为排序问题而非生成问题，训练奖励模型对多个候选解释进行相对质量排序，并发现排序损失优于回归方法，最佳排序损失取决于数据特征，小模型在高质量数据下可媲美大模型，且基于排序的奖励在策略优化中表现更稳定。
AI.motivation: 传统的解释质量评估方法通常将其视为生成问题（逐token优化生成单一"最佳"解释），但这种方式存在局限。作者希望将评估重构为排序问题，通过学习多个候选解释的相对质量来更好地评估解释质量。
AI.method: 构建每个实例的多级质量候选集，使用ListNet、LambdaRank、RankNet等列表级和成对级排序模型进行训练，以保持序数结构并避免逐点回归或二元偏好目标中的分数压缩问题。
AI.result: 1) 排序损失在所有测试领域上一致优于回归方法的分数分离效果；2) 最优排序损失取决于数据特征：列表级目标在质量层级分明的数据上更优，成对级方法对含噪自然标注更鲁棒；3) 经过精心策划的高质量数据训练的小编码器模型可与大数个数量级的模型媲美；4) 基于排序的分数在策略优化中可使收敛稳定，而回归奖励则完全失败。
AI.conclusion: 数据质量比模型规模更重要，将评估问题转化为排序问题能有效提升解释质量评估的性能，并在强化学习场景中提供更稳定的奖励信号。

title: IRIS: Interleaved Reinforcement with Incremental Staged Curriculum for Cross-Lingual Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Curriculum learning helps language models tackle complex reasoning by gradually increasing task difficulty. However, it often fails to generate consistent step-by-step reasoning, especially in multilingual and low-resource settings where cross-lingual transfer from English to Indian languages remains limited. We propose IRIS: Interleaved Reinforcement with Incremental Staged Curriculum, a two-axis framework that combines Supervised Fine-Tuning on progressively harder problems (vertical axis) with Reverse Curriculum Reinforcement Learning to reduce reliance on step-by-step guidance (horizontal axis). We design a composite reward combining correctness, step-wise alignment, continuity, and numeric incentives, optimized via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We release CL-Math, a dataset of 29k problems with step-level annotations in English, Hindi, and Marathi. Across standard benchmarks and curated multilingual test sets, IRIS consistently improves performance, with strong results on math reasoning tasks and substantial gains in low-resource and bilingual settings, alongside modest improvements in high-resource languages.

AI.tldr: 提出IRIS框架，结合逐步增难的监督微调（垂直轴）和反向课程强化学习（水平轴），通过GRPO优化复合奖励（正确性、步骤对齐、连续性、数值激励），在英语、印地语和马拉地语的数学推理任务上显著提升低资源和双语场景性能。
AI.motivation: 课程学习在复杂推理任务中难以生成一致的逐步推理，特别是在多语言和低资源场景下，从英语到印度语言的跨语言迁移效果有限。
AI.method: 提出IRIS双轴框架：1）垂直轴：在逐步变难的问题上进行监督微调；2）水平轴：反向课程强化学习减少对逐步指导的依赖。使用GRPO优化包含正确性、步骤对齐、连续性和数值激励的复合奖励函数。并发布CL-Math数据集（29k问题，含英语/印地语/马拉地语的步骤级标注）。
AI.result: 在标准基准和 curated 多语言测试集上，IRIS一致提升性能，数学推理任务表现强劲，低资源和双语场景有显著提升，高资源语言也有适度改善。
AI.conclusion: IRIS框架有效解决了课程学习在多语言数学推理中的不一致问题，通过双轴课程设计和复合奖励优化，显著增强了低资源语言的推理能力，验证了跨语言可迁移的逐步推理训练范式。

title: Adaptive ToR: Complexity-Aware Tree-Based Retrieval for Pareto-Optimal Multi-Intent NLU
summary: Multi-intent natural language understanding requires retrieval systems that simultaneously achieve high accuracy and computational efficiency, yet existing approaches apply either uniform single-step retrieval that compromises recall or fixed-depth hierarchical decomposition that introduces excessive latency regardless of query complexity. This paper proposes Adaptive Tree-of-Retrieval (Adaptive ToR), a complexity-aware retrieval architecture that dynamically configures retrieval topology based on query characteristics. The system integrates four components: (1) a Query Tree Classifier computing a Query Complexity Index from weighted linguistic signals to route queries to either a rapid single-step path or an adaptive-depth hierarchical path; (2) a Tree-Based Retrieval module that recursively decomposes complex queries into focused sub-queries calibrated to predicted complexity; (3) an Adaptive Pruning Module employing two-stage filtering combining quantitative similarity gating with semantic relevance evaluation to suppress exponential node growth; and (4) a Retrieval Reranking Layer featuring a deduplicator-first pipeline and global LLM rescoring for production efficiency. Evaluation on the NLU++ benchmark (2,693 multi-intent queries across Banking and Hotel domains) yields 29.07% Subset Accuracy and 71.79% Micro-F1, a 9.7% relative improvement over fixed-depth baselines, while reducing latency by 37.6%, LLM invocations by 43.0%, and token consumption by 9.8%. Depth-wise analysis reveals that 26.92% of queries resolve within three seconds (2.45s mean latency) via single-step routing (d=0: 37.9% Subset Accuracy, 74.8% Micro-F1), while token consumption scales by 4.9x across depths, validating complexity-aware resource allocation and establishing Pareto-optimal balance across accuracy, latency, and computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出Adaptive Tree-of-Retrieval (Adaptive ToR)，一种复杂度感知的检索架构，根据查询特征动态配置检索拓扑，在NLU++基准上实现9.7%的相对准确率提升，同时降低37.6%延迟和43.0%的LLM调用次数。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么采用统一的单步检索牺牲召回率，要么采用固定深度的层次分解带来与查询复杂度无关的过多延迟，缺乏根据查询复杂度动态调整检索策略的机制。
AI.method: 提出Adaptive ToR架构，包含四个组件：(1) 查询树分类器，计算查询复杂度指标路由查询；(2) 树基检索模块，递归分解复杂查询为聚焦子查询；(3) 自适应剪枝模块，两阶段过滤抑制指数级节点增长；(4) 检索重排序层，去重器优先+全局LLM重打分。
AI.result: 在NLU++基准上，Subset Accuracy达29.07%，Micro-F1达71.79%，较固定深度基线提升9.7%。延迟降低37.6%，LLM调用减少43.0%，token消耗减少9.8%。26.92%的查询在3秒内通过单步路由解决。
AI.conclusion: 验证了复杂度感知的资源分配策略的有效性，在准确率、延迟和计算效率之间建立了帕累托最优平衡。

title: Can an MLP Absorb Its Own Skip Connection?
summary: We study when a skip connection around a single-hidden-layer MLP can be absorbed into a residual-free MLP of the same width. We first show that for any architecture whose skip branch is an invertible linear map (including Hyper-Connections and their manifold-constrained variants), the problem reduces to the identity skip case. For homogeneous activations of degree $k \neq 1$, such as ReLU$^2$ and ReGLU, absorption is unconditionally impossible by a degree argument. For gated activations whose gate is differentiable at the origin with $g(0) = 0$, including SwiGLU and GeGLU, a linearization argument gives the same conclusion. These impossibility results extend to arbitrary depth: a composition of $L$ residual blocks using such activations cannot be replicated by any composition of $L$ residual-free blocks of the same width. For ungated ReLU and GELU, the situation is richer. For generic weight matrices, absorption holds at the single-block level if and only if there exists an index set $S$ of size at least $d$ such that $W_{\mathrm{down}}[:,S]\,W_{\mathrm{up}}[S,:] = -I_d$. This condition is non-generic (it fails with probability one under continuous weight distributions), so skip-connected and residual-free MLPs of the same width represent generically disjoint function classes. Whether this disjointness persists for deep compositions of ReLU or GELU blocks remains open.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了单层MLP中跳跃连接能否被同宽度无跳跃连接MLP吸收的问题。对于可逆线性跳跃连接、k≠1的齐次激活函数（如ReLU²、ReGLU）以及门控激活函数（如SwiGLU、GeGLU），吸收是不可能的；对于ReLU和GELU，吸收仅在特定非通有条件下成立，因此两类网络在通有情况下表示不相交的函类。
AI.motivation: 理解跳跃连接（包括Hyper-Connections等变体）是否本质上扩展了MLP的表达能力，以及何种条件下其效果可被无跳跃连接的网络所吸收或复制。
AI.method: 采用代数与分析方法：对可逆线性跳跃连接，归约到恒等跳跃情形；对齐次激活函数用度数论证；对门控激活函数用原点线性化论证；对ReLU/GELU用矩阵条件分析。
AI.result: 1) 可逆线性跳跃连接可归约为恒等跳跃。2) k≠1的齐次激活函数（ReLU²、ReGLU）无条件不可吸收。3) 门控激活函数（SwiGLU、GeGLU）也不可吸收。4) ReLU/GELU仅在存在大小≥d的索引集S满足特定矩阵条件时才可吸收，该条件非通有（概率1不成立）。5) 前三种不可吸收性可推广到任意深度。
AI.conclusion: 跳跃连接在大多数常见激活函数下本质地扩展了单层MLP的表达能力，不能简单地被同宽度无跳跃连接MLP吸收；但对于ReLU/GELU深度组合是否保持不相交性尚未解决。

title: Psychologically-Grounded Graph Modeling for Interpretable Depression Detection
summary: Automatic depression detection from conversational interactions holds significant promise for scalable screening but remains hindered by severe data scarcity and a lack of clinical interpretability. Existing approaches typically rely on black-box deep learning architectures that struggle to model the subtle, temporal evolution of depressive symptoms or account for participant-specific heterogeneity. In this work, we propose PsyGAT (Psychological Graph Attention Network), a psychologically grounded framework that models conversational sessions as dynamic temporal graphs. We introduce Psychological Expression Units (PEUs) to explicitly encode utterance-level clinical evidence, structuring the session graph to capture transitions in psychological states rather than mere semantic dependencies. To address the critical class imbalance in depression datasets, we employ clinically approved persona-based data augmentation, enable robust model learning. Additionally, we integrate session-level personality context directly into the graph structure to disentangle trait-based behavior from acute depressive symptoms. PsyGAT achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing both strong graph-based baselines and closed-source LLMs like GPT-5, achieving 89.99 and 71.37 Macro F1 scores in DAIC-WoZ and E-DAIC, respectively. We further introduce Causal-PsyGAT, an interpretability module that identifies symptom triggers. Experiments show a 20% improvement in MRR for identifying causal indicators, effectively bridging the gap between depression monitoring and clinical explainability. The full augmented dataset is publicly available at https://doi.org/10.6084/m9.figshare.31801921.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 PsyGAT，一种心理图注意力网络，通过将对话建模为动态时序图、引入心理表达单元（PEUs）编码临床证据、采用基于人设的数据增强解决类别不平衡，并在图结构中整合会话级人格上下文，在抑郁检测任务上达到 SOTA（DAIC-WoZ 89.99 Macro F1）。同时提出可解释模块 Causal-PsyGAT，因果指标识别 MRR 提升 20%。
AI.motivation: 现有抑郁检测方法面临三大挑战：1）数据严重稀缺；2）缺乏临床可解释性；3）难以建模抑郁症状的细微时序演变和个体间异质性。现有黑盒深度学习架构无法捕捉心理状态的动态过渡，也无法区分特质性行为与急性抑郁症状。
AI.method: 1）将对话会话建模为**动态时序图**，以 PEUs（心理表达单元）作为节点编码话语级别的临床证据，捕获心理状态的过渡而非语义依赖；2）采用**基于人设的数据增强**（clinically approved persona-based augmentation）缓解类别不平衡；3）在图中**整合会话级人格上下文**，分离特质行为与抑郁症状；4）提出 **Causal-PsyGAT** 可解释模块，识别症状触发因素。
AI.result: 在 DAIC-WoZ 和 E-DAIC 数据集上分别达到 89.99 和 71.37 Macro F1，超越强图基线及闭源 LLM（GPT-5）。Causal-PsyGAT 在因果指标识别上 MRR 提升 20%。
AI.conclusion: PsyGAT 通过心理驱动图建模有效弥合了抑郁监测与临床可解释性之间的鸿沟，验证了在数据稀缺场景下将心理学理论融入深度学习架构的可行性与优越性。

title: Generative Design of a Gas Turbine Combustor Using Invertible Neural Networks
summary: The need to burn 100% H2 in high efficient gas turbines featuring low NOx combustion in premix mode require the complete redesign of the combustion system to ensure stable operation without any flashback. Since all engine frames featuring a power range from 4 MW up to 600 MW are affected, a huge design effort is expected. To reduce this effort, especially to transfer knowledge between the different engine classes, generative design methods using latest AI technology will provide promising potential. In this work, this challenge is approached utilizing the current advances in generative artificial intelligence. We train an Invertible Neural Network (INN) on an expandable database of geometrically parameterized combustor designs with simulated performance labels. Utilizing the INN in its inverse direction, multiple design proposals are generated which fulfill specified performance labels.

AI.tldr: 本文利用可逆神经网络(INN)对燃气轮机燃烧室进行生成式设计，以满足100%氢气燃烧的低NOx排放要求，能够根据目标性能参数反向生成多种设计提案。
AI.motivation: 传统燃气轮机无法直接燃烧100%氢气，需要重新设计燃烧系统以避免回火问题，但不同功率等级(4MW-600MW)的发动机都需要重新设计，工作量巨大。作者希望利用AI生成式设计方法减少设计工作量，并在不同发动机类别间传递知识。
AI.method: 使用可逆神经网络(INN)在可扩展的参数化燃烧室几何设计数据库上进行训练，数据库包含模拟性能标签。训练后利用INN的反向推理方向，根据指定的性能目标生成多个符合要求的设计方案。
AI.result: 成功训练了INN模型，并能够通过反向推理生成多种满足指定性能标签的燃烧室设计提案。
AI.conclusion: 基于INN的生成式设计方法有望大幅减少氢气燃气轮机燃烧系统的设计工作量，实现跨发动机类别的知识迁移。

title: OptProver: Bridging Olympiad and Optimization through Continual Training in Formal Theorem Proving
summary: Recent advances in formal theorem proving have focused on Olympiad-level mathematics, leaving undergraduate domains largely unexplored. Optimization, fundamental to machine learning, operations research, and scientific computing, remains underserved by existing provers. Its reliance on domain-specific formalisms (convexity, optimality conditions, and algorithmic analysis) creates significant distribution shift, making naive domain transfer ineffective. We present OptProver, a trained model that achieves robust transfer from Olympiad to undergraduate optimization. Starting from a strong Olympiad-level prover, our pipeline mitigates distribution shift through two key innovations. First, we employ large-scale optimization-focused data curation via expert iteration. Second, we introduce a specialized preference learning objective that integrates perplexity-weighted optimization with a mechanism to penalize valid but non-progressing proof steps. This not only addresses distribution shifts but also guides the search toward efficient trajectories. To enable rigorous evaluation, we construct a novel benchmark in Lean 4 focused on optimization. On this benchmark, OptProver achieves state-of-the-art Pass@1 and Pass@32 among comparably sized models while maintaining competitive performance on general theorem-proving tasks, demonstrating effective domain transfer without catastrophic forgetting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OptProver，通过专家迭代数据筛选和偏好学习目标，将从奥数级别定理证明器迁移至本科优化领域，在优化基准上取得SOTA性能且不遗忘通用定理证明能力。
AI.motivation: 现有形式化定理证明聚焦于奥赛级数学，忽略了本科级别的优化领域；优化领域依赖领域特定形式体系（凸性、最优性条件、算法分析），与奥赛级数学存在显著分布偏移，简单迁移无效。
AI.method: 基于强奥赛级证明器，通过大规模优化数据专家迭代筛选，并提出偏好学习目标（融合困惑度加权与惩罚有效但无进展证明步骤的机制），缓解分布偏移并引导高效搜索轨迹。
AI.result: 在Lean 4优化基准上，OptProver在同等规模模型中达到SOTA的Pass@1和Pass@32，同时在通用定理证明任务上保持竞争力，实现有效领域迁移而无灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: OptProver成功将定理证明能力从奥赛级迁移至本科优化领域，证明了数据筛选与偏好学习相结合能有效克服领域偏移问题。

title: AdapTime: Enabling Adaptive Temporal Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Large language models have demonstrated strong reasoning capabilities in general knowledge question answering. However, their ability to handle temporal information remains limited. To address this limitation, existing approaches often involve external tools or manual verification and are tailored to specific scenarios, leading to poor generalizability. Moreover, these methods apply a fixed pipeline to all questions, overlooking the fact that different types of temporal questions require distinct reasoning strategies, which leads to unnecessary processing for simple cases and inadequate reasoning for complex ones. To this end, we propose AdapTime, an adaptive temporal reasoning method that dynamically executes reasoning steps based on the input context. Specifically, it involves three temporal reasoning actions: reformulate, rewrite and review, with an LLM planner guiding the reasoning process. AdapTime integrates seamlessly with state-of-the-art LLMs and significantly enhances their temporal reasoning capabilities without relying on external support. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: AdapTime 是一种自适应时序推理方法，通过动态执行"重构、重写、复查"三种推理动作，由LLM规划器引导推理过程，显著增强大语言模型的时序推理能力，无需外部工具支持。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在处理时序信息时能力有限，已有方法依赖外部工具或人工验证，且对不同类型时序问题采用固定流程，导致简单问题处理冗余、复杂问题推理不足，缺乏泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出AdapTime自适应时序推理方法，包含三种推理动作：reformulate（重构）、rewrite（重写）、review（复查），由LLM规划器根据输入上下文动态引导推理过程，无需外部工具支持。
AI.result: 大量实验表明该方法能有效增强大语言模型的时序推理能力，与最先进LLM无缝集成并取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: AdapTime通过自适应动态推理策略克服了固定流程的局限性，无需外部支持即可提升LLM时序推理能力，具有良好的泛化性和有效性。

title: Certified geometric robustness -- Super-DeepG
comment: ICCPS / HSCC 2026, CPS IoT Week, May 2026, Saint Malo (Palais du Grand Large), France
summary: Safety-critical applications are required to perform as expected in normal operations. Image processing functions are often required to be insensitive to small geometric perturbations such as rotation, scaling, shearing or translation. This paper addresses the formal verification of neural networks against geometric perturbations on their image dataset. Our method Super-DeepG improves the reasoning used in linear relaxation techniques and Lipschitz optimization, and provides an implementation that leverages GPU hardware. By doing so, Super-DeepG achieves both precision and computational efficiency of robustness certification, to an extent that outperforms prior work. Super-DeepG is shared as an open-source tool on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Super-DeepG方法，通过改进线性松弛技术和Lipschitz优化，利用GPU硬件加速，实现了对神经网络在几何扰动下的高效、精确的鲁棒性形式化验证。
AI.motivation: 安全关键应用中的图像处理函数需要对几何扰动（旋转、缩放、剪切、平移）不敏感，亟需对神经网络进行针对几何扰动的形式化验证。
AI.method: 改进线性松弛技术与Lipschitz优化相结合的推理方法，并利用GPU硬件实现加速。
AI.result: 在鲁棒性认证的精度和计算效率上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Super-DeepG是一个开源工具，能够高效且精确地验证神经网络对几何扰动的鲁棒性。

title: Quasi-Equivariant Metanetworks
summary: Metanetworks are neural architectures designed to operate directly on pretrained weights to perform downstream tasks. However, the parameter space serves only as a proxy for the underlying function class, and the parameter-function mapping is inherently non-injective: distinct parameter configurations may yield identical input-output behaviors. As a result, metanetworks that rely solely on raw parameters risk overlooking the intrinsic symmetries of the architecture. Reasoning about functional identity is therefore essential for effective metanetwork design, motivating the development of equivariant metanetworks, which incorporate equivariance principles to respect architectural symmetries. Existing approaches, however, typically enforce strict equivariance, which imposes rigid constraints and often leads to sparse and less expressive models. To address this limitation, we introduce the novel concept of quasi-equivariance, which allows metanetworks to move beyond the rigidity of strict equivariance while still preserving functional identity. We lay down a principled basis for this framework and demonstrate its broad applicability across diverse neural architectures, including feedforward, convolutional, and transformer networks. Through empirical evaluation, we show that quasi-equivariant metanetworks achieve good trade-offs between symmetry preservation and representational expressivity. These findings advance the theoretical understanding of weight-space learning and provide a principled foundation for the design of more expressive and functionally robust metanetworks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"准等变性"（quasi-equivariance）概念，让元网络在尊重参数-函数映射中对称性的同时，避免严格等变性导致的稀疏和低表达力问题，在多种神经网络架构上实现了对称保持与表达能力的更好权衡。
AI.motivation: 元网络直接在预训练权重上进行下游任务，但参数空间与函数空间之间存在非单射映射（不同参数配置可能对应相同输入-输出行为），仅依赖原始参数会忽略架构内在对称性。现有严格等变元网络约束过强、模型稀疏且表达力不足。
AI.method: 提出准等变性（quasi-equivariance）概念，允许元网络在保持功能一致性的同时，突破严格等变的刚性约束，并建立该框架的理论基础。
AI.result: 在前馈网络、卷积网络和Transformer等多种架构上实验验证，准等变元网络在对称保持与表达力之间取得了良好的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 准等变性为设计更具表达能力且功能鲁棒的元网络提供了理论基础，推动了权重空间学习的理论理解。

title: MemeScouts@LT-EDI 2026: Asking the Right Questions -- Prompted Weak Supervision for Meme Hate Speech Detection
comment: Accepted at Sixth Workshop on Language Technology for Equality, Diversity and Inclusion at ACL2026 (LT-EDI@ACL26)
summary: Detecting hate speech in memes is challenging due to their multimodal nature and subtle, culturally grounded cues such as sarcasm and context. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) enable joint reasoning over text and images, end-to-end prompting can be brittle, as a single prediction must resolve target, stance, implicitness, and irony. These challenges are amplified in multilingual settings. We propose a prompted weak supervision (PWS) approach that decomposes meme understanding into targeted, question-based labeling functions with constrained answer options for homophobia and transphobia detection in the LT-EDI 2026 shared task. Using a quantized Qwen3-VLM to extract features by answering targeted questions, our method outperforms direct VLM classification, with substantial gains for Chinese and Hindi, ranking 1st in English, 2nd in Chinese, and 3rd in Hindi. Iterative refinement via error-driven LF expansion and feature pruning reduces redundancy and improves generalization. Our results highlight the effectiveness of prompted weak supervision for multilingual multimodal hate speech detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于提示的弱监督方法（PWS），通过分解多模态理解任务为多个针对性问答标签函数，在LT-EDI 2026共享任务中检测恐同和恐跨性别内容，在英语、中文和印地语上取得领先成绩，性能优于直接使用VLM端到端分类。
AI.motivation: 检测网络迷因中的仇恨言论具有挑战性，因为其多模态特性以及包含讽刺、语境等微妙的文化线索。现有的端到端VLMs脆弱，单一预测需同时解决目标、立场、隐含性和讽刺等多重任务，且多语言环境进一步放大了困难。
AI.method: 提出Prompted Weak Supervision (PWS)方法，将迷因理解分解为一系列基于提问的标签函数（labeling functions），每个函数限定答案选项。使用量化Qwen3-VLM提取特征，通过回答针对性问题实现检测。并采用迭代优化策略：基于错误驱动的标签函数扩展和特征剪枝，减少冗余并提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在LT-EDI 2026任务中，PWS方法优于直接VLM分类，尤其在中文和印地语上提升显著。最终排名：英语第1名、中文第2名、印地语第3名。
AI.conclusion: 提示弱监督方法在多语言多模态仇恨言论检测中效果显著，通过任务分解和迭代优化能有效提升模型泛化能力和检测性能。

title: Aligning with Your Own Voice: Self-Corrected Preference Learning for Hallucination Mitigation in LVLMs
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) frequently suffer from hallucinations. Existing preference learning-based approaches largely rely on proprietary models to construct preference datasets. We identify that this reliance introduces a distributional mismatch between the proprietary and target models that hinders efficient alignment. To address this, we propose Alignment via VErified Self-correction DPO (AVES-DPO), a framework that aligns LVLMs using in-distribution data derived from the model's intrinsic knowledge.
