Our method provides an exact algorithm for reducing communication overhead that eliminates tail latency. Moreover, it presents a versatile solution compatible with data-parallel training and various tensor-level parallelism strategies, including TPSP and UP. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that our technique consistently achieves lower latency, superior Model FLOPS Utilization (MFU), and high throughput.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flash-Overlap方法，通过将传统的reduce-scatter和all-gather集体通信替换为分解后的点对点(P2P)通信，并调度分区计算实现细粒度重叠，有效消除分布式LLM训练中的尾延迟问题，降低通信开销。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型规模快速增长需要跨加速器划分计算负载，但现有并行策略存在大量数据通信开销，而现有的基于数据切片的通信-计算重叠方法遭受尾延迟问题，严重影响计算效率。
AI.method: 提出Flash-Overlap方法：1) 将reduce-scatter和all-gather集体操作替换为分解的P2P通信；2) 调度分区计算实现细粒度的通信-计算重叠；3) 提供精确算法消除尾延迟；4) 兼容数据并行和多种张量级并行策略（TPSP、UP）。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Flash-Overlap方法在延迟、模型FLOPS利用率(MFU)和吞吐量方面均实现了更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: Flash-Overlap有效消除了分布式LLM训练中通信-计算重叠的尾延迟问题，是一种兼容多种并行策略的通用解决方案。

title: Sentiment and Emotion Classification of Indonesian E-Commerce Reviews via Multi-Task BiLSTM and AutoML Benchmarking
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Final project for Natural Language Processing course (PBA 2026) at Institut Teknologi Sumatera
summary: Indonesian marketplace reviews mix standard vocabulary with slang, regional loanwords, numeric shorthands, and emoji, making lexicon-based sentiment tools unreliable in practice. This paper describes a two-track classification pipeline applied to the PRDECT-ID dataset, which contains 5,400 product reviews from 29 Indonesian e-commerce categories, each labeled for binary sentiment (Positive/Negative) and five-class emotion (Happy, Sad, Fear, Love, Anger). The first track applies TF-IDF vectorization with a PyCaret AutoML sweep across standard classifiers. The second track is a PyTorch Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) network with a shared encoder and two task-specific output heads. A preprocessing module applies 14 sequential cleaning steps, including a 140-entry slang dictionary assembled from marketplace corpora. Four configurations are benchmarked: BiLSTM Baseline, BiLSTM Improved, BiLSTM Large, and TextCNN. Training uses class-weighted cross-entropy loss, ReduceLROnPlateau scheduling, and early stopping. Both tracks are deployed as Gradio applications on Hugging Face Spaces. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ikii-sd/pba2026-crazyrichteam.

AI.tldr: 本文针对印尼电商评论中混合使用俚语、方言、数字缩写和表情符号导致情感分析困难的问题，提出了一条双轨道分类管道：第一轨道采用TF-IDF向量化结合PyCaret AutoML，第二轨道使用PyTorch双向LSTM网络配合共享编码器和双任务输出头。在PRDECT-ID数据集上进行了基准测试，并部署为Gradio应用。
AI.motivation: 印尼电商评论中混杂大量俚语、方言借词、数字缩写和表情符号，传统的基于词典的情感分析工具在实际应用中不可靠，亟需更鲁棒的分类方法。
AI.method: 构建双轨道分类管道：1) TF-IDF向量化 + PyCaret AutoML扫描标准分类器；2) PyTorch实现的BiLSTM网络（共享编码器+双任务输出头）。预处理模块包含14步清洗流程，含140条俚语词典。使用类别加权交叉熵损失、ReduceLROnPlateau调度和早停策略。
AI.result: 在PRDECT-ID数据集（5,400条评论，29类商品，二分类+五类情感）上对四种配置（BiLSTM Baseline、Improved、Large、TextCNN）进行了基准测试，并部署了Gradio应用。
AI.conclusion: 双轨道管道有效处理了印尼语非标准文本的情感分类问题，代码已开源，为低资源语言的电商评论情感分析提供了实用参考。

title: Geometry-Aware Offline-to-Online Learning in Linear Contextual Bandits
summary: We study offline-to-online learning in linear contextual bandits with biased offline regression data: the offline parameter need not match the online one, so history should not be treated as a single warm start. We model directional transfer with a shift certificate $(M_{\mathrm{shift}},ρ)$ and offline ridge estimation, yielding a geometry-aware confidence region for the online parameter rather than an isotropic radius. We propose \emph{Ellipsoidal-MINUCB}, which combines a standard online branch with an offline-informed pooled branch and uses offline information only when it tightens uncertainty. With high probability, regret is bounded by the minimum of a standard SupLinUCB-style fallback and a pooled term that separates statistical width from a certificate-weighted shift penalty. Under a simple alignment condition, the pooled term further simplifies to a rate governed by an effective dimension induced by the offline geometry. We also show that a purely Euclidean (scalar) shift bound, by itself, does not determine which feature directions are transferable. Beyond this fixed certificate, we show how to learn a data-driven certificate from data at finitely many refresh times and establish a high-probability regret bound for Ellipsoidal-MINUCB with epoch-wise learned certificates. Experiments match the main prediction: gains are strongest at intermediate horizons when offline coverage and transferability align, while the method otherwise tracks the safe online baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性上下文Bandit中的离线到在线学习问题，提出Ellipsoidal-MINUCB算法，通过椭圆置信区域和移位证书实现几何感知的离线信息利用，在理论上证明了后悔界，实验验证了中等时间跨度下的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将离线数据视为单一热启动，忽略了离线参数与在线参数不匹配的问题。本文旨在建模有偏离线回归数据下的方向性迁移，而非简单地将历史数据作为全局初始化。
AI.method: 提出Ellipsoidal-MINUCB算法，结合标准在线分支与离线信息分支，使用移位证书$(M_{\mathrm{shift}},ρ)$和离线岭估计构建几何感知的椭圆置信区域，仅在离线信息可收紧不确定性时使用。此外，还提出在有限刷新时刻学习数据驱动证书的方法。
AI.result: 高概率下后悔界受SupLinUCB风格回退项和分离统计宽度与证书加权移位惩罚的池化项的最小值控制。在简单对齐条件下，池化项简化为由离线几何诱导的有效维度决定的速率。实验表明，在中间时间跨度、离线覆盖与可迁移性对齐时收益最大，否则回退到安全在线基线。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了纯欧几里得（标量）移位界无法决定哪些特征方向是可迁移的，提出了可学习的数据驱动证书方法，为离线到在线迁移学习提供了更精细的几何视角和理论保证。

title: A Limit Theory of Foundation Models: A Mathematical Approach to Understanding Emergent Intelligence and Scaling Laws
summary: Emergent intelligence have played a major role in the modern AI development. While existing studies primarily rely on empirical observations to characterize this phenomenon, a rigorous theoretical framework remains underexplored. This study attempts to develop a mathematical approach to formalize emergent intelligence from the perspective of limit theory. Specifically, we introduce a performance function E(N, P, K), dependent on data size N, model size P and training steps K, to quantify intelligence behavior. We posit that intelligence emerges as a transition from finite to effectively infinite knowledge, and thus recast emergent intelligence as existence of the limit $\lim_{N,P,K \to \infty} \mathcal{E}(N,P,K)$, with emergent abilities corresponding to the limiting behavior. This limit theory helps reveal that emergent intelligence originates from the existence of a parameter-limit architecture (referred to as the limit architecture), and that emergent intelligence rationally corresponds to the learning behavior of this limit system. By introducing tools from nonlinear Lipschitz operator theory, we prove that the necessary and sufficient conditions for existence of the limit architecture. Furthermore, we derive the scaling law of foundation models by leveraging tools of Lipschitz operator and covering number. Theoretical results show that: 1) emergent intelligence is governed by three key factors-training steps, data size and the model architecture, where the properties of basic blocks play a crucial role in constructing foundation models; 2) the critical condition Lip(T)=1 for emergent intelligence provides theoretical support for existing findings. 3) emergent intelligence is determined by an infinite-dimensional system, yet can be effectively realized in practice through a finite-dimensional architecture. Our empirical results corroborate these theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文从极限理论视角提出了一个数学框架来形式化涌现智能，定义了依赖数据量N、模型规模P和训练步数K的性能函数E(N,P,K)，证明涌现有智能源于参数极限架构的存在性，并利用非线性Lipschitz算子理论推导出该架构存在的充要条件以及基础模型的缩放定律。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要依赖实证观察来描述涌现智能现象，缺乏严格的理论框架。本文旨在发展一种数学方法，从极限理论视角形式化涌现智能。
AI.method: 引入性能函数E(N,P,K)量化智能行为；将涌现智能重述为极限存在的数学问题；利用非线性Lipschitz算子理论证明极限架构存在的充要条件；结合Lipschitz算子与覆盖数推导缩放定律。
AI.result: 1) 涌现智能由训练步数、数据量和模型架构三要素决定；2) 临界条件Lip(T)=1为现有发现提供理论支持；3) 涌现智能由无限维系统决定，但可通过有限维架构有效实现。
AI.conclusion: 本文建立了涌现智能的极限理论框架，为理解大模型智能涌现现象提供了严格的数学基础，揭示了其本质上是有限到无限知识转换的极限行为。

title: AgenticCache: Cache-Driven Asynchronous Planning for Embodied AI Agents
summary: Embodied AI agents increasingly rely on large language models (LLMs) for planning, yet per-step LLM calls impose severe latency and cost. In this paper, we show that embodied tasks exhibit strong plan locality, where the next plan is largely predictable from the current one. Building on this, we introduce AgenticCache, a planning framework that reuses cached plans to avoid per-step LLM calls. In AgenticCache, each agent queries a runtime cache of frequent plan transitions, while a background Cache Updater asynchronously calls the LLM to validate and refine cached entries. Across four multi-agent embodied benchmarks, AgenticCache improves task success rate by 22% on average across 12 configurations (4 benchmarks x 3 models), reduces simulation latency by 65%, and lowers token usage by 50%. Cache-based plan reuse thus offers a practical path to low-latency, low-cost embodied agents. Code is available at https://github.com/hojoonleokim/MLSys26_AgenticCache.

AI.tldr: AgenticCache通过缓存计划复用来减少Embodied AI中逐步骤调用LLM带来的延迟和成本，在多个基准测试上成功率提升22%，延迟降低65%，token使用减少50%。
AI.motivation: Embodied AI代理依赖LLM进行规划，但每步调用LLM会带来严重的延迟和成本问题。
AI.method: 基于"计划局部性"观察，设计AgenticCache框架：运行时缓存频繁的计划转换，后台Cache Updater异步调用LLM验证和优化缓存条目。
AI.result: 在4个多智能体具身基准测试×3种模型共12种配置上，任务成功率平均提升22%，仿真延迟降低65%，token使用减少50%。
AI.conclusion: 基于缓存的计划复用是实现低延迟、低成本具身代理的实用路径。

title: End-to-End Learning for Partially-Observed Time Series with PyPOTS
summary: Partially-observed time series (POTS) is ubiquitous in real-world applications, yet most existing toolchains separate missing-value handling from downstream learning, which limits reproducibility and overall performance. This tutorial introduces PyPOTS, an open-source Python ecosystem for end-to-end data mining and machine learning on POTS. We present practical workflows spanning missingness simulation, data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation across core tasks, including imputation, forecasting, classification, clustering, and anomaly detection. The tutorial consists of two parts: Part I emphasizes hands-on application for practitioners through unified APIs and benchmark-oriented experiments. Part II targets developers and researchers, focusing on extending PyPOTS with custom models, domain-specific constraints, and contribution-ready engineering practices. Participants will gain both conceptual understanding and implementation experience for building robust, transparent, and reusable POTS pipelines in research and production settings. PyPOTS is publicly available at https://github.com/WenjieDu/PyPOTS

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了PyPOTS，一个面向部分观测时间序列(POTS)数据的端到端开源Python生态系统，涵盖缺失值处理、数据预处理、模型训练与评估，支持插补、预测、分类、聚类和异常检测等核心任务。教程分为实践应用和开发者扩展两部分。
AI.motivation: 现有工具链将缺失值处理与下游学习分离，限制了可重复性和整体性能，亟需一个统一的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 构建PyPOTS开源生态，提供统一API、缺失值模拟、基准实验、以及自定义模型扩展框架。
AI.result: 实现了面向POTS的完整工作流，覆盖插补、预测、分类、聚类和异常检测五大核心任务，支持可复现、可扩展的管道构建。
AI.conclusion: PyPOTS能够帮助研究人员和从业者构建健壮、透明且可复用的POTS处理管道，填补了该领域缺乏统一工具生态的空白。

title: Generalising maximum mean discrepancy: kernelised functional Bregman divergences
summary: Bregman divergences play a pivotal role in statistics, machine learning and computational information geometry. Particularly in the context of machine learning, they are central to clustering, exponential families, parameter estimation and optimisation, among other things. Despite this, the full toolkit of Hilbert spaces and in particular reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces have not been systematically developed and applied to functional Bregman divergences, where points are functions rather than finite-dimensional parameter vectors. While other types of functional Bregman divergences have been studied, these are typically in a Banach space rather than more directly aligned with kernel methods and Hilbert-space geometry commonly used in machine learning. We consider functional Bregman divergences on a Hilbert space, where the self-dual pairing and Riesz representer afford us particularly convenient calculus. Further specialising Bregman generators as a composition involving a kernel mean embedding makes such divergences easy to estimate. We discuss applications in clustering, universal estimation, robust estimation and generative modelling, and contrast our approach with other types of Bregman divergences.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地将Bregman散度从有限维向量空间扩展至希尔伯特空间中的函数版本，通过核均值嵌入作为生成器，使其易于估计，并展示了在聚类、通用估计、鲁棒估计和生成建模中的应用优势。
AI.motivation: Bregman散度在统计学和机器学习中至关重要，但现有的函数化Bregman散度多在巴拿赫空间中研究，缺乏与核方法及希尔伯特空间几何的紧密结合。作者希望填补这一空白，充分发挥希尔伯特空间的自对偶配对和Riesz表示定理带来的便利。
AI.method: 将Bregman散度定义在希尔伯特空间上，利用自对偶配对和Riesz表示简化计算；进一步将Bregman生成器特化为核均值嵌入的复合函数，使得散度易于基于数据进行估计。
AI.result: 所提出的希尔伯特空间函数Bregman散度具备了良好的可计算性和可估计性，并在聚类、通用估计、鲁棒估计和生成建模等任务中展示了应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 希尔伯特空间框架为函数Bregman散度提供了更便捷的微积分工具和与核方法的自然衔接，相比巴拿赫空间方法更适用于机器学习场景。

title: FreeScale: Distributed Training for Sequence Recommendation Models with Minimal Scaling Cost
comment: 14 pages, 11 figures. Accepted to the 9th MLSys Conference, Bellevue, WA, USA, 2026
summary: Modern industrial Deep Learning Recommendation Models typically extract user preferences through the analysis of sequential interaction histories, subsequently generating predictions based on these derived interests. The inherent heterogeneity in data characteristics frequently result in substantial under-utilization of computational resources during large-scale training, primarily due to computational bubbles caused by severe stragglers and slow blocking communications. This paper introduces FreeScale, a solution designed to (1) mitigate the straggler problem through meticulously load balanced input samples (2) minimize the blocking communication by overlapping prioritized embedding communications with computations (3) resolve the GPU resource competition during computation and communication overlapping by communicating through SM-Free techniques. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that FreeScale achieves up to 90.3% reduction in computational bubbles when applied to real-world workloads running on 256 H100 GPUs.

AI.tldr: FreeScale通过负载均衡输入样本、重叠优先级嵌入通信与计算、以及SM-Free通信技术，显著减少大规模深度学习推荐模型训练中的计算泡沫（在256块H100 GPU上最高减少90.3%）。
AI.motivation: 大规模深度学习推荐模型训练中，数据特征的异质性导致严重的计算泡沫（straggler和阻塞通信引起），造成计算资源严重浪费。
AI.method: (1) 精细负载均衡的输入样本缓解straggler问题；(2) 重叠优先级嵌入通信与计算减少阻塞通信；(3) 通过SM-Free技术解决计算与通信重叠时的GPU资源竞争。
AI.result: 在256块H100 GPU的真实工作负载上，计算泡沫减少高达90.3%。
AI.conclusion: FreeScale有效解决了大规模推荐模型训练中的资源利用效率问题，大幅降低了计算泡沫。

title: Explaining Temporal Graph Predictions With Shapley Values
summary: Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNNs) have become increasingly popular in recent years due to their superior predictive performance by combining both spatial and temporal information. However, how these models utilize the information to make predictions is rather unexplored, leading to potentially faulty or biased models. This work introduces two novel model-agnostic explainers for local explanations of TGNNs based on Shapley and Owen values. The first method, an event-level (edge-level) Shapley explainer, applies the KernelSHAP algorithm to estimate contribution scores for individual temporal events, providing interpretable descriptions for model behavior. The second, a feature-level Shapley explainer, extends this framework by decomposing event-level Shapley values into Owen values, and thereby uncovers hierarchical dependencies of the event and its features. The explainers outperform SOTA explainers on different metrics and datasets. Additionally, the Feature Explainer reveals a faulty extraction of actual timestamps of a commonly used TGAT implementation, helping to further understand performance drops on very sparse explanations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了两种基于Shapley值和Owen值的模型无关可解释方法，用于解释时序图神经网络（TGNN）的预测行为。事件级（边级）解释器使用KernelSHAP算法估计时序事件的贡献分数，特征级解释器通过Owen值分解事件级Shapley值，揭示事件及其特征的层次依赖关系。实验表明所提方法优于现有SOTA解释器，并发现常用TGAT实现中的时间戳提取错误。
AI.motivation: 现有TGNN虽然预测性能优越，但其如何利用时空信息进行预测尚不明确，可能导致模型存在错误或偏差。因此需要可解释方法来理解TGNN的行为。
AI.method: 提出两种模型无关的解释方法：(1) 事件级（边级）Shapley解释器：基于KernelSHAP算法估计单个时序事件的贡献分数；(2) 特征级Shapley解释器：通过Owen值分解事件级Shapley值，揭示事件与特征的层次依赖关系。
AI.result: 所提解释器在多个指标和数据集上优于SOTA解释器；特征解释器还发现了常用TGAT实现中实际时间戳的错误提取问题。
AI.conclusion: 基于Shapley和Owen值的模型无关解释方法能有效解释TGNN预测行为，并有助于揭示模型实现中的潜在问题。

title: Meta-Ensemble Learning with Diverse Data Splits for Improved Respiratory Sound Classification
summary: Training reliable respiratory sound classification models remains challenging due to the limited size and subject diversity of datasets. Ensemble methods can improve robustness, but when base models are trained on identical data, models tend to overfit and produce highly correlated predictions, thereby reducing the effectiveness of ensembling. In this work, we investigate a meta-ensemble learning methodology that enhances prediction diversity by training base models on diverse data splits and combining their outputs through a trained meta-model. Specifically, we train base models on the ICBHI dataset using two data split settings: fixed 80-20% split and five-fold cross-validation split, under two data granularity settings: patient- and sample-level. The resulting diversity in base model predictions enables the meta-model to better generalize. Our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the ICBHI benchmark, reaching a Score of 66.49% and showing improved generalization on two out-of-distribution datasets, indicating its potential applicability to real-world clinical data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出元集成学习方法，通过在不同数据划分（固定80-20%分割和五折交叉验证）和不同粒度（患者级和样本级）上训练基础模型，再使用元模型整合其预测，在ICBHI基准上达到66.49%的Score，并改善了对分布外数据的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 呼吸音分类数据集规模小、受试者多样性不足，传统集成方法中基础模型在相同数据上训练易过拟合并产生高度相关的预测，削弱集成效果。
AI.method: 采用元集成学习框架：1) 在ICBHI数据集上用两种数据划分（固定80-20%分割、五折交叉验证）和两种粒度（患者级、样本级）训练多个基础模型；2) 训练一个元模型来整合基础模型的多样化输出。
AI.result: 在ICBHI基准上达到66.49%的Score，刷新了当前最佳性能；在两个分布外数据集上展现出更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过多样化数据划分和粒度设置增强基础模型预测的多样性，元模型能更好地泛化，该方法具有应用于真实临床数据的潜力。

title: Leveraging Human Feedback for Semantically-Relevant Skill Discovery
comment: Accepted at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026)
summary: Unsupervised skill discovery in reinforcement learning aims to intrinsically motivate agents to discover diverse and useful behaviours. However, unconstrained approaches can produce unsafe, unethical, or misaligned behaviours. To mitigate these risks and improve the practical desireability of discovered skills, recent work grounds the discovery process by leveraging human preference feedback. However, preference-based approaches are feedback-inefficient and inherently ill-equipped to deal with skill spaces composed of a variety of different skills such as running, jumping, walking, etc. To overcome this limitation, we introduce semantic labelling, a novel and feedback-efficient approach that leverages human cognitive strengths to identify and label semantically meaningful behaviours. Based on semantic labelling, we propose Semantically Relevant Skill Discovery (SRSD), a novel human-in-the-loop approach that collects semantic labels from human feedback and learns a reward function to encourage skills to be more semantically diverse and relevant. Through our experiments in a 2D navigation environment and four locomotion environments, we demonstrate that SRSD can improve semantic diversity and discover relevant behaviours while scaling effectively to a large variety of behaviours.

AI.tldr: 本文提出语义标签方法（SRSD），通过人类反馈引导强化学习中的技能发现，在保证语义多样性的同时提升效率和安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督技能发现可能产生不安全、不道德的行为，而偏好学习方法反馈效率低且难以处理多种技能（如跑、跳、走）混合的技能空间。
AI.method: 提出语义标签（semantic labelling）方法，利用人类认知优势标记有语义意义的行为；基于此设计SRSD框架，整合人类语义标签学习奖励函数，鼓励技能在语义上更多样和更相关。
AI.result: 在2D导航环境和四个 locomotion 环境中的实验表明，SRSD能有效提升语义多样性，发现相关行为，并能扩展到多种行为场景。
AI.conclusion: 语义标签方法比偏好反馈更高效，SRSD能有效引导技能发现朝向语义上有意义且多样化的方向，提升实用性和安全性。

title: Machine-Learning-Based Classification of Radio Frequency Building Loss
comment: Accepted as a short paper in International Conference on Telecommunications (ICT) 2026
summary: Accurate modeling of outdoor-to-indoor (O2I) and indoor-to-indoor (I2I) signal loss is important for improving indoor wireless network performance in dense urban areas. Traditional on-site measurements are expensive, time-consuming, and difficult to conduct across wide regions. Real-world datasets also tend to be noisy and imbalanced, which makes signal loss prediction challenging. This study presents a machine learning framework for classifying radio frequency (RF) building loss. The framework combines passively collected, crowdsourced user equipment (UE) data from 3GPP-compliant networks with public building information. We evaluated Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, and a voting classifier using both supervised (SL) and semi-supervised learning (SSL). Compared to SL-only inference, the proposed SL and SSL framework improved both prediction accuracy and confidence under identical data constraints, achieving up to 12.6% relative accuracy gain for O2I loss and 3.4% for I2I loss, while reducing prediction entropy by up to 8.4%. Among the evaluated models, SSL XGBoost provided the most confident O2I loss classification, whereas SSL LightGBM achieved the best performance for I2I loss. These results demonstrate that the proposed approach provides a practical, data-driven alternative to traditional models, with promising potential to support better network planning and indoor coverage optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合半监督学习的机器学习框架，利用众包用户数据和公开建筑信息对室外到室内（O2I）及室内到室内（I2I）信号损耗进行分类。相比纯监督学习，该方法在相同数据条件下将O2I分类准确率提升12.6%，I2I提升3.4%，预测熵降低8.4%，为传统网络规划提供了实用的数据驱动替代方案。
AI.motivation: 传统的室外到室内（O2I）和室内到室内（I2I）信号损耗建模依赖实地测量，成本高昂且难以大范围开展。现有数据集常存在噪声大、类别不平衡等问题，导致预测困难。因此需要一种高效、低成本且能处理真实数据挑战的替代方案。
AI.method: 构建机器学习框架，结合被动收集的众包用户设备（UE）数据与公开建筑信息。评估了随机森林、XGBoost、LightGBM和投票分类器，并比较了纯监督学习（SL）与半监督学习（SSL）两种范式。半监督学习利用未标注数据增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 相比纯监督学习，半监督框架在相同数据约束下：O2I损耗分类准确率提升12.6%，I2I提升3.4%；预测熵降低最高8.4%。其中SSL XGBoost在O2I分类中最具置信度，SSL LightGBM在I2I分类中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 该半监督学习框架为传统信号损耗模型提供了实用、数据驱动的替代方案，能有效提升网络规划与室内覆盖优化的准确性，具有广阔应用前景。

title: Progressive Approximation in Deep Residual Networks: Theory and Validation
summary: The Universal Approximation Theorem (UAT) guarantees universal function approximation but does not explain how residual models distribute approximation across layers. We reframe residual networks as a layer-wise approximation process that builds an approximation trajectory from input to target, and prove the existence of progressive trajectories where error decreases monotonically with depth. It reveals that residual networks can implement structured, step-by-step refinement rather than end-to-end (E2E) black-box mapping. Building on this, we propose Layer-wise Progressive Approximation (LPA), a theoretically grounded training principle that explicitly aligns each layer with its residual target to realize such trajectories. LPA is architecture-agnostic: we observe progressive behavior in residual FNNs, ResNets, and Transformers across tasks including complex surface fitting, image classification, and NLP with LLMs for generation and classification. Crucially, this enables ``train once, use $N$ models": a single network yields useful predictions at every depth, supporting efficient shallow inference without retraining. Our work unifies approximation theory with practical deep learning, providing a new lens on representation learning and a flexible framework for multi-depth deployment. The source code will be released unpon acceptance at https://(open\_upon\_acceptance).

AI.tldr: 本文提出残差网络本质上是逐层渐进逼近过程，证明了单调递减误差轨迹的存在，并提出LPA训练原则实现这种渐进逼近，使得单个网络可在任意深度输出有用预测，无需重新训练。
AI.motivation: UAT保证通用函数逼近能力，但未能解释残差网络如何在各层间分配逼近任务。作者希望揭示残差网络内部的工作机制，而非将其视为端到端黑盒。
AI.method: 理论证明残差网络中渐进逼近轨迹的存在性，并提出LPA训练原则——每层显式对齐其残差目标，实现逐层逐步优化；在多种架构（残差FNN、ResNet、Transformer）和任务上验证。
AI.result: 1) 证明渐进逼近轨迹的存在性；2) LPA原则在多种架构和任务上有效；3) 实现"一次训练，使用N个模型"——不同深度均可输出有用预测，支持浅层高效推理。
AI.conclusion: 将逼近理论与实际深度学习统一，为表征学习提供新视角，也为多深度部署提供灵活框架。

title: Meta-Aligner: Bidirectional Preference-Policy Optimization for Multi-Objective LLMs Alignment
summary: Multi-Objective Alignment aims to align Large Language Models (LLMs) with diverse and often conflicting human values by optimizing multiple objectives simultaneously. Existing methods predominantly rely on static preference weight construction strategies. However, rigidly aligning to fixed targets discards valuable intermediate information, as training responses inherently embody valid preference trade-offs even when deviating from the target. To address this limitation, we propose Meal, i.e., MEta ALigner, a bi-level meta-learning framework enabling bidirectional optimization between preferences and policy responses, generating instructive dynamic preferences for steadier training. Specifically, we introduce a preference-weight-net as a meta-learner to generate adaptive preference weights based on input prompts and update the preference weights as learnable parameters, while the LLM policy acts as a base-learner optimizing response generation conditioned on these preferences with rejection sampling strategy. Extensive empirical results demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance on several multi-objective benchmarks, validating the effectiveness of the dynamic bidirectional preference-policy optimization framework.

AI.tldr: 提出Meal（元对齐器），一种双层元学习框架，通过偏好-策略双向优化实现动态偏好权重生成，优于传统静态偏好对齐方法。
AI.motivation: 现有多目标对齐方法依赖静态偏好权重策略，丢弃了训练过程中偏离目标但包含有效偏好权衡的中间信息，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 提出Meal框架：1）偏好权重网络作为元学习器，根据输入提示生成自适应偏好权重；2）LLM策略作为基础学习器，在偏好条件下通过拒绝采样优化响应生成；3）实现偏好与策略之间的双向优化。
AI.result: 在多个多目标基准上取得优越性能，验证了动态双向偏好-策略优化框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态偏好-策略双向优化相比静态偏好权重能更充分利用中间训练信息，实现更稳定的多目标对齐训练。

title: CMGL: Confidence-guided Multi-omics Graph Learning for Cancer Subtype Classification
comment: 24 pages, 15 figures, 13 tables, 2 algorithms (main paper + supplementary materials)
summary:
Motivation: Multi-omics integration can improve cancer subtyping, but modality informativeness and noise vary across cancer types and patients. Existing graph-based methods optimize modality weights jointly with the classification objective and therefore lack independent reliability estimates, so low-quality omics distort patient similarity graphs and amplify noise through message passing.
  Results: We propose CMGL, a two-stage framework that estimates per-sample modality reliability through evidential deep learning and uses the frozen confidence scores to guide cross-omics fusion and graph construction. On four MLOmics cancer-subtype tasks and the 32-class pan-cancer task, CMGL consistently improves over the strongest baseline, surpassing it by 4.03% in average accuracy on the four single-cancer tasks. Its representations recover the PAM50 intrinsic subtypes of breast invasive carcinoma (BRCA), and the BRCA-trained model transfers without fine-tuning to kidney renal clear cell carcinoma (KIRC), stratifying patients into prognostically distinct groups.

AI.tldr: 提出CMGL两阶段框架，先通过证据深度学习估计每个样本的模态可靠性，再用固定的置信度分数指导跨组学融合和图构建，在多癌种分型任务上平均准确率提升4.03%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图的组学集成方法将模态权重与分类目标联合优化，缺乏独立的可靠性估计，导致低质量组学数据扭曲患者相似度图并通过消息传递放大噪声。
AI.method: 两阶段框架CMGL：第一阶段用证据深度学习估计每个样本的模态可靠性（置信度分数），第二阶段冻结这些分数用于指导跨组学融合和图构建。
AI.result: 在4个MLOmics癌症亚型任务和32分类别泛癌任务上持续优于最强基线，单癌任务平均准确率提升4.03%；BRCA训练模型无需微调即可迁移至KIRC并进行预后分层。
AI.conclusion: CMGL通过解耦可靠性估计与分类目标，有效缓解了低质量组学数据的噪声干扰，提升了多组学癌症分型的鲁棒性和跨癌种迁移能力。

title: IMPA-Net: Meteorology-Aware Multi-Scale Attention and Dynamic Loss for Extreme Convective Radar Nowcasting
summary: Short-range prediction of convective precipitation from weather radar observations is essential for severe weather warnings. However, deep learning models trained with pixel-wise error metrics tend to produce overly smooth forecasts that suppress intense echoes critical for hazard detection. This issue is exacerbated by insufficient multi-scale feature interaction and suboptimal fusion of heterogeneous geophysical inputs. We propose IMPA-Net (Integrated Multi-scale Predictive Attention Network), a deterministic 0-2 hour nowcasting framework that addresses these limitations through meteorologically-informed designs at the input, architecture, and loss function levels. A parameter-free Spatial Mixer reorganizes heterogeneous input channels at the mesoscale-$γ$ neighborhood (~2 km) via deterministic channel permutation, providing a structured cross-field prior. An integrated multi-scale predictive attention module serves as the spatiotemporal translator, capturing dynamics from mesoscale-$β$ to mesoscale-$γ$ scales. A Meteorologically-Aware Dynamic Loss employs three-level asymmetric weighting -- adapting across training epochs, storm intensity, and forecast lead time -- to counteract regression-to-the-mean. Evaluated against seven baselines on a multi-source radar dataset over eastern China, IMPA-Net raises the Heidke Skill Score at $\geq$45 dBZ from 0.049 (SimVP baseline) to 0.143 under matched settings. Relative to pySTEPS, it provides a better trade-off between severe-event detection and false-alarm control. Spectral analysis confirms preserved energy across mesoscale bands where competing methods show progressive smoothing. These improvements are shown within a single domain and convective regime; generalizability to other orographic and climatic regions remains to be tested.

AI.tldr: IMPA-Net是一种针对0-2小时对流降水临近预报的深度学习框架，通过气象知识引导的输入设计、多尺度预测注意力模块和气象感知动态损失函数，有效解决了传统模型预测过于平滑、无法捕捉强回波的问题，在45dBZ阈值下的Heidke技能得分从0.049提升至0.143。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在降水临近预报中因使用逐像素误差指标导致预测过于平滑，抑制了对灾害预警至关重要的强回波；同时存在多尺度特征交互不足、异构地球物理输入融合不佳的问题。
AI.method: 提出IMPA-Net框架，包含三个核心设计：1) 参数无关的空间混合器(Spatial Mixer)，通过确定性通道置换在约2km中尺度-γ邻域重组异构输入通道；2) 集成多尺度预测注意力模块，作为时空翻译器捕获从中尺度-β到中尺度-γ尺度的动力学特征；3) 气象感知动态损失函数，在训练轮次、风暴强度和预报时效三个层面实施非对称加权，抑制回归到均值现象。
AI.result: 在中国东部多源雷达数据集上对比7个基线模型，IMPA-Net在≥45dBZ阈值下将Heidke技能得分从0.049(SimVP基线)提升至0.143；相比pySTEPS在强事件检测与虚警控制之间取得更好平衡；频谱分析表明其在竞争方法逐渐平滑的中尺度波段保留了能量。
AI.conclusion: IMPA-Net通过气象知识引导的设计有效改善了短时对流降水临近预报的强回波预测能力，目前仅在单一区域和一种对流类型上验证，向其他地形和气候区域的泛化性有待进一步测试。

title: GeoEdit: Local Frames for Fast, Training-Free On-Manifold Editing in Diffusion Models
summary: Diffusion models are a leading paradigm for data generation, but training-free editing typically re-runs the full denoising trajectory for every edit strength, making iterative refinement expensive. To address this issue, we instead edit near the data manifold, where small local updates can replace repeated re-synthesis. To enable this, we estimate a local manifold tangent space directly from perturbed samples and prove that this sample-based estimator closely approximates the true tangent. Building on this guarantee, we devise a Jacobian-free algorithm that constructs a tangent frame via small perturbations to the initial noise and alternates small tangent moves with diffusion-based projections. Updates within this frame follow principled on-manifold directions while suppressing off-manifold drift, enabling fine-grained edits without full re-diffusion or additional training. Edit strength is controlled by the number of steps for rapid, continuous adjustments that preserve fidelity and plug into existing samplers. Empirically, the resulting tangent directions yield smooth, semantic unsupervised traversals and effective CLIP-guided optimization, demonstrating practical interactive continuous editing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的扩散模型编辑方法，通过估计数据流形的局部切空间，仅需小幅度扰动和投影即可实现连续、高效的语义编辑，避免完整去噪轨迹的重复计算。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的编辑方法每次调整编辑强度都需要重新运行完整的去噪过程，迭代计算成本高昂，难以支持交互式连续编辑。
AI.method: 1. 从扰动样本中估计局部流形切空间，并证明该估计量接近真实切空间；2. 提出无Jacobian算法：通过小扰动构造切空间框架，交替进行切向移动和扩散投影；3. 编辑强度由步数控制，无需重新扩散或额外训练。
AI.result: 切方向能产生平滑、语义化的无监督遍历，并有效支持基于CLIP引导的优化，实现交互式连续编辑。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过近数据流形编辑，用小幅度局部更新替代重复再合成，显著提升编辑效率，兼顾保真度与灵活性，可无缝集成到现有采样器中。

title: BitRL: Reinforcement Learning with 1-bit Quantized Language Models for Resource-Constrained Edge Deployment
comment: 6pages, 1 Figure, IEEE International Conference of Frontiers of Engineering and Emerging Technologies 2026
summary:
The deployment of intelligent reinforcement learning (RL) agents on resource-constrained edge devices remains a fundamental challenge due to the substantial memory, computational, and energy requirements of modern deep learning systems. While large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful architectures for decision-making agents, their multi-billion parameter scale confines them to cloud-based deployment, raising concerns about latency, privacy, and connectivity dependence.
  We introduce BitRL, a framework for building RL agents using 1-bit quantized language models that enables practical on-device learning and inference under severe resource constraints. Leveraging the BitNet b1.58 architecture with ternary weights (-1, 0, +1) and an optimized inference stack, BitRL achieves 10-16x memory reduction and 3-5x energy efficiency improvements over full-precision baselines while maintaining 85-98 percent of task performance across benchmarks.
  We provide theoretical analysis of quantization as structured parameter perturbation, derive convergence bounds for quantized policy gradients under frozen-backbone architectures, and identify the exploration-stability trade-off in extreme quantization. Our framework systematically integrates 1-bit quantized language models with reinforcement learning for edge deployment and demonstrates effectiveness on commodity hardware.

AI.tldr: BitRL提出使用1-bit量化语言模型（BitNet b1.58）构建强化学习智能体，在资源受限的边缘设备上实现10-16倍内存压缩和3-5倍能效提升，同时保持85-98%的任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RL智能体依赖大规模深度模型（如LLM），参数量达数十亿，只能在云端部署，面临延迟、隐私和网络依赖问题。亟需一种能在资源受限边缘设备上高效运行RL智能体的方案。
AI.method: 基于BitNet b1.58架构，采用三值权重（-1, 0, +1）对语言模型进行1-bit量化；设计优化推理栈；将量化视为结构化参数扰动进行理论分析；推导冻结骨干架构下量化策略梯度的收敛界。
AI.result: 相比全精度基线，实现10-16倍内存压缩和3-5倍能效提升；在多个基准测试中保持85-98%的任务性能；在商用硬件上验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: BitRL成功将1-bit量化语言模型与强化学习系统整合，为边缘设备上的RL部署提供了可行方案，并揭示了极端量化下的探索-稳定性权衡。

title: Model-Free Inference of Investor Preferences: A Relative Entropy IRL Approach
summary: We present a framework using Relative Entropy Inverse Reinforcement Learning (RE-IRL) to recover investor reward functions from observed investment actions and market conditions. Unlike traditional IRL algorithms, RE-IRL is employed to account for environments where transition probabilities are unknown or inaccessible. To address the challenge of data sparsity, we utilize a $K$-nearest neighbor approach to estimate the observed behavior policy. Furthermore, we propose a statistical testing framework to evaluate the validity and robustness of the estimated results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于相对熵逆强化学习（RE-IRL）的框架，从投资者行为和市场数据中恢复其奖励函数，适用于转移概率未知的环境，并通过K近邻方法应对数据稀疏问题，同时构建统计检验框架评估结果的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统逆强化学习（IRL）算法在金融环境中面临两个核心挑战：一是市场环境的转移概率通常是未知或不可获取的；二是投资者行为数据往往稀疏。这些因素使得从观测到的投资行为中准确恢复投资者的奖励函数变得困难。
AI.method: 采用相对熵逆强化学习（RE-IRL）框架，该框架不依赖已知的转移概率。针对数据稀疏问题，使用K近邻（KNN）方法估计观测到的行为策略。此外，设计了统计检验框架来评估所估计奖励函数的有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 成功利用RE-IRL从稀疏的投资行为数据中恢复出投资者的奖励函数，并通过统计检验验证了估计结果的可靠性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RE-IRL结合K近邻方法与统计检验框架，能够有效应对未知转移概率和数据稀疏的挑战，为从观测行为中推断投资者偏好提供了一种实用的方法。

title: Latent-Hysteresis Graph ODEs: Modeling Coupled Topology-Feature Evolution via Continuous Phase Transitions
summary: Graph neural ordinary differential equations (Graph ODEs) extend graph learning from discrete message-passing layers to continuous-time representation flows. While it supports adaptive long-range propagation, we show that Graph ODEs with strictly positive irreducible mixing operators face an inherent \emph{monostability trap}: in the long-time regime, information leakage is unavoidable and the dynamics converge to a single global consensus attractor. We propose the \textbf{Hysteresis Graph ODE (HGODE)}, which couples feature evolution with a latent topological potential driven by a learned pairwise force. A double-well edge potential and bipolarized gate allow edge states to polarize into connected or insulated phases while preserving differentiability. We provide asymptotic analysis of the collapse mechanism and the proposed hysteretic topology dynamics, and validate HGODE on theory-driven synthetic diagnostics and real-world graph benchmarks.

AI.tldr: Graph ODE存在单稳态陷阱（信息泄露到全局共识），本文提出HGODE，通过双势阱边缘势和双极化门实现边缘状态极化，避免信息坍缩。
AI.motivation: 解决Graph ODE中严格正不可约混合算子导致的单稳态陷阱问题，即长期传播中信息必然泄露并收敛到单一全局共识吸引子。
AI.method: 提出HGODE，将特征演化与潜拓扑势耦合：双势阱边缘势+双极化门使边状态极化为连接/绝缘相，同时保持可微性。
AI.result: 理论分析坍缩机制与滞后拓扑动力学；在合成诊断数据和真实图基准上验证有效。
AI.conclusion: HGODE通过迟滞拓扑动力学打破了Graph ODE的单稳态限制，实现了长程传播中的信息保持与选择性去噪。

title: SolarTformer: A Transformer Based Deep Learning Approach for Short Term Solar Power Forecasting
summary: Accurate forecasting of solar power output is essential for efficient integration of renewable energy into the grid. In this study, an attention-based deep learning model, inspired by transformer architecture, is used for short-term solar power forecasting. Our proposed model, "SolarTformer", is designed to predict solar power output from meteorological data. Unlike traditional models, SolarTformer leverages self-attention mechanisms to effectively capture temporal dependencies and spatial variability in solar irradiance. In addition, the proposed methodology includes feeding power station-specific metadata into the model, which helps to generalize between power stations located at different locations and with different panel configurations and in different seasons. Our experiments demonstrate that SolarTformer significantly outperforms previous models on the same data set. In particular, the model exhibits strong performance on both clear and cloudy days, indicating high robustness and generalizability. These findings highlight the potential of attention-based architectures in enhancing the accuracy of solar forecasting, contributing to a more reliable management of renewable energy.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于注意力机制的深度学习模型SolarTformer，利用自注意力机制捕获太阳辐照度的时空依赖关系，并结合电站元数据进行短期太阳能发电预测，实验表明其在晴天和阴天均优于传统模型。
AI.motivation: 准确预测太阳能发电输出对可再生能源并网至关重要，传统模型在捕获时空依赖性和泛化能力方面存在不足，需要更有效的预测方法。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构的注意力机制深度学习模型SolarTformer，通过自注意力机制捕获时间依赖性和空间变异性，并将电站特定元数据（位置、面板配置、季节）作为额外输入，以提高模型在不同电站间的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在相同数据集上，SolarTformer显著优于之前的模型，在晴天和阴天均表现出强性能，具有高鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力机制的架构在提升太阳能预测准确性方面具有巨大潜力，有助于实现更可靠的可再生能源管理。

title: Self-Abstraction Learning for Effective and Stable Training of Deep Neural Networks
comment: Submitted to IEEE Access. Under review
summary: Training large-scale deep neural networks effectively and stably is essential for applying deep learning across various fields. However, conventional methods, which rely on training a single large network, often encounter challenges such as gradient vanishing, overfitting and unstable learning. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Self-Abstraction Learning (SAL), a hierarchical framework. In SAL, networks are arranged by structural complexity, where the simplest topmost network is trained first and its hidden and output layers serve as guidance for the successively more complex networks below. This top-down sequential guidance effectively mitigates optimization issues, enabling stable training of deep architectures. Various experiments across MLP, CNN, and RNN architectures demonstrate that SAL consistently outperforms conventional methods, ensuring robust generalization even in data-scarce and complex network regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Self-Abstraction Learning (SAL)分层框架，通过由简到繁的网络结构顺序训练，利用顶层网络的隐藏层和输出层指导下层复杂网络，有效缓解梯度消失、过拟合等问题，在MLP、CNN、RNN上均优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 传统单一大网络训练面临梯度消失、过拟合和学习不稳定等挑战，需要更有效的训练方法。
AI.method: 提出SAL分层框架：按结构复杂度排列网络，先训练最简单的顶层网络，其隐藏层和输出层作为指导信号，依次引导下层更复杂的网络进行训练。
AI.result: 在MLP、CNN、RNN多种架构上，SAL consistently优于传统方法，在数据稀缺和复杂网络场景下仍保持鲁棒的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SAL通过自上而下的顺序引导机制有效缓解了深度网络优化问题，实现了稳定训练和强泛化性能。

title: Mitigating Error Amplification in Fast Adversarial Training
summary: Fast Adversarial Training (FAT) has proven effective in enhancing model robustness by encouraging networks to learn perturbation-invariant representations. However, FAT often suffers from catastrophic overfitting (CO), where the model overfits to the training attack and fails to generalize to unseen ones. Moreover, robustness oriented optimization typically leads to notable performance degradation on clean inputs, and such degradation becomes increasingly severe as the perturbation budget grows. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of how guidance strength affects model performance by modulating perturbation and supervision levels across distinct confidence groups. The findings reveal that low confidence samples are the primary contributors to CO and the robustness accuracy trade off. Building on this insight, we propose a Distribution-aware Dynamic Guidance (DDG) strategy that dynamically adjusts both the perturbation budget and supervision signal. Specifically, DDG scales the perturbation magnitude according to the sample confidence at the ground truth class, thereby guiding samples toward consistent decision boundaries while mitigating the influence of learning spurious correlations. Simultaneously, it dynamically adjusts the supervision signal based on the prediction state of each sample, preventing overemphasis on incorrect signals. To alleviate potential gradient instability arising from dynamic guidance, we further design a weighted regularization constraint. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that DDG effectively alleviates both CO and the robustness accuracy trade off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出分布感知动态引导（DDG）策略，通过根据样本置信度动态调整扰动幅度和监督信号，有效缓解了快速对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合（CO）和鲁棒性-准确性权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 快速对抗训练中模型常遭遇灾难性过拟合（对未见攻击泛化差），且鲁棒性优化会导致干净样本性能显著下降，且扰动预算越大退化越严重。
AI.method: 首先分析不同置信度分组下引导强度对模型性能的影响，发现低置信度样本是CO和鲁棒性-准确性权衡的主要来源。据此提出DDG：1) 根据样本在真实类别上的置信度动态调整扰动幅度；2) 根据样本预测状态动态调整监督信号；3) 引入加权正则化约束缓解动态引导带来的梯度不稳定性。
AI.result: 在标准基准数据集上的大量实验表明，DDG有效缓解了灾难性过拟合和鲁棒性-准确性权衡问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态引导策略，针对低置信度样本的针对性处理能够同时缓解快速对抗训练中的两大核心问题。

title: Perfecting Aircraft Maneuvers with Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper evaluates an advanced jet trainer's utilization of artificial intelligence (AI)-based aircraft aerobatic maneuvers with the intention of developing an AI-assisted pilot training module for specific aircraft maneuvers. A multitude of aircraft maneuvers have been simulated using reinforcement learning (RL) agents, which will serve as a training tool for future pilots.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了基于人工智能的高级喷气式教练机在特技飞行中的应用，旨在开发AI辅助的飞行员训练模块。通过强化学习代理模拟多种飞行动作，为未来飞行员提供训练工具。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是利用人工智能技术提升飞行员训练效率，通过AI模拟特技飞行动作来辅助开发更高效的飞行员训练模块。
AI.method: 采用强化学习（RL）代理来模拟多种飞机特技飞行动作，作为训练工具的基础。
AI.result: 成功模拟了多种飞机特技飞行动作，为AI辅助飞行员训练模块的开发提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 基于AI的强化学习方法可以有效模拟飞机特技动作，有望成为未来飞行员训练的重要辅助工具。

title: Unveiling the Backdoor Mechanism Hidden Behind Catastrophic Overfitting in Fast Adversarial Training
summary: Fast Adversarial Training (FAT) has attracted significant attention due to its efficiency in enhancing neural network robustness against adversarial attacks. However, FAT is prone to catastrophic overfitting (CO), wherein models overfit to the specific attack used during training and fail to generalize to others. While existing methods introduce diverse hypotheses and propose various strategies to mitigate CO, a systematic and intuitive explanation of CO remains absent. In this work, we innovatively interpret CO through the lens of backdoor. Through validations on pathway division, diverse feature predictions, and universal class distinguishable triggers in CO, we conceptualize CO as a weak trigger variant of unlearnable tasks, unifying CO, backdoor attacks, and unlearnable tasks under a common theoretical framework. Guided by this, we leverage several backdoor inspired strategies to mitigate CO: (i) Recalibrate CO affected model parameters using vanilla fine tuning, linear probing, or reinitialization-based techniques; (ii) Introduce a weight outlier suppression constraint to regulate abnormal deviations in model weights. Extensive experiments support our interpretation of CO and show the efficacy of the proposed mitigation strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文创新性地将快速对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合（CO）解释为一种弱触发后门攻击，并借鉴后门防御策略提出了缓解CO的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽提出多种缓解灾难性过拟合的策略，但缺乏系统性和直观的解释，作者希望从后门攻击的视角统一理解CO的本质。
AI.method: 1) 通过路径划分、多样特征预测和通用可分类触发器的验证，将CO视为弱触发的不可学习任务；2) 提出后门启发的缓解策略：微调/线性探测/重初始化校准参数，以及权重异常值抑制约束。
AI.result: 实验验证了将CO解释为后门攻击的理论合理性，并证明了所提缓解策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作统一了灾难性过拟合、后门攻击和不可学习任务的理论框架，为理解CO提供了新视角，同时提供了实用的缓解方案。

title: Diffusion Templates: A Unified Plugin Framework for Controllable Diffusion
summary: Controllable diffusion methods have substantially expanded the practical utility of diffusion models, but they are typically developed as isolated, backbone-specific systems with incompatible training pipelines, parameter formats, and runtime hooks. This fragmentation makes it difficult to reuse infrastructure across tasks, transfer capabilities across backbones, or compose multiple controls within a single generation pipeline. We present Diffusion Templates, a unified and open plugin framework that decouples base-model inference from controllable capability injection. The framework is organized around three components: Template models that map arbitrary task-specific inputs to an intermediate capability representation, a Template cache that functions as a standardized interface for capability injection, and a Template pipeline that loads, merges, and injects one or more Template caches into the base diffusion runtime. Because the interface is defined at the systems level rather than tied to a specific control architecture, heterogeneous capability carriers such as KV-Cache and LoRA can be supported under the same abstraction. Based on this design, we build a diverse model zoo spanning structural control, brightness adjustment, color adjustment, image editing, super-resolution, sharpness enhancement, aesthetic alignment, content reference, local inpainting, and age control. These case studies show that Diffusion Templates can unify a broad range of controllable generation tasks while preserving modularity, composability, and practical extensibility across rapidly evolving diffusion backbones. All resources will be open sourced, including code, models, and datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diffusion Templates，一个统一且开放的插件框架，通过解耦基础模型推理与可控能力注入，支持多种控制任务（如结构控制、亮度调整、图像编辑等）的模块化组合与跨骨干网络复用。
AI.motivation: 现有可控扩散方法通常是为特定骨干网络开发的孤立系统，存在训练流程、参数格式和运行时钩子不兼容的问题，导致基础设施难以复用、能力难以跨骨干迁移、多种控制难以组合。
AI.method: 提出包含三个组件的统一插件框架：Template models（将任务输入映射为中间能力表示）、Template cache（标准化接口用于能力注入）、Template pipeline（加载、合并和注入多个cache到基础扩散运行时）。接口定义在系统层面，支持KV-Cache和LoRA等多种异构能力载体。
AI.result: 构建了涵盖结构控制、亮度调整、颜色调整、图像编辑、超分辨率、锐度增强、美学对齐、内容参考、局部修复和年龄控制等10种任务的模型库，验证了框架的统一性、模块化、可组合性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Diffusion Templates能够在保持模块化、可组合性和实用可扩展性的前提下，统一广泛的可控生成任务，所有代码、模型和数据集将开源。

title: An Aircraft Upset Recovery System with Reinforcement Learning
summary: This article explores the progress made in the creation of a pilot activated recovery system (PARS) for advanced jet trainers that utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) in an effort to enhance operational efficiency. The PARS model employs an advanced reinforcement learning (RL) architecture, incorporating a cutting-edge soft-actor critic (SAC) model and hyper-parameter optimization methods. Negative-g punishments and other handcrafted features remarked upon by control engineers and domain experts regarding PARS are also taken into account by the system. When evaluated by them, the AI model's behavior is deemed more desirable than that of conventional control methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于先进喷气式教练机的AI驱动飞行员激活恢复系统（PARS），采用强化学习（SAC模型）与超参数优化方法，在专家评估中表现优于传统控制方法。
AI.motivation: 旨在利用人工智能提升先进喷气式教练机的飞行员激活恢复系统（PARS）的运营效率。
AI.method: 采用先进的强化学习架构（软演员-评论家SAC模型）结合超参数优化方法，并融入负过载惩罚等手工设计的特征。
AI.result: AI模型的行为在控制工程师和领域专家的评估中被认为比传统控制方法更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于SAC的强化学习方案在PARS系统中展现出比传统方法更理想的性能，具备提升航空训练安全与效率的潜力。

title: DPRM: A Plug-in Doob h transform-induced Token-Ordering Module for Diffusion Language Models
summary:
Diffusion language models generate without a fixed left-to-right order, making token ordering a central algorithmic choice: which tokens should be revealed, retained, revised or verified at each step? Existing systems mainly use random masking or confidence-driven ordering. Random masking creates train--test mismatch, while confidence-only rules are efficient but can be myopic and suppress useful exploration.
  We introduce DPRM (Doob h-transform Process Reward Model), a plug-in token-ordering module for diffusion language models. DPRM keeps the host architecture, denoising objective and supervision unchanged, and changes only the ordering policy. It starts from confidence-driven progressive ordering and gradually shifts to Doob h transform Process Reward guided ordering through online estimates.
  We characterize the exact DPRM policy as a reward-tilted Gibbs reveal law, prove O(1/N) convergence of the stagewise Soft-BoN approximation, and show that the online bucketized controller tracks the exact DPRM score at empirical-Bernstein rates. Under tractable optimization assumptions, DPRM also yields a sample-complexity advantage over random and confidence-only ordering.
  DPRM improves over confidence-based baselines in pretraining, post-training, test-time scaling, and single-cell masked diffusion, with particularly strong gains on harder reasoning subsets. In protein, molecular generation and DNA design, the effect is more multi-objective: ordering-aware variants significantly improve selected structural or fragment-constrained metrics while not uniformly dominating the host baseline on every quality metric. These results identify token ordering as a fundamental control axis in diffusion language models and establish DPRM as a general-purpose module for improving it. Code is available at https://github.com/DakeBU/DPRM-DLLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPRM（Doob h变换过程奖励模型），一种用于扩散语言模型的即插即用令牌排序模块。它从置信度驱动的渐进式排序出发，逐步过渡到Doob h变换过程奖励引导的排序，在保持架构、去噪目标和监督不变的情况下仅改变排序策略。实验证明DPRM在预训练、后训练、测试时扩展和单细胞掩码扩散上均优于置信度基线，尤其在困难推理子集上提升显著。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型的令牌排序策略（随机掩码或置信度驱动）存在训练-测试不匹配或短视、抑制探索的问题，需要一种更优的排序策略来提升模型性能。
AI.method: DPRM作为插件模块，从置信度驱动的渐进式排序开始，通过在线估计逐步过渡到Doob h变换过程奖励引导的排序。理论贡献包括：精确策略为奖励倾斜的Gibbs揭示律，证明O(1/N)的阶段性Soft-BoN近似收敛，以及在线桶化控制器以经验Bernstein速率追踪精确DPRM分数。
AI.result: DPRM在语言建模的预训练、后训练、测试时扩展和单细胞掩码扩散上优于置信度基线，在困难推理子集上增益尤为显著；在蛋白质、分子生成和DNA设计任务中，排序感知变体在特定结构或片段约束指标上显著提升，但并非在所有质量指标上都全面超越基线。
AI.conclusion: 令牌排序是扩散语言模型中的一个基本控制轴，DPRM可作为通用模块来改进排序策略。

title: SAGE: Sparse Adaptive Guidance for Dependency-Aware Tabular Data Generation
summary: Generating high-fidelity synthetic tabular data remains a critical challenge for enhancing data availability in privacy-sensitive and low-resource domains. Recent approaches leverage LLMs by representing table rows as sequences, yet suffer from two fundamental limitations: (1) they model feature dependencies densely, introducing spurious correlations; and (2) they assume static relationships between features, ignoring how these dependencies vary with feature values. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SAGE (Sparse Adaptive Guidance), a novel LLM-based generation framework that enforces sparse and dynamic dependency guidance. SAGE discretizes features into value-aware pseudo-features and constructs a mutual information-based sparse dependency graph. This graph adaptively guides generation through explicit context selection or implicit logit correction, enabling LLMs to focus on truly relevant information during synthesis. Our extensive experiments across six datasets and multiple tasks reveal that SAGE not only improves data fidelity and downstream utility, boosting F1 scores by 10% compared to previous LLM-based methods, but also reduces policy violations by one point. These results highlight the importance of adaptive structure in tabular data generation and provide new insights into context-sensitive control of LLMs.

AI.tldr: SAGE是一个基于LLM的表格数据生成框架，通过稀疏自适应依赖图，在合成数据时只关注真正相关的特征关系，相比先前方法F1提升10%，违规减少1点。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM生成表格数据的方法有两个缺陷：密集特征依赖建模引入虚假相关，以及假设特征关系静态不变。作者希望解决这两个问题，提高合成数据的保真度和实用性。
AI.method: 将特征离散化为值感知的伪特征，构建基于互信息的稀疏依赖图，通过显式上下文选择或隐式logit修正来自适应引导LLM生成过程。
AI.result: 在6个数据集上F1分数比先前LLM方法提升10%，政策违规减少1个点，数据保真度和下游效用均有显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 自适应结构在表格数据生成中很重要，为上下文敏感的LLM控制提供了新见解，证明了稀疏动态依赖引导的有效性。

title: PathMoG: A Pathway-Centric Modular Graph Neural Network for Multi-Omics Survival Prediction
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables. Source code available at https://github.com/wangzoyou/pathmog
summary: Cancer survival prediction from multi-omics data remains challenging because prognostic signals are high-dimensional, heterogeneous, and distributed across interacting genes and pathways. We propose PathMoG, a pathway-centric modular graph neural network for multi-omics survival prediction. PathMoG reorganizes genome-scale inputs into 354 KEGG-informed pathway modules, introduces a Hierarchical Omics Modulation module to condition gene-expression representations on mutation, copy number variation, pathway, and clinical context, and uses dual-level attention to capture both intra-pathway driver signals and inter-pathway clinical relevance. We evaluated PathMoG on 5,650 patients across 10 TCGA cancer types and observed consistent improvements over representative survival baselines. The framework further provides gene-level, pathway-level, and patient-level interpretability, supporting biologically grounded and clinically relevant risk stratification.

AI.tldr: PathMoG是一个基于通路模块化的图神经网络模型，用于多组学数据癌症生存预测，在10种癌症类型5650名患者上表现优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 癌症生存预测面临多组学数据高维、异质且信号分布在交互基因和通路中的挑战，现有方法难以有效整合这些信息。
AI.method: 将基因组输入重组为354个KEGG通路模块，设计层级组学调制模块调节基因表达表征，采用双层注意力机制捕获通路内驱动信号和通路间临床相关性。
AI.result: 在10种TCGA癌症类型5650名患者上，PathMoG在生存预测上持续优于代表性基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PathMoG提供了基因、通路和患者三个层面的可解释性，支持生物学可解释且临床相关的风险分层。

title: Complexity of Linear Regions in Self-supervised Deep ReLU Networks
comment: Accepted for publication in 2026 IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition - Findings Track (CVPRF)
summary: There has been growing interest in studying the complexity of Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) based activation networks. Recent work investigates the evolution of the number of piecewise-linear partitions (linear regions) that are formed during training. However, current research is limited to examining the complexity of models trained in a supervised way. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) differs in that it directly optimises the representation space using a loss function to enhance the model's performance across multiple downstream tasks. This study investigates the local distribution of linear regions produced by SSL models. We demonstrate that the evolution of linear regions correlates with the representation quality by utilising SplineCam to extract two-dimensional polytopes near the data distribution. We track the number, area, eccentricity, and boundaries of regions throughout training. The study compares supervised, contrastive, and self-distillation methods over two standard benchmark datasets, MNIST and FashionMNIST. The analysis of the experimental results shows that self-supervised methods create substantially fewer regions to achieve comparable accuracy to supervised models. Contrastive methods rapidly expand regions over time, whereas self-distillation methods tend to consolidate by merging neighbouring regions. Lastly, we can detect representation collapse early within the geometric space of linear regions. Our analysis suggests that polytopal metrics can serve as reliable indicators of representation quality and model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督学习（SSL）模型中ReLU网络生成的线性区域（分段线性分区）的局部分布。实验表明，线性区域的演化与表征质量相关，自监督方法相比监督学习产生更少的区域即可达到相当精度，且可通过线性区域的几何指标检测表征坍塌。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注监督训练下ReLU网络线性区域的复杂度演化，而自监督学习直接优化表征空间以提升多下游任务性能，其线性区域的特性尚未被探索。
AI.method: 利用SplineCam提取数据分布附近的二维多面体，追踪训练过程中线性区域的数量、面积、离心率和边界；对比监督学习、对比学习（contrastive）和自蒸馏（self-distillation）方法在MNIST和FashionMNIST上的表现。
AI.result: 1) 自监督方法使用更少的线性区域即可达到与监督模型相当的准确率；2) 对比方法随时间快速扩展区域，自蒸馏方法倾向于合并相邻区域；3) 可通过线性区域的几何空间早期检测表征坍塌。
AI.conclusion: 多面体度量（polytopal metrics）可作为表征质量和模型性能的可靠指标，为理解自监督学习的内在机理提供了几何视角。

title: An Automatic Ground Collision Avoidance System with Reinforcement Learning
summary: This article evaluates an artificial intelligence (AI)-based Automatic Ground Collision Avoidance System (AGCAS) designed for advanced jet trainers to enhance operational effectiveness. In the continuously evolving field of aerospace engineering, the integration of AI is crucial for advancing operations with improved timing constraints and efficiency. Our study explores the design process of an AI-driven AGCAS, specifically tailored for advanced jet trainers, focusing on addressing the AGCAS problem within a limited observation space. The system utilizes line-of-sight queries on a terrain server to ensure precise and efficient collision avoidance. This approach aims to significantly improve the safety and operational capabilities of advanced jet trainers.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了一种基于AI的自动地面防撞系统（AGCAS），专门为高级喷气教练机设计，通过视线查询地形服务器实现精确高效的防撞，以提升操作安全性和效能。
AI.motivation: 在航空航天工程不断发展的背景下，将AI集成到防撞系统中对于改善操作的时间约束和效率至关重要，因此需要针对高级喷气教练机开发专门的AGCAS方案。
AI.method: 研究设计了一个AI驱动的AGCAS，在有限观察空间内解决防撞问题，利用视线查询（line-of-sight queries）在地形服务器上进行精确的碰撞避免判断。
AI.result: 论文评估了该AI-AGCAS系统的有效性，表明其在提升高级喷气教练机安全性和操作能力方面具有积极作用。
AI.conclusion: 该AI驱动的AGCAS能够显著提高高级喷气教练机的安全性和操作效能，为未来航空航天防撞系统提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Advancing Ligand-based Virtual Screening and Molecular Generation with Pretrained Molecular Embedding Distance
summary: Molecular similarity plays a central role in ligand-based drug discovery, such as virtual screening, analog searching, and goal-directed molecular generation. However, traditional similarity measures, ranging from fingerprint-based Tanimoto coefficients to 3D shape overlays, are often computationally expensive at scale or rely on hand-crafted molecular descriptors. Meanwhile, many deep learning approaches to similarity-aware design still depend on similarity-specific supervision or costly data curation, limiting their generality across targets. In this work, we propose pretrained embedding distance (PED) as an effective alternative, computed directly from pretrained molecular models without task-specific training. Experimental results show that PED exhibits distinct correlations with traditional similarity metrics, and performs effectively in both ranking molecules for virtual screening and guiding molecular generation via reward design. These findings suggest that pretrained molecular embeddings capture rich structural information and can serve as a promising and scalable similarity measurement for modern AI-aided drug discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出预训练嵌入距离（PED）作为传统分子相似度量的有效替代方案，无需任务特定训练即可直接从预训练分子模型中计算，在虚拟筛选和分子生成中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统分子相似度方法（如指纹Tanimoto系数、3D形状叠加）计算成本高或依赖手工特征，而深度学习方法需要相似性监督或昂贵的数据标注，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 直接利用预训练分子模型计算嵌入距离（PED），无需任务特定训练或额外数据标注。
AI.result: PED与传统相似度指标存在显著相关性，在虚拟筛选的分子排序和基于奖励设计的分子生成中均表现有效。
AI.conclusion: 预训练分子嵌入捕获了丰富的结构信息，可作为现代AI药物发现中具有前景且可扩展的相似度量方法。

title: SceneSelect: Selective Learning for Trajectory Scene Classification and Expert Scheduling
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICIC 2026
summary: Accurate trajectory prediction is fundamentally challenging due to high scene heterogeneity - the severe variance in motion velocity, spatial density, and interaction patterns across different real-world environments. However, most existing approaches typically train a single unified model, expecting a fixed-capacity architecture to generalize universally across all possible scenarios. This conventional model-centric paradigm is fundamentally flawed when confronting such extreme heterogeneity, inevitably leading to a severe generalization gap, degraded accuracy, and massive computational waste. To overcome this bottleneck, rather than refining restricted model-centric architectures, we propose selective learning, a novel scene-centric paradigm. It explicitly analyzes the characteristics of the underlying scene to dynamically route inputs to the most appropriate expert models. As a concrete implementation of this paradigm, we introduce SceneSelect. Specifically, SceneSelect utilizes unsupervised clustering on interpretable geometric and kinematic features to discover a latent scene taxonomy. A highly decoupled classification module is then trained to assign real-time inputs to these scene categories, and a highly extensible, plug-and-play scheduling policy automatically dispatches the trajectory sequence to the optimal expert predictor. Crucially, this decoupled design ensures excellent generalization capabilities, allowing seamless integration with different off-the-shelf models and robust adaptation across new datasets without requiring computationally expensive joint retraining. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks (ETH-UCY, SDD, and NBA) demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms strong single-model and ensemble baselines, achieving an average improvement of 10.5%, showcasing the effectiveness of scene-aware selective learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以场景为中心的新范式——选择性学习（Selective Learning），通过无监督聚类发现场景类别并动态调度最合适的专家模型进行轨迹预测，在多个基准上平均提升10.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法采用单一统一模型处理高度异质的场景（速度、密度、交互模式差异大），导致泛化性差、精度下降和计算浪费。需要突破模型容量固定的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出SceneSelect框架：（1）对几何和运动特征进行无监督聚类，发现潜在场景分类；（2）训练解耦的分类模块实时分配输入到场景类别；（3）采用即插即用的调度策略将轨迹分配给最优专家预测器。解耦设计无需联合重训练即可集成不同模型。
AI.result: 在ETH-UCY、SDD和NBA三个基准上一致优于强单模型和集成基线，平均提升10.5%。
AI.conclusion: 以场景为中心的选择性学习范式比传统模型中心范式更有效，解耦设计保证了良好的泛化性和扩展性，为轨迹预测提供了新思路。

title: Prior-Agnostic Robust Forecast Aggregation
summary:
Robust forecast aggregation combines the predictions of multiple information sources to perform well in the worst case across all possible information structures. Previous work largely focuses on settings with a known binary state space, where the state is either 0 or 1. We study prior-agnostic robust forecast aggregation in which the aggregator observes only experts' reports, yet is ignorant of both the underlying joint information structure and the full prior, including the underlying state space. Unlike the standard model that fixes the binary state space {0, 1}, we allow the (binary) unknown state values to be arbitrary numbers in [0, 1], so the same reported probability may correspond to very different realized outcome frequencies across environments.
  Our main contribution is a simple, explicit, closed-form log-odds aggregator that linearly pools forecasts in logit space, together with (nearly-)tight minimax-regret guarantees across three knowledge regimes. We first show that under conditionally independent (CI) signals, robust aggregation with an unknown state space is strictly harder than in the known-state setting by establishing a larger lower bound, and our aggregation rule can achieve a worst-case regret of 0.0255. Along the way, we also characterize tight regret bounds for Blackwell-ordered structures and for general information structures. In the classical setting with known state space {0,1}, our aggregator achieves regret strictly below 0.0226 for CI structures. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first explicit closed-form aggregator that achieves a regret upper bound strictly less than 0.0226. Finally, we extend the model where the aggregator additionally knows each expert's marginal forecast distribution; in this setting, with the CI structures, we show that a generalized log-odds rule achieves regret of 0.0228, complementing with a lower bound of 0.0225.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在先验未知且状态空间未知（状态值可为[0,1]间任意数）条件下的鲁棒预测聚合问题，提出了一种简单的对数几率聚合器，并在三种知识场景下给出了近乎最优的极小极大遗憾界。
AI.motivation: 已有鲁棒预测聚合研究大多假设已知二元状态空间{0,1}，但现实场景中状态值可能是任意实数，且聚合者既不掌握先验也不掌握状态空间。本文旨在填补这一更现实设定下的理论空白。
AI.method: 提出显式封闭形式的对数几率（log-odds）聚合器，在线性对数空间上对预测进行池化；分别在条件独立信号、Blackwell序结构、一般信息结构三种知识场景下分析其极小极大遗憾表现。
AI.result: （1）未知状态空间下条件独立信号的遗憾下界严格大于已知状态空间设定，本文聚合器可达0.0255的遗憾；（2）已知状态空间{0,1}下该聚合器遗憾严格低于0.0226；（3）当聚合者额外知道每位专家的边际预测分布时，广义对数几率规则遗憾为0.0228，下界为0.0225。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出一个显式封闭形式的对数几率聚合器，能够在多种设定下实现与理论下界几乎匹配的遗憾上界，拓展了鲁棒预测聚合的理论边界。

title: A Reward-Free Viewpoint on Multi-Objective Reinforcement Learning
summary: Many sequential decision-making tasks involve optimizing multiple conflicting objectives, requiring policies that adapt to different user preferences. In multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL), one widely studied approach} addresses this by training a single policy network conditioned on preference-weighted rewards. In this paper, we explore a novel algorithmic perspective: leveraging reward-free reinforcement learning (RFRL) for MORL. While RFRL has historically been studied independently of MORL, it learns optimal policies for any possible reward function, making it a natural fit for MORL's challenge of handling unknown user preferences. We propose using the RFRL's training objective as an auxiliary task to enhance MORL, enabling more effective knowledge sharing beyond the multi-objective reward function given at training time. To this end, we adapt a state-of-the-art RFRL algorithm to the MORL setting and introduce a preference-guided exploration strategy that focuses learning on relevant parts of the environment. Through extensive experiments and ablation studies, we demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art MORL methods across diverse MO-Gymnasium tasks, achieving superior performance and data efficiency. This work provides the first systematic adaptation of RFRL to MORL, demonstrating its potential as a scalable and empirically effective solution to multi-objective policy learning.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统地将奖励无关强化学习（RFRL）应用于多目标强化学习（MORL），通过将RFRL训练目标作为辅助任务并引入偏好引导的探索策略，在多个MO-Gymnasium任务上显著超越了现有MORL方法，实现了更优的性能和数据效率。
AI.motivation: 多目标强化学习中传统方法使用偏好加权奖励训练单一策略网络，但无法有效处理未知的用户偏好。RFRL天然适用于学习任意奖励函数的最优策略，然而历史上RFRL与MORL被独立研究，缺乏系统性结合。
AI.method: 1) 将最先进的RFRL算法适配到MORL设置；2) 将RFRL训练目标作为辅助任务，增强训练时的知识共享；3) 提出偏好引导的探索策略，聚焦于环境中与当前偏好相关的部分进行学习。
AI.result: 在多种MO-Gymnasium任务上，该方法显著优于当前最先进的MORL方法，在性能和样本效率方面均表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了RFRL到MORL的首次系统性适配，证明了RFRL作为一种可扩展且经验有效的解决方案在多目标策略学习中的潜力。

title: Dialysis Risk Prediction and Treatment Effect Estimation for AKI patients using Longitudinal Electronic Health Records
summary: Progression to dialysis or end-stage renal disease is a rare but clinically important outcome. Clinicians need evidence on how medication exposures influence downstream risk. We constructed a fixed-window EHR cohort (90-day observation, 730-day prediction; N=81401; dialysis/ESRD prevalence: 1.1%) and modeled sequences of diagnoses, procedures, and medications with kidney laboratory trends (creatinine, BUN, eGFR). A transformer-based causal multi-head model was trained to estimate drug- and ingredient-level average treatment effects (ATEs) using counterfactual exposure removal and insertion under a full medication history setup. On test set, predictive performance reached an AUC of 0.694 and PR-AUC of 0.094. At the selected decision threshold (0.883), the model achieved an F1 score of 0.201 with a Brier score of 0.018. Post-hoc causal analyses of lab changes (eGFR, creatinine, BUN) using IPTW, AIPW, naive, and covariate-adjusted OLS methods assessed clinical directionality. Results showed partial protective-direction support for ACE/ARB exposures and worsening-direction signals for loop diuretics.

AI.tldr: 本文构建固定窗口EHR队列，使用基于Transformer的因果多头模型，在完整用药史背景下通过反事实暴露移除与插入估计药物和成分级别的平均处理效应（ATEs），预测透析/ESRD风险（AUC=0.694），并后验分析发现ACE/ARB有部分保护性、袢利尿剂有恶化信号。
AI.motivation: 发展为透析或终末期肾病（ESRD）是罕见但临床重要的结局，临床医生需要药物暴露如何影响下游风险的证据。
AI.method: 构建固定窗口EHR队列（90天观察，730天预测；N=81401），建模诊断、手术、药物序列及肾脏实验室趋势。使用Transformer因果多头模型，在完整用药史下通过反事实暴露移除和插入估计ATEs。后验使用IPTW、AIPW等多种因果方法分析实验室变化。
AI.result: 预测AUC为0.694，PR-AUC为0.094，阈值0.883时F1为0.201，Brier分数0.018。ACE/ARB有部分保护性方向，袢利尿剂有恶化信号。
AI.conclusion: 基于EHR的Transformer因果模型可用于罕见肾脏终点预测和药物因果效应估计，验证了ACE/ARB的保护作用和袢利尿剂的风险信号。

title: GradMAP: Gradient-Based Multi-Agent Proximal Learning for Grid-Edge Flexibility
summary: Coordinating large populations of grid-edge devices requires learning methods that remain fully decentralised in deployment while still respecting three-phase AC distribution-network physics. This paper proposes gradient-based multi-agent proximal learning (GradMAP) to address this challenge. GradMAP trains independent neural-network policies for each agent without any parameter sharing, and each agent uses only its own local observation for online decision-making without communication. During offline training, GradMAP embeds a differentiable three-phase AC power-flow model in a primal-dual learning loop and uses implicit differentiation to propagate exact network-constraint violations to update the policy parameters. To speed up training, GradMAP reuses expensive environment gradients through a proximal surrogate within a trust region defined in the more direct policy-output (action) space, instead of the probability distribution space used in other works, such as PPO. In case studies with 1,000 agents managing batteries, heat pumps, and controllable generators on the IEEE 123-bus feeder, GradMAP learns decentralised policies that minimise three-phase AC load-flow constraint violations within 15 minutes of training on a single workstation-class NVIDIA RTX PRO 5000 Blackwell 48GB GPU. This is a 3--5x training speed-up over gradient-based self-supervised learning benchmarks and substantially better training efficiency than multi-agent reinforcement-learning benchmarks. In out-of-sample tests, GradMAP also delivers among the lowest operating cost and constraint violations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GradMAP方法，在离线训练中嵌入可微的三相交流潮流模型，通过隐式微分传播网络约束违反梯度，结合近端替代和动作空间信任域实现快速训练，使1000个智能体在IEEE 123节点馈线上15分钟内学会分布式策略，实现3-5倍训练加速。
AI.motivation: 协调大规模电网边缘设备需要完全去中心化的学习方法，同时必须尊重三相交流配电网的物理约束。
AI.method: 提出基于梯度的多智能体近端学习（GradMAP）。离线训练时将可微三相交流潮流模型嵌入原始-对偶学习循环，使用隐式微分传播网络约束违反梯度来更新策略参数；通过近端替代在动作空间（而非概率空间）信任域内复用环境梯度以加速训练。
AI.result: 在IEEE 123节点馈线上1000个智能体（电池、热泵、可控发电机）的案例中，GradMAP在单工作站GPU上15分钟内学会去中心化策略，最小化三相交流潮流约束违反；训练速度比基于梯度的自监督学习基准快3-5倍，训练效率远超多智能体强化学习基准；在样本外测试中，运行成本和约束违反均处于最低水平。
AI.conclusion: GradMAP通过将物理模型嵌入训练过程并结合高效梯度复用机制，实现了大规模电网边缘设备去中心化策略的快速收敛，兼顾了物理约束满足和运行经济性。

title: Fraud Detection in Cryptocurrency Markets with Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, Accepted at the SDS2026: IEEE Swiss Conference on Data Science and AI
summary: Technological advancements in cryptocurrency markets have increased accessibility for investors, but concurrently exposed them to the risks of market manipulations. Existing fraud detection mechanisms typically rely on machine learning methods that treat each financial asset (i.e., token) and its related transactions independently. However, market manipulation strategies are rarely isolated events, but are rather characterized by coordination, repetition, and frequent transfers among related assets. This suggests that relational structure constitutes an integral component of the signal and can be effectively represented through graphical means. In this paper, we propose three graph construction methods that rely on aggregated hourly market data. The proposed graphs are processed by a unified spatio-temporal Graph Neural Network (GNN) architecture that combines attention-based spatial aggregation with temporal Transformer encoding. We evaluate our methodology on a real-world dataset comprised of pump-and-dump schemes in cryptocurrency markets, spanning a period of over three years. Our comparative results showcase that our graph-based models achieve significant improvements over standard machine learning baselines in detecting anomalous events. Our work highlights that learned market connectivity provides substantial gains for detecting coordinated market manipulation schemes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种基于图构建的方法，结合注意力机制与时空图神经网络，在加密货币市场操纵检测中显著优于传统机器学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有欺诈检测方法将每个金融资产及其交易独立处理，忽视了市场操纵策略中资产间的协调性、重复性和频繁转账等关系结构特征。
AI.method: 提出三种基于聚合小时市场数据的图构建方法，采用统一的时空GNN架构，结合基于注意力的空间聚合与时间Transformer编码。
AI.result: 在跨越三年多的加密货币拉高出货真实数据集上，基于图的模型在异常事件检测中显著优于标准机器学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 学习到的市场连接性能够为检测协调性市场操纵方案提供显著的性能提升。

title: Uncovering Latent Patterns in Social Media Usage and Mental Health: A Clustering-Based Approach Using Unsupervised Machine Learning
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, International Conference on Advancement in Healthcare Technology and Biomedical Engineering, Vancouver, BC, Canada
summary: The widespread adoption of social media has heightened interest in its psychological effects, particularly on mental health indicators such as anxiety, depression, loneliness, and sleep quality, as these platforms increasingly influence social interactions and well-being. Although previous research has examined correlations between social media use and mental health, few studies have utilized unsupervised machine learning to segment users based on behavioral and psychological patterns, leaving a gap in identifying distinct risk profiles across diverse groups. This study seeks to address this by segmenting individuals according to their social media usage and psychological well-being, employing clustering to reveal hidden patterns and evaluate their mental health implications. Data from 551 participants, collected via an online survey, were preprocessed using KNN imputation for missing values, one-hot encoding for categorical variables like Gender with 5 unique values, and outlier detection via IQR and Z-score methods. K-Means clustering, optimized at 6 clusters using the Elbow Method and a Silhouette Score of 0.32, was applied, with PCA reducing 22 dimensions for visualization and a correlation heatmap highlighting relationships, such as a 0.28 correlation between social media hours and anxiety.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过K-Means聚类（6个簇）和PCA降维，对551名参与者的社交媒体使用与心理健康数据（焦虑、抑郁、孤独感、睡眠质量）进行无监督学习分析，发现社交媒体使用时长与焦虑存在0.28的相关性，并识别出不同行为-心理特征的用户风险画像。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究探讨了社交媒体使用与心理健康的相关性，但很少利用无监督机器学习方法，基于行为和心理模式对用户进行细分，从而识别不同群体的风险特征。
AI.method: 采用KNN插补处理缺失值、独热编码处理分类变量（如具有5个唯一值的性别）、IQR和Z-score检测异常值；使用K-Means聚类（肘部法和轮廓系数0.32确定6个簇），结合PCA将22个维度降维可视化，并利用相关性热图（如社交媒体使用时长与焦虑相关0.28）分析关系。
AI.result: 在551名参与者数据上，成功将用户划分为6个具有不同行为和心理特征的聚类，并揭示了社交媒体使用时长与焦虑之间的弱正相关（r=0.28）。
AI.conclusion: 无监督机器学习（聚类分析）能够有效揭示社交媒体用户中隐藏的行为-心理健康风险模式，为后续针对性干预提供依据。

title: Cortex-Inspired Continual Learning: Unsupervised Instantiation and Recovery of Functional Task Networks
summary: Block-sequential continual learning demands that a single model both protect prior solutions from catastrophic forgetting and efficiently infer at inference time which prior solution matches the current input without task labels. We present Functional Task Networks (FTN), a parameter-isolation method inspired by structural and dynamical motifs found in the mammalian neocortex. Similar to mixture-of-experts, this method uses a high dimensional, self-organizing binary mask over a large population of small but deep networks, inspired by dendritic models of pyramidal neurons. The mask is produced by a three-stage procedure: (1) gradient descent on a continuous mask identifies task-relevant neurons, (2) a smoothing kernel biases the result toward spatial contiguity, (3) and k-winner-take-all binarizes the resulting group at a fixed capacity budget. Like mixture-of-experts, each neuron is an independent deep network, so disjoint masks give exactly disjoint gradient updates, providing structural guarantees against catastrophic forgetting. This three-stage procedure recovers the sub-network of a previously-trained task in a single gradient step, providing unsupervised task segmentation at inference time. We test it on three continual-learning benchmarks: (1) a synthetic multi-task classification/regression generator, (2) MNIST with shuffled class labels (pure concept shift), and (3) Permuted MNIST (domain shift). On all three, FTN with fine grained smoothing (FTN-Slow) results in nearly zero forgetting. FTN with a large kernel and only 2 iterations of smoothing (FTN-Fast) trades off some retention for increased speed. We show that the spatial organization mechanism reduces the effective mask search from the combinatorial top-k subset problem in O(C(H,K)) to the complexity of a near-linear scan in O(H) over compact cortical neighborhoods, which is parallelized by the gradient-based update.

AI.tldr: 提出Functional Task Networks (FTN)，一种受哺乳动物新皮层启发的参数隔离方法，通过掩码机制在块序列持续学习中实现近乎零遗忘，同时能在推理时进行无监督任务分割。
AI.motivation: 解决块序列持续学习中模型需要同时保护先前解决方案不受灾难性遗忘，以及在无任务标签情况下高效推断当前输入对应哪个先前解决方案的问题。
AI.method: 受新皮层结构和动力学启发，使用高维自组织二元掩码覆盖大量小而深的网络（类似混合专家）。掩码通过三阶段生成：(1)对连续掩码进行梯度下降识别任务相关神经元；(2)平滑核使结果偏向空间连续性；(3)k-winner-take-all在固定容量预算下对结果二值化。不同掩码产生互不相交的梯度更新，从结构上防止灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在三个持续学习基准测试中：合成多任务分类/回归生成器、MNIST（纯概念漂移）和Permuted MNIST（域漂移），FTN-Slow实现近乎零遗忘。FTN-Fast通过大核和少量迭代在保留性能与速度间取得折衷。空间组织机制将掩码搜索复杂度从组合优化O(C(H,K))降低到近线性扫描O(H)。
AI.conclusion: FTN提供了一种有效的持续学习方案，兼具结构上的抗遗忘保证和推理时的无监督任务分割能力，且计算高效。

title: The Last Human-Written Paper: Agent-Native Research Artifacts
summary: Scientific publication compresses a branching, iterative research process into a linear narrative, discarding the majority of what was discovered along the way. This compilation imposes two structural costs: a Storytelling Tax, where failed experiments, rejected hypotheses, and the branching exploration process are discarded to fit a linear narrative; and an Engineering Tax, where the gap between reviewer-sufficient prose and agent-sufficient specification leaves critical implementation details unwritten. Tolerable for human readers, these costs become critical when AI agents must understand, reproduce, and extend published work. We introduce the Agent-Native Research Artifact (Ara), a protocol that replaces the narrative paper with a machine-executable research package structured around four layers: scientific logic, executable code with full specifications, an exploration graph that preserves the failures compilation discards, and evidence grounding every claim in raw outputs. Three mechanisms support the ecosystem: a Live Research Manager that captures decisions and dead ends during ordinary development; an Ara Compiler that translates legacy PDFs and repos into Aras; and an Ara-native review system that automates objective checks so human reviewers can focus on significance, novelty, and taste. On PaperBench and RE-Bench, Ara raises question-answering accuracy from 72.4% to 93.7% and reproduction success from 57.4% to 64.4%. On RE-Bench's five open-ended extension tasks, preserved failure traces in Ara accelerate progress, but can also constrain a capable agent from stepping outside the prior-run box depending on the agent's capabilities.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Agent-Native Research Artifact (Ara)协议，用四层机器可执行结构替代传统叙事性论文，显著提升AI代理对科学论文的理解、复现和扩展能力。
AI.motivation: 传统科学论文将分支探索过程压缩为线性叙事，导致两类结构成本：Storytelling Tax（丢弃失败实验和假设）和Engineering Tax（实现细节缺失）。这对人类可容忍，但对AI代理理解、复现和扩展工作构成严重障碍。
AI.method: 提出Ara协议，包含四层：科学逻辑层、可执行代码与完整规范层、保留失败记录的探索图层、每条主张基于原始输出的证据层。配套三种机制：Live Research Manager（开发时记录决策与死胡同）、Ara Compiler（将遗留PDF和仓库转换为Ara）、Ara-native审稿系统（自动化客观检查）。
AI.result: 在PaperBench上问答准确率从72.4%提升至93.7%；在RE-Bench上复现成功率从57.4%提升至64.4%。在开放式扩展任务中，保留的失败轨迹既加速了进展，也可能限制高水平代理跳出先前探索范围。
AI.conclusion: Ara协议通过结构化、机器可执行的工件替代线性叙事，显著提升了AI代理对科学文献的理解和复现能力，但保留的失败轨迹对高水平代理存在双刃剑效应。

title: A Functorial Formulation of Neighborhood Aggregating Deep Learning
summary: We provide a mathematical interpretation of convolutional (or message passing) neural networks by using presheaves and copresheaves of the set of continuous functions over a topological space. Based on this interpretation, we formulate a theoretical heuristic which elaborates a number of empirical limitations of these neural networks by using obstructions on such sets of continuous functions over a topological space to be sheaves or copresheaves.

AI.tldr: 本文使用拓扑空间上连续函数集的预层和共预层，对卷积（或消息传递）神经网络进行了数学解释，并基于此提出理论启发，通过连续函数集在拓扑空间上成为层或共层时的障碍，阐述了这些神经网络的一系列经验局限性。
AI.motivation: 作者希望为卷积/消息传递神经网络提供严格的数学基础（使用层论），并解释其已知的经验局限性。
AI.method: 使用拓扑空间上的预层（presheaves）和共预层（copresheaves）来形式化卷积/消息传递操作，并利用层论中的障碍（obstructions）概念分析网络失效的条件。
AI.result: 建立了CNN/GNN与层论之间的形式联系，并识别出当连续函数集无法形成层或共层时对应的网络局限性。
AI.conclusion: 层论提供了一个有力的理论框架来理解卷积神经网络的本质限制，并可能指导更具表达力的架构设计。

title: Diffusion-Guided Feature Selection via Nishimori Temperature: Noise-Based Spectral Embedding
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, extended version (with noise shift proof) of DSPA2026 article
summary: We propose Noise-Based Spectral Embedding (NBSE), a physics-informed framework for selecting informative features from high-dimensional data without greedy search. NBSE constructs a sparse similarity graph on the samples and identifies the Nishimori temperature $β_N$ the critical inverse temperature at which the Bethe Hessian becomes singular.
